synergy.note: Heavy Attacks inflict an Armor Break Debuff reducing the Opponent’s Armor Rating by 350 for 15 seconds.
Activating a Special Attack grants a non-stacking Vicious Buff increasing the potency of Damage Over Time Debuffs by 50% for 10 seconds.

signature.title: TOXIC HUSK
lines: Self inflicted Poison stack limit is increased to 12 and Abomination self inflicts 3.0 Poisons at the start of each fight.
Poison, Petrify, and Acid Burn effects last +0.0% longer.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Take 100.0% less damage from Poison effects and the recovery reduction from Poison is 50% less effective.

cards.title: CORROSIVE POISONS
lines: Contact with the Opponent has a 15.0% chance to inflict them with a Poison Debuff, dealing 85.0 Direct Damage over 25 seconds and reducing health recovery by 30%.
If the Opponent reaches 10 Poison Debuffs they are converted into an Acid Burn Passive dealing 550.0 Direct Damage over 5 seconds.

While Acid Burn is active, the Opponent is inflicted with an indefinite non-stacking Poison Debuff dealing 0 damage and reducing health recovery by 30%. While this is active, no additional personal Poison effects can be inflicted onto the Opponent.
When striking an Opponent suffering from Acid Burn, Attacks are Unblockable and deal a burst of 60.0 Physical Damage.
When triggering Acid Burn, Abomination inflicts a Petrify Debuff of 60.0% Potency for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SELF INFLICTED POISONS
lines: Every 1000.0th Basic Attack landed by either champion inflicts Abomination with an indefinite Poison Debuff dealing 0 damage.
Each Poison on Abomination grants +8.0 Physical Resistance, and the first -1 each reduce the potency of the Opponent's Inequity Mastery by 12.0%.
While Abomination is Poisoned, each time he Blocks an attack the Opponent is inflicted with a Weakness Debuff, reducing Attack Rating by 30.0% for 2 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On Activation, inflict a non-stacking Petrify Debuff of 20.0% Potency for 25 seconds.
Abomination inflicts himself with +400.0 Poisons. This is increased to +6 if the Toxic Aura is active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Activate Toxic Aura for 10 seconds. While active, consume 1 Poison Debuff on Abomination every 2.0 second(s) to keep the Aura paused. Consumption is paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
During Toxic Aura standing near the Opponent inflicts 1 Poison Debuff every second, dealing 85.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds and reducing health recovery by 30%.
Each stack of Toxic Aura beyond the first increases the speed that it inflicts Poison by -25.0%. The Toxic Aura can stack up to 4.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflicts Acid Burn, dealing 550.0 Direct Damage over 5 seconds. Each stack in the Toxic Aura inflicts 1 additional Acid Burn effect.

Until the next time the Toxic Aura expires it becomes enhanced, increasing the time it takes to consume a Poison by 50.0 second(s). This enhancement cannot stack but can be activated even while the Toxic Aura isn't yet active.

synergy.note: The second Medium Attack inflicts an Armor Break Debuff, reducing Armor by 500 for 9 seconds. Max stacks: 5
Gain Immunity to all Poison effects, and Omni-Morph Forms last 3 seconds longer.

signature.title: BREAKER OF WILLS
lines: Absorbing Man’s Omni-Morph Forms last 9.7% longer.

When Absorbing Man consumes Morph Charges, he gains a non-stacking Regeneration Passive, healing 9.9% of his missing Health over 12 seconds. As a Defender, this effect also triggers whenever Absorbing Man enters or refreshes any Form.
Personal Regeneration effects pause for 3 seconds when Absorbing Man is struck with True Damage and are removed when a form is deactivated early.

cards.title: MOLECULAR DUPLICATION
lines: A fluid molecular structure grants Absorbing Man 20.0% Crit Resistance and Immunity to Armor Break and Armor Shattered Debuffs, but reduces his Critical Penetration by 20.0% flat.
Absorbing Man is no stranger to brawling with beings of otherworldly resilience. He reduces the duration of his Opponent’s Indestructible, Immortality, Unstoppable, and Unblockable Buffs by -90.0%.

cards.title: OMNI-MORPH FORMS
lines: Absorbing Man’s Special Attacks transform him into powerful altered Forms. He can only be in one Form at a time, and Form changes cannot fail due to Ability Accuracy Modification.
Absorbing Man starts each fight in his Black Uru Form by default, but can use the Pre-Fight Menu to change this default, which persists until changed again.
Being struck by a Heavy Attack while recovering from a Special Attack deactivates the current Form, which cannot be deactivated again in this way for 20 seconds.
Whenever a Buff ends on the Opponent or Absorbing Man is Immune to a Debuff, the current Form pauses for 3 seconds.
Interrupting an Opponent's Basic Attack with a Light Attack pauses the current Form for 6 seconds and inflicts a 15.0 potency Vulnerability Passive for 15.0 seconds. Max Stacks: 5.

cards.title: REFINED FORMS
lines: If Absorbing Man would enter a Form that is already active, he instead Refines the Form, refreshing its duration and granting additional benefits.
Personal bursts of damage benefit from 300.0% of Absorbing Man's Critical Damage Multiplier when he lands a Critical Hit and cannot have their Ability Accuracy modified.
Special Attacks are Passively Unblockable.
Blocking a Hit reduces the Opponent’s Ability Power Rate by -72.0% until Absorbing Man stops blocking. The Power denied is transferred to Absorbing Man.

cards.title: MORPH CHARGES
lines: When Absorbing Man refreshes or changes Forms, he gains Morph Charges equal to the remaining percentage of his previous Form’s base duration. Max 60000.0.
Whenever Absorbing Man is Immune to an Armor Break or Armor Shattered Debuff, he gains 9000.0 Morph Charges.

Performing a Medium, Light, Medium Combo with at least 150.0 Morph Charges, or activating a Special Attack at max charges consumes available Charges to Refine the current Form and inflict one 30 second Vulnerability Passive with 50.0 potency for every 150.0 Charges consumed.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Activating a Special Attack after the first hit lands applies this bonus Critical Rating to the entire Special and grants 3000.0 Morph Charges.
This attack instead gains 90.0 Critical Rating if the Opponent is not Stunned as the first hit lands.
This attack gains 45.0 Critical Rating if the Opponent is Stunned as the first hit lands.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, enter Black Uru Form for 0 seconds, granting the following benefits:
Gain Immunity to all Bleed and Shock effects and +80.0 Physical Resistance.
All attacks deal a burst of 20.0 Physical Damage.
Refined: Absorbing Man can perform Critical Hits and trigger personal bursts of damage through the Opponent’s Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, enter Magma Form for 0 seconds, granting the following benefits:
Gain Immunity to all Incinerate, Coldsnap, and Frostbite effects and +80.0 Energy Resistance.
All attacks deal Energy Damage instead of Physical, as well as a burst of 20.0 Energy Damage.
Refined: Contact with the Opponent inflicts an Incinerate Passive, dealing 35.0 Energy Damage over 1 second.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain an indefinite Cruelty Passive, increasing Critical Damage Rating by 25.0. If a Refined Form is already active, gain a second Cruelty Passive. Max Stacks: -1.
Activate the most recent Form in its Refined state. Pause it for 15 seconds. While this Pause is active, Absorbing Man gains 80.0 Critical Rating.

synergy.note: When the champion gains 4+ Buffs, gain an Aptitude Buff, increasing the potency of Precision, Fury and Armor Up Buffs by 25% for 15 seconds. Cooldown: 15 seconds.

signature.title: COSMIC REBIRTH
lines: When entering the Stasis Pod, gain a Regeneration Buff healing 2.0% of missing Health over 2 seconds unless suffering from a Soul Barb effect.
When the Opponent strikes into the Pod, they have a 10.0% chance to be inflicted with a Stun Debuff for 2 seconds unless suffering from a Soul Barb effect.

cards.title: POWER METER
lines: Adam passively gains 2.5% of a Bar of Power each second, but his Combat Power Rate is reduced by -25.0%.
When Adam has his Power Stolen, he stops gaining Power overtime for 12 seconds.
When Adam has his power Drained or Burned, he gains a non-stacking 50.0% Energize Passive for 12 seconds.
Against non-Mystic Opponents, Adam’s Ability Power Rate cannot be reduced.

cards.title: SOVEREIGNTY COUNTER
lines: Landing Adam’s Light Attack 2 into Block or activating a Special Attack 1 or 2 starts the Sovereignty Counter for 2 seconds. When the Opponent receives a hit from any source, the Counter is refreshed and increased by 1.
Breaking the Opponent's Block with the first hit of the Sovereignty Counter increases it by 10 instead of 1 on this hit.
As the Sovereignty Counter increases, Adam gains non-stacking Buffs lasting 2 seconds, refreshed when the Opponent receives a hit from any source.
First Hit: Gain an Unblockable Buff.
10 Hits: Gain a True Damage Buff, allowing attacks to bypass Armor and Resistances.
20 Hits: Gain a Precision Buff, increasing Critical Rating by 90.0.
30 Hits: Gain a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 225.0.

40 Hits: End the Sovereignty Counter and all Buffs granted by it and gain a stackable Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by 150.0 for 60 seconds, paused while the Sovereignty Counter is active. Max stacks: 2.0.
The Sovereignty Counter and all above non-stacking Buffs are refreshed and paused while Adam is inside the Stasis Pod and during Adam and his Opponent’s Special Attack 1 and 2.
When the Sovereignty Counter expires, it goes on cooldown for 10 seconds and grants a Sovereignty Buff that lasts for 3000.0 seconds. This Buff is paused while the Sovereignty Counter is active.
Additionally, activating the Parry Mastery’s Stun Effect will end the Sovereignty Counter and all above non-stacking Buffs.
As a Defender, when Adam or his Opponent are struck by or Block attacks 2000.0 times, Adam gains a Sovereignty Buff for 15 seconds.

cards.title: SOVEREIGNTY BUFF
lines: This Buff cannot have its Ability Accuracy reduced or be Nullified, Staggered, or Fatesealed by Champions.
New personal Buffs become Sovereign. Sovereign Buffs cannot have their Ability Accuracy reduced.
Gain Immunity to Nullify, Stagger, and Fateseal caused by Champions.
Stun Debuffs inflicted by the Opponent’s Parry Mastery suffer -100.0% Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: STASIS POD
lines: Once per fight as a Defender, if Adam started the fight with more than 25% of his Max Health, when he reaches 25.0%, after a 2.0 second delay he enters his Stasis Pod for 2 seconds.
Once per fight as an Attacker, double tapping Block causes Adam to enter his Stasis Pod for 2 seconds.

cards.title: STASIS POD
lines: Adam is locked into place and cannot use any attacks or be Interrupted.
All incoming damage is reduced by 75.0%.
Instantly Regenerate 74.0% of all incoming damage unless suffering from a Soul Barb effect.
Lower the Ability Accuracy of Damaging Debuffs (excluding Soul Barb) and Heal Block effects by -100.0%.
When entering the Stasis Pod, gain an Energy Protection Buff granting Immunity to Shock, Incinerate, Coldsnap, and Frostbite for 60 seconds.
When emerging from the Stasis Pod, gain invulnerability for 0.25 seconds.
Adam immediately emerges from the Pod if the Opponent activates a Special Attack 3, not granting its benefits against the attack.

cards.title: MASTER OF SOULS
lines: While the Sovereignty Counter is active, inflict a 20.0% Taunt Debuff.
When the Sovereignty Counter’s cooldown is complete, inflict a -20.0% Intimidate Debuff for 4 seconds, removed when Adam strikes the Opponent’s Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: While Adam has a personal Precision Buff, the final hit inflicts a Stun Debuff for 1.25 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: After this attack, enter the Stasis Pod for 2 seconds. This ability can trigger multiple times in the fight. The Energy Protection Buff gained from this Stasis Pod only lasts 200.0 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a non-stacking Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 150.0 for 60 seconds. Max stacks: 1.0.

signature.title: SUPER CHARGED
lines: If at least 3 unique Dimensions are active, America Chavez becomes Supercharged, granting the following bonuses:
+11.4% Dimensional Energy Infusion potency.
Launching a Special 2 during a Heavy Attack provides +1 stack of whichever Dimension was activated.

cards.title: PARALLEL DIMENSIONS:
lines: Each hit of a Heavy Attack switches the dormant Dimension in the order they appear below.
When the Heavy Attack ends, or if launching a Special Attack during a Heavy Attack, activate the Dimension for 30 seconds.
Utopian Parallel: Reduce Opponents Fury, Armor Up, Precision, Pierce and Cruelty Buff Potency by -70.0%.
Dark Dimension: Reflect 40.0% of hit damage taken as Energy Damage. Damage is capped at 15.0.
Negative Zone: Reduce Opponents Ability Power Rate by -60.0%
Matching Dimensions suffer --15.0% Duration for each stack.
Whenever affected by a Wither Debuff, remove the most recently activated Parallel Dimension.
While Defending a Quest Node, if activating a Dimension that already has 2 active stacks, she activates 1 random unopened Dimension.

cards.title: DIMENSIONAL ENERGY INFUSION
lines: For each unique Parallel Dimension on America Chavez and each Buff on the Opponent, gain the following benefits.
+40.0 Attack Rating.
+18.0 Energy Resistance.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Charge a Heavy Attack after landing any non combo ending hit of a Basic Attack combo to inflict a Passive Stun for 0.75 seconds. Heavy Attacks launched this way generate -25.0% less Power on Hit.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each unique Parallel Dimension creates a Passive Power Gain effect generating 40.0% of a bar of Power over 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: For the final 3 hits of this Special Attack, America Chavez opens a Portal to an additional Big Bang Dimension. Dealing a burst of Energy Damage equal to 50.0% hit damage dealt.
These hits gain a bonus effect based on the last Dimension activated:
Utopian Parallel: Deal 80.0 additional damage on Hit.
Dark Dimension: Regenerate 12.0% of hit damage dealt.
Negative Zone: Unblockable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Activate 1 of each Parallel Dimension.

signature.title: BATTLE FOCUS
lines: For each Buff on Angela, her opponent suffers the following:
-10.0% Nullify & Auto-Block Ability Accuracy.
-10.0% Damaging Debuff Duration.

cards.title: BLOCKING
lines: Advanced training allows Angela to Parry Non-Contact attacks.

cards.title: WHEN DAMAGED
lines: For Each 10% Max Health Taken in damage, gain an indefinite Resilience Charge.
When below Max Health, if Angela does not have a Regeneration Buff, she converts 1 Resilience Charge into a Regeneration Buff, healing 5.0 Health over 10 seconds.

cards.title: INDEFINITE HUNTRESS BUFF
lines: Angela gains an indefinite Buff based on her current Power Level.
Below 1 Bar: Armor up, granting +30.0 Armor Rating.
Between 1 and 2 Bars: Fury, granting +85.0 Attack Rating.
Between 2 and 3 Bars: Precision, granting +50.0 Critical Rating.
3 Bars: Aptitude, increasing the Potency of all Fury, Armor Up and Precision Buffs by 60.0%.

cards.title: TEMPORARY HUNTRESS BUFFS
lines: 100.0% chance to duplicate the current, indefinite Huntress Buff. This duplicated Buff lasts 15 seconds. A maximum of 1 of each type of Huntress Buff may be duplicated at a time.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Angela’s terrifying aura inflicts 1 Armor Break Debuff on the opponent for each Buff on Angela, removing an Armor Up Buff and reducing Armor Rating by +-10.0 for 7 seconds.

synergy.note: Each hit of Special 1 has a 100% chance to Inflict the Opponent with a Fragility Debuff, reducing Block Proficiency by 50% and Increasing Ant-Mans Critical Damage Rating by 235.
When causing a hit to Glance, gains Fury Passive increasing Attack by 25% for 12 seconds. Max: 3.
Special Attack 1 inflicts the Opponent with 2 Stagger Debuffs for 12 second(s).

signature.title: CLOSE-UP MAGIC
lines: Whenever Ant-Man Glances an attack, he has a 50.0% chance to inflict a Fatigue Debuff lowering the opponent’s Crit Rating by -5.0 for 15 second(s).
Whenever Ant-Man gains a Pym Particle, he pauses the duration of any personal Fatigue, Poison, or Power Sting Debuffs on the opponent for 2 second(s).

cards.title: PYM PARTICLE
lines: Ant-Man is immune to Buffs. Whenever he would, he instead generates 100.0 Pym Particle.

Whenever Ant-Man's basic attacks intercept the opponent, or strikes them when recovering from a Heavy, he consumes 1 Pym Particle to refresh any personal Fatigue, Poison, and Power Sting Debuffs on the opponent.

cards.title: POWER STING
lines: If Ant-Man has 3 or more Pym Particles, landing a Heavy Attack or being knocked down by a Special Attack consumes 3 Pym Particles to inflict 1 Power Sting Debuff on the opponent lasting 9 second(s). An opponent with Power Sting takes 100.0 Direct Damage if they activate a Special Attack.
Whenever Ant-Man’s personal Power Stings detonate, they also deal a burst of 15.0 Physical Damage for each Debuff on the opponent including the Power Sting.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Whenever Ant-Man activates a Special Attack the opponent is inflicted with a non-stacking 100% Unsteady Debuff lasting 15 seconds. Unsteady cannot be activated if the opponent is already under the effect of an Unsteady Debuff.
When Unsteady expires this ability goes on a 15 second cooldown before it can be activated again.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation gain 300.0 Pym Particles. Then, if Ant-Man has 9 Pym Particles, this Special Attack is Unblockable.
Each hit inflicts a Fatigue Debuff lowering the opponent’s Crit Rating by -5.0 for 15 second(s). Max Stacks 12.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each Pym Particle Grants Ant-Man +25.0 Attack Rating for the duration of this Attack. Consume all Pym Particles at the end of the Special Attack.

On the second hit, consume all Fatigue Debuffs on the opponent. For each Fatigue consumed, the opponent is inflicted with a Poison Debuff that deals 75.0 damage over 15 second(s) and reduces their health recovery by 30%. Max Stacks 12.

synergy.note: At the start of each fight, inflict a 60% Infuriate Passive for 5 seconds.

signature.title: SWARM ACCELERATOR
lines: Incoming Bleed and Incinerate effects suffer -10.0% duration.

When a Bleed or Incinerate effect (including instant effects) expires naturally on Ant-Man, gain a non-stacking Self-Repair Buff healing 1.0% of missing Health over 6 seconds. Self-Repair Buffs are lost when Ant-Man is stunned.

When Ant-Man would lose more than 10% of his Max Health from a single source other than a Special Attack 3, reduce the damage to 10% of his Max Health and gain a Self-Repair Buff healing 1.0% of Max Health over 12 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: 10.0% chance for all incoming attacks that land or strike into Block to Glance.
Personal Glancing Abilities do not work on Opponents with an active Pierce effect.
When the Opponent glances Ant-Man, he lowers Glancing's Attack Rating reduction by a flat 20.0% and Offensive Ability Accuracy reduction by a flat 60.0%.

cards.title: POWER DETONATION
lines: At the start of each fight inflict an Encroaching Power Detonation Passive for 14 seconds which cannot be affected by Ability Accuracy. Upon expiry, drain 40.0% of their current Power and inflict a Power Detonation Passive for 14.0 seconds. Whenever this effect expires for any reason, reinflict the Encroaching Power Detonation.
The Encroaching Power Detonation is indefinitely paused and is unpaused while Ant-Man is landing hits. As a Defender, it is also unpaused while Ant-Man is being attacked.
While the Opponent is suffering from a Power Detonation Passive, all hits inflict a 15.0% potency instant Disintegration, dealing 18.0 Direct Damage.
When the Power Detonation expires naturally, inflict a 15.0% potency Disintegration Debuff, dealing 125.0 Direct Damage over 24 seconds and pausing during Ant-Man’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: NANO-ARMOR UP
lines: Start each fight with 1 Nano-Armor Up Buff, increasing Armor Rating by 5.0 and increasing the chance for incoming attacks to Glance by 6.0%. Nano-Armor Up effects count as Armor Up effects.

Nano-Armor Up effects are indefinite up to 5.0 while Attacking. Any additional Nano-Armor Ups last for 4 seconds and expire one at a time, up to a total of 1000.0 Nano-Armor Up effects. Additionally, all Nano-Armor Up effects are paused during either Champion’s Special Attacks.
Intercepting the Opponent grants 200.0 Nano-Armor Up Buffs.
Hitting the Opponent during their Heavy Attack grants 100.0 Nano-Armor Up Buff.
Each time a hit Glances Ant-Man, gain 100.0 Nano-Armor Up Buff.
Attacks that Intercept Ant-Man cannot Glance and remove 100.0 Nano-Armor Up Buff.

Whenever a Nano-Armor Up Buff fails to trigger or is removed for any reason except by the Opponent's Intercept, replace it with a Passive of the same potency. Nano-Armor Up Passives count as Armor Up Buffs for all of Ant-Man’s personal abilities and are not removed by Armor Break effects.

cards.title: SURGING SWARM
lines: While Ant-Man has more than 500.0 Armor Up Buffs his Surging Swarm activates, granting the following effects:
+75.0 Attack Rating.
The Encroaching Power Detonation expires 200.0% faster.
The Opponent is more aggressive while Surging Swarm is active.
When the Opponent’s Combo Ender Glances, inflict a Stun Debuff for 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: ON FOURTH LIGHT ATTACK
lines: If you have a Special Attack 2 or 3 available, the highest level Special Attack is disabled for 0.5 seconds.
This attack is non-contact.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: When the second hit lands or strikes into Block, inflict a 15.0% potency Disintegration Debuff, dealing 125.0 Direct Damage over 24 seconds and pausing during Ant-Man’s Special Attacks. This ability scales with Base Attack only. Max stacks: 2.
The final hit does not grant Power and drains 15.0% of a Bar of Power for each Disintegration Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: While the Power Detonation Passive is active, each hit inflicts a -10.0% potency instant Disintegration, dealing 167.0 Direct Damage. This ability gains +100% potency for each Disintegration Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 1000.0 Nano-Armor Up Buffs.
Inflict a non-stacking 15.0% potency Disintegration Debuff, dealing 125.0 Direct Damage over 60 seconds.

signature.title: CONTROLLED SYMBIOSIS
lines: While the Opponent is suffering from the Klyntar Debuff, if Anti-Venom is struck by or Blocks a non-Critical Hit, he gains a Regeneration Passive that recovers 20.0% of the hit damage taken over 20 seconds. These Regenerations are removed if the Klyntar Debuff is removed by Purify or Cleanse.
Each time Anti-Venom inflicts a personal Debuff, he inflicts an indefinite 250.0% Exacerbate Passive. Max stacks: -1.
Each personal Exacerbate Passive increases the potency of Anti-Venom’s personal Debuffs by an additional 2.5%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Immunity to Incinerate and Poison.
During the Opponent’s Special Attacks Anti-Venom gains 40.0% Defensive Combat Rate per Debuff on the Opponent.
Personal Passives are paused during Special Attacks and for 5 seconds on Striker activation.

cards.title: GENETIC MEMORY
lines: When the fight starts Anti-Venom inflicts an indefinite Klyntar Debuff. If this Debuff is removed by any means it comes back after 15 second(s).

If the Opponent is suffering from the Klyntar Debuff, every 1000.0 times either Champion lands a hit, Anti-Venom inflicts the selected Genetic Memory Debuff from the list below. Max Genetic Memory Debuffs: 4.0.
Spectre Debuff: Reduces the Opponent’s Regeneration Rate by -16.7%
Disorient: Reduces Defensive Ability Accuracy and Block Proficiency by 12.5%.
Decelerate: Lowers Evade and Unstoppable Ability Accuracy by --33.0% flat.
Second Medium Attack changes the selected Genetic Memory Debuff to the next Debuff in the list. Defenders have a 50.0% chance to change the selection when inflicting a Genetic Memory Debuff.

cards.title: KLYNTAR DEBUFF
lines: Klyntar Debuff reduces Physical Resistance by -20.0 and gains additional properties based on Anti-Venom’s Opponent.
#Spider-Verse Heroes: Reduce the Ability Accuracy of evade effects by -100.0%.
Mystic Champions: Reduce the Ability Accuracy of Unblockable effects by --65.0% flat. While -1 or more of Anti-Venom's personal Debuffs are active, this reduction becomes -100%.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflict a Stagger Debuff for 10 second(s). Max stacks: 2.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If not already active, gain an Accelerated Mutation Passive, causing Anti-Venom to inflict an additional Genetic Memory Debuff for 15 second(s). Triggering Accelerated Mutation also refreshes the Evolved Mutation Passive.
If Accelerated Mutation is active, all hits deal a burst of 40.0 Physical damage.
First hit inflicts a Petrify Debuff of 40.0% Potency for 20 seconds

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a +75.0 Fury Passive for 25 seconds for each Genetic Memory Debuff on the Opponent, then consume all but the two most recent Genetic Memory Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Rupture Debuff, dealing 70.0 Physical Damage over 15 second(s).

Gain a non-stacking Evolved Mutation Passive, increasing the max number of Genetic Memory Debuffs by 400.0 and increasing personal Fury potency and duration by 25% for 25 second(s). The max stack for an individual Debuff is 400.0.

signature.title: SURVIVAL OF THE FITTEST
lines: When Apocalypse doesn’t participate in a fight he enters his Rejuvenation Chamber to slumber. At the start of his next fight, he Regenerates 3.0 health for each fight his teammates won while he slumbered. This can stack up to 2 times.

cards.title: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT
lines: Start each quest with 1.0 Persistent Genetic Code. This becomes 2.0 if Defending, and 3 if Defending a final boss node.
Knocking out a non-#Robot Opponent grants 1 Genetic Code.
Gain 2 Genetic Code at the start of the fight when fighting a Mutant.
At the start of the fight gain 1 indefinite Passive Prowess for each Genetic Code, each increasing Special Attack Damage by 40.0%.
At 3+ Genetic Code, become Stun Immune while striking.
At 4+ Genetic Code, striking the Opponent’s block with Light Attack inflicts a Stun Debuff for 0.8 seconds. Cooldown 12 seconds. This has no effect against Well-Timed Blocks.

cards.title: TOTAL MOLECULAR CONTROL
lines: Develop immunity to Bleed, Incinerate and Disorient effects over 8 seconds while suffering from them. Once developed, these immunities persist for the entire quest.
Each time the Opponent Evades, gain +10.0% chance to bypass Evade. This is not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction and the chance to bypass Evade persists throughout the quest.
Opponents suffer -100.0% Purify Ability Accuracy reduction.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Both hits inflict Bleed dealing 35.0 Direct Damage over 7 seconds.
Refresh personal Weakness, Poison, Concussion and Degeneration effects on the Opponent.
Light Attack - Inflict a non-stacking Weakness reducing Attack Rating by 25.0% for 25 seconds.
Medium Attack - Inflict a non-stacking Poison dealing 200.0 Direct Damage and reduce health recovery by 30% over 25 seconds.
Light Attack - Inflict a non-stacking Concussion reducing Ability Accuracy by -35.0% for 25 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: If the Opponent is suffering from a Damage Over Time effect, Special Attack Debuffs trigger on activation and last 30.0% longer.
Each hit deals a burst of 27.0 Physical Damage for each personal Weakness, Poison, Concussion or Degeneration on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Inflict a Debuff determined by the last Light or Medium Attack thrown. If fighting a Mutant, or if Apocalypse has 4.0 Genetic Code, trigger both.
Light Attack - Inflict a non-stacking Weakness reducing Attack Rating by 25.0% for 25 seconds.
Medium Attack - Inflict a non-stacking Poison dealing 200.0 Direct Damage and reduce health recovery by 30% over 25 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Inflict a Debuff determined by the last Light or Medium Attack thrown. If fighting a Mutant, or if Apocalypse has 4.0 Genetic Code, trigger both.
Light Attack - Inflict a non-stacking Concussion reducing Ability Accuracy by -35.0% for 25 seconds.
Medium Attack - Inflict a non-stacking Degeneration dealing 350.0 Direct Damage over 25 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: All personal Weakness, Poison, Concussion and Degeneration effects on the Opponent are retriggered at +100.0% Potency and paused indefinitely. This Potency increase does not stack multiple times.
If no personal Weakness, Poison, Concussion or Degeneration effects are active, inflict 2 at random. These will not gain additional potency and will not be paused.

cards.title: HORSEMAN OF APOCALYPSE
lines: Once Per Quest If Apocalypse has 4.0 Genetic Code he can spend them in the Pre-Fight screen to place a Cross-Fight on the next fight. The next Mutant teammate excluding Apocalypse to enter this fight becomes a Horseman of Apocalypse for the rest of the quest.
Horsemen gain the following abilities:
+100.0% Bleed Resistance.
An indefinite Prowess increasing Special Attack Damage by 50.0%.
+30.0% Offensive Ability Accuracy.
Go Unblockable for 2 seconds when the Opponent Purifies a Debuff.
Once per fight go Unstoppable for 3 seconds when struck.

synergy.note: Successful Auto-Blocks grant a +80% Fury Buff for 3 seconds, paused during Arcade’s Special Attacks.

signature.title: WELCOME TO MURDERWORLD!
lines: Just before Arcade Auto-Blocks an attack, gain a non-stacking Steadfast Buff for 2 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. This will not trigger if the attack is a Heavy Attack, or if the Opponent has an Undermine effect.
When the Opponent enters a Poisonous Cloud, inflict a 5.0% Torment Debuff for 8 seconds. This starts paused, and is unpaused when the Opponent exits the Poisonous Cloud. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: PERSISTENT PRIZE TICKETS
lines: Arcade starts each Quest with 3 Persistent Prize Tickets. When winning a fight as an Attacker, convert 50% of all Arcade Tokens into Persistent Prize Tickets (rounded down). If a fight is won with fewer than 2 Arcade Tokens, gain 1 Persistent Prize Ticket anyways.

Persistent Prize Tickets can be spent in the Pre-Fight Screen to activate a Fabulous Prize. Fabulous Prizes can only be used by Arcade, and last until his Opponent is defeated. These are always active as a Defender.

cards.title: PRE-FIGHT ABILITY
lines: Power-Up: Personal effects and the Stun from the Parry Mastery gain +100.0% Ability Accuracy. If Arcade is not fighting a Cosmic Champion, he also gains Incinerate Immunity. Costs 1 Persistent Prize Ticket.

Cheat Code: The Opponent’s True Strike, True Accuracy, and True Sense effects suffer -100.0% Ability Accuracy. If Arcade is not fighting a Cosmic Champion, he also gains Poison Immunity. Costs 2 Persistent Prize Tickets.
Game Wizard: The duration of personal Damaging Debuffs cannot be reduced. If Arcade is not fighting a Cosmic Champion, he also gains Shock Immunity. Costs 3 Persistent Prize Tickets.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Arcade does not benefit from the Collar Tech Mastery. Instead, he gains +3.0 Attack Rating for each rank invested and reduces the Opponent’s Defensive Combat Power Rate by 7% for each unique personal Damaging Debuff on them.
As an Attacker, Arcade’s fourth Light Attack disables his Special Attack 3 for 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: ARCADE TOKENS
lines: Whenever the Opponent would be Poisoned, Arcade gains 100.0 Arcade Token. As a Defender, he gains 100.0 additional Arcade Token if a Poison is not prevented by Immunity, and gains 3 on the final hit of Special Attack 2 on hit, Block or Dodge.
Each Arcade Token increases Armor Rating and the potency of personal Damaging Debuffs by 10%. When knocked down, lose 200.0 Arcade Tokens.

While Arcade has 10 Arcade Tokens, or 3 or more as a Defender, he gains an indefinite Auto-Block Passive granting a 100.0% chance to Auto-Block incoming attacks. Arcade cannot Auto-Block the Opponent’s Heavy Attacks.
With 2 or more Arcade Tokens, Arcade also has a 100.0% chance to Auto-Block attacks while charging or releasing his own Heavy Attack.
When Auto-Blocking an attack, inflict a Shock Debuff dealing 120.0 Energy Damage over 3 seconds, trigger the Parry Mastery if it is active, and consume 8 Arcade Tokens, or 3 as a Defender.

cards.title: TRAP
lines: After the second hit of his Heavy Attack, Arcade deploys a Poisonous Cloud. Poisonous Clouds last for 10 seconds, and active Poisonous Clouds are removed when deploying a new one.

When the Opponent enters a Poisonous Cloud, gain 1 Arcade Token. Each second the Opponent is inside the Poisonous Cloud, they are inflicted with a Poison Debuff dealing 70.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.

cards.title: TRAP
lines: At the start of each fight, a Booby Trap is placed in the Defender’s corner. The Booby Trap will not be placed if the Opponent is also Arcade.
While the Opponent is on top of the Booby Trap, they are 60.0% more likely to launch a Special Attack.

If the Opponent is not performing a Special Attack and they are on top of the Booby Trap, charging or releasing Arcade’s Heavy Attack causes it to explode and Passively Stuns the Opponent for 3 seconds.
While the Opponent is inside of a Poisonous Cloud and they are Stunned by this explosion, the existing Poisonous Cloud will be refreshed instead of deploying a new one.
After exploding, the Booby Trap goes on standby for 20 seconds, or 10 seconds as a Defender. As an Attacker, this expires 15.0% faster per unique personal Damaging Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After the second hit of this attack, deploy a Poisonous Cloud at the Opponent’s location.
Electricity hits inflict Shock Debuffs each dealing 40.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Flamethrower hits inflict Incinerate Debuffs each dealing 90.0 Energy Damage over 20 seconds.
Buzz Saw hits inflict Bleed Debuffs each dealing 90.0 Direct Damage over 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Randomly inflict an indefinite Bleed, Rupture, or Shock Debuff that deals 8.0 damage per second.

signature.title: INCREASED TOXICITY
lines: The Neurotoxin coating Archangel's wings and claws increases in toxicity, making each Neurotoxin Passive reduce the Opponent's Ability Accuracy by 25.0% and preventing them from gaining Health.

cards.title: NEUROTOXIN
lines: Each time Archangel triggers a Bleed effect on an opponent with an active Poison effect that he caused, they are combined, converting into a Neurotoxin charge, lasting 15 seconds.
Neurotoxins are a Passive effect, and therefore do not count as either a Debuff, or a Poison.
Neurotoxins do 300.0 damage over their duration.
On expiry Neurotoxins have a 100.0% Chance to Stun their target for 1.5 seconds. This effect will not interrupt a Special Attack.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Only the first Bleed effect triggered by this attack will consume a Poison effect, though all Bleeds triggered by it will convert to Neurotoxins as long as a Poison was consumed during the attack.

cards.title: BLOCKING
lines: 0.0% chance on contact to Poison the target, reducing their Health recovery by 30% and dealing 125.0 Direct Damage over 15 seconds.

synergy.note: Start each fight with an indefinite +500 Armor Up Buff.
The final hit of Special Attack 1 inflicts a Root Debuff for 3 seconds.

signature.title: GRASP OF HYDRA
lines: Upgrades to his intricate neural network grant Zola the #Psychic Shielding tag while in a fight.
Striking a Sleeping Opponent grants Zola an Unblockable Passive for 2.868256343 seconds.
When Zola’s Special Attacks remove his Disintegration Debuffs, each Debuff deals a final burst of 5.0 Direct Damage.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Advanced robotics provides Immunity to Bleed and Poison, and Zola’s Ability Accuracy and Combat Power Rate can only be modified by his own effects.
The Critical Penetration of the Opponent’s Basic Attacks is reduced by -80% flat, and Zola cannot lose more than 10.0% of his Max Health from a single damage source, other than a Special Attack 3.
Zola’s first Medium and first Light Attacks are kinetic pulses that do not make contact.

cards.title: SYSTEMS OF CONTROL
lines: Zola can activate a Pre-Fight Ability to select either a Special 1 Lock or a Special 2 Lock. When Zola finishes a Special Attack, he inflicts the selected effect as a Passive for 20 seconds.
If neither Pre-Fight is selected, during the Opponent’s Special Attacks they are inflicted with a 30.0% Cowardice Debuff. As a Defender, this becomes a 90% Cowardice Passive.

cards.title: ESP BOX
lines: When Zola is struck by anything other than a Heavy Attack, he gains an indefinite ESP Charge. When Zola Blocks any hit, he gains 3 Charges. Max stacks: 30.

20+ Charges: Before being hit by a Basic Attack, Zola has a 10% chance to consume all ESP Charges and inflict a Sleep Passive for 3 seconds. For each Charge over 20, the chance is increased by +5% flat. During a Well-Timed Block, the chance is increased to 100%.
If Zola is knocked down by a Heavy Attack, he loses 10 ESP Charges.

cards.title: DISINTEGRATION GAUNTLETS
lines: The first hit of Zola’s Heavy Attack inflicts a 0.5% Disintegration Debuff dealing 3.0 Direct Damage over 0.5 seconds. If the Opponent was not Stunned, inflict 5 additional Debuffs.
While the Opponent is suffering from any of these Disintegration Debuffs, all of Zola’s hits inflict another Disintegration Debuff.
These Disintegration Debuffs are paused while Zola is charging or performing a Heavy or Special Attack, and the final hit of Zola’s Special Attacks removes them.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a 10.0% Energize Passive for 60 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
The first hit grants a +30.0 Fury Buff for 4 seconds, paused until the start of Zola’s next Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, inflict a 40.0% Disintegration Passive dealing 50.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.
Each buzzsaw hit consumes 1 of Zola’s personal Energizes to inflict a 10.0% Disintegration Passive dealing 120.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict an Armor Break Debuff, reducing Armor Rating by -30.0 for 20 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Gain a Self-Repair Passive healing 100% of Zola’s missing Health over 20 seconds. This Self-Repair is lost if Zola is Stunned.
For each time this Special Attack has been used previously in the Quest, these effects’ base durations are tripled. Zola’s anti-exponential algorithms won’t let this increase more than 3 times.

signature.title: TERROR OF THE DEEP
lines: Attuma has a 91.9% chance to start the fight with a personal Concussion Debuff. It is paused until he gains a personal Concussion from another ability.
Incoming Bleed Debuffs suffer 49.6% reduced potency.
Attuma’s rough skin can now also deal damage any time he strikes his Opponent. In addition, its damage is increased by 5.0% for each Bleed effect on either Champion.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Attuma’s plans can make the best out of the worst situation, or the worst out of the best. All Ability Accuracy modification effects on him have their potencies reversed.

While one of Attuma’s personal abilities with a listed chance has over a 100% chance to trigger, the ability has a chance to trigger additional times. Each time, the chance is equal to the former chance -100%. This repeats until the ability fails due to chance.
Attuma’s rough Talokanil skin abrades his Opponents with a 25.0% chance to deal 22.0 Physical Damage when they strike him or his Block with a contact attack. Damage scales with Base Attack only.
Whenever an Opponent Evades Attuma while he has less than 1 Bar of Power, he has a 100.0% chance to instantly gain 15.0% of his Max Power and passively go Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.
Attuma’s Base Regeneration Rate is 35.0% instead of the usual 100%. It cannot be lowered further.

cards.title: HYDRATION
lines: The water in Attuma’s Special Attacks grants him stacks of Hydration, which are Passives that fall off one at a time over 8 seconds as Attuma dries out.
With every stack of Hydration, Attuma’s Attack Rating is increased by 6.0, and his Regeneration Rate is increased by 1.8%.
At -1 stacks of Hydration, Attuma becomes immune to Incinerate and gains a Precision Passive increasing his Critical Rating by by 50.0.
At -1 stacks of Hydration, Attuma becomes passively Unstoppable.
When he is inflicted with or immune to an Incinerate or Shock, Attuma loses 100.0 stack of Hydration, and Hydration falls off 30.0% faster while suffering from Coldsnap.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: 100.0% chance for Attuma to attempt to Purify 1 non-damaging Debuff, excluding Concussions, and replace it with a Concussion Debuff, reducing Attuma’s Ability Accuracy by 50.0% for 25 seconds. If there are no eligible Debuffs, this ability consumes the oldest stack of Hydration instead.
This ability also triggers when Attuma is inflicted with a Stun or Infuriate Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to gain 300.0 stacks of Hydration.
On activation, 120.0% chance to gain a True Accuracy Passive. These Passives last 10 seconds and fall off one at a time.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 200.0% chance to gain 200.0 stacks of Hydration.
Each hit has a 50.0% chance to grant Attuma a Cruelty Passive, increasing his Critical Damage Rating by 8.0 for 22 seconds. Can trigger though Block.
Triggering one of these Cruelties pauses Attuma’s existing personal Concussions for the Cruelty’s duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 110.0% chance to gain 500.0 stacks of Hydration.
100.0% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff on the Opponent, dealing 150.0 Direct Damage over 20 seconds.
When one of these Bleeds fails to apply due to an Immunity, instead inflict a Physical Vulnerability Debuff that reduces the Opponent’s Physical Resistance by -30.0 for 16 seconds.

synergy.note: Bullet hits during Zemo’s Medium Attacks and Special Attack 2 inflict Incinerate Debuffs, dealing 20% of Attack Rating as Energy Damage over 6 seconds. Incinerate removes Perfect Block chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50%.
Activating a Special Attack grants a non-stacking Vicious Buff increasing the potency of Damage Over Time Debuffs by 50% for 10 seconds.

signature.title: THE MASTER OF EVIL
lines: Zemo gains +9547.7 Critical Damage Rating and can perform Critical Hits through the Opponent's Block.
When fighting #Heroes, attacks that intercept the Opponent gain +9547.7 Critical Rating.

cards.title: BASIC ATTACKS
lines: For Zemo’s Medium Attacks, he wields a gun. These attacks do not make contact.
When the Opponent Purifies a Debuff or is Immune to an effect, Zemo gains a +200.0 Fury Buff until he lands a hit or is Blocked. Max stacks: 15.

cards.title: YOUR DEFEAT IS CERTAIN
lines: Zemo’s personal Bleeds are indefinite Debuffs that deal 1.6 Direct Damage per second.
All of Zemo’s personal effects can be inflicted through Block.

cards.title: GRAND MACHINATION
lines: Enter each fight with 500.0 indefinite Cleanse Passives. Zemo’s Cleanses can’t Purify Stun Debuffs.
When Zemo runs out of Cleanses, he inflicts a Root Passive on the Opponent for 5.0 seconds and gains a 50.0 Resistance Up Passive for 15 seconds.
While this Resistance Up is active, Zemo can’t gain Cleanses. When Zemo has no personal Resistance Up or Cleanses active, he gains 500.0 indefinite Cleanse Passives.

cards.title: RIGHT WHERE I WANT YOU
lines: When the Opponent becomes Rooted, they are inflicted with an indefinite 50% Decelerate Passive. Max Stacks: 200.0.
While the Opponent is Rooted, their Combat Power Rate is reduced by 40% and Zemo’s is increased by 40%. Additionally, Zemo’s attacks can’t Miss and all his hits inflict an indefinite Bleed Debuff.
If the Opponent breaks free of Zemo’s Root before it expires, inflict 5 additional indefinite Bleed Debuffs, reduced by 100.0 for each Prowess effect they have.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict an indefinite Disorient Passive reducing Block Proficiency by 25.0% and Defensive Ability Accuracy by 10%. Max Stacks: 400.0.
The final hit inflicts an indefinite Bleed Debuff.
If the Opponent is Rooted, pause Root for the duration of this Special Attack and the final hit inflicts 500.0 additional indefinite Bleed Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a Root Passive on the Opponent for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a non-stacking indefinite Sunder Passive reducing Critical Resistance to 0.0 and preventing it from increasing.
This attack gains +15.0 Attack Rating for each of Zemo’s indefinite effects the Opponent is suffering.

signature.title: THE FUTURE INCARNATE
lines: Bastion’s Offensive Ability Accuracy and Defensive Ability Accuracy reduction is expanded to affect non-personal effects.
Against Mutants, whenever the Opponent gains a Regeneration or Prowess effect, all of Bastion’s personal Abilities are paused for 0 seconds.
Personal Fury potency increased by +0.0%.

cards.title: THE NEXT STEP IN EVOLUTION
lines: Bastion’s evolved Sentinel body provides him 100% Resistance against Bleed and Poison effects, and his Regeneration Rate cannot be reduced by Poison.
When inflicted with a Bleed, Poison, or Crush effect, Bastion gains a 10 second Self-Repair Buff healing 800.0% of missing Health or 3.0% of Max Health, whichever is greater. Max stacks: -1.
The Sentinel Relic increases the potency of personal Disintegration effects by 10.0%. This effect is doubled when fighting Mutants.

cards.title: MECHANICAL ARMOR UP PASSIVE
lines: Bastion starts each fight with an indefinite Armor Up Passive, granting +37.5 Armor Rating. If this ends for any reason it returns after 14 seconds. While active it provides the following effects:
Bastion can trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks.

When Bastion’s Block is broken due to Unblockable or Crush, he gains an Auto-Repair Passive for 2 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. While active, Bastion Instantly Regenerates 85.0% of all non-Special 3 damage taken. Cooldown: -1 seconds.

cards.title: TECHNO-MECHANICAL VIRUS CHARGES
lines: Bastion can inflict the Opponent with Techno-Mechanical Virus Charges. Virus Charges cannot be inflicted while Bastion’s Opponent has more than 3 unique Buffs.
When either Champion strikes with a Medium Attack, inflict 200.0 Techno-Mechanical Virus Charges.
When either Champion strikes with a Light Attack, inflict 100.0 Techno-Mechanical Virus Charge.
When Bastion performs a Well-Timed Block, inflict 200.0 Techno-Mechanical Virus Charges.
When Bastion hits his Opponent’s Block with his first Medium or Light Attack, inflict 100.0 Techno-Mechanical Virus Charge.

Each Techno-Mechanical Virus Charge decreases the Offensive Ability Accuracy and Defensive Ability Accuracy of the Opponent’s personal non-Instant [k=glossary/energy_dmg_effects]Energy Damaging effects[/k] and Daunted Debuffs by -500.0% flat, down to -40.0%, or --1% against Mutants.

Whenever a non-Instant [k=glossary/energy_dmg_effects]Energy Damaging effect[/k] fails due to Ability Accuracy reduction, inflict a 16.0% Disintegration Vulnerability Passive for 28 seconds. Potency doubled against Mutants. Max stacks: -1.
As a Defender, when Bastion’s Opponent activates a Special Attack, Techno-Mechanical Virus Charges are removed. Special 1: 5.0 Charges, Special 2: 12 Charges, Special 3: 2400.0 Charges.

cards.title: TECHNO-MECHANICAL INFECTION
lines: When the Opponent is inflicted with 3000.0 Techno-Mechanical Virus Charges, they are inflicted with an indefinite Techno-Mechanical Infection. When dropping below 15 Charges, Infection is removed.
While Infection is active, Virus Charges begin expiring one at a time every 1.2 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. When a Virus Charge expires, remaining Charges expire slightly faster.
While Techno-Mechanical Infection is active, Bastion’s Opponent has their Attack Rating decreased by -35.0% and they are inflicted with a Power Reroute Passive.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit cannot be Evaded and grants a non-stacking Pursuit Passive for 10 seconds. Against Mutants this becomes -1 seconds.
The second hit inflicts a non-stacking -1% Disintegration Passive, dealing 97.0 Direct Damage over 16 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each beam hit inflicts an Instant -1% Disintegration, dealing 65.0 Direct Damage. As a Defender, this damage is halved and scales with Base Attack only.
If Infection is active: For each personal Disintegration effect on the Opponent, inflict another Instant Disintegration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, Bastion’s inner turmoil grants him a +36.0 Fury Passive for 28 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.
If Infection is active: Gain an additional Fury Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a -1% Disintegration Debuff, dealing 450.0 Direct Damage over 40 seconds.

signature.title: CHAMPION OF KORBIN
lines: The potency of personal bursts of damage is increased by 5.0%.
Reduce Call of Thunder’s Unstoppable cooldown by 100.0 seconds.
While a personal Unstoppable Buff is active, damage taken is reduced by 10.0%. Does not reduce damage from Special Attack 3.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Incoming Bleed and Poison effects suffer -50.0% reduced potency.
Beta Ray Bill is Immune to Shock and Power Drain. When the Power Drain Immunity triggers, he gains a Power Gain Passive, granting 100.0 Bar of Power over 0.5 seconds. Cooldown: -1 seconds.
When starting a fight against Tech Champions or when Immune to an effect, gain a Steady Buff for 20 seconds.
The Thor Relic increases the potency of personal Buffs by 25.0%.

cards.title: CALL OF THUNDER
lines: Gain an Unstoppable Buff. If struck while this Buff is active this effect goes on cooldown for 24 seconds.
All Buffs on Beta Ray Bill and all Shocks on the Opponent are paused.
Every 0.4 seconds gain a 20.0% Intensify Buff for 400.0 seconds. Max stacks: -1. Beta Ray Bill’s Heavy Attack can be charged for an extended duration.
While above -1 Bars of Power: while Beta Ray Bill is below 2 Stacks of Intensify, the Opponent suffers a 10.0 Intimidate Passive. At max stacks, the Opponent suffers a 10.0% Infuriate Passive.

Activating a Special Attack 2 while charging a Heavy Attack pauses all personal Buffs until Beta Ray Bill has landed or been struck by 400.0 Basic Hits per Intensify gained, up to a max of -1. Heavy Hits count as 2 hits. This effect does not trigger if it is already active.
Releasing the Heavy Attack grants a Grit Buff for 15 seconds.

cards.title: ARMOR PULVERIZER
lines: Beta Ray Bill’s first Medium Attack Pulverizes one Armor Up effect, removing it and dealing a burst of 100.0 Direct Damage.

cards.title: SHOCKS
lines: If the Buff pause is not active, Basic Attacks have a 10.0% chance to inflict a Shock Passive, dealing 20.0 Energy Damage over 25 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
During a combo started with a Medium Attack, or while striking the Opponent with a Special Attack 1, the expiration rate of personal Shocks increases by 285.0%.
The final hit of Special Attacks refreshes all Shocks on the Opponent.
All Shocks are paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks and Beta Ray Bill’s Special Attack 2.
When any Shock on the Opponent ends, deal a burst of 60.0 Energy Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain an Fury Buff, granting +60.0 Attack Rating for 15 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
During this attack, the potency of personal bursts of damage is increased by 200.0%
While the personal Buff pause is active, when any Shock ends on the Opponent during this attack, inflict a personal Shock Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit grants a non-stacking 15.0% Energize Buff for 15 seconds.
All lightning hits inflict a personal Shock Passive. Each Intensify Buff grants a 10.0% chance to inflict these Shocks through Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a 65.0% Resonance Buff for 20 seconds, paused during Special Attack.

synergy.note: Every 15 seconds generate a Power Gain Buff granting 20% of a bar of Power over 5 seconds. While this Power Gain Buff is active, each Prowess increases Special Attack Damage by an additional +3%.

signature.title: FORESIGHT
lines: Bishop prepares a unique bonus based on how many bars of Power are full at the start of the fight.
With 0 Bars: Special Attacks become Unblockable with a stack of 3000.0 or more Prowess.
With 1 Bar: While Blocking, gain Stun Immunity and enemies lose -10.0% ability accuracy.
With 2 Bars: Special Attacks leave the target Incinerated for 9.9% of the Special Damage dealt over 10 seconds.
With 3 Bars: Start the fight with Steady Release active for 3 seconds.

cards.title: PERSISTENT POWER METER
lines: Bishop’s mastery over energy and time enables him to enter a fight with 100.0% of the Power he finished his previous fight in the same Quest with.
Bishop’s Special 1 and 2 Attacks cost no Power when activated. Instead, after these Specials end, Bishop immediately loses however many Bars of Power that special would have cost.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: All of Bishop’s Personal Passive Prowess effects increase Special Attack Damage by 10.0%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: +66.0 Energy Resistance.
Every 1 second(s), on receiving any Energy Damage gain 300.0 Passive Prowess.
Absorbing the kinetic energy of Blocking or being Struck generates 100.0 stack of Prowess, Well Time Blocks gain an additional +6.0 Prowess.
All these abilities grant +100.0 Prowess vs Skill Opponents, and -1 vs Tech.

cards.title: BLOCKING
lines: Holding Block for 0.5 seconds, Bishop converts 1 Personal Prowess into a Regeneration Buff every 0.3 seconds, granting 0.6 Health over 5 seconds. Max Stacks: 5.
Each Prowess converted also has an 100.0% chance to Purify a Bleed Debuff.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Each time the Opponent Purifies a Debuff they instantly receive 79.9 Energy Damage.
Skill Champions also receive a Passive Stun lasting 1.5 second(s) if the Debuff Purified was a Stun.

cards.title: WARNING: POWER OVERLOAD!
lines: While Bishop has more than 3000.0 Prowess, or if he’s Bleeding, Shocked, or Incinerated he Overloads and begins consuming his personal Prowess effects 1 at a time, getting faster the longer he’s been Overloading.
If Bishop is suffering from a Bleed, Shock, or Incinerate, Debuff or Passive, each time he consumes a Prowess this way he also deals 20.0 Energy Damage to his Opponent, scaling with Base Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: After each Special Attack Bishop consumes all his Personal Prowess Passives.
If Bishop is Overloading go passively Unblockable for the Duration of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After this Special Attack finishes, gain a Steady Release Passive for 10 seconds.
While active every 0.8 second(s) while near the opponent, inflict an Incinerate Debuff on them, dealing 32.5 Energy Damage over 3 seconds.
Each Prowess consumed by this attack increases the Duration of Steady Release by 2.5%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The last hit has a 100% chance to inflict an Incinerate Debuff lasting 10 seconds, and dealing 70.0% of the total damage dealt by this Special.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a non-stacking Energy Vulnerability reducing Energy Resistance by -37.8 for 20 seconds.
Against enemies at full Health, this Energy Vulnerability becomes indefinite.

synergy.note: When inflicted with a non-Damaging Debuff, gain a 2.5% Energize Passive for 10 seconds. Max stacks: 10.
Medium Attacks inflict a non-stacking 25% Spectre Debuff for 3 seconds.

signature.title: NINE LIVES
lines: Black Cat starts the quest with 900.0 Combo Shield Passives which prevent her from losing Combo when struck. These persist across fights.
These Combo Shields fall off one at a time, and last for 3 second(s) after Black Cat is Struck. These Combo Shields also begin to expire after she Evades using this ability.
When Black Cat would be struck while dashing, for each Combo Shield effect on her, she has a 3.4% chance to gain an Evade Passive for 1 second.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Black Cat’s Critical Hits inflict Bleed Debuffs dealing 20.0 Direct Damage over 7 second(s).

cards.title: CALLING CARD
lines: To goad her target, Black Cat sends a Calling Card in advance to let them know she’s coming. The Opponent begins the fight with this Calling Card.
Black Cat will steal the Calling Card from the Opponent whenever she Intercepts them or strikes them while they are standing up or recovering from a Heavy or Special Attack.
Black Cat will plant the Calling Card back on the Opponent with each of her Heavy attack hits.

Each time the Calling Card changes hands, Black Cat adds 1 Combo to her Combo Meter and gains a Cruelty Passive increasing her Critical Damage Rating by 25.0 for 13 second(s). These bonuses are multiplied for each time the Card has changed hands this fight.
Black Cat’s expertise in thievery means that Ability Accuracy reduction cannot cause her to fail to steal or plant the Calling Card.

cards.title: THE HEIST
lines: At the start of a fight, the Heist is on! The Heist lasts for 4500.0 second(s) and when it ends, one of the following two effects occur:
If the Calling Card is on Black Cat, it converts into a Vicious Passive, increasing the potency of her Damage-Over-Time Debuffs by 50.0% for 15 second(s).

If the Calling Card is on the Opponent, it converts into a Sabotage Debuff, reducing the Opponent’s Defensive Ability Accuracy by 40.0% for 15 second(s) and dealing 55.0 Direct Damage whenever their Defensive Abilities fail to trigger.

cards.title: BAD LUCK AURA
lines: For each Hit in Black Cat’s Combo Meter, the Opponent’s Defensive Ability Accuracy is passively reduced by -2.0%, or twice that against Science Opponents, up to a maximum of 60.0%
Whenever an Opponent’s ability fails to trigger due to Accuracy reduction, Black Cat pauses each of her personal Passives and Debuffs for 1.8 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On Activation, if Black Cat does not have the Calling Card, she Purifies up to 300.0 Debuffs. If no Debuffs were Purified this way, she grants herself a Cleanse Passive for 13 second(s). The Cleanse will consume itself to instantly Purify the next Debuff applied to Black Cat.
If Black Cat does have the Calling Card, landing this attack plants it back onto the Opponent and extends The Heist by 900.0 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: During this attack, Black Cat’s Critical Rating is increased by 1.0 for each hit in both Champions’ Combo Meters.
Instead of her regular Bleeds, this attack inflicts Critical Bleeds dealing 60.0 Direct Damage multiplied by Black Cat’s Critical Damage Multiplier.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict the Opponent with a non-stacking Infuriate Debuff for 13 second(s), causing them to become more aggressive and reducing their Offensive Ability Accuracy by -60.0%.
If it’s currently active, refresh The Heist timer.

synergy.note: Intercepting the Opponent grants a True Strike Passive for 10 seconds, letting his attack ignore all Armor, Resistances, Evade, and Auto-Block effects.

signature.title: FOR WAKANDA!
lines: Intercepting the Opponent has a 100% Chance to Purify one of each Debuff from Black Panther. Cooldown 15 seconds.
Each Bleed Debuff on the Opponent decreases their Defensive Ability Accuracy by -1.5%. Max 5 Bleeds.

cards.title: CRITICAL HITS
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 45.0 Direct Damage over 6 seconds.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: 100% Chance to gain a Cruelty Passive granting +35.0 Critical Damage Rating for 1.25 second(s). These Cruelty Passives fall off one at a time. Max Stacks: 15
Intercepting the Opponent or striking them while they are recovering from a Heavy or Special Attack grants an additional Cruelty Passive.
When striking into an Auto-Block, Panther is Immune to Stun.

cards.title: PANTHER'S MIGHT
lines: Dashing back after a non-combo ending attack will grant 1 Indefinite Inactive Panther's Might Charge. Max: 5 Charges
Inactive Panthers Might Charges cannot be gained while Panther's Might is Active.

cards.title: PANTHER'S MIGHT
lines: Landing a Heavy Attack while at 3 or more inactive charges grants Panther’s Might for 3 seconds per charge consumed.
Intercepting the Opponent or striking them while they are recovering from a Heavy or Special Attack pauses Panther's Might for 5 seconds.
Upon Activation: Gain 1 Precision Passive for each Personal Cruelty Passive active, each increasing Critical Rating by +4.5.
Pause all Personal Cruelty Passives.
While Active:
Bleed Debuffs gain +8.0% Duration per Personal Cruelty Active on Black Panther.
Champion Attacks reduce the Opponents Defensive Ability Accuracy by 50%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS 1 AND 2
lines: Intercepting the opponent: Each hit of this Attack is a Guaranteed Critical Hit and apply an additional Bleed Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Gain 3 Inactive Panther's Might charges. Then consume all charges and enter Panther's Might for 5 seconds per charge consumed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This Attack gains +5.0 Attack Rating for each Personal Cruelty Passive Active on Black Panther.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict up to 5 Bleed Debuffs, with each having a 100% Chance to Apply, and dealing 35.0 Direct Damage over 15 seconds.

synergy.note: Well Timed Blocks provides a +30% Fury Buff for 15 seconds.

signature.title: PANTHER HABIT
lines: Black Panther starts each fight with 495.5 Reflect Charges.
An upgraded Reflective Matrix grants +4.7 Physical Resistance.
While Black Panther has at least 1000.0 Reflect Charges, he gains a 21.7% chance to absorb Heavy Attack impacts by consuming -1 Charges to become Passively Unstoppable for 0.75 seconds.

cards.title: REFLECTIVE MATRIX
lines: Black Panther starts each fight with Reflective Matrix increasing his Critical Resistance by +10.0 for 10.0 seconds. Reflective Matrix is paused during the Opponent's Special Attacks.
While Reflective Matrix is active, Black Panther gains +8.0 Block Penetration when striking into Blocks that are not Well-Timed.

When Black Panther is inflicted with a Stun Debuff while making contact with the Opponent, he consumes his Reflective Matrix to Purify the Stun. Then, if he is not Passively Stunned and the Opponent is not performing a Special Attack, he inflicts a Stun Debuff on the Opponent for 2.5 seconds.

When Reflective Matrix ends, it goes on cooldown for 10 seconds, after which it reactivates the next time Black Panther is struck or Blocks an attack. The cooldown is decreased by up to 5000.0% based on missing Health.

cards.title: REFLECT CHARGES
lines: While Reflective Matrix is active, Black Panther can gain and refresh Reflect Charges. These last for 12 seconds, are paused during Special Attacks, and can be refreshed by Dodging back after a non-Combo Ending Attack.
Gain 1 Charge for every 2.0 Health lost from being struck or Blocking an Attack.
Gain 300.0 Charges when either Champion performs a Well-Timed Block, plus -1 additional Charges if Blocking a Special Attack or if Black Panther is Defending. Cooldown: 0.15 seconds.
As an Attacker, Reflective Matrix pauses for 10.0 seconds whenever Black Panther gains a Reflect Charge, reduced by -20.0 seconds for every active Charge.

cards.title: KINETIC BURST
lines: Black Panther can unleash stored Reflect Charges as a Kinetic Burst, dealing 1.0 Direct Damage for each Charge. This damage scales with Base Health and is reduced by 20% against Mutant Champions.
As a Defender, deal a Kinetic Burst whenever Black Panther strikes the Opponent with Reflect Charges active.
The final hit of Special Attack 2 deals a Kinetic Burst.
Each hit of a Heavy Attack, or of a Special Attack activated during a Heavy Attack, deals a Kinetic Burst.
After an attack that deals one or more Kinetic Bursts, remove all Charges and consume Reflective Matrix if active, reducing its cooldown by up to 50.0% based on the remaining duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain 400.0 Cleanse Passives for -1 seconds. These Cleanses cannot remove Stun Debuffs.
Gain 400.0 Reflect Charges on each landed or Blocked hit.
Each hit inflicts a Bleed Debuff dealing 50.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Activate or refresh Reflective Matrix and pause it for 20 seconds.
Gain 1000.0 Reflect Charges and refresh all Charges.

synergy.note: Whenever the Opponent is immune to Incinerate they’re inflicted with a Slow Debuff for 8 seconds.

signature.title: DEATH IMMUNITY
lines: When receiving damage that would knock her out, Death Touch is removed instead and Claire gains a Death Immunity Buff, preventing death and healing 4.0% of her max health over 4 seconds.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Claire uses spells in her Basic Attacks causing them to deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.

cards.title: CLAIRVOYANCE CHARGE
lines: Claire starts with 3.0 charges. Each time she or her Opponent are immune to any effect, she gains 1 charge and 4.0% of her max Power. Charges stack up to 20.
After landing or receiving a Light or Medium attack and the Opponent has 1 or more Buffs, a charge is consumed and 1 Buff is Nullified.

cards.title: CURSE OF THE BLACK WIDOW
lines: Claire has 3 types of curses each providing her with a different immunity, however only 1.0 curse can be active at a time.
By default the Curse of Blood is active. Landing a fourth Light Attack casts the next curse in the following order.
Curse of Blood: Bleed immunity. Curse of Plague: Poison immunity. Curse of Hellfire: Incinerate immunity.
When entering a new Curse any Bleed, Poison or Incinerate Debuffs that are Purified by the corresponding curse grant 1 Clairvoyance charge and 4.0% of Claire's max Power.

cards.title: CURSE OF DAMNATION
lines: Finishing a combo with a Medium attack inflicts 1.0 Debuff. Throwing a Heavy Attack or Special 1 inflicts up to 3.0 Debuffs. These Debuffs are determined by Claire’s active curse and last for 8 seconds.

Curse of Blood: Bleed, dealing 4.0 direct damage. Curse of Plague: Poison, dealing 4.0 damage and reducing health recovery by 30%. Curse of Hellfire: Incinerate, dealing 4.0 damage, removing Perfect Block Chance and reducing Block Proficiency by 50%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100% chance to inflict the Opponent with Buff Immunity for 10 seconds. Decreasing to 50% against Science Champions.

Each hit grants an effect determined by Claire’s active curse. Curse of Blood: Regenerate 35.0% of the damage dealt. Curse of Plague: Steal 5% of the Opponent’s current Power. Curse of Hellfire: Deal a burst of 80.0 Energy Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: All Clairvoyance charges are removed, each increasing her Attack Rating during this attack by 20.0.
Claire gains Death Touch, lasting for 1.2 seconds per Clairvoyance charge removed, Death Touch increases the Potency of all Curse effects by 100.0% and is not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction.

synergy.note: Start each fight with an indefinite 35% Endurance Passive.

signature.title: RED ROOM TRAINING
lines: Increase the potency of Sabotage Debuffs, increasing Direct damage done when abilities fail to trigger by 40.0%.
Increase the duration of Sabotage Debuffs by 10.0%.
Landing hits while Widow’s Insight is active pauses Sabotage Debuffs for 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Baton Hits deal Energy Damage instead of Physical and have a 40.0% chance to inflict a Shock Debuff dealing 75.0 Energy Damage for 3.65 seconds.

cards.title: WIDOW'S INSIGHT
lines: Black Widow’s covert assassin training kicks in whenever the perfect opportunity to strike presents itself. Gain Widow’s Insight for 0.85 seconds whenever the Opponent is dashing forward or recovering from a Heavy, Special, or Combo ending Attack.
This ability refreshes its duration when successfully landing hits.
Widow’s Insight is not affected by Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: WHILE WIDOW'S INSIGHT IS ACTIVE
lines: Light Hits: Increase Shock Ability Accuracy by a flat 60.0%.
Medium Hits: Reduce Defensive Ability Accuracy by -70.0%.
Heavy Hits: 100.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff for 1.75 seconds.
Ending a Combo has 100.0% chance to grant a Precision Buff increasing Critical Rating by 12.0 for 24 seconds. Max 8 Stacks.

cards.title: COUNTER-ATTACK EVADE
lines: When caused to Miss, gain a Passive Evade granting 100.0% Chance to Evade the next Basic Attack for 8 seconds. After triggering an Evade this effect is removed. Evade does not trigger while holding block.
When triggering an Evade, Black Widow Counter-Attacks with a Flashbang. This attack cannot Miss and does not generate Power.

When triggering an Evade through any of Black Widows personal Evade abilities, inflict a Sabotage Debuff reducing Defensive Ability Accuracy by 20% for 6 seconds. Sabotage deals 2.0 Direct Damage whenever an Opponent's Defensive Abilities fail to trigger. This Defensive Ability Accuracy reduction does not stack with other Sabotage effects.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The last hit inflicts a Shock Debuff dealing 100.0 Energy Damage over 13 seconds.

At the end of this Special Attack gain a Passive Evade granting 100.0% chance to Evade any Basic Attack for 6 seconds. After triggering this Evade the effect is removed. Evade will not trigger while Blocking.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Inflict an instant Shock, dealing 190.0 Energy Damage when striking Shocked Opponents.
If Widow’s Insight is active: All hits reduce Defensive Ability Accuracy by 70%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Sabotage Debuff reducing Defensive Ability Accuracy by 20% for 16 seconds and dealing 2.0 Direct damage when the Opponent's Defensive Abilities fails to trigger. This Defensive Ability Accuracy reduction does not stack with other Sabotage effects.

For every 5 stacks of Widows Insight gained since last activating this Special Attack, create a Passive Cruelty increasing Critical Damage Rating by 85.0 for 30 seconds. Widow's Insight is reset to 0 after launching this Special Attack.

signature.title: VAMPIRIC IMMORTALITY
lines: When below 70% Health, Blade’s healing factor allows him to recover 5.0 Health for the cost of 40.0% of a Bar of Power per second.

cards.title: WHEN NEARBY BLEEDING OPPONENTS
lines: For every stack of Bleed on the opponent, generates 7.0% of a Bar of Power per second.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: When against Dimensional Beings, Danger Sense activates and grants Blade 80.0 Attack Rating while also reducing the opponent's Ability Accuracy by 40.0%. The Ability Accuracy reduction bypasses immunities to Ability Accuracy reduction.
Blade’s immune system attacks alien substances, shrugging off Debuffs up to -95.0% faster based on current Power.

cards.title: WELL TIMED BLOCKS
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 30.0 Direct Damage over 2 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack receives 50.0 additional Critical Rating.
Inflicts Bleed on Critical Hits, dealing 17.5 Direct Damage per stack over 1 second. For each Bleed inflicted, Blade instantly generates 8.0% of a Bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflicts 3.0 stacks of Bleed, each dealing 140.0 Direct Damage over 13 seconds.
70.0% chance to Stun for 3 second(s).

signature.title: ENHANCED VAMPIRIC IMMORTALITY
lines: While below 70% Health, Blade’s healing factor allows him to Passively Regenerate 5.0 Health at a cost of 40.0% of a Bar of Power per second.
While Regenerating from this ability, Passively Regenerate 40.0% of the damage taken from Blocked hits.

cards.title: A HUNTER FORGED IN ISO
lines: Blade’s Stellar Enhancement grants him a Fractured Power Bar.
The final hit of any Special Attack activated while Blade has 3 Bars of Power inflicts a Stun Debuff for 2.5 seconds. Cooldown: -1 seconds.

cards.title: DANGER SENSE
lines: Blade’s heightened senses cause him to activate a Danger Sense Passive temporarily with his Special Attack 1, or indefinitely 0.25 seconds after the start of a fight against Cosmic or #God Champions. This ability grants the following effects:
+45.0 Attack Rating.
The Opponent is inflicted with an indefinite 50.0% Atrophy Passive. While this effect is active, Unblockable Buffs suffer an additional 25.0% reduced duration.
Inflicting a Degeneration effect Nullifies 100.0 True Buff.

cards.title: DEGENERATION EFFECTS
lines: Blade only benefits from 50.0% of the Mystic Dispersion Mastery, but while nearby Degenerating Opponents he Passively gains 2.0% of a Bar of Power per second for each Degeneration, up to 10%.
Blade’s Degeneration Passives deal 10.0 Direct Damage over 18 seconds and scale with Base Attack only. Max stacks: -1.
Performing a Well-Timed Block inflicts a Degeneration Passive.
When an Opponent’s Buff expires naturally or is Nullified, inflict a Degeneration Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, if the Opponent is suffering from -1+ Degeneration effects and Blade's indefinite Danger Sense isn't active, gain it for 20 seconds.
The first hit inflicts a non-stacking 100.0% Torment Debuff for 20 seconds.
The final two hits each inflict a Degeneration Debuff, dealing 50.0 Direct Damage over 12 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Ranged hits each inflict a Degeneration Debuff, dealing 55.0 Direct Damage over 2 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
While the Opponent is below Max Power, ranged hits also Power Steal 1020.0% of a Bar of Power, granting 40.0% of the Power stolen.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict 5 Degeneration Debuffs, each dealing 160.0 Direct Damage over 60 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

signature.title: THE MOST POWERFUL MAN IN AMERICA
lines: Before taking non-hit Direct Damage from Champions, gain an Indestructible Passive for 1.49607 seconds. Cooldown: -1 seconds. Cooldown is removed when Blue Marvel is Rooted.
Start each fight with a number of personal Cruelty Passives equal to 9.8% of Persistent Antimatter, rounded down.

cards.title: LIVING ANTIMATTER REACTOR
lines: As a living stable antimatter reaction, Blue Marvel warps the laws of physics to his benefit. His attacks deal Energy Damage and do not make contact with non-Skill Opponents.
Due to his unique composition, Blue Marvel is Immune to Bleed and Power Steal, and his Combat Power Rate cannot be reduced below 80.0%.
Blue Marvel does not gain a Precision Buff when using the Dexterity Mastery. Instead he gains a +15.0 Energy Resistance Passive for 5 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

Blue Marvel’s thunderous blows will not be denied. His Heavy Attacks cannot Miss, and when Punishing a Mystic Opponent’s Heavy or Special Attack with a Medium Attack, he inflicts a Crush Debuff for 2.5 seconds.
Light Attacks 2, 3, and 4 inflict a 1.0% Weakness Debuff for 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: ANTIMATTER CHARGES
lines: +1 Charge when the Opponent is inflicted with a non-Stun Debuff.
+3 Charges when the Opponent fills a Bar of Power.
+1 Charge when taking Energy Damage or Blocking a hit while not in Stable Release. Cooldown: 0.5 seconds.
For every 20 Charges Blue Marvel gains while not in Stable Release, and for every 8 seconds he spends in Stable Release, gain an indefinite +25.0 Cruelty Passive.
At the end of a fight, store 1 Persistent Antimatter, plus an additional for each personal Cruelty gained after the start of the fight. Max stacks: -1.
At the start of each fight, gain dormant Charges equal to Persistent Antimatter. Activating a Special Attack converts up to 1000.0 dormant Charges into Antimatter Charges.

cards.title: STABLE RELEASE
lines: When Blue Marvel reaches max Antimatter Charges, he enters Stable Release and the Charges begin to expire one at a time. Charges last 50.0 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. Stable Release grants the following benefits:
Gain +135.0 Attack Rating.
Gain +50.0 Energy Penetration.
Attacks cannot Miss.
Intercepting the Opponent with a Basic Attack inflicts a personal Crush Debuff.
When Blue Marvel has no Antimatter Charges remaining, Stable Release ends and its effects are removed.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Tapping Block while performing the final hit focuses the blast, refreshing personal Overload Debuffs. If all three have more than 50.0% duration remaining, pause them for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit inflicts a non-stacking Provoke Debuff for 5 seconds. While this Debuff is active, striking the Opponent re-inflicts it with its remaining duration, which is fixed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The bursts of damage dealt by personal Overload effects gain 65.0% additional potency during this attack.

Before each beam blast, Blue Marvel taps into his hyper-cosmic awareness to slow time. Tapping Block during this slowed time grants a +30.0 Precision Passive for 25 seconds. This is easier during Stable Release.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a non-stacking Regeneration Passive, healing 6.0% of Max Health over -1 seconds. While in Stable Release, this Passive pauses for 0.5 seconds when the Opponent is struck.
Inflict an indefinite 25.0% Overload Passive. Max stacks: -1.

signature.title: HEIGHTENED CONCENTRATION
lines: Activating a Special Attack Passively reduces damage caused by the Opponent by 10.0% for 0.06 seconds.

Whenever either Champion is Stunned or struck by a Heavy Attack, Bullseye has a 10.0% chance to Purify 50% of all Debuffs, up to a maximum of 10 Debuffs. The Stun Debuff from the Parry Mastery will not trigger this.

cards.title: I NEVER MISS
lines: All hits bypass Miss, and all hits are Guaranteed Critical Hits. Critical Hits and personal effects can be inflicted through Blocks that are not Well-Timed.
Bullseye is Immune to Precision or Fatigue effects, and gains a non-stacking +10.0 Cruelty Buff for 8 seconds when this Immunity triggers. This Buff will not re-trigger while already active.

When the Opponent would be inflicted with a Bleed effect, gain a +10.0 Cruelty Passive for 8 seconds, paused during Special Attacks as a Defender. These are also paused for 3 seconds each time the Opponent avoids a Basic Attack with the Dexterity Mastery. Max stacks: -1.
For each personal Cruelty Passive, Physical Resistance is increased by +15.0.
Blade Attacks inflict instant Bleeds dealing 10.0 Direct Damage. These are also inflicted when any attack is Evaded, or a Special Attack is avoided with the Dexterity Mastery.

cards.title: DIALED IN
lines: During a Special Attack 1 or 2, press the Block Input after the first hit to slow down time. Releasing the Block Input precisely when the final projectile is thrown grants a Perfect Release bonus.
A Perfect result in the Special 3 Mini-Game also grants a Perfect Release bonus.

Activating a Perfect Release bonus grants an indefinite Dialed In Passive increasing the potency of personal Cruelty Passives by +4.0 flat, and retriggers all personal Cruelty Passives. Failing to activate a Perfect Release bonus removes 1 Dialed In Passive. Max stacks: -1.
