As a Defender, 10% chance for each Cruelty Passive to activate a Perfect Release bonus after Special Attacks 1 and 2. Additionally, Special Attack 3 always triggers a Perfect Release bonus.

cards.title: KILLER INSTINCT
lines: Gaining a Bar of Power grants a non-stacking Killer Instinct Passive for 3 seconds, this will not trigger while already active. This is paused during Bullseye’s Special Attacks, and while over 1 Bar of Power or until a personal Evade triggers.

While Killer Instinct is active, Bullseye has a 100.0% chance to Evade incoming Basic Attacks, Purifying any Stun Debuffs in the process. This Evade will not trigger while Blocking. Killer Instinct and its effects are not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction.
When Killer Instinct expires as an Attacker, it goes on cooldown for 12 seconds or until Bullseye strikes the Opponent 10 times.
When Evading, Bullseye Counter-Attacks and inflicts an instant Bleed dealing 10.0 Direct Damage.

After Counter-Attacking as an Attacker, the ability to activate Special Attack 3 is disabled for 1 second. As a Defender, the chance to activate a Special Attack is increased for 100.0 second instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS 1 AND 2
lines: Activating Special Attack 1 or 2 immediately after a Counter-Attack makes the first hit of the Special Attack passively Unblockable and grants a +65.0 Fury Passive for 6 seconds. This Fury Passive will not re-trigger while already active, and is paused during Bullseye’s Special Attacks. Intercepting the Opponent with any Special Attack hit also grants this Fury Passive.
Special Attack hits landed against an Invisible, Phasing or Untouchable opponent grant no Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a True Accuracy Passive for 15 seconds, paused until the end of the Special Attack.
The final hit inflicts 2 additional instant Bleeds, each dealing 10.0 Direct Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a non-stacking 25.0% Impact Passive and inflict a non-stacking 50% Bleed Vulnerability Passive. Both of these effects last 30 seconds, and are paused until the end of the Special Attack.
The final hit inflicts a Stun Passive for 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a non-stacking Disorient Passive reducing Block Proficiency and Defensive Ability Accuracy by -50.0% for 45 seconds. While this Disorient is active, all personal Cruelty Passives are paused.

synergy.note: On a Well-Timed Block, inflict a Stagger Debuff that lasts for 10 second(s). The Staggered Opponent has their next Buff Nullified. Max 2 Stacks.

signature.title: LEADERSHIP
lines: An excellent leader, Captain America learns from his teammates gaining a unique effect, while Kinetically Charged, for each class represented on his team, excluding himself.
Mutant: 40.0% chance on triggering a Special Attack to gain +100.0 Kinetic Potential.
Skill: 40.0% chance whenever a Debuff is gained, Consume 100.0 Kinetic Potential to Purify it.
Science: 40.0% chance on a Well-Timed Block to place a 10.0% Weakness Debuff on the Opponent for 10 seconds.
Mystic: 40.0% chance to gain 100.0 Kinetic Potential each time a Buff Expires or is Nullified on the Opponent.
Cosmic: 40.0% chance on a Well Timed Block to place an Armor Break Debuff on the Opponent, reducing their Armor by -10.0 for 10 seconds.
Tech: 40.0% chance on a Well Timed Block to place a 25.0% Petrify Debuff on the Opponent for 10 seconds.

cards.title: KINETIC POTENTIAL
lines: Captain America’s vibranium vambraces can store up to 500.0 Kinetic Potential charges. He will not generate any new Kinetic Potential while at this limit.
15.0% Chance when Struck to gain 100.0 Kinetic Potential(s).
50.0% Chance when Blocking to gain +100.0 Kinetic Potential. This chance increases to 100% on a Well Timed Block.
100.0% Chance when Stunned to gain +100.0 Kinetic Potential.
Kinetic Potential falls off over time, falling off faster the longer its been since it last increased.

cards.title: KINETICALLY CHARGED
lines: As long as Cap has at least 100.0 Kinetic Potential, he is considered to be Kinetically Charged, and gains the following bonuses as Passive effects:
+50.0 Attack
+25.0 Physical Resistance
+25.0 Energy Resistance
100.0% chance to Nullify all Unstoppable Buffs when striking the Opponent.
+30.0% chance to cause Opponent’s attacks to Glance. This chance increases by 100.0% against Mystic Champions.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Beginning to charge a Heavy Attack grants a Passive Fury granting +50.0 Attack per Kinetic Potential, lasting for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: After any special Attack, Cap consumes all Kinetic Potential.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 25.0 Direct Damage over 3.5 seconds.
Reduces Opponent’s Defensive Ability Accuracy by -100.0% if Kinetically Charged.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a 1 second Stun Debuff.
Each Kinetic Potential charge grants +50.0 Attack and +0.5 second(s) Stun Duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If Kinetically Charged gain +100.0 Attack for each different Class on Cap’s team, not including himself, up to 2 Classes.
Gain 100.0 Non-Consumable Kinetic Potential charge which lasts 30 seconds.

synergy.note: Special 1 inflicts a Heal Block Debuff, preventing the Opponent from recovering Health for 15 second(s).

signature.title: VIBRANIUM ENCHANCED EXO-8 FALCON
lines: Redwing Lock-On lasts 2 second(s) longer, Attack Rating is increased by 5.0 and allows Captain America to inflict Ruptures from Special 2 through blocks.
When either Champion performs a Well-Timed Block, Captain America inflicts a Sapped Charge on the Opponent.
When an Opponent Miss fails or when their Ability fails due to low Ability Accuracy, an instant Rupture is inflicted, dealing 5.0 Physical Damage. Damage scales with Base Attack only.

cards.title: ARMOR UP
lines: When landing any attack or being struck by a Basic Attack, 30.0% chance to gain a +12.5 Armor Up Buff, lasting indefinitely up to 5 stacks. Additional stacks last for 15 seconds. These Buffs turn into Passives when Nullified or Staggered. Start each fight with one of these Buffs.
While Armor Up is active, Captain America can trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks and he can block Unblockable Specials from mutants.
Each Armor Up effect reduces the Opponent’s Bleed Ability Accuracy by --25.0% flat.

10.0% chance per Armor Up effect to Auto-Block incoming Special Attacks, up to 7500.0%. The first time this Auto-Block is triggered against a Special Attack, it counts as a Well-Timed Block and removes all personal Armor Ups.
Auto-Block Chance is also increased by 25% per Prowess effect on the Opponent. This chance is capped at 100% while the Opponent has Prowess.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Captain America cannot land Critical hits naturally, however every time he would have landed a Critical Hit he inflicts an instant Rupture, dealing Physical Damage. This ability scales with Critical Damage Rating.

Ruptures also inflict a Sapped Charge that lasts for 20 seconds, or indefinitely as a Defender. Consume all Charges when reaching 20.0 stacks, and replace them with a Power Drain Passive, draining 50.0% of the Opponent's Max Power over -1 seconds.

cards.title: RECON SCAN
lines: Dodging back and holding Block for 120.0 second(s), inflicting Lock-On charge for 16 second(s), but pauses on his Specials. Once Lock-On ends, it goes on Cooldown for 12.0 second(s). As a Defender, Cap inflicts a Lock-On Charge in 16 second(s) if not Locked-On.
When entering Lock-On, Cap passively inflicts Cowardice for the duration of Lock-On, reducing Special Attack damage by 40.0%.
While Locked-On, Cap gains 30.0 Critical Rating and his attacks cannot Miss
Striking the Opponent while Locked-On pauses Sapped charges for 5 second(s).

cards.title: ON A HEAVY OR INTERCEPT
lines: Consume an Armor Up effect and gain a non-stacking +30.0 Bulwark Buff for 15 seconds. While this Buff is active, Opponents have -100% Ability Accuracy when hitting Captain America’s Block.
Intercepts neither require nor consume an Armor Up effect to activate the Bulwark.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final hit inflicts a -20.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 30 seconds, paused while Locked-On. Max stacks: -1.
Lock-On: Inflict 100.0 Sapped Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain up to +150.0 Attack Rating based on current Armor Rating until the end of the Special Attack. All but one personal Armor Ups are consumed by the end of the attack.
Personal Armor Ups are paused during this Attack.
Each hit inflicts a Rupture Debuff, dealing 20.0 Physical Damage over 10 second(s).
Lock-On: Each hit inflicts an extra instant Rupture Passive, dealing Critical Damage as Physical Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Precision Buff, granting 80.0 Critical Rating for 8 second(s), but pauses for 0.5 second(s) on a Hit. Captain America can crit through blocks while this Buff is active.

Consume all but one personal Armor Up. While this Precision is active, gain a 10.0% chance for each Armor Up consumed to inflict an extra Sapped Charge when inflicting a Rupture. Inflicting the Sapped Charges' Power Drain while this Precision is active restores the consumed Armor Ups.
Lock-On: Inflicts a Special Lock Debuff for 10 seconds.

synergy.note: Striking an Opponent with a Critical Hit inflicts a non-stacking Degeneration Debuff dealing 50% Attack Rating as Direct Damage over 6 seconds.
Striking an Opponent with a Critical Hit has a 21% chance to grant a non-stacking Precision Buff, increasing Critical Rating by 14% for 7 seconds.

signature.title: PURE SOUL
lines: Increase personal Exhaustion duration by 3.0% for each Psionic Charge. Psionic Mode increases the duration as if Captain Britain has 10 Psionic Charges.
Each personal Neuroshock reduces the Opponent’s Energy Resistance by 15.0% of their current positive Energy Resistance. Max: 100%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Basic attacks deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
Against non-Tech Champions, Captain Britain’s personal Neuroshock and Exhaustion Passives cannot have their duration or Ability Accuracy reduced.
Captain Britain starts each fight with a 3.0% Safeguard Passive. When inflicted with a Special Power Drain effect, or, as an Attacker, after reducing a hit's damage, this Safeguard is removed.
When this Safeguard is removed or prevented, Captain Britain regains it after 20 seconds unless she’s suffering from a Special Power Drain effect.
When either Champion is knocked down, or Captain Britain is struck by a Critical Hit, the Opponent is inflicted with a non-stacking 100.0 Exhaustion Passive for 4 seconds.

cards.title: NEUROSHOCK
lines: Captain Britain’s Neuroshock Passives deal 25.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds, scaling with Base Attack only.
The potency of her Neuroshocks is increased by Captain Britain’s current Prowess potency, but doubly reduced by her current Cowardice potency. Max: 200% increased potency at +200% Prowess.
When inflicted with a Shock or Bleed effect, inflict a Neuroshock Passive.
If struck by or striking an Opponent suffering from an Exhaustion effect, inflict a Neuroshock Passive. Can only trigger once every 1.5 seconds.
Whenever the Opponent Purifies or Cleanses a Debuff, inflict 200.0 Neuroshock Passives.

cards.title: PSIONIC CHARGES
lines: When inflicting a personal Neuroshock or gaining any Prowess effect, gain 100.0 indefinite Psionic Charge.
When activating a Special Attack, gain 600.0 indefinite Psionic Charges.
When knocked down, gain 200.0 indefinite Psionic Charges.
When inflicted with a Cowardice or Special Power Drain effect, remove 200.0 Psionic Charges.
If knocked down while one of these effects is active, remove 200.0 Psionic Charges for each unique effect, up to a max of -1 Charges.

cards.title: PSIONIC MODE
lines: When reaching -1 or more Psionic Charges, if not already active, enter Psionic Mode. Psionic Mode lasts for 1 second per Psionic Charge when activated, paused during Special Attacks. While in Psionic Mode, Captain Britain cannot gain Psionic Charges, and gains the following:
Personal Neuroshock Passives tick 200.0% faster. Any personal Neuroshock Passives inflicted during Psionic Mode are paused until Psionic Mode ends.
When activating a Special Attack, for each level of the Special, gain 1 indefinite +15.0% Prowess Passive. When Psionic Mode ends, remove 3 personal Prowesses. Max stacks: -1.
Captain Britain is Stun Immune during her Dash and Medium Attacks.
As a Defender, Psionic Mode goes on cooldown for 15 seconds after it ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a non-stacking 2.0 Exhaustion Passive for 6 seconds.
Each hit inflicts a Slow Debuff for 16 seconds. If Purified by a Skill Champion, inflict a matching Slow Passive. While active, Captain Britain’s personal Exhaustion are paused.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a non-stacking +50.0 Bulwark Passive lasting until the next time Psionic Mode ends.
While this Bulwark is active, Basic Attacks inflict a Neuroshock Passive. This can trigger through Block.
Hits in this Special Attack gain +70.0 Critical Rating.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This Special Attack cannot be activated if Psionic Mode is active.
Enter Psionic Mode and increase its duration by +800.0 seconds.
Gain a non-stacking -60.0% Power Efficiency Passive lasting until Psionic Mode Expires.
Gain 600.0 additional indefinite +-1% Prowess Passives.

signature.title: BINARY DURABILITY
lines: While Binary Ignition is active Captain Marvel gains an Indestructible Buff for 1.5 seconds.
This ability can be activated again after a 5 second cooldown.
The Indestructible Buff and half of Captain Marvel's Energy Charges are removed when struck by a Special Attack.

cards.title: SUPER STRENGTH
lines: Landing a hit or hitting into a Block with a Light or Medium Attack has a 15.0% chance to inflict Armor Break reducing Armor Rating by -18.0 for 7 seconds.
Intercepting an opponent’s Dash Attack has a 100% chance to inflict Armor Break reducing Armor Rating by -18.0 for 7 seconds.
Striking with a Heavy Attack while the opponent is charging or executing a Heavy Attack removes all Armor Up effects and inflicts Stun for 2.5 seconds.

cards.title: ENERGY ABSORPTION
lines: Captain Marvel gains Persistent Energy Charges by Blocking Physical Attacks and when receiving Energy Damage. Any Energy Charges that Captain Marvel ends a fight with persists between fights. Max 25 stacks.
Well Timed Blocks generate an additional Energy Charge.
At the start of the fight, Captain Marvel gains 2% of Max Power for each Energy Charge she has.
Captain Marvel suffers 1.5 damage when Energy Charges are generated by the effects of Mystic Champions.

cards.title: BINARY IGNITION
lines: While at 10 Energy Charges or over, Dashing back and holding Block for 1.2 seconds or being Knocked Down Purifies all Debuffs and pushes Captain Marvel into Binary Ignition. Captain Marvel enters Binary Ignition automatically at 25 Energy Charges.
In Binary Ignition, Captain Marvel does not generate Energy Charges and each Charge lasts 1.2 seconds.
Gain a Permanent Fury Buff increasing Attack by 30.0 for every 5 stacks of Energy Charge. All Fury Buffs are removed when Energy Charges fall to zero.
Damaging Energy Debuffs increase the duration of Energy Charges by 1 second.
The chance to inflict Armor Break with a Light or Medium Attack increases to 60%.
Deal an additional 32.0% of damage dealt as a burst of Energy Damage when striking an opponent with an Armor Break Debuff.
Landing Heavy Attacks while in Binary Ignition generates 3 Energy Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Generate 3 Energy Charges.
Energy Beams in this attack deal True Damage.
In Binary Ignition, Beam Attacks are Unblockable but this attack expends 2 Energy Charges instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: In Binary Ignition, Beam Attacks are Unblockable and expend 4 Energy Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Generate 10 Energy Charges.
Gain a Power Gain Buff generating 40% of max Power over 10 seconds.

signature.title: BLOODLUST
lines: The sight and smell of blood triggers Carnage’s bloodlust, granting a Power Gain Buff when activating a Bleed or Armor Break on the opponent that lasts as long as the Opponent is Bleeding or Armor Broken. The Power Gain grants up to 6.5% of a Bar of Power per second based on how close Carnage is to the opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Each time Carnage activates a Special Attack he begins to Mutate for 10 seconds.
Once his Mutation ends he copies his current Symbiotic Creation as a Permanent Buff.
Maximum of 500.0 Permanent Buffs.

cards.title: RAVAGER
lines: Carnage rips and tears at his opponents, each time he triggers a Bleed Debuff on his Opponent he has a 25.0% chance to Refresh the Duration of all the other Bleed Debuffs on his Opponent.
If a Bleed fails to apply due to an Immunity, Carnage has a 100.0% chance to Armor Break his Opponent, reducing their Armor by -40.0 lasting for 10 seconds. The Armor Break doesn’t stack.
While his Opponent is Bleeding or Armor Broken, his Special Attacks become Unblockable.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Carnage gains 50.0% additional Power from Striking his Opponent. This is reduced by 25.0% per Mutation Buff he has.

synergy.note: Activating a Special Attack 2 Inflict a non-stacking 450 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 20 seconds.
When fighting against #Spider-Verse Heroes, on Special Attack activation, gain a Pursuit Passive for 13 seconds.

signature.title: MUMMUDRAI
lines: When Cassandra would inflict a personal Neuroshock, she deals a burst of 4.9 Energy Damage that scales with Base Attack only.
While Channeling, reduce incoming damage from non-Special Attack 3 hits by 19.9%, doubled while fighting Skill Champions.
When inflicted with Bleed, refresh Cassandra’s 300.0 oldest personal Regeneration Passives.

cards.title: ANTI-SELF
lines: Cassandra’s first Medium Attack is the only Basic Attack that makes contact with the Opponent. All of her attacks deal Energy Damage, and her Heavy Attack can be charged for 300.0 seconds.
When the Opponent gains a Bar of Power, Cassandra inflicts a Fear Passive for 12 seconds.

cards.title: STOP RIGHT THERE
lines: Just before being struck by a Basic Attack while charging or performing a Heavy Attack, Cassandra inflicts a Stun Passive for 0.5 seconds that is paused until the final hit of her Heavy Attack.
When this Stun ends or when Cassandra is knocked down by a Heavy Attack, this Stun goes on cooldown for 10 seconds. This cooldown will not re-trigger while already active.
The duration of personal Stuns and the Stun from the Parry Mastery cannot be reduced. If the Stun from the Parry Mastery is Purified or Cleansed, Cassandra’s Stun cooldown is removed.

cards.title: GENETIC MANIPULATION
lines: The Opponent's maximum Regeneration Rate is always equal to their percentage of remaining Health, and their Disorient Ability Accuracy is reduced by 100.0%.
When an Opponent with a Regeneration effect is Neuroshocked, inflict a non-stacking Marked Passive for 10 seconds, paused while Channeling and during Cassandra’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: DAUNTED PASSIVES
lines: Personal 9.0% Daunted Passives last 15 seconds. These are paused while Channeling, during Cassandra’s Special Attacks, and while the Opponent is Blocking.
On hit or Block, the first landed hit of a Heavy Attack consumes up to -5000.0 hits from the Opponent’s Combo Meter to inflict -1 Daunted for every 2 hits consumed.
If Cassandra is struck while -1+ personal Daunteds are inflicted, or struck while she is suffering from Shock against a Tech Champion, 300.0 personal Daunteds are removed.

cards.title: CHANNELING
lines: While charging a Heavy Attack and at the end of her Special Attacks 1 and 2, Cassandra Channels for up to 3 seconds. As a Defender, she also Channels during her Special Attacks 1 and 2.
Channeling increases the Opponent’s aggression and inflicts -1 personal Daunted every 0.5 seconds. If struck while Channeling, 50.0% of Daunteds inflicted since it started are removed.
While Channeling, releasing a Heavy Attack or activating Special Attack 1 or 2 extends Channeling until the final hit is performed.
While Channeling at the end of a Special Attack 1 or 2, charging a Heavy Attack restarts Channeling and refreshes all personal Daunteds.
Channeling ends if Cassandra stops charging a Heavy Attack or recovering from Special Attacks 1 or 2 for any other reason.

cards.title: NEUROSHOCK PASSIVES
lines: Personal Neuroshock Passives deal 25.0 Energy Damage over 5 seconds, are paused while Channeling or during Cassandra’s Special Attacks, and scale with Base Attack only.
While Cassandra is suffering from Shock against a Tech Champion, personal Neuroshocks cannot be inflicted through Block.

cards.title: PSIONIC ENTITY
lines: Basic Attacks inflict 100.0 personal Neuroshock Passive. As a Defender, these can be inflicted through non-Well-Timed Blocks.
Performing the first hit of Special Attacks 1 or 2 Passively Roots the Opponent for 3 seconds. This Root is paused until the final hit, and removed if the hit is Well-Timed Blocked or Dodged.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a Regeneration Passive healing 20.0% of missing Health over 20 seconds. Max stacks: -1. While active, Cassandra’s Regeneration Rate cannot be reduced below 0%.
The first and final hits inflict 100.0 personal Neuroshock. These can be inflicted through non-Well-Timed Blocks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit that strikes the Opponent or a non-Well-Timed Block inflicts 100.0 personal Neuroshock. If -1 or more consecutive hits are Well-Timed Blocked or Dodged, remove 100.0 personal Neuroshock.
When the Opponent or a non-Well-Timed Block has been struck 3 times, inflict a Reversed Controls Passive for 3 seconds, paused until the final hit of this attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Cassandra consumes all personal Daunteds, and deals a burst of 500.0 Energy Damage with its base potency increased by +-1% flat for each Daunted consumed.
All personal Daunteds are paused for 30 seconds, or until either Champion activates a Special Attack.

synergy.note: Knocking down the Opponent grants a non-stacking +100 Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds.

signature.title: PYM SUIT UPGRADE
lines: Cassie’s Pym Suit is enhanced, and grants her Immunity to Power Steal.
Power Stings have their Stack limit increased by 0.0 (rounded down).
Cassie gains a 0.0% chance to Evade her Opponent’s attacks.

When Cassie's personal Evade triggers, she inflicts a Power Sting Debuff for 14 seconds, dealing a burst of 40.0 Direct Damage if the Opponent activates a Special Attack. As a Defender, this sting can not re-inflict itself.

cards.title: PYM SUIT TECHNOLOGY
lines: Cassie’s highly advanced Pym Suit provides her with Buff Immunity, as well as Immunity to Poison and Shock effects.

Unless otherwise stated, Cassie’s personal Power Stings last 10 seconds and deal a burst of 35.0 Direct Damage if the Opponent launches a Special Attack. These Power Stings are reapplied when the Opponent launches a Special Attack, paused during Cassie’s Special Attacks, and scale with Base Attack only. Max: -1.

cards.title: PYM PARTICLES
lines: As an Attacker, whenever Cassie prevents a Buff via Immunity or causes the Opponent’s Special Attacks to Miss by shrinking down, she gains 100.0 Pym Particle.

Landing a Light Combo Ender consumes all Pym Particles to inflict a Poison Debuff, dealing 10.0 Damage over 2 seconds and reducing Opponent Health recovery by 30%. This duration is increased by 2 seconds for each Pym Particle consumed. This ability cannot be activated with no Pym Particles.
While this Poison is active, Cassie’s Taunt and Power Stings on the Opponent fall off -80.0% slower, including effects that are already active.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Cassie’s Heavy Attack can be charged for an extended duration. While charging, Cassie shrinks down, causing all incoming attacks to have a 100% chance to Miss.

Being shrunken consumes Pym Fuel. Cassie starts with her maximum 30000.0 Pym Fuel and consumes 100 Fuel per second while shrunken. Fuel recharges at a rate of 12 Fuel per second while not performing a Heavy Attack. Running out of fuel overexerts Cassie and leaves her Passively Stunned for 2 seconds.

Cassie generates dormant Power Stings while charging her Heavy Attack. The first hit of her Heavy Attack that lands inflicts 100.0 Power Sting Debuff for each dormant Power Sting. These are removed when Cassie lands her Heavy Attack or has her Heavy Charge interrupted.
Whenever the Opponent Misses due to Cassie being shrunken, she generates 200.0 additional dormant Power Stings.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final hit inflicts a non-stacking 50% Taunt Debuff for 12 seconds.
During this Special Attack, the Opponent’s Combat Power Rate is increased by 300.0% while under 1.5 Bars of Power.

As a Defender, inflict a Combo Detonation Debuff on activation for 12 seconds. If the Opponent does not build 14 Combo before this ability expires, they take a burst of 280.0 Direct Damage, scaling with Base Attack only.
This Debuff starts paused until the end of this Special Attack and cannot be inflicted while it's already active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack gains +15.0 Attack Rating for each Power Sting on the Opponent.
If activated while Cassie’s personal Taunt is active, this Special Attack deals Guaranteed Critical Hits.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Crush Debuff, lasting 10 seconds.
For the rest of the fight, Cassie becomes furious and grows in size! This cannot be triggered multiple times. Being furious grants Cassie the following abilities:
An indefinite Fury Passive, increasing her Attack Rating by 40.0.
+40.0 Physical Resistance.
The duration of all personal Power Stings is increased by 20.0%.

signature.title: χɛMAMɛN (CLAW OF THE BEAR)
lines: Brother Grizzly extends his wisdom, granting a Precision Passive each time the Opponent is Immune to a Bleed effect, increasing Critical Rating by 14.0 for 10 seconds. While Chee’ilth has at least one of these Precision Passives, they can land Critical Hits through Block.
Sister Eagle also provides new assistance, instantly healing 54.0% of all damage dealt to Chee’ilth by Physical Damage effects.

cards.title: OPPOSE THE ONE BELOW ALL
lines: While fighting #Gamma Opponents, Chee’ilth’s personal Debuffs gain 40.0% potency and her Synergy Bonuses gain special [Gamma] enhancements.

cards.title: PERSONAL DEBUFFS
lines: As an Attacker, personal Debuffs gain 30.0% duration.
As a Defender, personal Debuffs can be inflicted through Block.

cards.title: SPIRIT CHARGES
lines: Every 20 seconds, Sister Eagle and Brother Grizzly bestow an indefinite Spirit Charge on Chee’ilth. As a Defender, this timer becomes 1000.0 seconds.
When this timer expires, as well as at the start of each fight, Sister Eagle grants 200.0 indefinite Cleanse Passives. Max: -1.
Brother Grizzly grants +30.0 Critical Damage Rating and +15.0% Bleed potency per Spirit Charge.

cards.title: SISTER EAGLE THE HEALER
lines: While Blocking the Opponent’s attacks, their Attack Rating is capped at 100.0% of what it was at the start of the fight.
Well-Timed Blocks reduce this Attack Rating cap to 50.0%. Each Well-Timed Block also shortens the Spirit Charge timer by 5 seconds.

cards.title: BROTHER GRIZZLY THE WARRIOR
lines: Chee’ilth’s Bleed Debuffs deal 52.5 Direct Damage over 9 seconds.
Striking the Opponent with the Adze Axe inflicts a Bleed Debuff.
Brother Grizzly shortens the Spirit Charge timer by 7 seconds each time Chee'ilth Punishes a Heavy Attack or Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a Grizzly’s Grit Passive for 16 seconds which counts as a Grit Passive. While Grizzly’s Grit is active, all attacks gain a 50.0% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a non-stacking Eagle’s Tranquilize Debuff for 12 seconds which counts as a -50.0% Tranquilize Debuff. While Eagle’s Tranquilize is active, Chee’ilth cannot Miss. Each time a Debuff or Miss is prevented, pause Eagle’s Tranquilize for 3.0 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a 15 second Regeneration Buff, healing 50.0% of Health lost this fight or 30.0% of missing health, whichever is greater.

signature.title: ARC SHIELD
lines: Civil Warrior begins the fight with 2 indefinite Armor Up Buffs.

Blocking during the opponent’s Special Attack inflicts them with a Passive Weakness, reducing their Attack Rating by 14.5%. This is also true if Civil Warrior was Blocking prior to a Special Attack 3.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Civil Warrior’s combination of Super Soldier Serum and advanced Stark Tech renders him Immune to Nullify and Stagger effects.
For each Armor Up Buff active on Civil Warrior, reduce the opponent’s Bleed and Poison Ability Accuracy by -25.0%.

cards.title: PERSONAL ARMOR UP BUFFS
lines: Unless otherwise stated, Civil Warrior’s Armor Up Buffs provide +10.0 Armor Rating and last 11 seconds.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Every 500.0th basic attack that either Champion throws has a 100.0% chance to grant 1 Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: DASH BACK AND HOLD BLOCK FOR 1.2 SECONDS.
lines: Civil Warrior converts all of his Armor Up Buffs into Fury Buffs, with each providing +12.0 Attack Rating for 12 seconds.
These Fury Buffs have a Max Stack of 5000.0 and are Refreshed each time an Armor Up Buff is converted this way.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: When launched: Pause all Armor Up Buffs for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Gain up to 400.0 Armor Up Buff(s). 100.0% chance each.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: The opponent is Passively Power Locked during this attack.
100.0% chance to inflict Power Drain, removing 100.0 Bar(s) of Power. If the target is reduced to 0 Power, they also receive a Power Lock Debuff for 10 seconds, preventing them from gaining Power.

signature.title: THE MIGHTY COLOSSUS!
lines: Whenever one of Colossus' Immunities protects him from an effect, he has a 23.0% chance to gain an Armor Up Buff, lasting 15 seconds.
Colossus has a 16.0% chance to convert an expiring Armor Up Buff into a permanent one.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: At the start of the fight, Colossus gains a number of indefinite Armor Up Buffs equal to 200.0 plus the number of X-Men Champions on his team, including himself.

cards.title: PERSONAL ARMOR UP BUFFS
lines: Unless otherwise stated, Colossus’s Armor Up Buffs provide 10.0 Armor Rating.
Additionally for each Armor Up Buff Colossus has, he gains an additional 15.0 Critical Damage Rating.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED OR WHEN ATTACKING
lines: If Colossus' Ability Accuracy is below 100%, he gains +100.0% Combat Power Rate for the duration of the attack.

cards.title: ENEMY CRITICAL HITS
lines: Damage is capped at 150.0% of the opponent's Attack rating.
Each time this damage cap is hit, the duration of Colossus' Armor Up Buffs are refreshed. Additionally he has a 50.0% chance to gain an additional Armor Up Buff lasting 15 seconds.

cards.title: WELL TIMED BLOCKS
lines: 100.0% chance to gain an Armor Up Buff, lasting 15 seconds.
If contact is made by basic attacks, Colossus has a 100.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff lasting 1 seconds.
If Colossus has the Parry Mastery, this Stun Debuff is disabled and instead a successful Parry also deals 50.0 direct damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL AND HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Attack rating is increased by up to +200.0, based on Colossus’s Armor Rating.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: If the Opponent has a Stun Debuff, Colossus’s Heavy Attacks have a 100% chance to Purify the Stun and grant a Passive Fury increasing Attack by up to +350.0, based on Colossus’s Armor, for 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Gain an indefinite Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack is Unblockable.

When activated, for each Armor Up Buff, Colossus has a 50.0% chance to gain another lasting 15 seconds. These Buffs do not count towards the Max Stack limit, allowing Colossus to temporarily go above his Armor Up Buff limit.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict an indefinite Passive Fatigue on the opponent, reducing their Critical Rating by -50.0.

synergy.note: Use a Heavy or Special Attack to knock down an opponent that used Evade or Auto-Block in a fight. Once this mission is complete, his True Damage becomes True Strike.

signature.title: GLAIVE OF IMMORTALITY
lines: As long as Glaive’s Immunity is active, Corvus Glaive cannot die. Instead of dying, 400.0 Glaive charges are removed. If Corvus performed a Well Timed Block against that attack, 2 Glaive charges are removed instead.
If Corvus is able to spend all of his Glaive charges in less than 30 seconds since they were first activated, the cooldown to get them back is reduced by -20.0%.

cards.title: MISSIONS FROM THANOS
lines: Corvus Glaive has 4.0 missions to accomplish. Whenever completing a mission, he gains 1 Persistent Charge and a Cruelty Buff, increasing his Critical Damage Rating by 60.0. Missions can be completed in any order.
Corvus Glaive starts the fight with a number of the above Cruelty Buffs equal to his Persistent Charge.
Mission 1: Eliminate Avengers: Knockout a member of the Avengers. Once this mission is complete, Corvus gains 10 additional Glaive charges when fighting against a member of the Avengers.
Mission 2: Sabotage Technology: Knockout a Tech Champion. Once this mission is complete, Tech Champions have -25.0% reduced Ability Accuracy.
Mission 3: Hunt the Uncanny: Knockout a Mutant Champion. Grants Safeguard against opponent’s Special 2 Attacks if the synergy with Wolverine, X-23 or Storm is active.

Mission 4: Challenge Defenses: Use a Heavy or Special Attack to knock down an opponent that used Evade or Auto-Block in a fight. Once this mission is complete, his True Damage Buff becomes a True Strike Buff if the synergy with Proxima Midnight is active.

cards.title: GLAIVE’S IMMUNITY
lines: Corvus Glaive does not take damage from Coldsnap, Bleed and Shock Debuffs, nor Frostbite, while Glaive’s Immunity is active. When Glaive’s immunity reactivates or is disabled, those Debuffs are Purified and Corvus takes 20.0 damage.

At the start of the fight, Corvus gains 2000.0 permanent Glaive charges, granting him True Damage and guaranteed Critical Hits with his glaive as long as Glaive’s Immunity is active. A charge is spent every time Corvus hits with a Basic Attack using his glaive.
Corvus Glaive can trigger Critical Hits through an enemy Block.
Corvus’ blade is damaged after he uses all of his Glaive charges, disabling Glaive’s Immunity for 50 seconds. Corvus cannot inflict Critical Hits while Glaive’s Immunity is disabled.
When Glaive’s Immunity reactivates if Corvus has 0 Glaive Charges, he regains all of his Glaive charges.

cards.title: WHEN KNOCKED DOWN
lines: Corvus’ blade is damaged if Corvus is Knocked Down by a Heavy or Special Attack, disabling Glaive’s Immunity for 3 seconds.

cards.title: WELL TIMED BLOCKS
lines: Inflicts an Armor Break, reducing the opponents Armor Rating by -15.0 for 4 seconds. Additional Armor Breaks are inflicted for each active Armor Up effect on the opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: When Glaive’s Immunity is active, this Special Attack is Unblockable and instantly drains 20% of the opponent’s Power if they are at max Power.

synergy.note: Whenever an Energy Build Up is inflicted, also inflict a 15% Decelerate Debuff lasting 18 seconds.

signature.title: IONIC RECHARGE
lines: During Ionic Overcharge, Passively Regenerate 9.3% of the Health denied to the Opponent due to any reduced Regeneration Rate. Each tick of this healing cannot exceed 0.2 Health, scaling with Base Health.
When the Opponent gains 180.7% of a Bar of Power from a Passive or Buff within 0.5 seconds, instantly gain 50.0 Ionic Charges. Then activate Ionic Overcharge.
This also triggers when they gain 32.1% of their Max Health for any reason within 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Count Nefaria’s body is composed of Ionic Energy, granting Immunity to Power Steal and Bleed effects, and -90.0% Shock and Incinerate Resistance.

cards.title: ENERGY BUILD UP
lines: Whenever the Opponent fills a Bar of Power, they gain 1500.0 Stored Energy.
For every 1.0% of the Opponent's Max Health or Power they would gain from a Buff or Passive, they gain 200.0 Stored Energy. This is unaffected by reduced Regeneration or Ability Power Rates.
Every -1000.0 Stored Energy is automatically converted into an indefinite Energy Build Up Debuff.

cards.title: WELL-TIMED BLOCKS
lines: When Count Nefaria would Block a Basic Attack or the final hit of a Special Attack with or just after a Well-Timed Block, he has a 100.0% chance to Evade instead.
This Evade has a cooldown of 11 seconds, but the cooldown is ignored for Evading Special Attacks.
When Evading, Count Nefaria Counter-Attacks. On hit this deals a burst of 30.0 Energy Damage and inflicts 2 Energy Build Ups.
If the Opponent's Special Attack is punished after Evading it, inflict a -50.0 Energy Vulnerability Debuff for 18 seconds.

cards.title: IONIC CHARGES
lines: Gain 1000.0 Ionic Charges when performing a Well-Timed Block.
Lose 2000.0 Ionic Charges when Count Nefaria would be inflicted with a Bleed effect while fighting a non-Mystic Champion.
Ionic Charges grant up to +110.0 Attack Rating, maxing out at 100 Charges.
They also grant up to +70.0 Physical and Energy Resistance and 90.0% Degeneration Resistance, maxing out at 100 Charges.

cards.title: IONIC OVERCHARGE
lines: At 10000.0 Ionic Charges, activate Ionic Overcharge for 17 seconds. It is paused during Count Nefaria’s Special Attacks. Lose 10000.0 Charges when it expires.
During Ionic Overcharge, all of Count Nefaria’s attacks are non-contact and deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
Additionally, the Opponent’s Regeneration and Ability Power Rates are reduced by 95.0%, and when they gain Ability Power he gains 60.0% of the Power denied this way.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final 4 hits each devour 200.0 Energy Build Ups. This can trigger through Block and is unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
Each devoured Energy Build Up grants 16 Ionic Charges, 2.0% of his missing Health, and 9.0% of a Bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a +12.0 Fury Passive per 10 Ionic Charges, each lasting 16.0 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
The final hit inflicts an Incinerate Debuff, dealing 130.0 Energy Damage over 6 seconds.
Against Mystic Champions, inflict a Plasma Debuff instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 5000.0 Ionic Charges, then activate Ionic Overcharge.
Pause Ionic Overcharge for 10 seconds.

synergy.note: [Contempt] Gain Immunity to Nullify.
[Contempt] Gain Immunity to Stagger.

signature.title: HYDRA TRAINING
lines: Brock Rumlow’s brutal Hydra Training allows him a 39.0% chance to Purify incoming Debuffs. Each time he does so, he gains a Fury Buff. Chance temporarily decreases for consecutive triggers.

cards.title: PERSONAL FURY BUFFS
lines: Unless otherwise stated, Crossbones’ Fury Buffs grant +45.0 Attack Rating for 9 seconds. These Fury Buffs gain increased Potency equal to 20.0% of Crossbones’s Critical Damage Multiplier.

cards.title: CRITICAL HIT REPLACEMENT
lines: Crossbones’ hydraulic gauntlets prevent him from landing Critical Hits. Whenever he would land one, he instead gains a Fury Buff.

cards.title: CONTEMPT FOR HEROES
lines: While fighting #Hero Champions, Crossbones’ abilities gain special [Contempt] bonuses.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Reduce the opponent’s Defensive Ability Accuracy by 20% for each Fury Buff active. [Contempt] Reduction becomes -25.0% instead.

cards.title: OVERRUN
cards.trigger: DASH BACK AND HOLD BLOCK FOR 1.2 SECONDS
lines: Once activated, Overrun remains active for 12 seconds, after which it must go on cooldown for 800.0 seconds.
On Activation: Refresh the duration of all Personal Fury Buffs and gain 200.0 new ones. [Contempt] Gain an additional Fury Buff.
While Active: Hits on the opponent ignore positive Physical Resistance and gain +50.0% Combat Power Rate.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Spend 1 Fury Buff to Pause all remaining Fury Buffs for 5 seconds. If this attack Intercepts the opponent or strikes them while they are recovering from a Special Attack, it does not cost a Fury Buff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a Fury Buff.
[Contempt] Gain 200.0 an additional Fury Buff(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: [Contempt] Inflict an additional Incinerate Debuff.

signature.title: ENFORCED OBLIVION
lines: Once Cull Obsidian’s Rout Buff has expired, it goes into cool down, and can be reactivated after 30 seconds.
When Rout enters cool down, Cull’s aggression is awarded with a Fury Buff, granting +100.0 Attack for 4 seconds. This Buff gains +0.5 seconds duration for each hit landed while Rout was active.

cards.title: THANOS'S FAVOR
lines: At the beginning of the fight, 1 Thanos’s Favor Buff is gained per Persistent Charge. These Buffs last 10 seconds each and they gain effects based on the number of charges. These Buffs have their duration paused for 250.0 second each time an attack is landed.
Thanos has directed Cull to spread the maximum possible amount of mayhem, allowing him to start with 300.0 Persistent Charges in Battlegrounds or in the first fight of Alliance War.

cards.title: MISSIONS FROM THANOS
lines: Cull Obsidian has 300.0 Missions to complete, which may be done in any order. Each Mission can be completed multiple times and doing so grants 1 Persistent Charge.
Mission 1: Break their Defenses: Knockout any Champion.
Mission 2: Crush their Hope: Knockout an Avenger.
Mission 3: End their Resistance: Knockout a Champion without the Combo Meter being lost due to being struck during the fight.

cards.title: THANOS’S FAVOR BUFFS
lines: 1+ Each Buff grants +10.0 Attack.
3+ Gain an indefinite True Accuracy Passive for the duration of the Buffs.
5+ Each Buff grants +10.0 Critical Damage Rating.
8+ Each Buff grants +5.0% Rout Buff duration.

cards.title: ON WELL-TIMED BLOCKS
lines: Cull Obsidian’s unique shield is able to Stun opponents with the Parry Mastery even against attacks that don't make contact.

cards.title: DASH BACK AND HOLD BLOCK FOR 1.2 SECONDS
lines: Cull Obsidian overcharges his weapon to gain a Rout Buff for 8 seconds. This causes his opponent to suffer -100.0% Auto-Block Ability Accuracy and also grants his attacks an additional burst of Energy Damage equal to 120.0% of the damage dealt.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Cull Obsidian’s overwhelming presence reduces the opponent’s Armor Up Ability Accuracy by -100.0% during his Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Combat expertise grants 1000.0 Combo Shield Buffs. When struck, 1 Combo Shield Buff is lost instead of the Combo Meter resetting. Max: 10 Combo Shield Buffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: +10.0 Attack for each Persistent Charge.

synergy.note: For the first 1 second of each fight, Cyclops has a 100% chance to Evade and Counter-Attack dealing 200% of Attack as a burst of Energy Damage on hit. Additionally, he Evades the first time he would be struck during a Medium Attack

signature.title: TO ME, MY X-MEN
lines: Leading the charge, Cyclops stores 48.3% of the damage taken from Bleeds and from Physical Thorns as Adrenaline.

For each other #X-Men Champion on the team, Cyclops enters his first fight with a Persistent Tactician Charge, each increasing his personal Prowess potency by +0.2% flat, and his personal True Focus and Precision durations by +1 second. Winning a fight grants Cyclops +1 Charge. Max stacks: 10.

cards.title: CALM UNDER PRESSURE
lines: Always at the ready, Cyclops's Defensive Ability Accuracy cannot be reduced.
As an Attacker, rather than running forward when not performing an action, Cyclops stands still. This stoicism unnerves the Opponent and makes them more aggressive.
Start each fight against non-Tech Champions with a True Focus Buff for 10 seconds, refreshed when gaining a personal Precision. If not active, it retriggers when Cyclops activates any Special Attack.

cards.title: PRECISION
lines: A master marksman, Cyclops’s Precision Passives increase his Critical Rating by +5.0 for 10 seconds. These expire one at a time and are refreshed when he gains a new one. Max stacks: 20.
The third Basic Attack in a combo grants Cyclops a Precision Passive.
Intercepting the Opponent grants Cyclops a Precision Passive. Intercepting with a Special Attack grants +4 additional Precisions.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: At 10+ personal Precisions, Cyclops’s Special Attacks are Passively Unblockable.
For each personal Precision, the first hit of a Special Attack that lands grants Cyclops a +20% Prowess Passive for 2 seconds. Max stacks: 100.
Personal effects are refreshed and paused during Cyclops’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a 20% Power Efficiency Passive for 2 seconds. Max stacks: 2.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a non-stacking 30% Power Efficiency Passive for 2 seconds.
On activation, gain 5 personal Precision Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On activation, gain a 5% Power Efficiency Passive for 2 seconds.
As an Attacker, this Special Attack can only be activated with at least 20 personal Precisions and only once per fight, but it costs 100% less Power.

signature.title: BARBED ARROWS
lines: If a Neuroshock or Stun Debuff is removed for any reason other than expiry, 20.0% chance to inflict a Neuroshock Passive dealing 64.0 Energy Damage over 8 seconds. This is not affected by Ability Accuracy Reduction.
When the Opponent’s Health is at or below 10%, inflict an indefinite Marked Passive.

cards.title: ILLUSION
lines: When either Champion’s Combo Meter passes a multiple of 10, gain a non-stacking indefinite Illusion. An Illusion is lost when Knocked Down.
Gain an Illusion when inflicted with Disorient, Fragility, or Intimidate. Dani will attempt to regain Illusion every 10 seconds if Illusion is consumed while suffering from these effects.

When Dani would Block a Basic Attack, she consumes an Illusion to inflict a 150.0% Falter Passive. This Falter lasts 2.5 seconds, is not affected by Ability Accuracy Reduction, and is paused during Dani’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: NEURAL ARROWS
lines: When the Opponent Misses, gain an indefinite Neural Arrow. As a Defender, hitting the Opponent’s Block while Dani has an Illusion also grants a Neural Arrow.

For each Neural Arrow, the final hit of Dani’s Special Attacks inflicts a Neuroshock Debuff dealing 64.0 Energy Damage over 8 seconds. All Neural Arrows are removed at the end of Dani’s Special Attacks.
Against Skill Champions, Neuroshocks are inflicted on Special activation. Skill Champions cannot heal while suffering from Neuroshock.

cards.title: PROWESS EFFECTS
lines: Unless otherwise stated, Dani’s Prowess effects are indefinite and have 15.0% potency. If her Prowess effects fail to trigger or are removed by the Opponent, gain a Neural Arrow.
Gain a Prowess Buff when Faltering the Opponent, and one more each time Dani strikes a Faltered Opponent. As a Defender, striking the Opponent while Dani has an Illusion also grants a Prowess Buff.
Activating a Special Attack with Neural Arrows removes all personal Prowess Buffs and replaces them with Prowess Passives. All personal Prowess effects are removed at the end of the Special Attack.
All personal Prowess Passives gained during Special Attacks gain 80% potency for each Neural Arrow.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On the first hit, inflict a Slow Passive for 24 seconds.
Just before the final hit, gain an Unblockable Passive lasting 1 second for each Neural Arrow.
The final hit inflicts a non-stacking -50.0 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 30 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit grants a 10.0% Impact Passive for 5 seconds. This can trigger through Block.
Activating this Special Attack with 5 or more Neural Arrows inflicts a 70% Overload Passive for 25 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This Special Attack costs -6.0% less power, and costs an additional -6.0% less for each Neural Arrow.
After this attack, gain 600.0 Prowess Buffs. The limit for personal Prowess Buffs is increased to 10 until the end of the next Special Attack.

synergy.note: Knock the opponent down: 100% chance to inflict a 12 second Disorient Debuff, reducing Defensive Ability Accuracy & Block Proficiency by 35%.
Whenever the Combo Meter rises past a multiple of 10, gain a True Accuracy Passive for 8 seconds. When fighting Science Champions, gain a True Strike Passive instead.

signature.title: SINNER OR SAINT
lines: Murdock Boy - Exiting this mode has a 100% chance to grant a stacking 5.9 second Rage Debuff with no effect.
Stick’s Apprentice - While in this mode, attacks reduce the damage of the Opponent's Passive Degeneration and Direct Damage effects by -49.0% for 0.2 second(s).

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: An enhanced sensory system allows Daredevil to bypass Miss.

cards.title: FIGHT START
lines: Base Regeneration Rate is set at 40.0% instead of the normal 100%.
Immune to all effects that modify Regeneration Rate, except Poison.

cards.title: MURDOCK BOY
lines: The unbreakable spirit of Battlin’ Jack Murdock grants the following:

When inflicted with a non-damaging Debuff, one of each non-damaging Debuff is Purified after 0.5 seconds. Each time this ability triggers, Devil of H.K. gains +500.0 Combo Meter. This ability goes on Cooldown for 2.0 seconds once activated.
Passive +60.0 Physical Resistance against Basic Attacks.

cards.title: STICK'S APPRENTICE
lines: The assassin training of Stick grants the following:
+30.0 Critical Rating.
Attacks reduce the opponent’s Defensive Ability Accuracy by -65.0%.
+25.0 Attack Rating for each Non-Damaging Debuff on the Devil of H.K. This bonus decreases by 5.0% for each additional Debuff.
When struck, -100.0 Combo Meter is lost.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit spends 10.0 Combo Meter to grant a 100% chance to gain a stacking Cruelty Buff, increasing Critical Damage Rating by +85.0 for 14 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to boost Critical Rating by 25.0 for 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit spends 5.0 Combo Meter to grant a 100% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff, causing 125.0 direct damage over 5 seconds.
At the end of the attack, gain a Rage Debuff with no effect, lasting 12 seconds. When this Debuff ends, it is replaced with a Fury Buff, granting +80.0 Attack rating for 25.0 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100% chance to gain a Righteous Wrath Passive for 70 seconds. While active, The Devil of H.K.’s basic attacks have a 35.0% chance to inflict an instant Bleed, causing 120.0% of the damage dealt by the attack as direct damage.

synergy.note: Intercepting the Opponent grants a non-stacking +125 Precision Buff for 12 seconds.

signature.title: EASE INTO DARKNESS
lines: As a Defender, gain a Phoenix Rising Charge at -1+ Ember Charges.
At the start of each fight, lower the Health threshold on Safeguard by 7.8%.
While Immortal, Special Attacks are Passively Unblockable.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Dark Phoenix’s phenomenal cosmic power grants her Immunity to Incinerate, Nova Flame, and Power Drain.
Dark Phoenix’s Ability and Combat Power Rates cannot be reduced by more than 50.0%.
If any of Dark Phoenix’s personal Buffs fail due to Ability Accuracy reduction or are removed due to Stagger or Nullify, they re-trigger as a Passive.

cards.title: A PHOENIX’S FLAME - EMBER CHARGES
lines: Ember Charges are indefinite and increase the potency of Dark Phoenix's Nova Flame by 20.0% per Charge.
+100.0 Charge when landing a second Medium Attack or when Dark Phoenix’s Safeguard prevents damage.
-100.0 Charge when Dark Phoenix is knocked down by a Special Attack.
+500.0 Ember Charges at the start of each fight as a Defender.

cards.title: LIFE-FORCE CONTROL
lines: At the start of each fight, Dark Phoenix gains a 5.0% Safeguard Buff for 10.5 seconds. The damage threshold of this effect is 20% lower when Phoenix has Class Advantage, 40% higher when she has Class Disadvantage, and its potency cannot be otherwise modified.
This Safeguard is removed when the Opponent activates a Special Attack 3, and, as an Attacker, after reducing damage. This Buff re-activates every 10 seconds.
At 5+ Ember Charges, Safeguard also reduces the potency of incoming Damaging effects and Power Stings from Champions by -75.0%.

cards.title: A PHOENIX RISING - NOVA FLAME
lines: Upon reaching 10+ Ember Charges for the first time each fight, Dark Phoenix gains a Phoenix Rising Charge.
This Charge is consumed when Dark Phoenix would be Knocked Out, granting an Immortality Buff for 12 seconds.

Upon consumption, the Opponent is inflicted with a 100.0 Nova Flame Passive for 20 seconds, reducing Block Proficiency by 60%. As a Defender this scales with Base Attack only. If suffering from Poison when activated, the duration is reduced by 20.0% per Poison. Max reduction from Poison inflicted by non-Mystics: 40%.
Dark Phoenix passively Regenerates Health equal to 100.0% of the Energy Damage caused while Immortal.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Pulverize 2 Armor Up effects if any are active, dealing a burst of 25.0 Direct Damage per Armor Up removed.
Removing an Armor Up this way grants 100.0 Ember Charge.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Upon finishing her Special Attacks, Dark Phoenix continues siphoning energy from the Phoenix Force over 3 seconds. Upon expiry, she inflicts the Opponent with her personal Nova Flame.
Striking her during this time disrupts her channeling, reducing the duration of this Nova Flame by -13.0% per hit.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain an Unstoppable Buff for 5 seconds. As an Attacker, the duration is decreased by 5% per Ember Charge, excluding permanent ones.
On activation, gain 300.0 Ember Charges. Then, if at 5+ Ember Charges, gain a Power Gain Buff granting 15.0% of Max Power over 5 seconds. Max stacks: 2. As an Attacker, this gains +-1% flat potency.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, Dark Phoenix’s telekinetic powers inflict a Root Passive until after the last hit.
On activation, gain a non-stacking +30.0 Fury Buff for 35 seconds. This Fury gains +-1% flat potency per Ember Charge.
As an Attacker, at the end of this attack consume half of all Ember Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain +300.0 permanent Ember Charges which cannot be removed. Max stacks: 9.
Inflict an indefinite Nova Flame Passive, dealing 2.5 Energy Damage per second. As a Defender, this scales with Base Attack only. Max stacks: 3.
Gain a non-stacking Power Gain Buff, granting 100.0% of Max Power over 30 seconds.

synergy.note: Once per Quest when receiving damage that would knock her out, Dazzler gains an Immortality Buff for 6 seconds.
Performing a Dazzling Dash inflicts an Incinerate Debuff dealing 20% of Attack as Energy Damage over 10 seconds.
Gain Incinerate Immunity thanks to Lockheed’s assistance.

signature.title: SOUNDS OF LIGHT AND FURY
lines: During her hits, Dazzler takes no Physical Damage and instead reflects -26.1% of it back at the Opponent as a burst of Energy Damage.
Performing a Dazzling Dash grants a Pursuit Passive for 1.93147212 seconds, paused until the end of the Dash.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Dazzler won’t let anything cramp her style. She’s Immune to bad vibes, and also Nullify.
Be cool, not cruel. If Dazzler’s Opponent isn’t a Tech Champion, their Critical Damage Rating is set to 0 and cannot be increased.
No stopping this light show. If Dazzler's Opponent has the Stand Your Ground Mastery active, it is removed.
While Dodging back, Dazzler cannot be struck by attacks. She does not benefit from the Dexterity Mastery, but she builds 1 Tempo when Dodging a Special Attack hit.

cards.title: TEMPO
lines: Dazzler builds up Tempo as excitement mounts for her performance.
Light and Medium Attacks build 1 Tempo, or 5 if the attack strikes the Opponent while they are standing up.
Heavy Attacking a non-Stunned Opponent builds 5 Tempo. Dazzler’s personal Stun Passive does not count against this.
As a Defender, each hit in the Attacker’s Combo Meter builds 1 Tempo.

cards.title: DAZZLING DASH ATTACKS
lines: Building 1000.0 Tempo sets the stage for a Dazzling Dash Attack. Only one Dazzling Dash Attack may be readied at a time.
Once readied, Dashing forwards from outside striking distance or during the Opponent’s Special Attack inflicts a Falter Passive for 1.2 seconds, paused until the end of the Dash.
If Blocked, a Dazzling Dash Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for 1.5 seconds. As an Attacker, on hit or on Block it also deals a burst of 2.0 Energy Damage per Tempo.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Tapping Block in rhythm with the 4 blasts builds 10 Tempo each.
The final hit inflicts a non-stacking -40.0 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 30 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If Dazzler is not suffering from Cowardice, after activation she gains 10% Resonance, +10.0 Fury, and +10% Prowess Buffs until the end of the attack. These potencies increase by +1% flat per Tempo.
If the Opponent is suffering from a personal Energy Vulnerability, after activation Dazzler also gains an Unblockable Buff until the end of the attack.

Tapping Block in rhythm with the first 5 lasers grants Dazzler +20.0 Precision Buffs until the end of the attack. If Dazzler reaches at least 4 of these Precisions, the final laser is a Guaranteed Critical Hit.
At the end of this Special Attack, reset Dazzler’s Tempo.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Dazzler kicks things into High Tempo for 4000.0 seconds, allowing her to build up to 150 Tempo and doubling all Tempo gains.
A Perfect result in the Special 3 Mini Game increases this to 60 seconds, or 50 if the result was semi-Perfect.

synergy.note: Heavy Attacks inflict a non-stacking Armor Break Debuff, reducing Armor Rating by -700 for 10 second(s). Reverberate this!

signature.title: HEALING FACTOR
lines: Permanently regenerating up to 36.0 Health per minute was granted when the natural healing factor of Wolverine was implanted into Deadpool. Regeneration amount is tied to Deadpool's Power Meter.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Dropping below 20.0% Health activates Regeneration, recovering up to 38.0 Health over 6 seconds. This occurs only once per fight, and the amount Healed is tied to the Power Meter.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff, dealing 290.0 Direct Damage over 5.5 seconds.

synergy.note: Heavy Attacks inflict a non-stacking Armor Break Debuff, reducing Armor Rating by -700 for 10 second(s). Reverberate this!

signature.title: SUPERCILIOUSLY SAVAGE SLANDER
lines: Each time the Opponent Purifies a Taunt Debuff or a Taunt Debuff on the Opponent is replaced due to hitting the max stack limit, Deadpool gains a Power Efficiency Buff reducing the cost of Special Attacks by -20.0% until the next Special Attack is used. Cooldown: 26 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Against Skill Champions, each Shbleed Dooboof Passive up to -1 reduces their Regeneration Rate by -5.0%.

cards.title: TAUNT
cards.trigger: I’M THE MERC’ WITH THE MOUTH, BABY!
lines: Deadpool can inflict Taunt Debuffs on the opponent, reducing the opponent’s Attack Rating by -25.0% for 16 seconds. Max Stacks: -1.
Inflict a Taunt Debuff each time the opponent fails to activate a Buff or Debuff during a basic attack. Cooldown: 4 seconds(s).
Inflict a Taunt Debuff by landing a Heavy Attack.

cards.title: ON FOURTH LIGHT ATTACK
lines: Deadpool’s Special Attack 3 is disabled for 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: BLEED DEBUFFS
lines: All attacks inflict a Bleed Debuff, dealing 40.0 Direct Damage over 4 seconds. Cooldown: 4.0 seconds.

Opponents that Purify, Cleanse, or use an LMD to remove these Bleed Debuffs are instead inflicted with a Shbleed Dooboof. They’re basically the same, except they’re Passive, deal 70.0% more damage, and have a different, dumber name. HEY!
If the Opponent is suffering from a Daunted effect, all Duodenum Bleeds instead inflict an Instant Shbleed Dooboof dealing a burst of 65.0 Direct Damage.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACK
lines: While walking forward, or landing Light Attacks 1 and 3, Deadpool builds up indefinite Slap Charges. Max stacks: -1.
While at max Slap Charges, slapping the Opponent with a Heavy Attack inflicts -1 stacks of Duodenum Poke Bleed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: During this attack Duodenum Poke does not have a Cooldown.
If at -1 Slap Charges, the final hit triggers Super Slap, inflicting an additional 2000.0 Duodenum Bleeds, increased to 25 against Skill Champions.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This is Deadpool’s Fav Attack and while fighting as a Defender he is 100.0% more likely to use it over other Special Attacks.
Each hit that is Blocked inflicts a Taunt Debuff.

signature.title: TOXIC EXPERIMENTATION
lines: While Poisoned, Diablo takes 14.0% reduced damage from all sources.
While the opponent is Poisoned, Diablo gains +9.0 Attack Rating.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Diablo’s alchemical self-experimentation grants the following:
+20.0 Energy Resistance.
Incoming Poison effects suffer --100.0% Potency.
Basic Attacks deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.

cards.title: MASTER ALCHEMIST
lines: In the Pre-Fight Menu, Diablo can add up to 300.0 Alchemical Ingredients to his Philosopher’s Mix Passive for the fight. He has unlimited Ingredients but can only add 1 of each type to a fight.
For each Ingredient type not used, gain 2 indefinite Vial of Might, granting +6.0 Attack Rating & +10% Poison Potency. Max Stacks: 8.

cards.title: PHILOSOPHER'S MIX
lines: Philosopher's Mix lasts 8 seconds per level of Special Attack used and heals Diablo 0.4 health every second. It also gains effects based on which Ingredients were added in the Pre-Fight Menu.
Distilled Will: Incoming Energy Damage causes Diablo to Passively Heal 7000.0% of the damage taken.
Essence of Null: Every 2 seconds, 100.0% chance to Nullify 1 Buff on the opponent.
Grain of Uru: Gain Immunity to Stun effects & Armor Break Debuffs.

cards.title: PERSONAL POISON DEBUFFS
lines: Unless otherwise stated, Diablo’s Poison Debuffs inflict 68.0 direct damage over 14 seconds and reduce healing effects by 30%.
Heavy Attack: Each hit has 100.0% chance to inflict a Poison Debuff.
Medium Attack 2: 75.0% chance to inflict a Poison Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After the attack, Diablo will drink from his flask. If he drinks for 1.5 seconds, he gains a Regeneration Passive, recovering 7.0 Health over 4.0 seconds. If his drink is interrupted, he gains a Vial of Might and Pauses all Poison effects on the opponent for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack is Unblockable and deals a burst of 50.0 Energy Damage. This burst of damage increases by +20.0% for each Buff & Poison that the opponent has gained this fight. Max Bonus: +500%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack can only be used once per fight.
This attack gains +50.0 Attack rating. It also gains effects based on which Alchemical Ingredients have been added to the Flask.
Distilled Will: Gain a Regeneration Passive, healing 10.0 Health over 4 seconds.
Essence of Null: Places 10 Detonate Buffs on the opponent, which last 20 seconds and deal a burst of 20.0 Energy Damage when they expire or are Nullified.
Grain of Uru: Philosopher’s Mix is Paused for 10 seconds.
For each Vial of Might: 100.0% chance to inflict 200.0 Poison Debuff(s).

signature.title: ASK NOT FOR WHOM THE BONG TOLLS
lines: When Doctor Bong would be struck by a Combo-Ending Attack, he executes a Reversal. Cooldown: 15 seconds.
Doctor Bong’s Heavy Proficiency Buff gains 9.6% increased potency.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: The incomparable Doctor Bong is Immune to Nullify and Power Sting.
As a genius, Doctor Bong fights using his head. Charging a Heavy Attack grants him an Unblockable Buff until the end of his Heavy or Special Attack.

cards.title: PURIFY
lines: For each Debuff on him, Doctor Bong has a 20% chance to Purify incoming Debuffs, increased to 50% against non-Damaging Debuffs. Doctor Bong can’t Purify Stun Debuffs.
When Doctor Bong Purifies a Debuff, he gains +5 Combo.

cards.title: GUARANTEED CRITICAL HITS
lines: After Doctor Bong’s Combo Meter reaches a multiple of 5, he gains an indefinite Guaranteed Critical Passive.
When Doctor Bong Critically Hits with a Basic Attack, he loses 1 personal Guaranteed Critical Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Activating a Special Attack grants Doctor Bong a +180.0 Heavy Proficiency Buff for 30 seconds. This will not re-trigger while active and expires 90% slower during the Opponent’s Special Attacks, but expires 10% faster for each active personal Reverb.
Doctor Bong bongs his bell 3 times in each Special Attack. Each bong grants him an indefinite 8.3% Reverb Buff per level of the Special.
Gaining these Reverbs restores 5 seconds to Doctor Bong’s Heavy Proficiency's duration. Critical Hits restore 3 seconds. When the Heavy Proficiency ends, all personal Reverbs are removed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a Panic Debuff for 20 seconds. Critical Hits restore 5 seconds to this duration.
While at 9 or more Reverbs, the final hit inflicts a Stun Debuff for a fixed 1.8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each of the 5 hits grant Doctor Bong +5 additional Combo Meter.
While at 9 or more Reverbs, the final hit inflicts a Stun Debuff for a fixed 4 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain an indefinite Bong Buff, increasing the base duration of Doctor Bong’s Heavy Proficiency Buff by +10 seconds. Max stacks: 3. Any Bong Buffs gained while already at max stacks grants 3 personal Reverb Buffs.
Inflict a Stun Debuff for a fixed 4 seconds.

synergy.note: Gain Passive Prowess whenever a Blessing activates, increasing Special Attack damage by 15%. These last until the end of the Synergy Champion's next Special Attack, and are capped at 3.
Gain Immunity to Coldsnap. While charging a Heavy Attack, gain an Unstoppable Passive and +60% Combat Adrenaline.

signature.title: WELL OF UNSEEN WORLDS
lines: At the start of each fight, grant the Opponent 99.0 (rounded down) indefinite Placebo Buff(s) and then inflict a Fate Seal Passive for 3 seconds.
When Doctor Strange gains an Arcane Font, he has a 9.9% chance to gain another. This can trigger itself, but is not affected by Ability Accuracy.
Before the Opponent would be Knocked Out, inflict a 125% Neutralize Passive for 3 seconds.

cards.title: MASTER OF THE MYSTIC ARTS
lines: Earth’s Sorcerer Supreme, Doctor Stephen Strange has 0% Combat Power Rate, but he generates 3.5% of his Max Power per second.
As an Attacker, Doctor Strange Passively gains 12% of his Max Power each time a Buff on the Opponent is Nullified or expires naturally. This replaces the Mystic Dispersion Mastery.

cards.title: ARCANE ARSENAL
lines: Channeling defensive wards, Doctor Strange Passively Regenerates 60.0% of the damage taken from Blocked hits, or 80% from a Well-Timed Block.
Slinging offensive cantrips, all of Doctor Strange’s attacks deal Energy Damage and bursts of 50.0 Energy Damage.
Prepared with counterspells, after the Opponent gains a Buff, Doctor Strange has a 60.0% chance to Nullify their most recent Buff.

cards.title: ARCANE FONTS
lines: When any Buff on the Opponent is Nullified, Doctor Strange gains an Arcane Font, each increasing the potency of his personal bursts of Energy Damage by 3.0%.
While charging or performing a Heavy Attack, double tap Block to consume 1 Bar of Power to gain 300.0 Arcane Fonts, once per Heavy.

cards.title: VISHANTI BLESSINGS
lines: Doctor Stephen Strange invokes three Vishanti Blessings to aid him in battle, each lasting 20 seconds and cycling in sequential order. Blessings are paused while Doctor Strange is performing a Heavy or Special Attack.
Oshtur’s Refuge grants 40.0% increased Regeneration potency. During the Opponent’s Special Attacks, this bonus is doubled and this Blessing is paused.
Agamotto’s Insight grants +35.0 Attack Rating. During Doctor Strange’s Special Attack 1, this bonus is doubled.
Hoggoth’s Wisdom grants 100.0% increased Ability Accuracy. During Doctor Strange’s Special Attack 2, he gains an additional Arcane Font when an Opponent’s Buff is Nullified.

cards.title: TIME WEAVING
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack after landing any non-Combo-Ending Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for 0.3 seconds.
While charging a Heavy Attack, personal effects on the Opponent are paused. Doctor Strange’s Heavy Attack can be charged for an extended duration.
After charging for 0.5 seconds, Doctor Strange increases the expiry rate of his Vishanti Blessings by 1200% for as long as he charges his Heavy Attack.

cards.title: SORCERER SUPREME'S SPELLS
lines: The final hit of Doctor Strange’s Heavy Attack, and the final 3 hits of his Special Attacks 1 and 2 trigger effects based on the current Vishanti Blessing.
Under Oshtur’s Refuge, inflict a 30% Wither Passive for 30 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
With Agamotto’s Insight, deal an additional burst of 50.0 Energy Damage.
Through Hoggoth’s Wisdom, grant the Opponent a Placebo Buff for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On the first hit, the Winds of Watoomb inflict a Coldsnap Debuff dealing 90.0 Energy Damage over 2.5 seconds.
On the next 3 hits, the Flames of the Faltine inflict Incinerate Debuffs each dealing 30.0 Energy Damage over 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first 3 hits lash with an Eldritch Whip, each granting the Opponent a Placebo Buff for 10 seconds.
After landing the final hit, 3 Buffs on the Opponent each have a 50.0% chance to be Nullified.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Refresh the current Vishanti Blessing and inflict a Fate Seal Passive for 15 seconds.
While this Fate Seal is active, when the Opponent is prevented from gaining a Buff due to Fate Seal or Immunity, Doctor Strange gains an Arcane Font.

signature.title: BROTHER DANIEL
lines: Brother Daniel will possess either Doctor Voodoo or his opponent moving between them based on Doctor Voodoo's combo meter when he uses a Special Attack. Combo Even: Doctor Voodoo is possessed gaining 100% increased Ability Accuracy and 25.0% increased Buff Duration. Odd Combo: Opponent is possessed gaining 50% decreased Ability Accuracy and 25.0% increased Debuff Duration.

cards.title: FIGHT START
lines: Gain a Regeneration Buff, recovering 12.0 Health over 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On the final hit, each Buff on the Opponent has a 50.0% chance to be Nullified. For each Buff Nullified, inflict a 250.0 Poison Debuff for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 65.0% chance to convert up to 3.0 Loa, Nullifying them and placing either a Buff on himself or a Debuff on the Opponent, based on current Combo Meter.
Even Combo: Gain a Damballa Buff for 15 seconds, giving all attacks a 50.0% chance to Power Steal 2.5% of the Opponent's Max Power, granting -1% of the Power to Doctor Voodoo.
Odd Combo: Inflict a 2.0% Power Dissolve Debuff 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: When the Power Steal ends for any reason, Doctor Voodoo gains an equivalent Power Gain Buff.

synergy.note: Heavy Attacks inflict an Incinerate that deals damage equal to that Heavy Attack’s damage over 2 second(s).

signature.title: CRITICAL FAILURE
lines: Opponents take up to 10.0 Energy Damage over 1.5 second(s) whenever their abilities fail to trigger. Damage scales with Base Attack only. Potency decreases temporarily for consecutive triggers.

cards.title: PROBABILITY FIELD PASSIVE
lines: At the start of the fight, opponents lose -10.0 Critical Rating and Domino gains the same amount.
Opponents lose 15.0% Ability Accuracy. This reduction has no effect against abilities that trigger at the start of a fight.
Whenever one of Domino’s abilities fails to trigger, she gains +10.0% Ability Accuracy for 8 seconds.
Domino’s Bleed abilities tend to strike vital points and have a chance to benefit from her Critical Damage bonuses equal to her Critical Chance.

Opponents’ Bleed Debuffs tend to graze and have a 50.0% chance to be Passively Purified after only 1 second(s). Whenever a Bleed is Purified this way, Domino is inspired and gains 10.0% of her maximum Power instantly.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Domino uses her pistol for her first Light hit, her second Medium hit, and her final Heavy hit. These hits do not make contact with opponents.
Benefit from up to +40.0 Attack Rating selected at random.
Benefit from up to +200.0 Critical Damage selected at random.
A Critical Hit with a maximum roll in both Attack and Critical Damage Ratings results in a Perfect Critical Hit that inflicts Stun for 100.0 to 3 second(s).

cards.title: BLOCKING
lines: Benefit from up to +40.0 Block Proficiency selected at random.
A Well-Timed Block with a high roll in Block Proficiency results in a Perfect Block, reducing incoming attack damage to zero and granting 10.0% maximum Power instantly.
While Lucky, a Block with a maximum roll in Block Proficiency also results in a Perfect Block and bonus Power.

cards.title: WHEN FILLING A BAR OF POWER
lines: 30.0% chance for Domino to gain a Lucky Passive. 25.0% of Domino’s current Combo Meter count is added to this chance.
30.0% chance for opponents to suffer an Unlucky Passive. 25.0% of the opponents’ current Combo Meter count is added to this chance.
Lucky and Unlucky effects last for a random duration between 1.0 and 500.0 seconds plus 1.5 additional second(s) for each full Bar of Power at the time of activation.
Skill Champions are always Unlucky.
Tech Champions are never Unlucky.

cards.title: LUCKY PASSIVE
lines: +12.0 Critical Rating.
+80.0 Critical Damage Rating.
+15.0% Ability Accuracy.
+15.0 Block Proficiency.
10.0% chance to Evade attacks.
Stun expires -35.0% faster.
Domino is more likely to earn a higher roll when selecting Attack Rating, Critical Damage Rating, and Block Proficiency bonuses at random.

cards.title: UNLUCKY PASSIVE
lines: --12.0 Critical Rating.
--80.0 Critical Damage Rating.
--10.0 Critical Resistance.
--35.0% Ability Accuracy.
--15.0 Block Proficiency.
-100.0% chance for Evade or the Dexterity Mastery to fail.
Bleed abilities deal -50.0% less damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit has 25.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 110.0 Direct Damage over 7 seconds.
If Domino is Lucky, this attack refreshes all Stun and Bleed effects on the opponent.
If the opponent is Unlucky, this attack has +20.0 Attack Rating for each second that passed since the last time Domino hit with a Special Attack this fight.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit has 25.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 240.0 Direct Damage over 7 seconds. This Bleed does not benefit from the Lucky bonus below.
If Domino is Lucky, this attack has +100.0 Attack Rating if Domino suffered from Bleed at least once this fight.
If the opponent is Unlucky, they’re inflicted with a Taunt passive by this flashy attack, reducing their Attack by 20.0% until they are no longer Unlucky.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 74.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 240.0 Direct Damage over 7 seconds.
If Domino is Lucky, this attack has +3.0 Attack Rating for every Critical Hit that occured this fight by either Domino or her opponent. (Max: 100 Critical Hits)
If the opponent is Unlucky, this attack inflicts Armor Break, removing one Armor Up and reducing Armor by -22.0 for 4 seconds.

signature.title: THE PRINCE OF DARKNESS
lines: As an Attacker, when the Opponent’s Unblockable, Unstoppable, or Evade effects fail due to reduced Ability Accuracy, inflict a 24.4 Bleed Passive for 3 seconds.
Dracula gains +24.4 Attack Rating for each Armor Break Debuff he is suffering from, up to 5.

cards.title: BLOOD OF VAMPIRES
lines: Dracula’s vampiric blood makes him Immune to Heal Block, but while fighting #Silver Champions he suffers -25% Regeneration Rate.
Driven by bloodthirst, Dracula only benefits from half the potency of the Mystic Dispersion Mastery, but after a Buff on the Opponent is Nullified he inflicts a 30.0 Bleed Passive for 3 seconds.

cards.title: DREAD OF NIGHT
lines: Dracula strikes terror into the very souls of mortals. As an Attacker, at the start of each fight, inflict a Degeneration Passive dealing 8000.0 Direct Damage over 666 seconds. This is unaffected by Ability Accuracy and scales with Base Attack only.
Charging a Heavy Attack or Interrupting any attack with a Light Attack makes this Degeneration Dire, increasing its tick rate by 666%.
The Degeneration remains Dire as long as Dracula continues attacking, or while a Striker or Striker Opening are active.

cards.title: FORM OF MIST
lines: Hitting the Opponent’s Block with a Basic Attack grants Dracula an Invisibility Buff for 2 seconds. This will not re-trigger while active.
If this Invisibility causes an attack to Miss, or if Dracula is struck while it’s active, it goes on cooldown for 12 seconds when it ends.

cards.title: VAMPIRIC DRAIN
lines: During his Special Attacks 1 and 2, Dracula gains a Regeneration Passive healing 0.25% of his Max Health per second. The tick rate of this Regeneration is increased by half of the Dire Degeneration's increased tick rate.
Each sword hit Nullifies a Buff on the Opponent. If a Fury Buff is Nullified, Dracula steals it to gain a Fury Buff with twice the potency until the end of the Special Attack. Max potency: +100.0.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a Slow Passive for 40 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: During this attack, Dracula’s Degeneration becomes Dire, increasing its tick rate by 666%. If it was already Dire, its tick rate is instead increased to 1200%.
Each bat hit inflicts a Fear Passive for 60 seconds. This can be inflicted through Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: As an Attacker, re-inflict Dracula’s Degeneration Passive.
Inflict a Power Steal Passive stealing a Bar of Power over 3 seconds.
At the end of this attack, inflict a 162.6 Bleed Passive for 3 seconds. If the Opponent is below 30% Health, this Bleed gains up to 1260% base potency based on their missing Health.

signature.title: TACTICAL PROGRAMMING
lines: When any Non-Science Opponent has specific Buffs active, gain a unique effect. Potency is increased by 100% when fighting Cosmic Champions.
Regen: Reduce Opponents Regen Rate by 9.9%.
Power Gain: Reduce Opponent's Ability Power Rate by 9.9%.
Fury: Gain 9.9 Armor Rating.
Armor Up: Gain 9.9 Attack Rating.
Precision: Gain 9.9 Critical Resistance.
Cruelty: Gain 9.9% Critical Damage Resistance.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Dragon Man’s thick Armor and Advanced Robotics grants full immunity to Bleed, Poison, and Armor Shattered.
If under the effects of an Armor Break, Dragon Man releases currents of mystical energy, dealing 5.0 Degeneration Damage every 0.5 seconds. Damage is increased by 100.0% against Cosmic Champions.
Offensive Combat Power Rate is reduced by -35.0%.

cards.title: POWER CHARGE
lines: At the start of a fight, gain Power Charge, generating 12.0% of a bar of Power every second. Power Charge is removed when Stunned.
