If 0 Power Charges are active, create one after 12 seconds. When Defending, this duration is reduced by 400.0 seconds.
When fighting Science Champions, upon receiving a Non-Damaging Debuff, pause cooldown Duration for 0.35 seconds.

cards.title: CORNERED
lines: While the Opponent’s back is against the wall they gain Cornered. Cornered is unaffected by Ability Accuracy modifications.
Each hit deals 35.0 physical damage. This damage is increased by 35% for each Ineptitude or Unique Buff on the Opponent. Up to 105.0%
Opponents Defensive Combat Power Rate is reduced by -70.0% while above 2 bars of Power.

cards.title: ON OPPONENT KNOCKDOWN:
lines: Gain an Unblockable Buff for 3 seconds. Duration is paused during Special Attacks.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: On Hit, remove any Incinerates on the Opponent, each dealing a burst of 50.0 energy damage. If 6 or more Incinerates are removed, this damage is increased by 50.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final hit inflicts a non-stacking Slow for 8 seconds.
The first hit that contacts the Opponent consumes 1 Power Charge to inflict an Ineptitude Debuff reducing the potency of new Fury, Armor Up, Precision, and Cruelty Buffs by -75.0% for 30 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: All 3 hits of Dragon Man’s fire breath inflict Incinerate, dealing 50.0 energy damage over 25 seconds. Incinerate also reduces the Opponent’s Block Proficiency by 50% and prevents the activation of Perfect Block.
Consume 1 Power Charge to generate a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 65.0 for 30 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Consume all stacks of Power Charge. Each contributing 4 seconds to an Unstoppable Buff. While active, this Unstoppable instantly regenerates 8500.0% of hit damage received from Attacks other than Special 3’s.
After this Special Attack ends, generate 3 stacks of Power Charge. Additional stacks of Power Charge do not generate additional Power.

signature.title: TURAAB
lines: When either Champion’s Combo Meter reaches a multiple of 10, Dust has a 0.0% chance to inflict a Sand Debuff for 6 seconds.
When fighting against Skill Champions and while Sandstorm is active, Dust gains a Steadfast Passive.
Whenever Dust prevents a Bleed effect via Immunity, there is a 0.0% chance to inflict 1 Sand Debuff on the Opponent for -1 seconds.

cards.title: SENTIENT STORM
lines: Dust is Immune to Bleed, Poison, and Shock effects.
Dust’s Light and Heavy Attacks do not make contact with the Opponent.
Incoming attacks during Dust's Well-Timed Block window have a 100.0% chance to Glance. As a Defender, this triggers for any incoming Basic Attack as long as Dust is Blocking.
If the Opponent has the Willpower Mastery active, it is removed.

cards.title: SAND EFFECTS
lines: Whenever the Opponent or their Block is struck by a Medium Attack or has a hit Glance, they are inflicted with a Sand Debuff for 6 seconds.
Punishing a Heavy Attack or Special Attack with a Light or Medium Attack inflicts 200.0 Sand Debuffs for 6 seconds.

When the Opponent Purifies a Debuff, Dust deals a burst of 10.0 Physical Damage and inflicts 1 indefinite Sand Passive. If the Purified Debuff was a Sand Debuff, 2 additional Sand Passives are inflicted.
As an Attacker, Dust’s Light Attacks Purify her most recently inflicted personal Debuff on the Opponent on hit.
Inflicting Dust with an Incinerate or Plasma effect will crystalize her sand, removing 100.0 Sand effect from her Opponent.

cards.title: SANDSTORM
lines: As an Attacker, when Dust performs a Heavy Attack, she spins up a Sandstorm for 16 seconds. When finished, Sandstorm goes on cooldown for -1 seconds.
As a Defender, when Dust’s Opponent reaches -1 Sand effects, Dust spins up a Sandstorm for 8 seconds. This Sandstorm does not have a cooldown.

When a Sandstorm is spun up, Dust removes all Sand effects on the Opponent. For each effect removed, Dust gains a 3.5% Prowess Passive until the Sandstorm ends. Sandstorm and its Prowess effects are not affected by Ability Accuracy modification. Max Prowess: -1.

cards.title: WHILE SANDSTORM IS ACTIVE
lines: Whenever Dust would inflict a Sand effect, she instead gains an additional Prowess Passive, and a Power Efficiency Passive reducing the cost of Special Attacks by 300.0% for 8 seconds. Dust’s Light Attacks pause these Power Efficiency Passives for 0.3 seconds.
As an Attacker, the Opponent’s Basic Attacks have a 60.0% chance to Glance when hitting Dust’s Block.
Opponents are dealt 14.0 Physical Damage every second. This damage scales with Base Attack only and is reduced by -1% while the Opponent is Blocking.
Dust gains a Grit Passive.
Sandstorm is paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks and expires -50.0% slower during Dust’s Special Attacks. Additionally, Sandstorm cannot end during Dust’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts 1 Sand Debuff for 6 seconds. These can be inflicted through Block. The final 2 hits inflict an additional Sand Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final 3 hits each inflict a -8.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 20 seconds. If these Debuffs are Purified, they are replaced with Passive versions with their potency increased by 50%.
If Sandstorm is active, the final hit inflicts a Stun Passive for 2 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This Special Attack does not consume Power, but cannot be activated while Sandstorm or its cooldown are active.
This Special Attack spins up a Sandstorm for 22 seconds. This Sandstorm does not have a cooldown.

signature.title: DETERIORATING MIND
lines: When the Opponent Misses an attack they are inflicted with a Degeneration Passive, dealing 15.0 damage over 1 seconds.
While the Opponent is suffering from a Falter Debuff their Auto-Block Ability Accuracy is reduced by 100% and Ebony Maw gains 9.0% Ability Power Rate.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Ebony Maw’s first Light Attack and Heavy Attack are the only Basic hits to make contact with the Opponent.
If the Opponent doesn’t have Class Advantage, Ebony Maw causes all incoming Guaranteed Critical Hits to Miss.

cards.title: MISSIONS FROM THANOS
lines: Ebony Maw has 3 missions to complete. Each mission can only be completed once per fight and when successful will inflict a Passive Degeneration, dealing 320.0 Direct Damage over 4 seconds, this scales with Base Attack only.
Mission 1: Mastermind: Nullify a Buff from the Opponent. Mission 2: Manipulator: Inflict a Power Steal effect. Mission 3 Unwavering: Cause the Opponent to Miss.

Completing all 3 missions in a single fight grants 1 Persistent Charge, each increasing the duration of Degeneration effects by 10.0% and reducing the potency of the Opponent’s Fury effects by 25% for the rest of the quest. Persistent Charges stack up to a max of 4.0.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Landing a Heavy Attack steals all the Opponent’s Power Gain Buffs and 10.0% of their current Power.

cards.title: PERSUASIVE VOICE
lines: Become Focused after 7 seconds, this time is doubled while suffering from a non-damaging Debuff. While Ebony Maw is Focusing, the Opponent’s Ability Power Rate is reduced by 60.0%.
If knocked down by a Heavy Attack or Special Attack 3, Focus is broken and re-focusing begins after 1 second(s).
Once focused, the Opponent gains 1 Persuasion every 0.6 seconds.
Every 20th Persuasion the Opponent gains inflicts a Falter Debuff, giving them a 100.0% chance to Miss for 3 seconds. This duration is increased to 4.0 seconds against Cosmic Opponents.
At 100 Persuasion the Opponent is inflicted with Black Tongue for the rest of the fight, reducing their Power Gained from all sources by 40% and increasing Ebony Maw’s Attack Rating by +40.0.
When Black Tongue is active, inflict the above Falter every 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: When activated and with each hit, Ebony Maw Nullifies 1 Fury, Cruelty, or Precision Buff from his Opponent. This expands to all Buffs if the Opponent is inflicted with Black Tongue.
If no Buffs were Nullified during this attack, the Opponent gains a Fury Buff increasing their Attack Rating by 0.0 for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit inflicts a Passive Degeneration, dealing 129.0 Direct Damage over 4 seconds. If the Opponent is suffering from a Falter effect, each hit inflicts 2 additional Degenerations.
The final hit refreshes any active Falter Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack grants no Power to the Opponent.
Steal 100% of the Opponent’s Power and gain a Power Gain Buff, granting 40.0% of the Power stolen over 5 seconds.

synergy.note: When Counter-Attacking with her Revolver, Elsa inflicts a Slow Passive for 2.5 seconds. She cannot Miss while this effect is active.
At the start of each fight, inflict a 35% Torment Passive for 30 seconds.
Start each fight with a 10% Vicious Passive for 30 seconds.

signature.title: HUNTRESS OF THE CONTEST
lines: When Fighting Science Champions, Critical Hits with Hellfire Rounds deal an additional 24.9 damage.
When Fighting #Large or #Extra Large Champions, Critical Hits with Behemoth Busters deal an additional 24.9 damage.
Elsa’s Critical Damage Rating is increased by 24.9 when fighting the final node in a Quest.

cards.title: BLOODGEM PROTECTION
lines: When Elsa is affected by a Bleed Debuff, Non-Mutant Champions gain a Passive Degeneration dealing 12.0 Direct Damage every 0.5 seconds until all Bleed Debuffs on Elsa end. While this Degen is active Opponents will also be passively Heal Blocked.
While suffering from a Non-Damaging Debuff, Elsa has a 100.0% chance to Purify 1 of any Debuff every 2.6 seconds.
After Purifying a Debuff, Elsa gains a Precision Buff increasing Critical Rating by 50.0 for 9 seconds.

cards.title: WELL TIMED BLOCKS
lines: When Elsa would perform a Well-Timed Block against Basic Attacks, she has a 100.0% chance to Evade instead. This Evade has a cooldown of 11 seconds.
When performing an Evade, Elsa counter attacks with her Revolver and deals 15.0 Physical Damage on Hit. This attack generates no Power for the Opponent.

cards.title: ENHANCED MUNITIONS
lines: Elsa loads her Winchester with Hellfire Rounds and her Revolvers with Behemoth Busters. Each gun can fire 600.0 rounds before Reloading.
Reloading lasts 11 seconds. Each stack of Reloading increases Elsa’s Offensive Combat Power Rate by 40.0%.

cards.title: WINCHESTER: HELLFIRE ROUNDS (MEDIUM COMBO ENDER AND SPECIAL 1):
lines: On Hit: Inflict an Incinerate Debuff, dealing 50.0 Energy Damage over 11 seconds. This also removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50%. Winchester shots are projectiles and do not make contact.
If the Opponent has triggered an Evade or they are Immune to Incinerate, a matching Coldsnap Debuff is inflicted instead, which prevents Evade from activating.

cards.title: REVOLVER: BEHEMOTH BUSTERS (LIGHT COMBO ENDER AND SPECIAL 2):
lines: On Hit: Inflict a Busted Debuff, increasing the Potency of incoming Incinerate or Coldsnap Debuffs by 50.0% for 21 seconds. Additionally, each time the Opponent is Struck by a Critical Hit, deal 25.0 Direct Damage for each Busted Debuff. This Damage scales with base attack only. Revolver shots are projectiles and do not make contact.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On Activation gain a Precision Buff increasing Critical Rating by 60.0 for 9 seconds. This Precision is paused until Elsa activates her next Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If Elsa runs out of Behemoth Busters she will fire her Hellfire Rounds instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain up to 3 Cruelty Buffs, each increasing Elsa’s Critical Damage Rating by 50.0 for 22 seconds.
These Cruelty Buffs expire 1 at a time. Each time Elsa triggers a Reloading effect, she refreshes their duration.

signature.title: WHITE QUEEN
lines: When Telepath Form is active and Emma would lose more than 61.5% of her Base Health from a single source, she activates Diamond Form for 3 seconds to reduce the damage. Against Tech Champions, this ability triggers based on Max Health instead. This ability always activates before checking Armor and Resistances but does not activate on a Well-Timed Block.
When Emma uses a Special Attack, the Opponent’s controls are reversed until just after the end of the attack. This will not trigger when fighting an Opponent with #Psychic Shielding.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Emma starts the fight in Diamond Form.
When Emma is at least one Power Level ahead of the Opponent, she deactivates Diamond Form and switches to Telepath Form.
When the Opponent is at least one Power Level ahead of Emma, she deactivates Telepath Form and switches to Diamond Form.
If the opponent uses an Armor Break while Emma is in Diamond Form, she is forced into Telepath Form, and cannot swap back for the duration of the Armor Break.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Emma’s organic diamond is immune to all Stun, Bleed, Poison, Incinerate, Shock, Frostbite, Coldsnap, Fatigue, Concussion, and Exhaustion effects.
Well-timed Blocks grant a Prowess Passive. Triggering an immunity to Bleed, Incinerate, or Shock grants 2 Prowess Passives.

When Emma changes into Diamond form, she replaces all temporary Prowess Passives with new indefinite Prowess Passives that increase Special Attack Damage by +10.0%. Prowess Passives are capped at 10 in Diamond Form.
10.0% chance that a Block is a Perfect Block, reducing all damage to 0.
+45.0 Armor
+15.0 Block Proficiency
+45.0 Physical Resistance.
+50.0 Critical Resistance Rating
Opponents have --50.0 Critical Damage Rating

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: When Emma changes into Telepath form, she replaces all indefinite Prowess Passives with new Prowess Passive that increase Special Attack Damage by +10.0% and last 12 seconds. Prowess Passives are capped at 15 in Telepath form.
Critical hits grant a Prowess Passive, and refresh all existing Prowess Passives.
Emma is able to read her Opponent’s thoughts, allowing all of Emma’s attacks to ignore Evade.
+15.0 Critical Rate for each active Prowess effect.
+10.0 Critical Damage Rating for each active Prowess effect.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Generate 50.0% additional Power.
Opponents generate -80.0% less power from this attack.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACK
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a Taunt Debuff on the Opponent for 5 seconds.
These Debuffs are removed if Emma switches to Diamond Form.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Emma switches to Telepath form for the duration of the attack.
Once Emma finishes a Special Attack, all Prowess Passives are removed.
These attacks are Psychic and deal True Damage, ignoring all of the Opponent's Armor.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to reduce the Opponent’s Power Gain from all sources by -75.0% for 8 seconds.

synergy.note: New Transmutation Spell: Shield: ↓ , ↓ , ↓. Grants a Bulwark buff.
New Enchantment Spell: Flesh to Stone: →,←,←. Inflicts a Petrify Debuff. No effect against #Robots.
New Evocation Spell: Poison Spray: ↓ , ↓ , ↑. Inflicts three Poison Debuffs.

signature.title: TAKE YOUR HEART
lines: Charm Champion: ↑ , ↓ , ↑
Enchantment Spell effects last an additional +244.3 seconds.

Whenever a Buff fails to activate on the Opponent for a reason other than chance, or they are Immune to a Damaging effect, Enchantress instantly Power Steals 1.0% of their Max Power. As an Attacker, this potency is reduced by -1%.

cards.title: ARTIST OF SEDUCTION
lines: The ultimate thief of hearts, Enchantress’s Light and Medium Attacks deal Energy Damage and Power Steal up to 1.0% of her Opponent’s Max Power. This ability can’t affect the Opponent if they have their Special Attack 3.
Enchantress is Immune to Power Lock and her Ability and Combat Power Rates can’t be reduced below 50.0%.
When inflicted with an Opposing Champion’s effect that would cause her to lose Power, Enchantress Passively Gains that same amount of Power over 7 seconds.
Charging a Heavy Attack after landing any non-Combo Ending Basic Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for 0.75 seconds. The following Heavy Attack grants Enchantress no Power.
The first and second hits of Enchantress’s Heavy Attack prevent her from using her Special Attack 3 and Special Attack 2 respectively until the Heavy Attack finishes.
Enchantress uses her Special Attack 1 to cast Spells. Casting a Spell inflicts or grants a corresponding temporary effect. Spells themselves are indefinite and unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
When Enchantress is struck by a Special Attack while -1 or more Spells are active, she loses concentration and all are removed, each dealing a burst of 30.0 Direct Damage to the Opponent.

cards.title: ABJURATIVE CASTING
lines: For each active Spell, 20.0% of all incoming damage is prevented. If any Spells are still active at the start of Enchantress’s next Special Attack, the prevented damage is sent back to the Attacker as Direct Damage. This is unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
Each Debilitate effect on Enchantress counts as a negative Spell for the purposes of this ability.
At the start of each fight, and when using her Special Attack 1, Enchantress casts a predefined combination of -1 Spells at random. Doing so depletes 60.0% of her current Power.
Until she has thrown her Special Attack 1 two times, Enchantress cannot throw her Special Attack 2 and is more likely to throw Special Attacks. This resets after throwing her Special Attack 2.
Enchantress’s Ability and Combat Power Rates are reduced by --20.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: As an Attacker, after the first hit of this attack, time will slow. Swiping Up, Down, Left, or Right in any combination corresponding to one of the Spells in Enchantress’s Spellbook exits slowed time and casts that Spell.
Tapping the Block input twice or inputting a combination that is not a Spell exits slowed time and casts an Evocation Spell at random.

cards.title: AMORA’S SPELLBOOK
lines: Fireball: ↓ , ↓ ,→; Blizzard: ↑ , ↑ ,→; Chain Lightning: ↑ , ↑ , ↓
Damaging effects are inflicted by the final hit of Enchantress’s Special Attacks, including through Block, and deal 50.0 damage over -1 seconds.
As a Defender, these effects are Passives instead of Debuffs.
Removal Trigger: All active Evocation Spells end if Enchantress is Intercepted while not Unstoppable.

cards.title: AMORA’S SPELLBOOK
lines: Levitate: ↑ , ↑ , ↑; Haste: →,→,→; Etherealness: ←,←,←
Effects granted by Transmutation Spells last -1 seconds. If they have a potency or chance, that value is 30.0%. They do not stack and are removed when Enchantress has no active Transmutation Spells.
Removal Trigger: All active Transmutation Spells end when Enchantress’s Heavy Attack is interrupted or punished.

cards.title: AMORA’S SPELLBOOK
lines: Dispel: ↓ , ↑ , ↓; Antipathy: →,←,→; Wilt: ←,→,←
Effects inflicted by Enchantment Spells last -1 seconds. If they have a potency, that potency is 30.0%. They do not stack and are removed when Enchantress has no active Enchantment Spells.
Removal Trigger: All active Enchantment Spells end when Enchantress is knocked down.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack gains +46.0 Attack Rating for each active Spell up to -1, as well as different effects for each category of Spell that has, or is tied for, the highest number of active instances.
Evocation: Gain +20.0 Critical Rating for each active Spell. Doubled if the Spell is Evocation.
Transmutation: Lifesteal 0.1% of damage dealt for each active Spell. Doubled if the Spell is Transmutation. Max Lifesteal: 1.8%.
Enchantment: Reactivate the effect of each active Spell. Double the effect’s potency if the Spell is Enchantment.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a non-stacking 25.0% Charm Debuff for 50 seconds and Power Steal up to 1 Bar of Power.

synergy.note: When the opponent starts a Dash Attack or is recovering from a Heavy, Special, or combo ending attack, gain Widow’s Insight for 0.85 seconds. Ending a combo with Widow’s Insight active grants a Cruelty Buff increasing Critical Damage Rating by 450 for 12 seconds.

signature.title: EXO-8
lines: Redwing's Lock On lasts 2 seconds longer and provides an additional 20.0 Critical Rating.

cards.title: ENHANCED SYNERGY BONUSES
lines: Falcon is a master scout and is always ready to lend a hand. His Synergy Bonuses all provide an additional +300.0% Attack rating each.

cards.title: RECON SCAN
lines: To begin a Recon Scan, dash back and hold Block. If Block is held for 1.2 seconds the opponent gains a Lock On charge for 14.0 seconds. While Lock On is active, Falcon's attacks Passively reduce the opponent's Defensive Ability Accuracy by 100.0%.
Lock On gains +40.0% duration while fighting Science Champions but suffers -20.0% duration while fighting Mutants.
Once Lock On ends, it goes on Cooldown for 8 seconds.
Falcons Basic Attacks Gain +130.0 Attack Rating while Locked On to the Opponent.

cards.title: ON OPPONENT EVADE
lines: Falcon’s scanning system in his goggles Recalibrates each time the opponent triggers a Passive Evade, increasing Falcon’s Critical Damage Rating by 30.0 indefinitely.
While Redwing is active any Evade that the Opponent Fails to trigger will increase Falcon’s Critical Damage Rating by 30.0 indefinitely.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100% chance to inflict an Incinerate Debuff, dealing 160.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds. Incinerate also removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50%.

synergy.note: Interrupting any attack inflicts a Bleed Debuff dealing 20% of Attack as Direct Damage over 8 seconds.

signature.title: ENHANCED HYBRID PHYSIOLOGY
lines: Increase the potency of Falcon’s Bulwark Passive by 10.0%.
Falcon deals a burst of 10.0 Physical Damage when the Opponent's Unstoppable or Evade effects fail to trigger due to Ability Accuracy reduction. Cooldown: 1 second.
Falcon’s Physical Vulnerability Debuff from swapping Instincts now pauses during all Special Attacks.
After the start of each fight, inflict a Slow Debuff for 12 seconds. This is removed if the Defensive Instinct Slow activates.

cards.title: HYBRID PHYSIOLOGY
lines: Falcon's part Vampiric biology allows him to regenerate unnaturally. Falcon Instantly Regenerates 40.0% of the damage taken during Opponent’s Special Attacks. This potency scales +1000.0% flat for every Special Attack the Opponent uses, up to a max of 3 times.
Falcon cannot Regenerate damage from Critical Hits.

Falcon’s lethal talons allow for deadly finishing strikes. Falcon’s third Light Attack inflicts a 10.0% Debilitate Debuff for 20 seconds. These are paused during Opponent’s Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.

Falcon does not gain a Precision Buff when using the Dexterity Mastery. Instead, he pauses Trauma Debuffs on the Opponent for 5 seconds. This effect goes on cooldown until Falcon activates his next Special Attack.

cards.title: REDWING INSTINCTS
lines: Falcon starts each fight with his trusted sidekick Redwing at his side in Defensive Instinct. Falcon benefits from different effects while Redwing is in different Instincts. Redwing swaps Instincts when Falcon lands a second Medium Attack, or after an Opponent’s Special Attack.
When Redwing swaps Instincts, Falcon inflicts a Physical Vulnerability Debuff reducing Physical Resistance by -40.0 for 4 seconds . This cannot be inflicted while already active.

cards.title: DEFENSIVE INSTINCT
lines: Gain a Bulwark Passive increasing Block Proficiency by +40.0.
When the Opponent activates a Special attack, inflict a non-stacking Slow Debuff for 16 seconds.

cards.title: AGGRESSIVE INSTINCT
lines: While the Opponent is suffering from a Slow effect, they are more aggressive.
Falcon's Attacks have a 50.0% chance to inflict a 5.0% Trauma Debuff for 15 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Dash Attacks pause Falcon’s Slow Debuff for 4 seconds.

cards.title: VELOCITY
lines: Gain 100.0 Velocity Charge when Falcon inflicts the Opponent with a non-Damaging Debuff, excluding Trauma Debuffs. Additionally, gain 100.0 Charge when the Opponent activates a Special Attack.

When at max Velocity Charges, Redwing reaches Peak Performance. Activate a Special Attack to combine the effects of both Instincts for 20 seconds and remove all Charges. While active, reaching max Velocity Charges refreshes this effect and re-inflicts his Physical Vulnerability Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: [Defensive Instinct]: The first hit inflicts a non-stacking 20.0% Special Weakness Debuff for 16 seconds.
[Aggressive Instinct]: The first hit grants a non-stacking +40.0 Fury Passive for 20 seconds, and 1 Velocity Charge.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: [Defensive Instinct]: Pause all non-Damaging Debuffs other than Stun on the Opponent during this attack and for 6 seconds after.
[Aggressive Instinct]: Each hit inflicts a personal Trauma Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 500.0 Velocity Charges.
Inflict a 2.0% Special Weakness Debuff for 20 seconds. While active, Trauma Debuffs now also grant Velocity Charges.

synergy.note: #Legion of Monsters Champions: At the start of each fight, gain an indefinite 20% Fervor Passive.

signature.title: UNDEAD AND HATING IT
lines: When Frank activates a Special Attack, he gains an Undying Passive for 4.974874372 seconds. If this Undying prevents him from being Knocked Out, he gains his personal Rage Debuff for 2000.0 seconds.
Frank gains +4.9 Critical Rating for each non-Damaging Debuff he is suffering from, up to 10.
While the Opponent is Incinerated, Frank gains +14.8 Energy Penetration, doubled while fighting Science Champions.

cards.title: DOCTOR MORBIN-STEIN'S MONSTER
lines: The reanimation process grants Immunity to Poison, Petrify, and Spectre effects. This also sets Frank’s Regeneration Rate to 65.0%, and prevents it from being reduced any further.
Being too angry to die grants Frank rank 100.0 of the Willpower Mastery.

When struck by a Basic Attack while Unstoppable, or when Shocked, Frank gains a non-stacking Rage Debuff for -1 seconds. With Rage, Frank’s Basic Attack hits Passively convert a flat 10.0% more Adrenaline to Health.
When Frank is inflicted with or Immune to a non-Damaging Debuff other than Rage, his Combo Meter gains 200.0 hits.
When Frank’s Combo Meter crosses a multiple of 15, he gains a +35.0 Berserk Passive for 20 seconds, paused during his Special Attacks. Max stacks: 15.

cards.title: UNSTOPPABLE MACHINE
lines: Frank does not idle after Dodging back, and gains an Unstoppable Passive for 0.7 seconds when he starts to run. This will not re-trigger while active, and is paused while running, charging Heavy Attacks, or attacking.
Frank’s Unstoppable also grants him +30.0% Combat Adrenaline, and it prevents incoming Basic Attacks from resetting his Combo Meter. As an Attacker, it also grants him Stun Immunity.

As an Attacker, Frank also gains his Unstoppable when he is struck by a Basic Attack immediately after Dodging back. He also gains it, plus the ability to run immediately, after Blocking the final hit of the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
This Unstoppable is immediately removed at the end of Frank’s Heavy or Special Attacks, and when the Opponent activates a Special Attack.

cards.title: CRUSHING BLOWS
lines: On hit or on Block as an Attacker, Frank’s second Basic Attack inflicts an indefinite Crush Passive until his Unstoppable expires.
When Frank’s Crush ends after being used to Break a Block, it goes on cooldown for 20 seconds, or until he gains 100.0 of his Berserk Passives.

cards.title: EXTERNAL COMBUSTION
lines: On hit, Frank’s Heavy Attack inflicts an Incinerate Debuff that deals 70.0 Energy Damage over 20 seconds, paused during his Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.
On hit or Block, Frank’s Heavy Attack also adds 400.0 hits to his Combo Meter.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit grants Frank a personal Berserk Passive.
On the final -1 hits, Frank deals a burst of 50.0 Energy Damage with its base potency increased by +12.5% flat for each of his Incinerates on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first -1 hits each grant Frank a personal Berserk Passive.
The final hit refreshes all of Frank’s Incinerates, and then inflicts -1 Incinerate Debuffs that each deal 70.0 Energy Damage over 30 seconds, paused during his Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Frank gains 15.0% of missing Health as Adrenaline, and Passively Stuns the Opponent for -1 seconds.
For the next 10 seconds, Frank’s Light and Medium Attacks inflict 100.0 of the Incinerates from his Special Attack 2.

synergy.note: Striking the Opponent while their back is against the wall grants a 500 potency Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds. This does not reapply if active.

signature.title: HUMBLE GOD OF THE BATTLEREALM
lines: Whenever Galan prevents a Power Drain, Burn, Lock or Special Lock effect from a non-Mystic Champion via immunity, he gains 0.0 indefinite Physical Resistance and Energy Resistance Buffs (Rounded Up). These Buffs are the same as those gained from striking the Opponent with the Staff of Taa.
While the Harvest is active: Galan becomes Stun Immune and deals a burst of 0.0 Direct Damage whenever Galan gains any amount of Planetary Mass, this Damage scales with Base Attack only.

cards.title: SOLAR INTENSITY
lines: Galan starts each quest with 1 Persistent Solar Intensity. This becomes 2 when Defending, and 3 if Defending a final boss node.
When Galan defeats a non-#Dimensional being, he gains 1 additional Solar Intensity.
At the start of the fight gain 1 indefinite Intensify Passive for each Solar Intensity, each increasing the potency of all future Buffs by 20.0%.
At 3 Solar Intensity, all of Galan’s Special Attacks gain a True Sense Buff, bypassing the effects of Miss and Auto-Block.

cards.title: TAA’AN BIOLOGY
lines: Galan’s otherworldly nature provides immunity to Fate Seals and Nullify effects.
Additionally, the Staff of Taa preserves Galan’s Power and grants immunity to Power Drain, Burn, Lock and Special Lock.

Galan’s first Light Attack and second Medium Attack strike with the Planetary side of the Staff of Taa, granting Galan 1 indefinite Resist Physical Buff, increasing Physical Resistance by 3.5. Max 20.
Galan’s first Medium Attack strikes with the Solar side of the Staff of Taa, granting Galan 2 indefinite Resist Energy Buffs, increasing Energy Resistance by 3.5. Max 20.
Building additional Resistance Buffs while at their maximum quantity will replace previous versions with an updated Potency.

cards.title: PLANETARY MASS AND HARVEST
lines: Whenever Galan gains a Buff, his Planetary Mass is increased by 10. Galan also gains 5000.0 Planetary Mass whenever the Opponent gains an Armor Up effect. Max 999.
Whenever Galan is knocked down by a Special Attack, he loses -3000.0 Planetary Mass per bar of Power spent.
Landing a Heavy Attack with 100 or more Planetary Mass will trigger the Harvest. Activating the Harvest on Attack prevents Galan from building Power if over 1 Bar of Power.
On Defense, the Harvest activates when Galan reaches 100 or more Planetary Mass.

The Harvest lasts for 14 seconds, when the Harvest ends, Galan consumes all Planetary Mass to deal a burst of 5.8 Direct Damage for each Planetary Mass consumed, this Damage scales with Base Attack only and is halved on Defense.
While the Harvest is active, Galan gains an Unstoppable Buff and a Regeneration Buff, healing 0.2 Health per second.
If Galan performs a Special Attack while the Harvest is active, it becomes Unblockable and the Harvest ends. The burst of Damage triggers on the final hit of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, Galan gains 4 Fury Buffs, these Furies last for 26 second(s) and increase Attack Rating by 8.0.
While the Harvest is active: Convert all of Galan’s Resistance Buffs into 500.0 Planetary Mass each.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, Galan gains 8 Intensify Buffs, each lasting 22 second(s) and increasing the potency of all new Buffs by 5.0%.
The final 3 hits each inflict 1 Incinerate Debuff dealing 125.0 Energy Damage over 14 seconds.
While the Harvest is active: Instead inflict 3 Incinerates per hit with the same Potency and Duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Galan immediately gains 20000.0 Planetary Mass and begins a Planetary Harvest if it is not already active.
If activated while the Harvest is already active, refresh the duration of the currently active Harvest and enable Galan to gain Power again.

cards.title: COSMIC SEED HERALDS
lines: Once per Quest, Galan can consume 2 Solar Intensity in the Pre-Fight Menu to place a Cross-Fight Cosmic Seed on the next fight. The next Cosmic Champion excluding Galan to enter this fight gains the Seed and becomes a Herald for the rest of the Quest. Whenever a Herald emerges victorious, the Seed will grow in power to grant abilities. Victories max out at 5.
0+ Victories - Heralds reduce the potency of all Power Burn effects by 100%.
1+ Victories - Heralds gain a 7.0% Resistance to all Damaging Debuffs for each Victory.

2+ Victories - Heralds become Unblockable when launching a Special Attack into an Opponent’s block, this Buff lasts for the duration of the Special Attack with an additional 1 second(s) added for each Victory. Once activated, this ability goes on cooldown for 24 seconds, and won't trigger while it's active.

signature.title: RAGIN' CAJUN
lines: Prowess Buffs now also grant Gambit +7.0 Critical Damage Rating each.
Additionally, his Flak Jacket is upgraded to allow it to absorb an additional 20.0 attack damage before breaking.

cards.title: BLOCKING
lines: Gambit charges his weapons while holding Block, gaining a Kinetic Charge every 0.4 seconds. Kinetic Charges build up more slowly as Gambit accumulates more of them. Max Charges: 1000.0.
Gambit cannot stack additional Kinetic Charges while his personal Prowess buffs are active.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Gambit cashes out, converting his Kinetic Charges to Prowess Buffs, each increasing Special Damage by 30.0% for 16 seconds.

cards.title: STUN
lines: Each Stun Debuff on the Opponent Reduces Regeneration Rate and Combat Power Rate by -40.0% while active.
All Stun Debuffs currently on the Opponent are Paused for the duration of Gambit's Special Attacks.

cards.title: MEDIUM, HEAVY, SPECIAL 1 AND SPECIAL 2 ATTACKS
lines: These attacks utilize a burst of kinetic energy. Striking with them reduces the damage of the Opponent's Passive Degeneration and Direct Damage effects by -100.0% for 0.2 second(s).

cards.title: FLAK JACKET
lines: Gambit begins each fight with a Flak Jacket charge, which is lost once Gambit has taken 50.0 attack damage. Tech Champions' attack damage counts double for this purpose.
While Flak Jacket is active, Gambit gains +40.0 Armor Rating and incoming Bleed effects suffer -150.0% Potency.
Against Non-Contact Physical Attacks, the Flak Jacket provides an additional +40.0 Armor Rating and Critical Resistance.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: If the opponent does not have an Armor Up Buff, all hits gain +20.0% Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This Attack has an 85.0% chance to inflict up to Two 5 second Stun Debuffs.

signature.title: DEADLIEST WOMAN IN THE GALAXY
lines: Gamora’s skill with the Godslayer Blade grows, increasing the chance to activate it during Special Attacks to 100%. Additionally, the cooldown is reduced to 51 seconds.

cards.title: LIGHT ATTACKS
lines: 65.0% chance to gain a Fury Buff, granting +16.0 Attack Rating for 14 seconds. Max: 25.

cards.title: MEDIUM ATTACKS
lines: 65.0% chance to gain a Cruelty Buff, increasing Critical Damage Rating by 15.0 for 14 seconds. Max: 25.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Gamora’s personal Buffs gain +1.5% duration for every 1 seconds that have passed during the fight. Max bonus: +60.0%.
If Gamora has 800.0 or more personal Buffs active, her attacks cannot Miss.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Gamora begins each fight with a Godslayer Strike ready, which has a 65.0% chance to activate during each Special Attack. Once Godslayer Strike is used, it goes on Cooldown for 100 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: This attack has 100% Critical Hit Chance.
Godslayer: Attack gains a flat +600.0% Critical Damage Multiplier.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack has 100% Critical Hit Chance.
Godslayer: Armor Break Debuffs during the attack gain +50.0% Potency, +60% Duration and +150% Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Godslayer: 100.0% chance to inflict a Shock Debuff causing 200.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds. If the opponent is a Robot, instead inflict a Degeneration Debuff that deals double damage.

signature.title: VIBRANIUM TATTOOS
lines: Reduce the health lost when finishing a Special Attack at max stack of Muscle Mass by 5.0%. While Unstoppable this damage reduction is increased by 50%.
While Unstoppable, Special Attacks cost 1.0% less Power. This potency is doubled against Skill Champions.
Gain +1.0 Block Penetration per Muscle Mass.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Gentle is Immune to Bleed, and while performing a Well-Timed Block he is Immune to Stun.
When an Immunity triggers, or when the Opponent Purifies or Cleanses a Debuff, gain a Pursuit Passive for 15 seconds.
When Critically Hit through Block, struck by a Guaranteed Critical Hit, or if struck by 2.0 Critical Hits within 200.0 seconds of each other, gain a Reinforce Passive for 20 seconds.

cards.title: UNSTOPPABLE
lines: When either Champion’s Combo Meter passes a multiple of 1500.0, gain an Unstoppable Passive for 3 seconds.

When the Opponent Purifies or Cleanses a Stun Debuff, or triggers a Stun Immunity, gain Unstoppable and Indestructible Passives for 2 seconds. This effect has a 500.0 seconds cooldown, and the Opponent’s Special Attack 3 removes the Indestructible.

cards.title: MUSCLE MASS
lines: When striking with or being struck by Basic Attacks, Gentle has a 31.8% chance to gain Muscle Mass, granting +8.3. Attack Rating for 15 seconds, paused during Special Attacks.
For each active Muscle Mass, inflict a 5.0% Daunted Passive.
When struck and when starting a Combo against a non-Stunned Opponent, Muscle Mass is paused for the duration of the Combo, plus 4 seconds if it was a 5-Hit Combo.
Heavy Attacks pause Muscle Mass for 3 seconds. This effect has a 1500.0 second cooldown if striking a Stunned Opponent.
Gentle’s fourth Light Attack does not grant Muscle Mass but consumes one Muscle Mass to inflict a 90.0 Rupture Debuff for 15 seconds. Max: -1.

At max Muscle Mass, inflict an extra 60.0% Daunted Passive, but Gentle loses 10% of his Base Health when finishing a Special Attack. Gentle does not benefit from the Recoil Mastery, but each point increases this Daunted’s potency by +10.0% flat.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Pause Unstoppable effects for the duration of the Special Attack. This pause does not trigger against Tech Champions.
While Unstoppable,gain +50.0 Attack Rating.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final hit inflicts a Fear Passive for 15 seconds.
When this attack ends, gain 500.0 Muscle Mass.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: For the duration of this Special Attack gain +200.0 Critical Rating, but Critical Damage Rating is reduced by 50.0%.
On activation, gain a non-stacking 25.0% Reverb Passive for 15 seconds and refresh any personal Fear Passives
When this attack ends, gain non-stacking 80.0 Physical Resistance Passive for 20 seconds, or 30.0 seconds as Defender.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On activation, gain a non-stacking 35.0% Reverb Passive for 25 seconds.
Gain 1200.0 Muscle Mass.

synergy.note: When Immune to an Incinerate effect, gain a non-stacking +15% Bulwark Passive for 15 seconds.
At the start of each fight, inflict a 35% Torment Passive for 30 seconds.
Start each fight with a 10% Vicious Passive for 30 seconds.

signature.title: BROTHER BLAZE
lines: Ghost Rider’s Fury Passives gain 9.8% potency.
Against #Villains, Ghost Rider’s Genesis Passives gain 49.3% potency.

cards.title: SPIRIT OF VENGEANCE
lines: The Rider’s curse grants Immunity to Bleed and Incinerate.

cards.title: JUDGMENTS
lines: Certain actions cast indefinite Judgments onto the Opponent. Each individual Judgment cannot be re-cast while they are already active.
Casting a Judgment also activates an associated non-stacking effect. The duration of this effect is increased by 45.0% for each personal Judgment on the Opponent.
Casting a Judgment grants a +8.0 Fury Passive until Penance Stare ends or Ghost Rider finishes his Special Attack 3. Max stacks: -1.
With more than 2 Bars of Power, the first hit of Ghost Rider’s Heavy Attack consumes 50.0% of a Bar to also grant a personal Fury.

cards.title: AT THE START OF THE FIGHT AGAINST A #VILLAIN
lines: Judgment of Guilt: Inflict a Stagger Passive for 2 seconds. This Judgment counts towards Ghost Rider’s other abilities, but is not removed by them.

cards.title: FINISH A 5-HIT COMBO WITH A MEDIUM ATTACK
lines: Judgment of Corruption: Inflict a -75.0% Hinder Passive for 8 seconds, paused during Ghost Rider’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: FINISH A 5-HIT COMBO WITH A LIGHT ATTACK
lines: Judgment of Wrath: Inflict a -50.0% Atrophy Passive for 6 seconds, paused during Ghost Rider’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: CHARGE A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Judgment of Spite: Inflict a Power Steal Passive, stealing 25.0% of a Bar of Power over 4 seconds.

cards.title: AFTER USING A STRIKER
lines: Judgment of Retribution: Inflict a Degeneration Passive dealing 30.0 Direct Damage over 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, cast the Judgment of Malice: Inflict a Fear Passive for 6 seconds.
On the final hit, inflict a non-stacking Incinerate Passive that deals 120.0 Energy Damage over 15 seconds, paused during Ghost Rider’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, cast the Judgment of Greed: Gain a 2.0% Genesis Passive for 8 seconds.
After the final hit of this attack, Ghost Rider uses his Penance Stare for up to 3 seconds, or until he is interrupted or takes any action.

cards.title: PENANCE STARE
lines: Penance Stare converts all Judgments and personal Incinerates into Degeneration Charges that expire one at a time over 3 seconds and are all removed when it ends.

If the Opponent is far from Ghost Rider when these Charges expire naturally, inflict a Degeneration Passive that deals 30.0 Direct Damage over 3 seconds. As an Attacker, inflict 3 additional Degenerations.
As an Attacker after the final hit of Special Attack 2, the first Degeneration inflicted also Passively Roots the Opponent until 50.0 seconds after Penance Stare ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Damnation Passive that deals 100.0 Direct Damage over 12 seconds, and then convert all Judgments into additional Damnations. 1 Damnation is removed when Ghost Rider is struck.

synergy.note: Add White Tiger : Charging a Heavy Attack while the Opponent’s back is against the wall grants a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by +50.5% for 2 seconds, paused during Gladiator’s Special Attacks. Max stacks: 3. Add Prowler : Special Attack 2 grants a +20% Fury Buff for 6 seconds.

Heavy Attacks grant +1 additional Confidence Buff. Furthermore, while the Opponent is suffering from Intimidate, Dashing forward inflicts a Root Passive for the duration of the Dash. Cooldown: 8 Seconds.

signature.title: EVEN FURTHER BEYOND
lines: Winning a fight as an Attacker with more than 90.0% Health adds 4 to Gladiator’s Persistent Confidence Limit. Max: 8. When starting a fight, increase Confidence Limit by that value.

Gladiator starts each fight with a Vigilance Buff for 1.57 seconds. While benefiting from a personal Vigilance effect, all hits deal Passive True Damage and the Opponent’s Armor Up effects suffer 100% reduced Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: STRONTIAN PHYSIOLOGY
lines: Strontian physiology grants 200.0% increased Ability Accuracy to personal Buffs, plus Immunity to Power Drain and Power Burn effects.
Gladiator’s personal Damage Over Time effects can not have their durations changed.

cards.title: STUNNING INTIMIDATION
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack after landing a non-Combo ending Basic Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for 0.6 seconds.

On hit while the Opponent has less than 2 Bars of Power, inflict a non-stacking 30.0% Intimidate Passive for 2.5 seconds. This Intimidate is paused for 0.35 seconds each time Gladiator Dashes forward, strikes the Opponent, or hits their Block. This pause does not activate during Special Attacks.

cards.title: CONFIDENCE BUFFS
lines: Confidence Buffs are indefinite and have 5.0% potency. Potency is increased by +1% flat when fighting on a Final Boss Node. New Confidence Buffs cannot be gained while at the Confidence Limit.
Striking the Opponent with a Heavy Attack grants 200.0 Confidence Buffs.
While the Opponent is suffering from Gladiator's personal Intimidate Debuff, gain 100.0 Confidence Buff each time the Opponent or their Block is struck by a Light or Medium Attack.
As a Defender, gain 100.0 Confidence Buff every 2 seconds. Being knocked down by a Special Attack pauses this for 8 seconds.
When struck by any attack other than the final hit of a Special Attack, remove 100.0 Confidence Buff.
When struck by the final hit of a Special Attack, remove 400.0 Confidence Buffs per level of the Special. This removal will not trigger while Gladiator is Unstoppable.

cards.title: SUPER CONFIDENCE
lines: On Special Attack activation, gain an Embolden Passive for 5 seconds, paused until the end of the Special Attack.
Striking the Opponent with a Heavy Attack grants an Unblockable Buff for 2 seconds, paused during Gladiator’s Special Attacks. Cooldown: 5 seconds, unless Gladiator does not strike the Opponent.
While benefiting from an Unblockable Buff, Heavy and Special Attacks deal an additional 90.0% of the damage recently dealt as a burst of Energy Damage.

cards.title: ULTRA CONFIDENCE
lines: Personal Unstoppable Buffs are paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. While this pause is active, Gladiator is immune to the Opponent's Stun effects.

While attacking the Opponent within striking distance during or immediately after their Special Attacks, incoming damage from hits is reduced by 80% and Basic Attacks deal bursts of 200.0 Energy Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain an Unstoppable Buff for 4 seconds, paused until the end of the Special Attack. While this Unstoppable is active, Gladiator can not lose Confidence during Special Attacks, or on Basic Attacks during Ultra Confidence.
Each Frost Breath hit inflicts a Coldsnap Debuff dealing 100.0 Energy Damage over 12 seconds. As a Defender, Coldsnaps can also be inflicted through Block but at 25% potency.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a Vigilance Buff for 20 seconds, paused until the end of the Special Attack.
Each Eye Beam hit inflicts an Incinerate Debuff dealing 200.0 Energy Damage over 20 seconds. As a Defender, Incinerates can also be inflicted through Block but at 25% potency.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Increase Confidence Limit by 400.0. This can only trigger once per fight.
Gain a Power Gain Buff granting 100% of a Bar of Power over 5 seconds.

synergy.note: While the Opponent is inflicted with at least 15 damaging Debuffs, gain an indefinite True Damage Buff.

signature.title: GODHUNTER
lines: Gaining a Shadow Magic Buff also grants an Undermine Buff for 9.9396 second(s).
Personal damaging Debuff duration is increased by 147.5 second(s) flat. It is further increased by 0.5 second(s) flat when fighting #Gods, #Elders, and for each stack of Heresy.
Gain 100.0 stack of Heresy the first time entering a fight on the final node in a Quest. Max Heresy is increased to 4.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Immune to Heal Block.
If the Willpower Mastery is active, it is removed, and each rank grants Gorr an indefinite Vicious Buff, increasing the potency of Damage over Time effects by 25.0%.
Gain 100.0 stack of Heresy after winning a fight against a #God or #Elder. Heresy persists between fights. Max 3.

cards.title: SHADOW MAGIC
lines: Gorr has 3 types of Shadow Magic Buffs. They each last 30 second(s) and allow him to inflict different damaging Debuffs by striking with his second Medium Attack. Max: 4 Each.

Gorr starts with Viscera Magic active. Starting his fourth Light Attack grants him the next Shadow Magic Buff in sequence. When fighting as a Defender, this also occurs automatically every 10 second(s).
Viscera Magic: Inflict Bleed, dealing 40.0 Direct Damage over 18 second(s).
Venom Magic: Inflict Poison, dealing 30.0 Direct Damage over 18 second(s) and reducing Regen Rate by 30%.
Volt Magic: Inflict Shock, dealing 50.0 Energy Damage over 18 second(s).
If any of these Debuffs is prevented via Immunity, Gorr instead inflicts a Degeneration Debuff, dealing 9.0 Direct Damage over 18 second(s). Damage increased by 500.0% against Tech Champions.
While Shadow Magic is active, striking Block has a 4.0% chance per Buff on Gorr to inflict its matching damaging Debuff, but not Degeneration.

cards.title: HERETIC’S DEFIANCE
lines: When Struck, gain a non-stacking Regeneration Buff, restoring 16.0% of missing Health over 12 second(s). The amount healed is increased by 12.5% when fighting #Gods, #Elders, and for each stack of Heresy.
A stacking copy of this Buff triggers whenever Gorr is inflicted with Power Burn, or a damaging effect that matches any active Shadow Magic Buff.
A stacking copy of this Buff triggers when gaining a Shadow Magic Buff, if Gorr is already affected by its matching damaging effect.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Once per fight, if the Opponent is inflicted with at least 20.0 damaging Debuffs, Gorr gains a Power Gain Buff for 2 second(s), granting the difference in Power between his current Power and Max Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: All Gorr’s Shadow Magic Buffs are paused during both Champion’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After this Attack, pause Shadow Magic Buff for 6 second(s).
On activation, when fighting as a Defender, activate all Shadow Magic Buffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On Activation, gain a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 20.0 for 20 second(s). Gain an additional Fury Buff for each unique damaging Debuff on the Opponent.
These Fury Buffs are refreshed when Gorr activates any Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gorr activates all of his Shadow Magic Buffs, and pauses all Shadow Magic Buffs for 11 second(s).

+12.0 Attack Rating during this Attack for each damaging Debuff on the Opponent. This is increased by 100% per unique damaging Debuff on the Opponent, and by an additional 100.0% when fighting #Gods, #Elders, and for each stack of Heresy.

signature.title: WEAPON ALPHA
lines: While Guardian has an Armor Up effect, gain the following effects:
+20.0 Block Proficiency
+25.0 Energy Resistance.
+25.0% Bleed Resistance
+15.0 Critical Damage Resistance

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Guardian can't land Critical Hits naturally, however every time he would have landed a Critical Hit, he inflicts an instant Shock dealing Energy Damage. This ability scales with Critical Damage Rating.
Guardian can trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks.

While all of Guardian’s Abilities are below 100% Ability Accuracy for 3+ second(s), he inflicts a Shock Debuff, dealing 15.0 Energy Damage per second until restored. This ability scales with Base Attack only and cannot be affected by Ability Accuracy. Max 1 stack.

cards.title: ARMOR UP
lines: Start each fight with an indefinite Armor Up Buff, increasing Armor Rating by 50.0.
If this Buff is removed for any reason, it will return after 14 second(s).
While Guardian has an Armor Up, Well-Timed Blocks against Special Attacks grant 100.0% Perfect Block Chance over 0.5 second(s). Each Perfect Block grants 10.0% of a bar of Power.

cards.title: FORCE FIELD
lines: Force Field Charges last indefinitely, up to 300.0 Charges. Any additional Force Field Charges last for 22 seconds.
Gain 1 Force Field Charge every 12 seconds.

If Guardian has an Armor Up, gain a +15% chance per Force Field Charge to Auto-Block all Hits in the Opponent's Special Attack. Gain a +15% chance against Mutants. This Auto-Block can reach a 75% chance max and the first activation is considered a Well-Timed Block.
Consume 100.0 Force Field Charge(s) to Block Unblockable Special Attacks against Mutants.

cards.title: ON FOURTH LIGHT ATTACK
lines: Consume 2 Force Field Charge(s), inflicting a Power Drain removing 20.0% of the Opponent’s current Power.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit consumes 1.0 Force Field Charge(s) to gain an Armor Up Buff, increasing Armor Rating by 50.0 for 15 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After activation, gain 300.0 Force Field Charge(s).
The last hit inflicts a Taunt Debuff for 6 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit consumes all Force Field Charges, increasing Attack Rating by 125.0 for each Force Field Charge for the duration of the Special Attack.
If Guardian has 3.0+ Force Field Charges consume 1 Armor Up Buff, inflicting a Shock Debuff, dealing 250.0 Energy Damage over 3 second(s).
This attack cannot be Evaded by Mutant Champions.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On activation, gain 600.0 indefinite Force Field Charge(s).
Inflict a Shock Debuff, dealing 150.0 Energy Damage over 20 second(s).

signature.title: ADVANCED A.I. INTEGRATION
lines: When Guillotine would be struck, she has a 5.0% chance to gain a Combo Shield Passive lasting 2 seconds, plus 2 additional seconds per Digi-Soul. Cooldown: 60.0 seconds.
While under the effect of a Combo Shield, damage from incoming attacks excluding Special 3 is capped at 10.0% of Guillotine's max health.

cards.title: ROBOTICS
lines: Advanced Robotics provides Immunity to Bleed & Poison effects.

Once per fight, when Guillotine drops below 15.0% health and she has at least 1 Digi-Soul, Self-Repair is activated, recovering 18.0 health per Digi-Soul over 4 seconds. This ability triggers instantly when starting a fight below 15.0% health. If Stunned during repair, connection is lost and the Repair immediately ends.

cards.title: BASIC ATTACKS
lines: Guillotine can’t land Critical Hits naturally, however all Basic Attacks that aren't Critical, have a chance based on Critical Rating to inflict a Degeneration Debuff dealing 25.0 direct damage over 3 seconds.

cards.title: DIGI-SOULS
lines: Guillotine begins the quest with 2.0 Digi-Souls, each providing +1600.0% Defensive Combat Power Rate. Digi-Souls are refunded after each fight and can be spent to enhance Guillotine's sword on the Pre-Fight screen.

At the start of the fight if Guillotine has at least 1 Digi-Soul, she gains an Armor Up Buff granting +40.0 Armor Rating per Digi-Soul and lasting indefinitely. If removed, this Armor reactivates after 4 seconds.

cards.title: PRE-FIGHT - SWORD EMPOWERMENT
lines: Huntress Function: Every 20th attack on the Combo Meter is a guaranteed Critical Hit, if this Attack is a Special 1 or 2 all hits of the Attack are guaranteed to be Critical.
Stability Function: While above 99 hits in the Combo Meter, Medium attacks Regenerate 5.0% of the damage dealt.
Assault Function: While above 99.0 hits in the Combo Meter, Medium attacks Burn 5% of the Opponent’s Current Power.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a Combo Shield Passive lasting indefinitely. Max stacks 200.0, plus an additional 200.0 for every Digi-Soul. When struck, a Combo Shield is removed.
100.0% chance to gain a Combo Shield Passive lasting indefinitely. Max stacks 200.0, plus an additional 200.0 for every Digi-Soul. When struck, a Combo Shield is removed.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Guillotine’s Attack Rating increases by +1.5 with each hit in her Combo Meter, capping after 100.0 hits.
At a Combo of 100+ Guillotine’s sword becomes empowered, dealing a burst of 2.0 Energy Damage for each hit above 100, scaling with base attack and capping after 600.0 hits.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED BY A LIGHT OR MEDIUM ATTACK
lines: 15.0% chance to activate Digi-Cloak, lasting 2.5 seconds per Digi-Soul and causing all unblocked attacks to Miss. Cooldown: 10.0 seconds after each use, and each time Guillotine is knocked down.
While fighting Mutant Opponents, the Digi-Cloak’s cooldown is reduced by -50.0%, and it’s chance to activate is doubled.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final strike of this attack drains 20.0% of the Opponent’s current Power per Digi-Soul, increasing to 40% per Digi-Soul if the attack doesn’t make contact with the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation: 100.0% chance to inflict a Spectre Debuff, reducing the Opponent's Regeneration Rate by -120.0% for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If the Opponent is at or below 5% of their max health this attack knocks them out. This damage can be prevented or reduced.
If Guillotine uses this attack to knock out her Opponent, their soul is digitized and absorbed, allowing her to start the next fight with 100.0 hits in her Combo Meter.

synergy.note: On activation, Special 1 inflicts a non-stacking 150% Neutralize Passive for 15 seconds.

signature.title: ANCESTOR'S STRENGTH
lines: The Souls of her ancestors empower Guillotine further, granting a 10.0% chance to steal 19.0% of damage done as Health for every 4 Souls she possesses. Minimum 19.0% Health Steal regardless of current Soul count.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Start each fight with 4.0 Souls. Each Soul grants Guillotine +15.0 Critical Damage Rating. 1 Soul expires every 10 seconds. Souls are treated as Cruelty Passives for all other abilities.
For every 500.0% of Max Health that Guillotine removes from her Opponent during combat, she feeds her ancestral blade and gains 1 Soul.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a 200.0% Spectre Debuff for 10 seconds, then consumes 2.0 Souls.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: La Fleur du Mal deals 2.0% of the Opponent’s Max Health in Direct Damage per Soul. After this attack, 50.0% of Guillotine’s Souls are consumed, rounded down.

synergy.note: Whenever a personal effect is refreshed via Bleed consumption, gain an indefinite +15% Fury Passive. Max: 5.
Gain Vigilance while the Opponent is Bleeding, making attacks unable to Miss.

signature.title: PLOT ARMOR
lines: Gwenpool’s read enough comics to know that the main character doesn’t die, preventing her from losing more than 90.0% of her current health per hit from Special Attacks. She also reduces her opponent's Defensive Ability Accuracy, based on her current combo count.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: 3.0% chance to Stun per Bleed active on target, lasting for 0.75 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: If target isn't Bleeding when the last strike hits, it has a 5.0% Chance to cause Bleed, doing 93.0 Direct Damage over 6 seconds.
If target is already Bleeding, the attack instead gains a 100.0% chance to convert one existing Bleed into a Bleed causing 500.0 Direct Damage, over 27 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: This attack Incinerates the enemy, dealing 115.0 Energy Damage over 14 seconds. This effect also removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50% while it's active.
When this effect expires, it has a 100.0% chance to consume 1 Bleed effect to reapply itself.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict an Enervate Debuff, preventing the opponent from gaining Power when struck for 7 seconds.
When this effect expires, it has a 100.0% chance to consume 1 Bleed effect to reapply itself.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict an Armor Break Debuff, removing 1 Armor Up Buff and reducing Armor Rating by -75.0 for 16 seconds.
When this effect expires, it has a 100.0% chance to consume 1 Bleed effect to reapply itself.

signature.title: PLASMA AMPLIFICATION
lines: Each time Havok gains a Plasma Charge, from any source other than this ability he has a 25.0% chance to gain another one.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Havok is Immune to all forms of Incinerate.
Havok’s mutation gives him +50.0 Energy Resistance.
Havok Passively generates 2.5% of a Bar of Power each second.
Havok gains -25.0% less Power from landing and receiving Hits.

cards.title: WHEN STRUCK BY CRITICAL HITS
lines: Havok reduces the Opponent's Critical Damage Rating by -50.0%.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Havok’s Medium Attacks, Heavy Attacks, and Light combo ending attacks do not make Contact, and deal Energy Damage.

cards.title: PLASMA CHARGES
lines: Havok generates a Plasma Charge every 5 seconds, and can have a maximum of 1000.0 Plasma Charges.
While Power Locked Havok’s Plasma Charge generation increases to 200.0 Charges every 5 seconds.
Each time Havok receives Energy Damage or a Critical Hit he gains +100.0 Plasma Charge(s).
If affected by a Power Drain or Power Burn Havok loses all his Plasma Charges.

cards.title: PLASMA BUILD UP
lines: When Havok would generate a Plasma Charge beyond his maximum, he instead places a Plasma Build Up on the Opponent. Plasma Build Ups last until removed by another ability.
If made to Bleed Havok puts a Plasma Build Up on the Opponent.
At 1100.0 Stacks all Plasma Build Ups are Removed.
When a Plasma Build Up is removed, it detonates Passively causing 15.0 Energy Damage.
If a Plasma Build Up is removed due to a Purify effect its Passive Damage is increased to 40.0.
Champions with an Armor Up Buff, and Havok, receive no damage from this ability.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Convert 2 Plasma Charge(s) to 1 Prowess, each increasing Special Attack Damage by 10.0% and lasting until Havok's next Special Attack ends. Max 5 stacks.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Places a Feedback Debuff on the Opponent for 10 seconds, causing 5.0 Energy Damage over its duration, for each Plasma Build Up on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: If Havok has +700.0 Stacks of Prowess all hits of his Special Attacks become Unblockable.
Converts up to 5.0 Plasma Charge(s) into Passive Prowess Effects, each increasing Special Attack Damage by 10.0% and lasting for 13 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activating this Special Attack Havok gains a Overcharge Passive Effect for the next 9 seconds, granting +100.0 Plasma Charge(s) per second.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: +175.0 Attack as long as the Opponent doesn’t have an active Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Convert all Plasma Charges into Prowess Passive Effects.
+40.0 Attack for each Plasma Charge converted.
Purifies all Plasma Build Ups on the Opponent.

synergy.note: Draining the Opponent’s Power across a Power Bar threshold grants a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by 20% for 20 seconds. Max stacks 3.
Hawkeye’s personal Bleed abilities inflict Poison instead.
Inflict Rupture and Critical Rupture instead of Bleed and Critical Bleed when fighting Bleed Immune Champions.
Gain Immunity to Poison Debuffs from Non-Mutant Champions.

signature.title: HEMORRHAGE
lines: Landing a Critical Hit with an Arrow Shot will cause any personal Bleed Debuff triggered to become a Critical Bleed, multiplying the Bleed’s Potency by Hawkeye’s Critical Damage Multiplier.
Additionally each Bleed Debuff on the opponent reduces their Physical Resistance by -4.9.

cards.title: DIALED IN
lines: During Special Attacks, press the Block Input after the first hit to slow down time. Releasing the Block Input precisely when Hawkeye releases the arrow grants a Perfect Release bonus.

Activating a Perfect Release bonus grants a Dialed In Passive, increasing duration of personal Debuffs inflicted by Arrow strikes by 10.0%. All Dialed In Passives are removed when failing to activate a Perfect Release. Max Stacks: 5.

cards.title: BASIC ATTACKS
lines: Pause all Bleed Debuffs on the opponent for 1 second(s).

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Causes a Slow Debuff on the opponent for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Final Hit: 100% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff dealing 100.0 direct damage over 10 seconds. Each bar of Power spent beyond 1 grants +1 Debuff and +5.0 seconds Duration.
Perfect Release: Arrow attack becomes a Guaranteed Critical Hit.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict Power Drain, removing 75.0% of a bar of Power.
Perfect Release: 100.0% chance to inflict a Suppression Debuff, reducing the Opponents Combat Power Rate by -50.0% for 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a 25 second Fragility Debuff. Attacking a Fragile Opponent grants +150.0 Critical Damage Rating and reduces Block Proficiency by 50%.
Perfect Release: Inflict an additional Fragility Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: All Bleeds triggered during this attack gain up to +200.0% duration based on Hawkeye’s Critical Rating.
Based on Hawkeye's Critical Chance, Bleeds triggered during this attack can be Critical Bleeds, multiplying the Bleed’s Potency by Hawkeye’s Critical Damage Multiplier.
Getting a Perfect result in the Special 3 Mini-Game grants Maximum Critical Rating for the attack.

signature.title: ALL SEEING
lines: Heimdall gains Immunity to Fate Seal effects.
Once per fight when Heimdall would be Knocked Out, he gains an Indestructible Buff for 0.5 second(s).

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Heimdall has -60.0% Resistance to Poison and Incinerate effects. While suffering from a Poison or Incinerate effect from a Champion, Heimdall pauses all personal Buffs and Passives.

Personal Buffs have 200.0% increased Ability Accuracy. If one fails due to an Immunity, it re-triggers as a Passive with -1% increased base duration and 25.0% increased base potency. Max stacks: -1 Precision, Fury, and Armor Up Passives each.
When gaining a personal Buff other than Power Gain, gain a non-stacking Power Gain Buff granting 10.0% of a Bar of Power over 5 seconds.

cards.title: VANIR BUFFS
lines: When Heimdall hits the Opponent or their Block, or when Heimdall is struck or Blocks a hit, he gains 1000.0 Vanir Charges, up to -1. At -1 Vanir Charges, Heimdall’s next action consumes them to grant him a 15 second Buff based on the action:
Hitting the Opponent or their Block with a Light Attack grants a +10.0 Precision Buff.
Hitting the Opponent or their Block with a Medium Attack grants a +15.0 Fury Buff.
Blocking a hit or being struck grants a +10.0 Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: INDEFINITE BUFFS
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack converts 100.0 Vanir Buff with a duration into an indefinite copy with the same base potency. Max stacks: -1 per Buff.
When converting to an indefinite Buff, Heimdall also gains an indefinite Cross-Fight of that Buff. Max: 1000.0 Cross-Fights gained per fight. Max: -1 Cross-Fights per Buff.

cards.title: TRUE SIGHT
lines: Activating a Special Attack grants Heimdall an indefinite True Strike Buff. While active, the Opponent cannot activate the Dexterity Mastery, Heimdall can Parry non-contact Attacks, and this True Strike is removed when Heimdall is struck.

While this True Strike is active, Heimdall has a 25.0% chance to Auto-Block Light and Medium Attacks. As a Defender, this chance is increased by 3750.0% for each active Buff or personal Passive up to -1. This Auto-Block is considered a Well-Timed Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a Stun Immune Buff for 8 seconds.
If Heimdall has an Armor Up effect active, he also gains an Unstoppable Buff for 8 seconds. This will not re-trigger while active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a 750.0% Resonance Buff for 12 seconds, with +750.0% flat base potency for each active Buff or personal Passive, up to 100.0% total.
If Heimdall has an Armor Up effect active, he also gains an Unblockable Buff for 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Heimdall converts all personal Buffs into Passives with 5000.0% increased base duration and -1% increased base potency.

synergy.note: Personal Reversed Controls Passive is replaced by a 25% Special Concussion Passive.

signature.title: MASTER OF EVOLUTION
lines: At the end of a fight against the High Evolutionary, each Debuff on the Opponent becomes a Cross-Fight 1.6% Devolve Debuff. These Cross-Fight Debuffs carry over to the next 3 fights. Max stacks: 10.0.

For each Debuff on the Opponent reduce their Regeneration Rate by 20.0%, up to a max of 100.0%. This effect replaces the Despair Mastery, and it is also granted to the Opponent of a Champion suffering from the Cross-Fight Devolve Debuff.
The potency of the bursts of damage granted by the Evolutionary Field are increased by 10.0%.
When inflicting a Devolve Debuff, 10.0% chance to gain an indefinite 1.6% Aspect of Evolution Passive. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: EVOLVED PHYSIOLOGY
lines: The High Evolutionary is Immune to Buffs granted by the Opponent and Immune to any Neutralize and Rupture.
The High Evolutionary’s Combat Power Rate can only be reduced by Skill Champions.
While the Opponent is suffering from a personal Debuff, they lose and cannot gain Undermine or True Sense effects.
When Blocked or when Blocking an attack, 25.0% chance to inflict a -10.0% Severe Wither Debuff for 15 seconds. 100% chance on Well-Timed Blocks and Auto-Blocks. Max stacks: -1.
Basic Hits have a 25.0% chance to inflict a 5.0 Exhaustion Debuff for 15 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: EVOLUTIONARY EXOSKELETON
lines: When the High Evolutionary would be struck with the same Basic Attack twice in a row, he removes any Stuns and gains a 10000.0% Auto-Block Passive, lasting until he’s attacked 3 more times.

Once it ends, this Auto-Block is disabled and cannot be gained again until the High Evolutionary is struck 1800.0 times by Basic Attacks. As a Defender, each personal Debuff on the Opponent when the Auto-Block ends reduces this count by 1 to a minimum of 5.0.
This Auto-Block does not count as a Well-Timed Block, resists Block Breaks from Heavy Attacks, and cannot be prevented by Ability Accuracy reduction.

cards.title: COMBO DETONATION
lines: While Combo Detonation is not active, when striking or when struck with Basic Attacks, gain -1 Combo Detonation Charge. When the High Evolutionary would inflict a personal Debuff, gain 500.0 Charges.

When the Opponent gains a Bar of Power, consume 50 Charges for a 150.0% chance to inflict a -1 hit 380.0 Combo Detonation Passive for 18 seconds. Unblockable hits from non-Skill Champions do not count towards this Combo Detonation. As a Defender, damage scales with Base Attack only.
As an Attacker, Combo Detonation is paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks, but as a Defender, it only pauses during the High Evolutionary’s own Special Attack 2.

cards.title: EVOLUTIONARY FIELD
lines: The Evolutionary Field is an area of effect placed in the stage by the High Evolutionary around the Opponent for 12 seconds. The expiration rate decreases by 75.0% while either Champion is inside of it.
When the Opponent enters the field, they are inflicted with an indefinite -1.6% Devolve Debuff. Max Stacks: -1.
While the Opponent is inside of the field, all personal Debuffs are paused. Additionally, while suffering from a non-Damaging Debuff, they suffer a Reversed Controls Passive.
While the High Evolutionary is inside the field, all attacks deal a burst of 34.0% of the damage dealt as Direct Damage.

While either Champion is inside the field during the High Evolutionary’s Special Attack 1, he gains +100.0 Attack Rating, and the potency of his Combo Detonation increases by 4.5% per Debuff on the Opponent, up to a max of 25 Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: While the Opponent is inside of the Evolutionary Field, they are not pushed back when struck by Special Attack hits and are Passively Slowed for the duration of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict 500.0 personal Severe Wither Debuffs.

As an Attacker, the final hit immediately expires the High Evolutionary’s Combo Detonation, but if it expires naturally during this Special while the Opponent is inside the Evolutionary Field, it re-inflicts itself when the Special ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 0.7 seconds after activation, place the Evolutionary Field.
If the personal Auto-Block is disabled due to activation, it becomes enabled.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On activation, inflict 500.0 personal Severe Wither Debuffs and place the Evolutionary Field.

synergy.note: Critical Hits have a 30% chance to Armor Break the Opponent for 6 second(s), reducing their Armor Rating by 700.

signature.title: THE MONKEY, THE MYTH, THE LEGEND
lines: While the Opponent is above or at 25.0% Health or is a #Mercenary, Assassin’s Cunning and Primal Rage last 45.6 second(s) longer.
While the Opponent is below 25.0% Health or is a #Mercenary, Hit-Monkey Passively reduces their Defensive Ability Accuracy by 9.6%.

cards.title: NUNCHAKU
lines: Hit-Monkey’s nunchaku attacks are guaranteed Critical Hits against Opponents who are not Blocking. He uses them for his first Medium Hit, first Light Hit, and second Medium Hit.
Landing 3 Critical Hits in a row deals internal damage to the Opponent and inflicts a Bleed Debuff, dealing +50.0 Direct Damage over 4.5 second(s).

cards.title: MONKEY SCHEME, MONKEY DO
lines: Landing 300.0 Critical Hits in a row grants Hit-Monkey a Monkey Scheme. This is unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
Blocking or Dodging an attack converts a Monkey Scheme into Assassin’s Cunning, lasting 8 second(s).
Attacking or being Struck converts a Monkey Scheme into Primal Rage, lasting 8 second(s).
Against #Mercenary Opponents, Monkey Schemes are always converted into both Assassin’s Cunning and Primal Rage.
While Assassin’s Cunning or Primal Rage are active, Monkey Schemes cannot be gained.

cards.title: WHEN KNOCKED DOWN
lines: Activate both Assassin’s Cunning and Primal Rage for 6 second(s).

cards.title: ON OPPONENT EVADE
lines: Activate Assassin’s Cunning and refresh Primal Rage. This is unaffected by Ability Accuracy, but can’t trigger more than once every 15 second(s).

cards.title: ASSASSIN’S CUNNING
lines: Prevent the Opponent’s Evade effects.
Gain a 60.0% chance to Evade an incoming Basic Attack while not Blocking. Evading removes Assassin’s Cunning.
The Bleed Debuffs from Hit-Monkey’s Nunchaku can be Critical Bleeds, multiplying their Potency by his Critical Damage Multiplier. The chance for a Critical Bleed is equal to his Critical chance.
The chance for Critical Bleeds to occur is further increased for every 3 Critical Hits landed in a row during Assassin’s Cunning.

cards.title: PRIMAL RAGE
lines: Ignore the Opponent’s Armor and Resistances.
Gain a 100.0% chance to Purify one of each Stun and Damage over Time Debuff on Hit-Monkey when one is gained, or when Primal Rage activates. Purifying removes Primal Rage.

Light hits have a 20.0% chance to Disorient the Opponent, decreasing their Block Proficiency and Defensive Ability Accuracy by 40% for 6 second(s). The chance to Disorient is increased by 2.50% flat for each Hit landed during Primal Rage, up to 45.0% total.
Special Attack hits have the same chance to Disorient, for 300.0 additional second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If Assassin’s Cunning is active, this attack has Vigilance and cannot Miss.
If Primal Rage is active, this attack is Unblockable.

If this attack causes a Miss to fail or it breaks through a Block, refresh Assassin’s Cunning and Primal Rage, and Hit-Monkey gains Vigilance and Unblockable until Assassin’s Cunning or Primal Rage expires.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If activated immediately after Hit-Monkey lands a Critical Hit, all hits in this attack are guaranteed to be Critical.
Assassin’s Cunning and Primal Rage are paused during this attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Cruelty Buff for 27 second(s), increasing Critical Damage Rating by +225.0.
While this Cruelty is active, striking the Opponent pauses Assassin’s Cunning and Primal Rage for 0.3 second(s).

synergy.note: Knocking the opponent down removes all their Prowess effects and grants Howard 1 Prowess Buff for each effect removed this way, each increasing Special Attack Damage by 10% for 10 seconds.

signature.title: QUACK-FU
lines: If Howard is fighting in any fight with a Class Advantage, he breaks out his legendary Quack-Fu to gain the following:
Critical Resistance equal to 7.0% of Howard’s Armor Rating.
Base Ability Accuracy of 115% instead of the normal 100%.
Incoming Debuffs suffer --19.0 second(s) duration.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: The bulky ISO-Loader suit provides Immunity to Bleed effects.
Howard’s personal Buffs and Debuffs each expire 1 at a time.

cards.title: BUTTON MASHER EXTRAORDINAIRE
lines: Rapidly pressing the Block button at different times in the fight grants Howard special MASH! bonuses. Each MASH! bonus requires more presses of the Block button than the last within the same window.
In the Pre-Fight Menu, Howard can activate the Auto-Masher which lasts for the duration of the fight. While Auto-Masher is active, all MASH! bonuses will be handled automatically for Howard.
While fighting as a Defender, Auto-Masher is always active.

cards.title: BEFORE THE FIGHT STARTS
lines: Gain 1 indefinite Dormant Armor. MASH! Gain additional Dormant Armors. When the fight starts each Dormant Armor is converted into an indefinite Armor Up Buff, increasing Armor Rating by +11.0.

cards.title: WHILE EITHER CHAMPION IS STUNNED
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by +10.0 for 10 seconds. Max Stacks: 50. MASH! Gain additional Fury Buffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict 2 Heal Block Debuffs, each lasting 2.5 seconds. MASH! Inflict additional Heal Block Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 80.0% chance to inflict a Suppression Debuff, reducing Combat Power Rate by -10.0% for 4 seconds. MASH! Additional hits can inflict additional Suppression Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a 3 second Stun Debuff.
If Howard gets a Perfect result in the Special 3 Mini Game, this Stun Debuff becomes Passive and lasts 4 seconds.

synergy.note: Hulk is Immune to Buffs. Whenever a Buff is prevented by Immunity, inflict a -250 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 3 seconds. Max: 20.
Immunity to Fate Seal.
Immunity to Nullify.
Immunity to Stagger.

signature.title: GAMMA BRAWLER
lines: When Hulk enters GAMMA RAGE or he strikes the Opponent with a Heavy Attack while it's active, he gains an Unstoppable Passive for 0.9546 seconds.
Gain up to 9.3 Physical Resistance and Critical Resistance while Unstoppable based on missing Health. Potencies for both are reduced by -50.0% against Skill Champions.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
Gain up to 90% Degeneration Resistance and +50.0 Attack Rating based on missing Health. Maximum benefit at 20.0% Health.
Stunned Opponents suffer --20.0% Combat Power Rate, doubled while in GAMMA RAGE.

cards.title: FURY
lines: Hulk’s Fury Passives grant +10.0 Attack Rating. They last 2 seconds and expire one at a time during GAMMA RAGE, but are paused otherwise.
Their Ability Accuracy cannot be modified, except by Hulk.
When striking the Opponent, 50.0% to 80.0% chance to gain a Fury Passive based on missing Health.
When struck, 40.0% to 70.0% chance to gain a Fury Passive based on missing Health.
When struck, if Hulk loses more than 10.0% of his Max Health, gain 5 Fury Passives.

cards.title: GAMMA RAGE
