lines: Striking an Opponent with a Heavy Attack while Hulk has 500.0 or more personal Fury Passives inflicts a Stun Debuff for 2 seconds and enters GAMMA RAGE.
When Hulk has 1500.0 or more personal Fury Passives, he automatically enters GAMMA RAGE.
While in GAMMA RAGE, if Hulk would gain a personal Fury Passive, he instead inflicts a -5.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 3 seconds. Max: -1.
While GAMMA RAGE is active, pause all Trauma and Physical Vulnerability Debuffs on the Opponent.
GAMMA RAGE ends when Hulk has no personal Fury Passives, then goes on cooldown for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final hit inflicts a Stun Debuff for 4 seconds. Duration is increased by 100.0% while in GAMMA RAGE.
Each time this Stun is inflicted, its duration is reduced by -60.0% until the next time Hulk enters GAMMA RAGE.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a Trauma Debuff for each personal Fury Passive currently on Hulk. Trauma lasts for 3 seconds and causes all hits to deal an additional 5.0% of the damage recently dealt as a burst of Physical Damage. Max: -1.

signature.title: THE GREEN DOOR
lines: Hulk surges with gamma energy from the Below-Place, gaining benefits while above certain thresholds of Gamma Radiation:
25%: Basic Attacks have a 2.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff, lasting 0.75 second(s).
50%: When the Opponent is Immune to a Stun Effect or a Stun Effect expires, inflict a Weakness Debuff, decreasing Attack Rating by 25.0% for 4 second(s).
75%: Inflict an indefinite Petrify Debuff of 25.0% Potency.

cards.title: GAMMA MUTATE
lines: An enhanced immune system provides full immunity to the Poisons of the Battlerealm.
Hulk's Regeneration Rate cannot be decreased or increased by outside sources.
Gain up to 100.0 Attack Rating based on how much health Hulk has lost during the entire fight. This ability is based on 200% of Hulk’s Health.

cards.title: RAGE
lines: Hulk’s Medium Attacks, the first hit of his Special 1 Attack and the first and last hits of his Special 2 Attack apply a RAGE stack.
Consecutive RAGE Attacks build up RAGE stacks. All RAGE stacks are lost after 2 second(s) without performing a RAGE Attack. RAGE stacks do not expire during Hulk's or his Opponent's Special Attacks.

cards.title: RAGE ATTACKS
lines: Deal a burst of 15.0 Physical Damage for each RAGE stack.
Deal a burst of 1.0 Direct Damage to Hulk for each RAGE stack except when using the Medium 1 Attack. Hulk cannot be knocked out by this ability.
If the Recoil Mastery is active, the Recoil Damage is disabled and deals a burst of 2.0 Direct Damage to Hulk instead, plus an equal amount for each Rank. Hulk cannot be knocked out by this ability.

cards.title: PERSISTENT GAMMA RADIATION
lines: Gamma Radiation’s maximum strength is equal to 100.0% of Hulk's Max Health, and scales with boosts and buffs.
20.0% of all Damage dealt to Hulk when struck is stored as Gamma Radiation.
60.0% of all damage dealt to Hulk while afflicted with a Degeneration Effect is stored as Gamma Radiation.
100.0% of all self-inflicted Damage is stored as Gamma Radiation.

cards.title: IMMORTALITY
lines: When receiving damage that would knock out Hulk while Gamma Radiation is at or above 15.0%, consume 15% and gain an Immortality Passive, preventing death and becoming Unblockable for 8.0 second(s). This ability has a 50 second cooldown.
While active, any damage prevented by Immortality consumes an equal amount of Gamma Radiation instead. This does not apply to self-inflicted Damage.
When Immortality expires, consume all Gamma Radiation. Become Invulnerable and gain a Regeneration Passive, recovering 10.0 Health plus all Gamma Radiation as Health over 1 second(s).

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit refreshes the RAGE timer and doubles the amount of RAGE stacks.
The last hit gains 40.0 Attack Rating for each RAGE stack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The last hit of this attack has a 60.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff, lasting 1.75 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The last hit of this attack has a 100.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff, lasting 3 seconds.
Inflict a Suppression Debuff for each RAGE stack, reducing Combat Power Rate by -5.0% for 15 second(s). Max 14.0 stack(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Add a flat 15.0% strength to Gamma Radiation.
Inflict a Petrify Debuff of 25.0% Potency for 20 second(s).

synergy.note: Launching a Special Attack converts 1 Armor Up Buff into a Fury Buff, lasting 10 Seconds and granting 30% Attack.

signature.title: VERONICA MK II
signature.trigger: Brought Below 15% Health - Once Per Fight
lines: 100.0% chance to activate a Self-Repair Buff lasting 12 seconds and recovering 15.0 Health. This Buff is lost if Hulkbuster is Stunned.
Giant-Buster: +24.0 Attack rating while Self-Repair is active.
Iron Wall: +13.0% Self-Repair Potency.

cards.title: WHILE FIGHTING AS AN ATTACKER
lines: Enter Giant-Buster Mode, granting the following:
Up to +25.0 Attack rating based on how large the opponent is.
+28.0 Attack rating for each Shock effect on the opponent.

cards.title: WHILE FIGHTING AS A DEFENDER
lines: Enter Iron Wall Mode, enhancing Hulkbuster’s defensive abilities.

cards.title: START OF FIGHT & EVERY 15 SECONDS
lines: Gain an indefinite Armor Up, granting +15.0 Armor rating.
Max Stacks in Giant-Buster: 200.0.
Max Stacks in Iron Wall: 400.0.

cards.title: BROUGHT BELOW 15% HEALTH
lines: Gain an indefinite Armor Up, granting +15.0 Armor rating.
If in Iron Wall, gain a second Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: FIGHTING NON-COSMIC CHAMPIONS
lines: For each Armor Up Buff Hulkbuster gains the following benefits:
+30.0 Energy Resistance.
+20.0 Critical Damage Rating.
Incoming Bleed & Poison Debuffs suffer --25.0% Potency.
Enemy attacks suffer --20.0% Offensive Ability Accuracy.
Enemy attacks suffer --35.0 Critical Damage Rating.

cards.title: WHEN STRUCK BY CRITICAL HITS
lines: 60.0% chance to consume 1 Armor Up Buff to inflict a Shock Debuff, dealing 65.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict an Armor Break Debuff, removing 1 Armor Up Buff and reducing Armor Rating by -60.0 for 20 seconds.
100.0% chance to gain an Unblockable Buff, lasting 1 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflicts up to 3 Shock Debuffs, with each having a 80.0% chance to activate, dealing 55.0 Energy Damage over 20 seconds.
Unblockable Buffs triggered during this attack gain +450.0 seconds duration.

synergy.note: 50% chance when Striking the Opponent while Unblockable to inflict a non-stacking Armor Break Debuff for 10 second(s), reducing Armor Rating by 500.
Knocking down the Opponent grants a non-stacking +100 Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds.
Hulkling is Stun Immune while he has at least 3 Pierce Buffs.

signature.title: KING OF SPACE
lines: Personal Bulwark Buff duration is increased by 147.5 second(s) flat.
Personal Fury Buff duration is increased by 47.5 second(s) flat.
+4.8 Armor Penetration for each active personal Pierce Buff.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Advanced Kree-Skrull physiology provides full immunity to the Poisons and Shocks of the Battlerealm.
Additionally, the mystical Excelsior Sword protects Hulkling’s energy, granting immunity to Power Drain, Steal and Burn, and reducing incoming Heal Block duration by -200.0 second(s) flat.
When Hulkling prevents an effect via immunity, he gains 100.0 Shapeshift Charge(s).
Offensive Combat Power Rate is decreased by -20.0%.
+25.0 Attack Rating for each unique Buff Hulkling has.
Increase hit damage by 1% for every 1% of Armor Penetration that exceeds the Opponent's combined Armor Rating and Resistances.

cards.title: SHAPESHIFT CHARGES
lines: Start the fight with 3.0 Shapeshift Charge(s), and gain 100.0 Charge(s) every 1 second(s) while not attacking with Basic Attacks or being Struck.
A Shapeshift Charge is converted into a Buff when Hulkling performs certain gameplay actions. These Buffs each last 16 second(s) and can stack up to 400.0 times.
Whenever a Shapeshift Buff is gained, Hulkling also Passively gains 7.0% of a Bar of Power.

cards.title: SHAPESHIFT BUFF CONVERSION
lines: Hit into Block: Convert into a Pierce Buff of 25.0 potency.
Strike with a Light or Medium Attack: Convert into an Aptitude Buff, increasing the potency of Fury, Armor, and Precision Buffs by 18.0%.
Well-Timed Block: Convert into a Bulwark Buff, increasing Block Proficiency by 25.0.
Struck by the Opponent: Convert into a Regeneration Buff, healing 65.0% of the damage that would be taken from the strike.

cards.title: PEAK TRANSFORMATION
lines: Every 500.0 Pierce Buffs gained also grants an Unblockable Buff for 5 second(s). Reduced to every 3.0 Buffs when fighting as a Defender.
Every 800.0 Regeneration Buffs gained also grants an Indestructible Buff for 2.5 second(s). Reduced to every 5.0 Buffs when fighting as a Defender.
If either of these Buffs are Nullified, they are replaced with identical Passives, and their duration is 300.0 second(s) longer.
Both the Indestructible Buff and Passive are removed after being struck by the Opponent’s Special Attack 3.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflicts a non-stacking Intimidate Debuff for 7 second(s), making the Opponent less aggressive and reducing their Block Proficiency by -30.0. Cooldown 15.0 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: For the next 10 second(s), the time between gaining Shapeshift Charges is decreased to 50.0 second(s).
If Hulkling is or becomes Unblockable during this Attack, pause all his personal Buffs, other than Unblockable, until 2 second(s) after this Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On Activation, gain a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 70.0 for 10 second(s).
If Hulkling is or becomes Unblockable during this Attack, gain another Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 110.0 for 10 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If Hulkling has at least 200.0 Bulwark Shapeshift Buffs, pause 200.0 of them for the remainder of the fight, once per fight.
If Hulkling doesn’t have enough Bulwark, or they’re already paused, pause Aptitude Buffs instead, then Pierce Buffs.
If Hulkling doesn’t have enough of any Bulwark, Aptitude, or Pierce, or all are paused, he instead gains Shapeshift Charges up to their Max.

synergy.note: When Immune to an Incinerate effect, gain a non-stacking +15% Bulwark Passive for 15 seconds.
Whenever the Opponent is immune to Incinerate they’re inflicted with a Slow Debuff for 8 seconds.

signature.title: REKINDLE
lines: If Human Torch has 0 Persistent Charges and his Pre-Fight Ability is not active, he has a 1000.0% chance to gain 1 Persistent Charge(s).
This chance increases by a flat 1200.0% every time the ability fails to activate.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Basic attacks deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.

cards.title: FLAME ON!
lines: Human Torch starts the Quest with 100.0 Persistent Charge(s).
If Human Torch has at least 100.0 Persistent Charge(s), he can consume them to activate this ability before the Fight.
For the entire Fight, all of Human Torch's Incinerates are Nova Flames, last 2 second(s) longer, and deal an additional +75.0% damage. This ability does not stack.

cards.title: TEMPERATURE
lines: While Charging a Heavy Attack, Human Torch increases his Temperature.
Temperature decreases constantly over time. Temperature decreases slower for each Incinerate or Smoulder on either Champion.
At 1000.0 Temperature, the heat from Human Torch’s attacks is so intense, they cannot Miss.
At 2000.0 Temperature, Temperature cannot decrease for 6.5 second(s), then it is set to 18.0.
The duration of all of Human Torch's Incinerate effects increases by up to 400.0 second(s) depending on his Temperature.

cards.title: INCINERATES
lines: Human Torch Incinerates the Opponent with his first and last Light hits, and all his Medium and Heavy hits. These Incinerate Debuffs deal 20.0 damage over 3 seconds.
Incinerate removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50% while it's active.
The potency of all Incinerate and Nova Flames on the Opponent is increased by 12.0% for each Incinerate or Smoulder on either Champion.
For each Incinerate on the Opponent, their Regeneration Rate is reduced by -20.0%.
While Human Torch is Bleeding, the duration of all his Incinerate effects is reduced by -400.0 second(s).

cards.title: NOVA FORM
lines: When Temperature is at 20.0 and the Opponent has 700.0 Incinerate effects, for the next 7 second(s) instead of placing Incinerate Debuffs on the Opponent, Human Torch places Nova Flame Passives instead.

cards.title: NOVA FLAME
lines: Human Torch's personal Nova Flame reduces Block Proficiency by 100%, and inflicts a Power Sting Passive.
An Opponent with Power Sting takes 60.0 Direct Damage when activating a Special Attack. Power Sting is removed when Nova Flame expires.
All of Human Torch's abilities treat Nova Flames as Incinerates.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED
lines: 0% chance to Incinerate the Opponent for 20.0 damage over 4 seconds. This chance increases by a flat 10.0% for each Incinerate or Smoulder on either Champion.

cards.title: WHEN BLOCKING OR ATTACKED
lines: If the hit dealt Energy Damage, Temperature increases by 500.0, and Human Torch Smoulders.
All Attacks from Mystic Champions are considered as Energy Attacks towards this ability.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit of this attack increases Temperature by 500.0, and it cannot decrease for 6.5 second(s).
If the last hit is blocked, it places a Smoulder Passive on Human Torch.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The last two hits of this Attack each have a 100.0% chance to Incinerate the Opponent, dealing 30.0 damage over 5 seconds.
If the last two hits are blocked, they each place a Smoulder on Human Torch instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Nova Flame, dealing 100.0 damage over 5 seconds.
Human Torch enters his Nova Form for 7 second(s) and places 200.0 Smoulder Passives on himself.

signature.title: COSMIC POTENTIAL
lines: Hyperion's Eternal physiology becomes more efficient at storing and converting cosmic radiation, resulting in 25.0% increased Fury, Precision, Power Gain and Regeneration Buff duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: This attack Incinerates the enemy, dealing 104.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds. This effect also removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50% while it's active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 60.0% chance to Stun for 4 seconds.
100.0% chance to inflict an Armor Break Debuff, removing 1 Armor Up Buff and reducing Armor Rating by -45.0 for 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to gain up to 3 Cosmic Charges.
If Hyperion has 3 Cosmic Charges when used he instead gains a Cosmic Overcharge Buff.
While in Cosmic Overcharge mode Hyperion gains Power, and does not convert Cosmic Charges into Power Gains while below Full Power.

cards.title: COSMIC CHARGE
lines: Gains charges periodically.
Maximum 3 charges at a time.
Each charge passively increases Physical Resistance by 22.5.
Each charge passively increases Attack by 50.0.
Whenever not at full Power, Cosmic Charges are converted into Power Gain Buffs, 1 at a time.

cards.title: COSMIC HEALING
lines: Hyperion triggers Cosmic Healing by dashing backwards and holding block for 2 seconds, at a cost of 3.0 Cosmic Charges.
Cosmic Healing Regenerates 15.0 of Hyperion's Health over 15 seconds.
After triggering Cosmic Healing, Hyperion will be unable to generate Cosmic Charges for 45 seconds.

signature.title: ABSOLUTE ZERO
lines: While the Opponent has a Coldsnap Debuff, the chance to apply Frostbite on Critical Hits is increased by 4.7% flat.
Ice Armor reforms -300.0 seconds faster.
At the start of the fight, inflict a Coldsnap Debuff dealing 100.0 Energy Damage over 12 seconds.

cards.title: ORGANIC ICE
lines: Iceman’s organic ice form grants him full Immunity to all Incinerate, Nova Flame, Bleed, Poison, Coldsnap, and Frostbite effects.

cards.title: ICE ARMOR
lines: Iceman begins the fight with an indefinite Ice Armor Buff, increasing his Armor Rating by +25.0. Ice Armor counts as an Armor Up effect.
If Iceman would lose more than 5.0% of his Max Health from a single source, his Ice Armor protects him from the blow reducing the health loss to 5.0%, then it is removed.
If Iceman would become Stunned while his Ice Armor is active, the Ice Armor negates the effect, then shatters.
Once removed, Ice Armor takes 15 seconds to reform.
If Ice Armor is removed due to Iceman’s abilities, all Frostbite effects expire instantly.

cards.title: CRITICAL HITS
lines: 70.0% chance to inflict a Frostbite Passive. Frostbite Passives last for 10 seconds and deal 85.0 Energy Damage when they expire.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Iceman consumes his Ice Armor to gain +150.0 Attack Rating for the duration of this attack.

synergy.note: At the start of each fight, inflict a 60% Infuriate Passive for 5 seconds.

signature.title: THE ASCENDANT EMPRESS
lines: Synthect Passives can trigger as an Attacker, but at 9.8% potency, and not from Nullify, Stagger, or Fateseal.
When Imperiosa is Auto-Blocked, they trigger their Synthect Trap directly under the Opponent for 3 seconds as well as each Synthect Passive.

cards.title: COSMIC EIDOL PHYSIOLOGY
lines: Imperiosa is a Cosmic Eidol and thus has a Fractured Power Bar and is Immune to Bleed, Disintegrate, and Power Drain effects.
Imperiosa begins each fight with 75.0% of their Max Power. Their Combat Power Rate cannot be reduced below it's starting value.

While neither Champion has 3 Bars of Power or is using a Special Attack or Striker, Imperiosa is Passively Special Locked and loses 2.0% of their Max Power per second. This falls and rises by up to -1% the more Imperiosa does or does not hit the Opponent or their Block.
When either Champion lands or Blocks an Intercept or a Combo-Ending or Heavy Attack, gain Immunity to Special Lock for 4 seconds.

cards.title: SYNTHECT BUFFS
lines: When Imperiosa loses Power, if it causes them to go to or below a certain threshold, they gain a corresponding non-stacking Buff:
2 Bars of Power: +190.0 Fury Buff.
1 Bar of Power: +40.0 Pierce Buff.
0 Bars of Power: Power Gain Buff granting 4.0% of Max Power per second. While active, Power can't increase via non-personal sources.
Synthect Buffs last 16 seconds but are paused while Imperiosa’s Power is below the triggering threshold.
As a Defender, when a Synthect Buff fails or is removed, it is replaced with an identical Passive with -1% of the Buff's potency.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, refresh up to -1 Damaging Debuffs on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Places a Synthect Trap in front of Imperiosa lasting 6 seconds. While in the Trap, the Opponent is Passively Rooted.
While Rooted this way, the Opponent suffers -150.0% reduced Stun Ability Accuracy and becomes significantly more likely to Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Corrosion Debuff dealing 500.0 Physical Damage over 20 seconds, paused during Special Attacks.

signature.title: VANISHING ACT
lines: Invisible Woman turns Invisible at the start of the fight, but it is not Paused.
941.0% chance to turn Invisible whenever Invisible Woman is knocked down.
Whenever the Opponent Misses, the Force Field gains back 100.0% of its starting value.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: While Dodging backward, Invisible Woman is not struck by attacks.
20.0% chance that a Block is a Perfect Block, reducing all damage to 0.
Physical Resistance decreased by -25.0.
For each Debuff on the Opponent, Invisible Woman’s Attacks deal an additional 4.0% of the damage dealt as a burst of Physical Damage.

cards.title: THE BEST DEFENSE...
lines: If the Force Field is active, Invisible Woman's Hits have +20.0 Attack Rating, but also drain the Force Field by 5.0%.

cards.title: FORCE FIELD
lines: Invisible Woman starts the Fight with a Force Field. The Force Field’s maximum strength is equal to 10.0 Health, and scales with boosts and buffs.
Whenever Invisible Woman would take damage other than from Special Attack 3, the Force Field takes up to 90.0% of the damage instead.
Physical and Energy Resistance are increased by 15.0.

When the Force Field runs out, it goes into cooldown for 20 second(s), after which it will reform at 100.0% strength. If the Force Field doesn’t reform for any reason, it goes into cooldown again for 10.0 second(s).

cards.title: INVISIBILITY
lines: Invisible Woman turns Invisible whenever she Dodges an attack or the Force Field is depleted.
Invisibility lasts for 2 second(s), but starts Paused if Invisible Woman is not Bleeding.
While Invisible, incoming attacks have a 100% chance to Miss as long as Invisible Woman is not Blocking or Dodging, and Critical Rating is increased by 65.0.
Invisibility is unpaused when Invisible Woman Blocks an Attack, an Opponent Misses, or an Opponent hits Invisible Woman.
When Invisibility expires, it goes into cooldown for 10 second(s).

cards.title: FRAGILITY
lines: Whenever Invisible Woman would turn Invisible, she places a Fragility Debuff on the Opponent, max stacks 5000.0.
When attacking a Fragile Opponent, increase Critical Damage Rating by 8.0 and decrease their Block Proficiency by 10.0%.
All Fragility Debuffs are Purified when Invisibility expires. Whenever a Fragility Debuff is Purified, Invisibility expires immediately.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On the last hit, if the Force Field is active, add a flat 25.0% to its current strength.
On the last hit, if the Force Field is on Cooldown, 50.0% chance for it to be restored at 50.0% strength.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If this attack is Blocked, Invisible Woman has a 50.0% chance to turn Invisible.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If the Force Field is active, add a flat 100.0% to the Force Field's current strength. If the Force Field is on Cooldown, it is instead restored at 100.0% strength.
Pause Invisibility on Invisible Woman. It cannot unpause for 6 second(s).

synergy.note: When the opponent starts a Dash Attack or is recovering from a Heavy, Special, or combo ending attack, gain Widow’s Insight for 0.85 seconds. Ending a combo with Widow’s Insight active grants a Cruelty Buff increasing Critical Damage Rating by 450 for 12 seconds.
Special Attacks inflict a Plasma Passive dealing 40% of Attack over 6 seconds.
Heavy Attack inflicts a Power Drain, removing 50% of the Opponent’s current power over 5 second(s). This effect has a 20 second(s) cooldown.

signature.title: IRON MAN ARMOR MARK III UPGRADE
lines: Increase the potency of Armor Ups by 5.0%.
Double the amount of Block Proficiency gained during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.

When Iron Man’s Health drops below 15.0%, gain a Regeneration Passive granting 10.0% of missing Health over 6 seconds. Pressing Block 2 times while performing a Special Attack triggers the Regeneration with -1% reduced Potency.
As an Attacker this Regeneration can only trigger once per Quest.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Iron Man can Block Unblockable Special Attacks from Mutants.
Gain +61.6 Block Proficiency during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: ARMOR UP
lines: Personal Armor Ups increase Armor Rating by +16.0, lasting indefinitely up to -1 stacks. Additional stacks last for 6 seconds. While an Armor Up is active, Iron Man is Immune to Coldsnap, Frostbite, and Incinerate.

Personal Armor Ups increase Critical Resistance by +2.5, cannot be removed by Nullify or Stagger, their Ability Accuracy can only be modified by Cosmic Champions, and when they expire naturally the Opponent is Power Locked for 0.2 seconds.
Gain 100.0 Armor Up Buff when the fight starts and when Iron Man’s Combo Meter passes a multiple of 5. 25.0% chance to gain an Armor Up Buff when struck or Blocking an attack.

Well-Timed Blocking an Opponent's Special Attack pauses Armor Ups for 1000.0 seconds, and activating a Special Attack pauses them for 5 seconds per Bar of Power spent. These pauses expire one at a time.

cards.title: ARC REACTOR
lines: When reaching 1200.0 or more stacks of Armor Up, the Arc Reactor activates and gains 100 Reactor Charges.
The Arc Reactor grants +100.0 Attack Rating.

Gain an additional +4.0 Attack Rating for each Armor Up above 12 stacks. Any effect that increases the potency of Armor Ups also increases the potency of these Attack Rating bonuses by the same amount.
Striking with or being struck by Basic Attacks consumes 100.0 Reactor Charges. Reaching 0 charges causes the Arc Reactor to expire and consume -1 Armor Ups.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Each hit Invalidates 3 Prowess, removing them. For each Prowess removed this way, deal a burst of 25.0 Direct Damage.
Arc Reactor: On activation, consume 2500.0 Reactor Charges, increasing the potency of the Special Attack’s Buffs and Debuffs by 100.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts an Armor Break Debuff, removing one Armor Up and reducing Armor Rating by -30.0 for 20 seconds.
For every 1 Prowess Invalidated during this Special Attack, gain 100.0 Armor Up Buff.
Arc Reactor: This Special grants no Power to the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain 500.0 Armor Up Buffs.
Activating the Arc Reactor during this Special grants 1500.0 Reactor Charges for each Armor Up above 12 stacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 700.0 Armor Up Buffs and refresh all existing Armor Ups.

Inflict an Incinerate Passive dealing 300.0 Energy Damage over -1 seconds. While this effect is active, striking the Opponent or their Block pauses all personal and synergy Incinerate effects for 0.5 second.

synergy.note: Whenever personal Shocks is prevented by an immunity, he inflicts a corresponding Incinerate. These Incinerates still count as Shocks for the purposes of Infamous Iron Man’s abilities.

signature.title: ARCANE OVERLOAD
lines: Once per fight, when Infamous Iron Man’s Health drops below 15%, he gains a Regeneration Buff, healing 4.7% of his Maximum Health over 10 seconds. While this effect is active, the Opponent is passively Special Locked.
While Aura of Iron is active, the Opponent suffers -100.0% flat reduced Unblockable Ability Accuracy.
While his personal Armor Up Buff is active, Infamous Iron Man gains 4.7 Block Proficiency and Energy Resistance.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: When Infamous Iron Man would land a Critical Hit, he instead inflicts an instant Shock dealing Energy Damage equal to the damage the Critical would’ve dealt. This cannot trigger on the first hit of his Heavy Attack.

If an Opponent would gain 2 or more Prowess effects at once, those Prowesses are converted into a single indefinite Energy Vulnerability Debuff that reduces their Energy Resistance by -30.0. Each subsequent Debuff is 10.0% less potent than the previous one.

cards.title: ARMOR UP
lines: Victor Von Doom’s modifications to his Iron Man armor grant him extra protection. He starts the fight with an indefinite Austere Armor Up Buff granting 40.0 Armor Rating. While he has this Buff, he is immune to Shock and Incinerate.
If this Buff is lost, it restores itself after 10 seconds. This timer is paused while Infamous Iron Man is suffering from an Armor Break.

cards.title: BASIC ATTACKS
lines: Infamous Iron Man’s Medium Attacks do not make contact and inflict Shock Debuffs dealing 12.5 Energy Damage over 2.5 seconds.

While charging a Heavy Attack, if the Opponent is within striking distance and suffering from Shock, all their Shock effects are consumed and replaced with a Passive Stun for 0.6 seconds. This cannot trigger during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
The final hit of Infamous Iron Man’s Heavy Attack inflicts a non-stacking Cowardice Debuff, reducing the Opponent’s Special Attack damage by 40.0% for 8 seconds.
When one or more Shocks are consumed by Infamous Iron Man’s abilities, he triggers Aura of Iron for 260.0 seconds for each Shock removed, if it is not already active.

cards.title: AURA OF IRON
lines: The Aura of Iron can’t trigger while Infamous Iron Man does not have his personal Armor Up Buff, and its duration is reduced by 400.0 seconds for each unique, non-Prowess Buff on the Opponent above two.
The Aura is paused during both Champion’s Special Attacks. While paused this way, landing a Medium Attack ends the Aura early.
Infamous Iron Man’s Special Attacks are passively Unblockable.

Each time he inflicts one of his personal Shocks, it is immediately replaced by an instant Energy Power Burn that burns a percentage of the Opponent’s current Power based on the potency of the replaced Shock. Deals 18.0 Energy Damage to the Opponent per percent of Max Power burned.

Infamous Iron Man becomes passively Unstoppable and Stun Immune against the last hit of incoming Special 1, Special 2, and Heavy Attacks. In addition, if the damage of the hit exceeded 5% of his Maximum Health, he gains a Regeneration Buff, restoring the excess damage over 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On Activation, enter Aura of Iron for 800.0 seconds.
If it was already active, the Opponent is passively Special Locked for Aura of Iron’s remaining duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: After the first hit of this attack lands, Infamous Iron Man gains +25.0 Attack Rating for each of the Opponent’s filled Bars of Power for the remainder of the attack.
Each beam hit inflicts a Shock Debuff dealing 110.0 Energy Damage over 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On Activation, enter Aura of Iron for 24 seconds. This Aura cannot be ended early, and until it next expires, Infamous Iron Man has +50.0 Critical Rating for each of the Opponent’s filled Bars of Power.
If Aura of Iron was already active, both Infamous Iron Man and his Opponent gain an Energize Passive increasing their Combat Power Rates by 100.0%, each lasting until Aura of Iron next expires.

synergy.note: While the Opponent is suffering from Armor Break, they are also inflicted with a Passive Cowardice, reducing Special Damage by 40%.

signature.title: DEFLECTOR PROTOCOL
lines: Once per fight, Iron Man’s Model 50 suit executes an emergency protocol if attacked while 15.0% Health or less remains, creating a hardened exterior by instantly granting 100.0 stack(s) of Molecular Armor.

While 15.0% Health or less remains and Iron Man has an Armor effect, gain a Power Gain Passive that is not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction and grants 3.6% of Max Power per second. Additionally, Iron Man has a 100% chance to Auto-Block attacks without consuming Armor. This Auto-Block triggers Parry.

cards.title: MOLECULAR ARSENAL
lines: Tony Stark’s Model 50 suit uses state-of-the-art nanotechnology to change form and mass at will, providing extreme adaptability and a wide array of weaponry including Blade Arm, Hammer Arm, and point-blank Repulsor attacks.

cards.title: MOLECULAR ARMOR PASSIVE
lines: Up to 24.0% chance to activate an Armor Passive when attacking or struck by an attack, increasing Armor by 53.0 for 8 seconds. The chance to trigger is reduced for each active Armor Passive.
Start the fight with 100.0 stack(s) of Molecular Armor.
Critical Resistance increases by 12.0 for each active Armor effect.
Each Armor effect active on Iron Man reduces the effectiveness of Power Drain, Power Steal, and Power Burn effects by -18.0%.
After achieving 400.0 stacks of any Armor effect, Iron Man has a 100.0% chance to Auto-Block the next attack and then consume 1 Armor effect(s). This Auto-Block triggers Parry.
A stack of Armor is lost each time Iron Man is inflicted by an Armor Break effect.
Molecular Armor provides full immunity to Bleed and Coldsnap effects while active.

cards.title: REPULSOR ATTACKS
lines: The first Medium hit, the first Heavy hit, and the second and fourth Light attacks employ point-blank Repulsor blasts.
Repulsor hits don’t make contact, cannot be evaded, and deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
Repulsor hits that strike an opponent suffering from both Shock and Incinerate fuse those two Debuffs into a new Plasma Passive that has the properties of both.
Repulsor hits refresh Incinerate Debuffs and Plasma Passives on opponents.
Repulsor hits that strike an opponent suffering from a Shock or Plasma effect generate zero Power in opponents and drain up to 2.5% of their current stored Power.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first Repulsor hit has all the properties of a Repulsor Attack and has +100.0 Attack Rating.
The second hit employs a Hammer Arm and has a 100.0% chance to inflict Armor Break on the opponent, removing one Armor Up and then reducing Armor by -25.0 for 12 seconds.
The third and final hit employs an Unblockable Blade Arm and inflicts Heal Block for 16 second(s) against targets under the effects of Regeneration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit employs an Unblockable Blade Arm and inflicts Heal Block for 16 second(s) against targets under the effects of Regeneration.
Each energy projectile has all the properties of a Repulsor attack and generates zero Power in opponents.
100.0% chance to leave opponents Shocked for 100.0 Energy Damage over 16 seconds.
Shock duration increases by up to 50.0% based on the opponents’ current Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to instantly ignite and electrify the target, inflicting a Plasma Passive that deals 300.0 damage over 10 seconds.

synergy.note: Final hit of Special Attack 1 grants an Unstoppable Buff for 8 seconds.

signature.title: PROTECTIVE HEART
lines: Once per fight when Ironheart drops below 15% Health, she gains a Regeneration Buff healing 15.0% of her Maximum Health over 10 seconds. While she has this Buff, she gains +15.0% Critical Resistance.
While she has any active Armor Up effect, Ironheart gains a Bulwark Passive, increasing Block Proficiency by +25.0%.
Repulsor Debuffs gain +5.0% increased potency.

cards.title: PRE-FIGHT ABILITY
lines: Ironheart can inflict Damaging effects called Repulsor Debuffs, dealing 50.0 damage over 18 seconds. Her default Repulsor Debuff is an Incinerate, but she can override with Rupture in the Pre-Fight Screen. [Max Stacks: 50]
Medium Attacks inflict Repulsor Debuffs. Additionally, triggering the Dexterity Mastery inflicts 200.0 Repulsor Debuffs. This goes on cooldown until Ironheart’s next Special Attack.
On Special Attack, pause Repulsor Debuffs and Armor Ups. Special Attack hits inflict instant versions of the Repulsor Debuffs dealing a burst of 10.0 damage.

cards.title: ARMOR UP
lines: The advanced systems within Ironheart’s custom crafted suit allow her to start each fight with an indefinite Armor Up Buff granting +35.0 Armor Rating.
If this Buff is lost, it restores itself after 12 seconds. This timer is paused while Ironheart is suffering from an Armor Break.
Ironheart’s first 3 Light Attacks have a 30.0% chance to grant an Armor Up Buff granting +10.0 Armor Rating for 15 seconds. Her fourth Light Attack has a 100% chance.

While Ironheart has an Armor Up effect, she’s Immune to Reversed Controls, Incinerate, Coldsnap, and Frostbite. Additionally, her personal Debuffs and Armor Up Buffs are unaffected by Ability Accuracy modification against Mutants.

cards.title: TARGET LOCK!
lines: While the Opponent is suffering from 5 or more Debuffs, Ironheart inflicts a Tracking Passive, bypassing the effects of Miss.
Opponents that are #Robots or are suffering from a Tracking effect suffer --100.0% Offensive Ability Accuracy when hitting Ironheart’s Block. Mutants suffer a -150% reduction.

While a Tracking effect is on the Opponent, Ironheart’s AI can predict enemy attacks, allowing her to trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks and Block Mutant's Unblockable Special Attacks.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit inflicts a non-stacking Suppression Debuff reducing Combat Power Rate by 30.0% for 15 seconds.
The final hit Invalidates 1 Prowess stack from the Opponent plus an additional amount equal to the amount of Repulsor Debuffs they have.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first and final hits inflict 100.0 Repulsor Debuff.
The final hit also inflicts a non-stacking Vulnerability Passive reducing Physical and Energy Resistance by -20.0 for 20 seconds, and pauses Repulsor Debuffs for an additonal 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit gains +25.0 Attack Rating for each Repulsor Debuff on the Opponent and Armor Up effect on Ironheart.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Instantly Power Drain the Opponent for up to 2 Bars of Power. For each Bar of Power Drained, gain an indefinite Armor Up Passive, increasing Armor Rating by +10.0 and inflict an indefinite Repulsor Debuff. Max stacks: 5. Indefinite Repulsor Debuffs suffer 20% reduced potency for each indefinite Repulsor Debuff already active when inflicted.

synergy.note: Whenever a personal Immunity triggers, gain a +8% Fury Passive for 12 seconds. Max stacks: 3.

signature.title: THE LIVING ISO-SPHERE
lines: Isophyne will not let any Cosmic threats escape their fate. When a Cosmic Opponent's Health drops below -1%, inflict an indefinite -125.0% Marked Passive.
As an Attacker, activating a Special Attack grants Isophyne a non-stacking Regeneration Passive, healing -0.0% of missing Health for each Ego Passive over 4 seconds.
Isophyne starts each fight with a Power Gain Passive, granting 0.0% of a Bar of Power over 10 seconds.

cards.title: MYSTICAL EIDOL PHYSIOLOGY
lines: Isophyne is an Mystic Eidol and thus has a Fractured Power Bar and is Immune to Bleed, Coldsnap, and Frostbite effects.

Isophyne’s mystical physiology causes their attacks to deal Energy Damage, and they benefit from Rank 3 of the Mystic Dispersion Mastery when it is not activated. However, their Combat Power Rate is reduced by -25.0%.
Both Champion’s Light Attacks have a 35.0% chance to Nullify 100.0 Buff on Isophyne’s Opponent. If the Opponent has a Pierce effect active, this becomes a -1% chance to Nullify.
Whenever any of Isophyne’s personal Nullify abilities activate, but the Opponent does not have any Buffs active, gain an Instant Power Gain granting 1000.0% of a Bar of Power, or 3.5% as a Defender.

cards.title: EVER EVOLVING EGO
lines: Ego Passives last for 3.5 seconds and expire one at a time, paused during Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.
Gain 200.0 Ego Passives whenever Isophyne crosses a Bar of Power.
Gain 100.0 Ego Passive whenever Isophyne Nullifies a Buff.

cards.title: EGO EFFECTS
lines: Ego Passives grant Isophyne the following effects:
+18.5 Attack Rating.
+3.5 Energy Resistance.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit inflicts a -17.5 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 14 seconds, paused during Special Attacks and Strikers. When activated while above 2 Bars of Power, an additional Energy Vulnerability is inflicted. Max: -1.
The final hit Nullifies 200.0 Buffs on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a non-stacking -100.0% Wither Passive for 24 seconds. While active, whenever Isophyne triggers a Nullify, they trigger an additional Nullify.
If activated after hitting the Opponent’s Block with a Medium or Light Attack, this Special Attack becomes Passively Unblockable.
For each Ego Passive active on Isophyne, they gain a +22.0 Fury Passive for the duration of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Degeneration Passive dealing 650.0 Direct Damage over 35 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. This damage is increased by 10.0% for each personal Energy Vulnerability Passive on the Opponent.
While this Degeneration Passive is active, Isophyne’s Special Attack 1 inflicts an additional Energy Vulnerability Passive.

synergy.note: Striking the Opponent while their back is against the wall grants a 500 potency Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds. This does not reapply if active.

signature.title: CHOSEN OF GHEKRE
lines: The duration of the Hunt is increased by 47.5 second(s).

Whenever Jabari Panther would gain a Huntress Charge while the Hunt is active, she instead gains an indefinite Counterpunch Charge. Max Charges starts at 1, and increases by 1 for every 5000.0 signature levels obtained.
A Counterpunch Charge is spent to gain Unstoppable for 0.75 second(s) when Blocking an Attack, and all are lost when the Hunt ends.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Gain a non-stacking Cleanse Passive for 2 second(s).
While fighting as a Defender, if Jabari Panther Cleanses a Stun Debuff, this ability goes on cooldown for 8 second(s).

cards.title: CRITICAL HITS
lines: Inflict a Bleed Debuff, dealing 65.0 Direct Damage over 7 second(s).
If this Bleed fails due to Immunity against a Science Champion, gain a +90.0 Cruelty Passive for 7 seconds.

cards.title: THE HUNTRESS
lines: A skilled huntress, Jabari Panther stalks her Opponents no matter where they run or hide. Gain 1 Huntress Charge when Intercepting an Opponent, or Attacking a Stunned or Ensnared Opponent. This ability can only trigger every 1.25 seconds.
Gain 2 Charges whenever Jabari Panther Cleanses or Purifies a Debuff, and when the Opponent Evades or causes an Attack to Miss. This ability can only trigger every 1.25 seconds.
Lose -200.0 Huntress Charge(s) whenever the Opponent gains a Prowess Buff or Passive.

cards.title: THE HUNT
lines: When Jabari Panther reaches 20 Huntress Charges, remove them all and Hunt the Opponent for 9 second(s).

Once Jabari Panther has 10+ Huntress Charges, the next time she activates a Special Attack or the Opponent would Evade or cause an attack to Miss, remove them all and Hunt the Opponent for 9 second(s).
While the Hunt is on, Jabari Panther cannot gain Huntress Charges, is Stun Immune, and gains a Precision Buff increasing Critical Rating by +25.0.
Additionally, the Opponent cannot trigger the Dexterity mastery, Evade, or cause Attacks to Miss.
Whenever Jabari Panther Purifies or Cleanses a Debuff, or the Opponent fails a Miss or Evade, Pause the Hunt and all Fury Buffs on Jabari Panther for 2 second(s).
Inflicting a Bleed Debuff Pauses all Bleed Debuffs on the Opponent for 0.5 second(s).

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: If the Hunt is active, each Bleed Debuff on the Opponent has a 50.0% chance to inflict another Bleed Debuff, dealing 65.0 Direct Damage over 7 second(s). This ends the Hunt.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Activating any Special Attack and the Hunt within 1.0 second(s) of each other grants a non-stacking Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by +160.0 for 9 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict an Ensnare Debuff on the Opponent for 11 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The Hunt is Paused during this Attack.

signature.title: A FLAME IMPERISHABLE
lines: During the Opponent’s Special Attacks, gain a non-stacking Bulwark Buff granting +15.0 Block Proficiency.
While suffering from any Energy Damaging Passives, Jack O’Lantern Passively Regenerates +0.1% of Base Health per half second.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Jack O’Lantern’s master assassin training grants him Immunity to Reversed Controls and Incinerate effects, and allows him to trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks.
When Jack O’Lantern would land a Critical Hit, he instead inflicts an instant Incinerate dealing a burst of 40.0 Energy Damage.
All of Jack O’Lantern’s personal Damaging effects scale with Critical Damage Rating.
Against Mutant Champions, Jack O’Lantern’s Incinerate effects become Plasma effects instead.

cards.title: INFLAMED
lines: For every 300.0 Damaging effects the Opponent is inflicted with, or Passive Damaging effects Jack O’Lantern is inflicted with, gain an Inflamed Passive for 25 seconds, granting the following:
+26.5 Critical Damage Rating
+2.0% Ability Accuracy
+7.5 Energy Resistance

While an Inflamed Passive is active, Opponent’s Damaging Effects suffer -100.0% reduced Ability Accuracy when hitting Jack O’Lantern’s Block during Special Attacks. Mutant's Damaging effects suffer an additional -5% flat Ability Accuracy per Inflamed Passive. This does not trigger against Cosmic Champions.
Inflamed Passives are paused during Special Attacks and for 5 seconds after Intercepting an attack.

cards.title: LIGHT ATTACKS
lines: Jack O’Lantern’s fourth Light Attack inflicts a non-stacking 20.0% Cowardice Debuff for 25 seconds.
While suffering from a Cowardice effect, Mutant Opponents are -35.0% less likely to activate their Special Attack 1.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit grants a +50.0 Precision Passive for 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Pause all Precision effects on Jack during this attack.
On activation, gain 400.0 Inflamed Passives.
Passive Damaging effects inflicted during this Special Attack count an additional +1 towards Jack O’Lantern’s next Inflamed Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final two hits each inflict 2 Incinerate and Poison Debuffs, each dealing 62.5 damage over 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a non-stacking Precision Passive granting 200.0% of Jack O'Lantern's base Critical Rating for 15 seconds.
Gain 12 Inflamed Passives and pause them for 5 seconds.

synergy.note: Crossing a Bar of Power grants Jean a +750 Bulwark Passive for 10 seconds.

signature.title: LIMITLESS POTENTIAL
lines: While Jean’s Force Field is active, using the Parry Mastery instead inflicts a 1.5 second Stun Passive. Skill Champions cannot reduce the Ability Accuracy of this Stun.
Increased control over her mutation allows Jean to retain one Uncanny Passive after her Special Attack 1.
Increase the duration of personal Neuroshock Passives by +198.2 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Omega Level Telepathy provides Jean Grey with full Immunity to Reversed Controls, and all of her attacks deal Energy Damage.
Light Attacks 2, 3, and 4 inflict a 30.3 Neuroshock Debuff for 18 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
When Jean is struck with or Blocks a Critical Hit, inflict a 60.0 Exhaustion Debuff for 12 seconds.
Personal Neuroshock Passives deal 82.8 Energy Damage over 24 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: FORCE FIELD
lines: Jean Grey starts each fight with a Force Field, with strength equal to 10.0% of her maximum Health. The Force Field is not subject to Ability Accuracy.
Whenever Jean would take damage other than from a Special Attack 3, the Force Field takes up to 90.0% of the damage instead.
While the Force Field is active, Jean takes no damage from Physical Thorns effects and the Opponent’s Critical Damage Rating is reduced by -80.0.

When the Force Field is depleted, Jean lashes out psychically and inflicts a 30.0% Delirium Passive for 8 seconds. The Force Field then goes on cooldown for -1 seconds, after which it reforms at full strength.
This cooldown is reduced by 150.0 seconds each time a Debuff is Purified off the Opponent and expires -1% more slowly while Jean is Poisoned.

cards.title: UNCANNY PSION
lines: When a Debuff is Purified or Cleansed off the Opponent while Jean is not performing a Special Attack, gain a -12.5% Uncanny Passive until the end of her next Special Attack. Max stacks: -1.
When Jean would gain an Uncanny Passive above max stacks, she instead gains an indefinite Psionic Charge. Max stacks: -1.
When a Debuff is Purified or Cleansed off the Opponent during Jean’s Special Attacks by a source other than her, Jean gains a Psionic Charge.
When a personal Debuff is prevented by Ability Accuracy reduction, Jean has a 35.0% chance to gain a Psionic Charge. This will not trigger against Opponents with #Psychic Shielding.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: For each Debuff Purified and for each Charge consumed in this way, inflict a personal Neuroshock Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, inflict a non-stacking 35.0% Daunted Passive for 20 seconds.
Each hit deals a burst of 25.0 Energy Damage for each Neuroshock on the Opponent and for each Psionic Charge on Jean.
The final hit consumes 50.0% of Psionic Charges, rounded down.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Jean adds a flat 100% strength to her Force Field if active or reactivates it at full strength if not.
Then, inflict a personal Neuroshock Passive for every -1% of the Force Field’s remaining strength.

synergy.note: Increased chance of throwing the Pizza with Special Attack 1. Also, Dodging attacks using Dexterity inflicts a non-stacking Exhaustion Debuff, lowering Critical Damage Rating by 500 for 6 seconds, instead of granting Precision.
Whenever the Opponent suffers a Debuff, 40% chance to inflict a Stagger Passive for 4 seconds.

signature.title: CLASS DOSSIER
lines: When Jessica reaches max Investigation, she gains a Dossier on the Opponent’s Class, increasing her Combat Power Rate by 0.8% while below 1 Bar of Power.
Dossiers are Cross-Fight, lasting for the rest of the Quest. Once Jessica has a Dossier on 300.0 different Classes, she also gains one on the Superior Class.
At the start of each fight, if Jessica already has her Opponent’s Dossier, she gains 1 Investigation for every 5000.0 signature levels obtained.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Physical and Energy Resistance increased by +20.0.

cards.title: INVESTIGATION
lines: Gain 100.0 Investigation when the Opponent gains a Bar of Power. +1 as a Defender.
Gain 100.0 Investigation when the Opponent is inflicted with a non-Stun Debuff.
As a Defender, gain 100.0 Investigation every 4 seconds the Opponent spends above 2.0 Bars of Power.
Lose -200.0 Investigation when the Opponent gains or activates a Cleanse effect.

The ongoing Investigation makes Opponents nervous. Each Investigation increases the Opponent’s chance to launch a Special Attack by 18.0%, and reduces their Ability Power Rate and Regeneration Rate by 7.0%.
Once Investigation reaches max, the Investigation is complete and it can no longer be gained or lost.

cards.title: OPPONENT ACTIVATES A SPECIAL ATTACK
lines: For each Investigation, inflict a 2.0% Weakness Debuff lasting until the end of the attack. This does not grant Investigation. Then, if the Opponent has:
3+ Debuffs: Gain a 55.0 Resistance Up Passive, lasting for 2 seconds after the end of the attack.
5+ Debuffs: Gain an Unstoppable Passive, lasting for 2 seconds after the end of the attack.
10+ Debuffs: Gain an Unblockable Passive, lasting for 2 seconds after the end of the attack.
The duration of these effects is increased by 400.0 seconds flat when fighting as a Defender.
While Investigation is at 7 or more, Resistance Up and Unstoppable also activate during Jessica’s Special Attacks, regardless of Debuffs on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Box: Inflict a Stun Debuff for 4 seconds.
Garbage Can: Inflict a Crush Debuff for 9 seconds.
Fire Hydrant: Inflict a 40.0% Suppression Debuff for 9 seconds.
Pallet: Inflict a -60.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 13 seconds.
Tire: Inflict a Rupture Debuff, dealing 180.0 Physical Damage over 9 seconds.
Propane Tank: Inflict Incinerate, dealing 180.0 Energy damage over 9 seconds. Incinerate removes Perfect Block chance, and lowers Block Proficiency by 50%.
Pizza: Jessica gains a Regeneration Passive, restoring 10.0 Health over 9 seconds.
The Kitchen Sink: Apply the effects from every other item, but potencies are reduced by -50.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by 70.0 for 10 seconds. Gain an additional Fury for each unique object Jessica has thrown with her Special Attack 1 in this fight. Max Fury Passives: -1.
These Fury Passives are paused during all Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain an indefinite non-stacking Indestructible Charge. The next time Jessica would be struck, the Charge is removed and she gains an Indestructible Passive for 2 seconds. Does not trigger against Special Attack 3.

signature.title: STACKED DECK
lines: After using cards to play a Dead Man’s Hand Debuff, instead of being removed, all slots are randomly assigned 1 matching suit.
Additionally, suits gain a stackable bonus during Special Attacks.
Hearts: +5.0% Debuff Duration.
Spades: +9.9 Critical Rating.
Clubs: +9.9% of a bar of Power over 2 seconds.
Diamonds: +9.9% Armor Penetration.
Jackpot: Counts as all 4 Suits.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: An enhanced immune system provides full immunity to the Poisons of the Battlerealm.

cards.title: GAMBLERS DRAW
lines: Joe Fixit can hold 4 cards at a time. At max capacity, new cards replace old cards in the same order they were acquired.
Cards are drawn even if the attack was blocked.
Hearts: End a Combo with Light, +7.0% Life Steal.
Spades: End a Combo with Medium, +40.0 Attack Rating.
Clubs: Heavy Hit, +25.0% Combat Power Rate.
Diamonds: Well-Timed Block, +25.0% Block Penetration.
When Defending a Quest Node, cards are acquired based on the Attacking Champions actions.

cards.title: DEAD MAN’S HAND
lines: If Joe's hand consists of one of the following combinations, inflict the respective Debuff for 10 seconds. +5 seconds per bar of Power spent.
One Pair: Disorient, reducing Defensive Ability Accuracy and Block Proficiency by -40.0%.
Three of a Kind: Weakness, reducing Attack Rating by 30.0%.
Flush: Petrify with a potency of 60.0%.
Playing a hand removes all cards on the last hit of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On Hit, 50.0% chance to Inflict a Bleed Debuff dealing 35.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds. +1 per Dead Man’s Hand Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Final hit has a 100.0% chance to inflict a 2.75 second Stun Debuff.
Replay the last Dead Man’s Hand Debuff that was played.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a random Dead Man’s Hand Debuff.
Until the Opponent is no longer suffering any Dead Man’s Hand Debuffs, Gamblers Draw card effects have +30.0% Potency.

signature.title: GEM ACCLIMATION
lines: The Weakness Passive from the Crimson Gem of Cyttorak is reduced to 33.0% and becomes a Debuff instead.
Attacks have a 1.5% chance per Unstoppable Buff to Nullify a Buff from the Opponent.

cards.title: CRIMSON GEM OF CYTTORAK
lines: Juggernaut starts the fight with the Crimson Gem of Cyttorak active.
The Crimson Gem of Cyttorak is disabled if Juggernaut suffers a non-damaging Debuff or is knocked down. While the Crimson Gem of Cyttorak is disabled, Juggernaut suffers a 50.0% Weakness Passive.
While the Crimson Gem of Cyttorak is active, Juggernaut is empowered and gains the following: 1. +50.0 Attack Rating. 2. +25% Damage Reduction. 3. Immunity to Reversed Controls.

cards.title: UNSTOPPABLE BUFFS
lines: Juggernaut can only activate his Unstoppable Buffs if the Crimson Gem of Cyttorak is active.
Juggernaut gains 100.0 Unstoppable Buff each time he moves forward or lands an attack, but loses 100.0 Unstoppable Buff each time he is struck, enters block, or blocks an attack.
Unstoppable Buffs decrease by 100.0 every 1.25 seconds. This timer is reset each time an Unstoppable Buff is added or removed, or when Juggernaut Dodges backwards.

Each Unstoppable Buff provides the following: 1. +10.0 Attack Rating. 2. Increases Power Rate by 2.5%. 3. Lowers the opponent's chance to trigger Stun Debuffs by 20%. If this ability prevents a Stun Debuff from triggering, Juggernaut loses 7.0 Unstoppable Buffs.

cards.title: MAXIMUM MOMENTUM
lines: While Juggernaut has 1000.0 Unstoppable Buffs, he gains an Unblockable Passive making his next blocked attack Unblockable at the cost of 1000.0 Unstoppable Buffs.

After landing a Maximum Momentum Unblockable attack, Juggernaut is unable to gain his Unstoppable Buffs for 7.0 seconds, and places a Wither Debuff on the Opponent reducing their Power Rate by 50.0% for 10 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: 100.0% chance to Stagger the Opponent for 8 seconds. The next time a Staggered Opponent triggers a Buff, that Buff and all other Buffs triggered at the same time will be immediately Nullified.
If the Crimson Gem of Cyttorak is active, inflict an additional Stagger.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit deals a burst of 50.0 Physical damage.
While at Maximum Momentum, 100.0% chance to gain a Fury Buff granting +200.0 Attack Rating for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: When activated, the Crimson Gem of Cyrrotak cannot be removed for 20 seconds.
While at Maximum Momentum, inflict a Stun Debuff on the Opponent for 4 seconds.

synergy.note: Every 4 seconds, Kang Gains an indefinite Fury Buff granting 20% Attack Rating. This ends when reaching 20 stacks of Fury.

signature.title: KANG ARMOR
lines: Kang’s Power level fuels his neuro-kinetic suit of armor, endowing him with up to 30.0 Armor Rating based on stored Power.

signature.title: ALL WILL BE AS DUST
lines: A stricter training regimen allows Karnak to begin the fight with 1 Focus Charge. Additionally, his Basic Attacks are enhanced in the following ways:
Ignore -29.0% of the opponent’s positive Physical Resistance.
When Striking a Block, Passively gain Power equal to 64.0% of what an unblocked Attack would have granted.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Karnak’s training and unmatched focus grants him the following:
+23.0 Physical Resistance.
+8.0 Block Proficiency against Basic Attacks.
Incoming non-damaging Debuffs suffer --60.0% duration.
Incoming Poison effects deal --65.0% damage.

cards.title: FOCUS CHARGES
lines: Every 12 seconds, Karnak gains a Focus Charge to a max of 300.0. Karnak’s Focus timer is Paused for 10.0 seconds each time he’s struck and he loses a Charge of Focus if struck by a Special Attack.
1+ Charge: +55.0 Critical Rating.
2+ Charges: Basic attacks can land Critical Hits into the opponent’s Block. Critical Hit based abilities will not trigger through a Block.
3+ Charges: Basic attacks have a 50.0% chance to inflict a burst of Bleed Damage equal to 35.0% of the damage dealt by the attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a True Strike Passive lasting 15 seconds, allowing attacks to ignore Armor, Resistances, Auto-Block and Evade effects. Knocking down the opponent will pause the True Strike Passive for 3 seconds.
While this True Strike is active, Karnak will not stop gaining Focus if he’s struck.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a Passive Fury effect, increasing attack by 50.0 for 30 seconds.
This Fury is Paused for 5 seconds each time the opponent is Knocked Down.

synergy.note: When a personal Incinerate fails due to Immunity against Tech Champions, inflict a Plasma Passive instead, copying personal Incinerate behavior. Additionally, personal Incinerates and Plasmas have their potency increased by 15%.

signature.title: SHINE IN THE SKY LIKE DIAMONDS
lines: Whenever Karolina has her Block struck by a Heavy Attack, she consumes 600.0 Iridescence Buffs to resist a Block Break and grant herself a Glancing Buff for the duration of the attack.
At 6+ Iridescence Buffs, personal Incinerates also Pulverize 1 Armor Up effect, removing it and dealing a burst of -0.0 Direct Damage.
For each Iridescence Buff, gain -0.0% increased Incinerate potency, up to 6 Iridescence Buffs.

cards.title: GLOWING WITH MAJESDANIAN SUNSHINE
lines: Karolina’s Majesdanian physiology grants her 100% Resistance to Incinerate effects. Additionally, Incinerate effects do not lower her Block Proficiency or remove her Perfect Block chance.
Karolina’s solar energy-infused body also causes her attacks to deal Energy Damage and grants her Immunity to Special Lock, Power Lock, Coldsnap, and Frostbite effects.
Karolina has a youthful pep in her step granting her an indefinite Instinct Buff.

cards.title: SOAK IN THE IRIDESCENT SUN
lines: Karolina can absorb indefinite Iridescence Buffs from the sun as it shines down in various locations across the stage. After appearing briefly, the sun fades away before appearing again in a new location. Karolina starts with 200.0 Iridescence Buffs. Max stacks: -1.
While in the sun, Karolina gains the following abilities:
Karolina gains 100.0 Iridescence Buff every 0.65 seconds.
Karolina gains a Power Gain Buff, granting 2.0% of a Bar of Power each second for each Iridescence Buff, up to -1.
Charging a Heavy Attack in the sun after landing a non-Combo-Ending Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for 2.2 seconds. This Stun cannot have its duration modified by Tech Champions.
If Karolina activates a Special Attack while in the sun, she gains an Unblockable Buff for the duration of the Special.
As an Attacker, Karolina stands still while in the sun.

cards.title: SOLAR SHIELD BLOCK
lines: Whenever Karolina Blocks a hit, she consumes Iridescence Buffs based on the Blocked attack to grant herself a Glancing Buff for the duration of the attack. This Buff is removed if Karolina is struck.
When the Opponent Glances against Karolina, damage is reduced by 85% and Offensive Ability Accuracy is reduced by 4000.0%.
Light and Medium Attacks - 100.0 Buff.
Special Attack 1 - 300.0 Buffs.
Special Attack 2 - 600.0 Buffs.
Whenever Iridescence Buffs are consumed by Blocking, inflict a -7.5 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 15 seconds for each Buff consumed. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SOLAR-INFUSED INCINERATES
lines: Personal Incinerate Passives deal 51.5 Energy Damage over 14 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1. As a Defender, personal Incinerates scale with Base Attack only and deal half damage.

During Karolina’s Special Attacks, personal Incinerates deal no damage. Instead, each of Karolina’s Special Attack hits inflicts an Instant Incinerate for each personal Incinerate active, dealing a burst of 11.5 Energy Damage per bar of Power spent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Gain -1 Iridescence Buffs over the course of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit consumes 100.0 Iridescence Buff to inflict 100.0 personal Incinerate Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Consume up to 1200.0 Iridescence Buffs to inflict 1200.0 personal Incinerate Passives.
Gain a non-stacking 10.0% Intensify Buff for 24 seconds. While active, Karolina generates Iridescence Buffs 35.0% faster while in the sun.

synergy.note: Well-Timed Blocks grant a non-stacking Precision Buff for 4 second(s), increasing Critical Rating by +700.

signature.title: REVERBERATION
lines: Vibranium Armor activates Reverberation for 8 seconds, dealing damage back to the opponent when Killmonger is Struck or Blocks an attack. Damage is based on Killmonger’s stored Power at the time of activation, inflicting up to 70.0% of the incoming damage as Physical Damage. Reverberation has a 8.0 second cooldown time after expiring.
When both Reverberation and True Strike are active, Killmonger gains +20.0 Attack Rating when hitting opponents.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: This Champion has additional Critical Resistance in its Base Attributes.

At the start of the fight, Vibranium Armor provides 25.0 Armor Rating and Killmonger gains 15% of his missing Power each time a Debuff is inflicted against him. This Power Gain is not affected by Ability Accuracy modification. Vibranium Armor is disabled if he is suffering from an Armor Break effect.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Hitting opponents that are recovering from a Special Attack grants Killmonger True Strike for 16 seconds. This allows him to ignore Armor, Resistances, Auto Block and all Evade effects.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Killmonger gains 200.0 Counterpunch Charges that last for 15.0 seconds. A Charge is spent to gain Unstoppable for 0.75 seconds when Blocking an Attack, allowing him to immediately counter-attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Vibranium Armor activates 300.0 Indestructible Charges. A charge is spent to ignore all the incoming damage from an attack. Max: 4 charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If Killmonger inflicted 15 or more Bleed Debuffs in this fight, he inflicts a Bleed stack for every Bleed he inflicted. Each Bleed deals 65.0 Direct Damage over 6 seconds. This effect can activate once a fight. Max: 50 Bleed stacks.

synergy.note: Activating Dread Aura grants an Unblockable Passive for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 20 seconds.
When Nightmare Outbreak activates, gain an Unstoppable Buff for 7 seconds.
Nightmare Outbreak inflict a 15% Weakness Debuff for 15 seconds. These cannot re-trigger if active.

signature.title: NIGHTMARE'S RESURRECTION
lines: Up to +29.0% Degeneration Potency based on Missing Health.

Once per fight at 5% Health, inflict a Root Passive for 1.4 seconds. If triggered during an Opponent’s Special Attack, this Root triggers when that Special Attack ends. Kindred is prevented from being knocked out while this Root Passive is active or attempting to activate.
Upon activating this ability, activate Dread Aura at no Power cost. If at or above 30 Infestation Charges, inflict Nightmare Outbreak.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Kindred is a being forged in the flames of hell and feels nothing but contempt. They are Immune to Poison, Incinerate, Heal Block, Infuriate, and Intimidate effects.
Centipede Strikes inflict an Atrophy Passive reducing the duration of any new Buffs by 30.0% for 8 seconds. Max stacks: 3.

cards.title: INFESTATION CHARGES
lines: The Opponent is inflicted with an Infestation Charge every 2.5 seconds.
Inflict 1.0 Infestation Charge when a Buff expires off the Opponent or they make contact with Kindred.
As a Defender, when Kindred is struck by Special Attacks while attacking, inflict 1000.0 Charges.
If Kindred is struck while recovering from a Special Attack, Infestation Charges pause for 8 seconds and cannot be inflicted. 14.0 seconds against #Spider-Verse Heroes.

cards.title: NIGHTMARE OUTBREAK
lines: Inflict Nightmare Outbreak for 18 seconds.

Nearby Opponents are inflicted with a Degeneration Passive every 0.55 seconds, each dealing 8.5 Direct Damage per second, scaling with Base Attack only. Max stacks: 5.0. Once the opponent is out of range, they lose 1 Degeneration Passive every 0.2 seconds.
While Kindred’s personal Degeneration effects are on the Opponent, Kindred Regenerates 0.8% of missing health every 0.5 seconds.

Inflicting 5.0 or more Infestation Charges at once by landing Special Attacks inflicts instant Degenerations, dealing a burst of 40.0 Direct Damage per Passive Degeneration on the Opponent and pauses Nightmare Outbreak for 2 seconds.
If Kindred is struck by a Heavy Attack, Nightmare Outbreak expires 70.0% faster. All Infestation Charges are consumed when Nightmare Outbreak expires.

cards.title: DREAD AURA
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack consumes 30.0% of a Bar of Power to activate Dread Aura for 6 seconds. Kindred fights more aggressively while Dread Aura is active. Dread Aura is not affected by Ability Accuracy.
As a Defender, every 25.0% of Max Health Kindred loses, Dread Aura triggers at no Power cost to Kindred.
Kindred gains Stun Immunity.
Infestation Charges are inflicted every 0.75 seconds and the amount of Charges inflicted is doubled.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final hit inflicts 500.0 Infestation Charges. This can trigger through Block.
The final hit inflicts a Degeneration Debuff dealing 80.0 Direct Damage over 14 seconds.
Nightmare Outbreak: While this Debuff is active, Passive Degenerations are prevented from falling off.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first and final hits inflict 500.0 Infestation Charges.
Dread Aura: During this Attack, Power Steal 6.0% of a Bar of Power per second. Gain 150% of the Power Stolen.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack gains 150.0 Attack Rating.
If the Opponent suffers from Nightmare Outbreak this attack gains an additional 175.0 Attack Rating.

synergy.note: Gain an Undermine Buff during Special Attacks.

signature.title: UNYIELDING MIGHT
lines: Gain up to +40.0% Incinerate duration based on how long the fight has gone on. Max bonus after 100 seconds.
When Malice enters cooldown, gain a Regeneration Buff recovering 4.0 Health over 12 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Unique physiology grants Immunity to Bleed, Power Drain and Power Burn effects.

cards.title: PERSONAL FURY BUFFS
lines: Unless otherwise stated, personal Fury Buffs each provide +30.0 Attack Rating and last 14 seconds.
When inflicted with a Debuff, spend 100.0 personal Fury Buff to remove the effect after 0.5 seconds.
When a personal Fury Buff is spent, gain an indefinite Ignition Buff. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: MALICE
lines: Start the fight with a Malice Passive, which grants 300.0 Fury Buffs each time it activates. Malice lasts as long as at least 1 personal Fury Buff is active.
While Malice is active: Gain up to +10000.0% Fury Buff Potency based on how long the fight has gone on. Max Bonus after 100 seconds.
When Malice ends, it goes on cooldown for 12 seconds.

cards.title: WHILE MALICE IS ON COOLDOWN
lines: Any attack that makes contact from either Champion has a 30.0% chance to grant 100.0 Fury Charge. When cooldown ends, gain 1 Fury Buff for each Charge and re-enter Malice.
When the Opponent Evades, Auto-Blocks, or causes an attack to Miss, gain 200.0 Fury Charges. Cooldown: 2 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Deal a burst of 10.0 Energy Damage, this damage is doubled while the Opponent is Incinerated.
Pause all Incinerate and Armor Break Debuffs on the Opponent for 3 seconds.
Malice: Spend 1 Fury Buff to instead Pause for 6 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts a -12.0 Armor Break Debuff for 15 seconds. These Armor Breaks also reduce Energy Resistance by 8%. Max stacks: 10.
Malice: Spend 1 Fury Buff to make the Armor Break indefinite.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each Infernal Breath hit deals a burst of 100.0 Energy Damage. This damage is doubled against #Hero Champions of the Tech Class.
The final hit inflicts an Incinerate Debuff dealing 200.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
When this Incinerate triggers, consume all Ignition Buffs to increase its potency by +30% for each Buff consumed.
Malice: Spend 1 Fury Buff to double the Incinerate’s duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Regeneration Buff, recovering 10.0 Health over 3 seconds. This Regeneration Buff is paused while Heal Blocked.
Malice: Spend 1 Fury Buff to increase the Regeneration Buff’s duration by 50.0%.

synergy.note: Each time the opponent uses a Special Attack they become Power Locked for 6 seconds.

signature.title: TRUE NATURE
lines: Fisk brings his ill intent upon the Contest, entering the fight with 190.0 Rages active (rounded down).
When Kingpin’s Overpower Buff ends, he has a chance to gain up to 500.0 Rages, with each having a 29.0% chance to activate.

cards.title: FIGHT START
lines: Base Regeneration Rate is set at 50.0% instead of the normal 100%.

cards.title: RAGE
lines: Kingpin can gain Rage, which is a Debuff with no inherent effect.
Kingpin gains a non-Rage Debuff: 60.0% chance to Purify it and gain 1 Rage. Cooldown: 0.5 seconds.
Kingpin takes damage: Gain 1 Rage. Cooldown: 20 seconds.
Enemy Evades or Auto-Blocks: Gain 1 Rage. Cooldown: 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: INCOMING DEBUFFS
lines: Each Debuff on Kingpin only strengthens his resolve, increasing Attack Rating by 30.0 and Combat Power Rate by 5.0%.

cards.title: OVERPOWER
lines: Kingpin Purifies 8 Debuffs to grant a 100% chance to gain an Overpower Buff, lasting 15 seconds and providing +250.0 Attack Rating as well as Unblockable Special Attacks.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: While charging a Heavy Attack, Kingpin gains +60.0 Physical Resistance and gains an Unstoppable Buff for 0.8 seconds.

If Kingpin lands 3 Heavy Attacks within 4.0 seconds of each other he has a 100% chance to gain a Fury Buff granting +85.0 Attack Rating for 14 seconds. While this Fury Buff is active, Kingpin cannot gain his Unstoppable Buff while charging his Heavy Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: While this Degeneration is active, the opponent suffers -50% Attack Rating and --65.0% Defensive Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Gain an Unstoppable Buff for 7.5 seconds, paused until the end of this attack.
While this Unstoppable is active, each hit either Champion lands has a 50.0% chance to grant Kingpin 1 Rage. No Cooldown.

synergy.note: When Phasing gain +1 Fury Buff for each Debuff on Kitty, each increasing Attack Rating by 7% for 5 seconds Max 5.
The first hit of Special Attack 1 inflicts a 30% Incinerate Vulnerability Passive for 10 seconds.
Become Immune to reverse controls, and each time this immunity is triggered gain +1 personal Prowess. Cooldown 0.8 seconds.

signature.title: BLACK VORTEX EMPOWERMENT
lines: While Phased take no damage from any source.
While Phased gain 65.0% Defensive Combat Power Rate and pause Phasing while being struck.

The first time each Personal Incinerate effect expires naturally or is Purified, it has a 20.0% chance to retrigger itself at +30.0% potency. Incinerates triggered from this ability are always Passive.

cards.title: PASSIVE PROWESS
lines: Gain 100.0 Prowess each time either champion lands a Critical Hit or Inflicts a Stun effect. +2 against Guaranteed Crits or Passive Stuns.
Gain 200.0 Prowess when intercepting a Dashing Opponent.
Each Prowess increases Special Attack Damage by 5.0% and lasts until the end of Kitty’s next Special Attack that strikes the Opponent or their Block.
If Kitty is inflicted with Cowardice, all Prowess are lost.
While the Opponent is suffering from Incinerate, Prowess potency begins to increase by up to 40000.0% over 40 seconds. This bonus gradually falls off while no Incinerates are active.
Each time Lockheed prevents an Incinerate, the above Prowess Potency bonus is increased by 3000.0%. Cooldown 0.8 seconds.
When throwing a Special Attack, all personal Prowess are removed and reapplied through the current Prowess Potency bonus.

cards.title: PHASING
lines: Dashing forward with 300.0 or more Prowess triggers Phasing for the duration of the dash plus 1.2 second(s) after, giving the Opponent a 100% chance to Miss. This is paused during Kitty’s Special Attacks.
While Phased gain +65.0 Critical Rating, become Stun Immune and take 80% reduced damage.
While Phased #Robots suffer --20.0% Ability Accuracy reduction.
Personal Debuffs and Buffs that are triggered while Phased become Passive and gain +20.0% duration.
Each Miss caused by Phase deals a burst of 95.0 Physical Damage and Kitty gains +3 Personal Prowess, these can stack above the normal limit.
When Phasing expires, 600.0 Prowess are consumed for each Miss that Phasing caused.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final 3 hits in this attack each inflict an Incinerate Debuff dealing 37.0 Energy Damage over 3.5 seconds, reducing block proficiency by 50% and removing Perfect Block chance.
Incinerates inflicted by this attack expire 1 at a time and are paused and refreshed while any other Incinerate is active.
With 1000.0+ Prowess, Incinerates will trigger through block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit deals a burst of Physical Damage equal to 40.0% of the damage dealt by the hit.
With 1000.0+ Prowess, gain an Unblockable Buff lasting 9 seconds, plus an additional 0.3 seconds for each Prowess above 1000.0.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a non-stacking Incinerate Debuff dealing 90.0 Energy Damage over 30 seconds.
When this attack ends, enter Phasing for 200.0 seconds, if Phasing was already active this time extends to 4 seconds.

synergy.note: While the opponent is suffering from 12+ Armor Breaks, Knull gains an indefinite Energize Buff.
When the Opponent is immune to an effect, Knull gains a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 35% for 16 seconds. Max 1 stack(s).

signature.title: KING IN BLACK
lines: At the start of each fight, inflict +1 Living Abyss Debuffs on the Opponent for every 1300.0 signature levels obtained. Max 15.
When Corruption activates, gain an Unstoppable and Unblockable Buff for 2 second(s).
While Corruption is active and the Opponent has 10.0% Health or less, when they would gain a Regeneration Effect, replace it with Knull's Degeneration Debuff.

cards.title: LORD OF DARKNESS
lines: +40.0% Degeneration Resistance and +60.0% Bleed and Poison Resistance.
Every 10 hits in the Opponent’s Combo Meter, inflict an indefinite Darkness Passive, lowering Combat Power Rate by 15.0%. Max 8.0 stack(s).
When the Opponent uses a Special Attack, remove 1 Darkness Passive.

cards.title: CORRUPTION
lines: Knull inflicts Corruption on his Opponents using his Special Attacks, causing the following effects:
The Opponent’s Armor Break Debuffs are paused.
On activation, convert all indefinite Living Abyss Debuffs on the Opponent into Armor Break Debuffs that lower Armor Rating by -10.0, for 10 second(s).
For each Armor Up Effect on the Opponent, inflict an Armor Break Debuff, reducing Armor Rating by -10.0, for 10 second(s).
The Opponent suffers from -3.3% current Combat Power Rate for each Armor Break Debuff. Max 65.0%.
The Opponent passively suffers from Reverse Controls.

cards.title: SYMBIOTE ATTACKS
lines: Symbiote Attacks gain passive True Accuracy.
While the Opponent is not Corrupted, landing a hit or striking into Block has a 75.0% chance to inflict an indefinite Living Abyss Debuff, removing 1 Armor Up Buff.

While the Opponent is Corrupted, consume 3 Armor Break Debuffs to inflict 3 Living Abyss Debuffs, regenerate 10.0% of hit damage and inflict a Degeneration Debuff, dealing 80.0 Direct Damage over 2 second(s). This ability does not trigger when using the Medium 1 Attack.

cards.title: NECROSWORD ATTACKS
lines: Pause the duration of the Opponent’s Corruption for 1.25 second(s).
While the Opponent is Corrupted, inflict an instant Bleed dealing 66.0% of hit damage as Direct Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict an Encroaching Corruption lasting for 10.0 second(s). Upon expiry, inflict Corruption for 10.0 second(s).
While fighting as a Defender, Encroaching Corruption will not inflict Corruption while the Attacker is performing a Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Inflict 10 Armor Break Debuffs, reducing Armor Rating by -10.0 for 10 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict Corruption, lasting 25 second(s).

synergy.note: +15% Attack Rating and +20% Fury Buff for 8 seconds when using a Medium Attack to end a Basic Attack Combo while their opponent is pinned against the wall.

signature.title: ROCK HARD THORNS
lines: While Rock Shield is active and Korg is struck by a Medium, Heavy or Special Attack that makes contact, 50.0 Physical Damage is inflicted to the opponent. Damage scales with Base Attack only. This ability does not activate if the opponent’s hit deals Energy Damage and Mutant Champions take 25% less damage.
While Rock Shield is active, Korg has a 30.0% chance to Purify Debuffs and gain one Rock Shield charge for each Debuff Purified this way.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Rock anatomy provides Korg immunity to Bleed, Shock and additional Critical Resistance but decreases his Energy Resistance by 20%.

cards.title: CROWD EXCITEMENT
lines: The crowd goes crazy when Miek makes an appearance while Korg is blocking an attack, increasing Crowd Excitement by 1 for 20 seconds. +2.0 on Well Timed Blocks. Only 6.0 Crowd Excitement charges can be gained through this ability.

The crowd dislikes cowards, cheering for Korg when opponents Evade or Dexterity his Basic Attacks, increasing Crowd Excitement by 3.0 for 20 seconds. Only 12.0 Crowd Excitement charges can be gained through this ability.
When Crowd Excitement reaches 6.0 or more, Korg gains an Unstoppable and an Unblockable Passive for 2 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
