lines: Miek expels fluids on opponents when hitting with a Heavy Attack, creeping out the crowd and consuming all Crowd Excitement to inflict a non-stacking Armor Break Debuff, reducing their Armor Rating by -27.2 for each Crowd Excitement charge for 8 seconds.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Korg begins the fight with 900.0 Rock Shield charges which are removed each time he is struck. An additional charge is removed when Korg’s Dash Attack is interrupted by a Light Attack and if Struck by a Special Attack 3, all Rock Shield charges are removed instead.

While Rock Shield is active, powerful enemy attacks cannot deal more than 40.0% of the opponent's Base Attack Rating in a single hit. Special 3 Attacks cannot deal more than 120% of the opponent's Attack instead.
When all charges are consumed, Rock Shield is shattered and it takes between 11 and 15.0 seconds to reform. Each time Rock Shield reforms it starts with 1 less charge.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If Crowd Excitement is greater than 1, this attack cannot be Evaded and Korg gains an Unblockable Passive for the duration of the Special.
The first hit refreshes Korg's personal Bleed Debuffs. If the Opponent is suffering from 9 or more Bleed Debuffs, Korg's personal Bleed Vulnerability is also refreshed.
If the Opponent is suffering from a Bleed Debuff, each projectile hit inflicts an Instant Bleed each dealing a burst of 37.5 Direct Damage per Bleed Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, if Korg is Unblockable, refresh Korg's Personal Bleed Debuffs and inflict a non-stacking 50.0% Bleed Vulnerability Passive for 30 seconds, paused during the Opponent's Special Attacks.
Each hit inflicts a 100.0 Bleed Debuff for 30 seconds, paused during the Opponent's Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Crowd Excitement goes up by 900.0 for 20 seconds.

synergy.note: On a Critical Hit, inflict a Fragility Debuff for 5 seconds. When attacking a Fragile Opponent, increase Critical Damage Rating by [200, 230] and decrease their Block Proficiency by 15%.
When a trap activates, inflict an Infuriate Debuff on the Opponent for 4 second(s), causing them to become more aggressive and reducing their Offensive Ability Accuracy by 25%.

Bleed Immune Champions are inflicted by a Poison Debuff instead, reducing Health Recovery by 30% and Dealing 17% of Attack in Direct Damage over 10 second(s). Poison pauses and refreshes just as Bleed.
When fighting against #Spider-Verse Heroes, on Special Attack activation, gain a Pursuit Passive for 13 seconds.
Gain Bleed Immunity. Personal Bleeds last 50% longer, but lose 33% potency.

signature.title: ENTRAPMENT
lines: While the Opponent is rooted Dash Attacks grant a Trample Passive, making the attack Unblockable except against Well-Timed Blocks
While the Opponent is rooted all Bleeds are Critical Bleeds, multiplying their Potency by 100.0% of Kraven’s Critical Damage.

cards.title: JUNGLE FIGHTER
lines: Heavy Attack: First hit inflicts a non-stacking Disorient Debuff, decreasing Block Proficiency and Defensive Ability Accuracy by 40.0% for 16 second(s).
Critical Hits: Inflict a Bleed Debuff, dealing 24.0 Direct over 8 second(s).

cards.title: WHEN DEBUFFED
lines: Each time Kraven receives a non-damaging Debuff, reduce the duration of future non-damaging Debuffs by -10.0% for the rest of the fight. Max 8 stacks.

cards.title: TRAP
lines: If the Opponent moves into a Trap, it springs and deals a Burst of 75.0 Direct Damage and Roots them for 5 second(s). Damage scales with Base Attack only. If the Opponent moves into the Trap during a special, the Trap is removed.
If the Opponent is pushed into the Trap by a Heavy or Special 2, Kraven has a 100.0% chance to place a new Trap when the Root expires.
Rooted Champions cannot move, but can still attack, block, and dodge. Activating a Special Attack removes Root and prevents it from applying.
While the Opponent is rooted, Kraven's Dash Attacks become Unstoppable, his damage over time Debuffs are paused and he gains 40.0 Critical Rating.
While the Opponent is rooted, their Combat Power Rate is reduced by -37.5%.

cards.title: SUPPRESSION
lines: Traps also inflict a Cross-Fight Suppression Passive on the Opponent, reducing Combat Power Rate by -6.3% for this and the next 5 fights. Max 2.0 stacks. Traps cannot suppress Opponents with Natural Class Advantage.
In the following fights Suppression Potency is increased by 10000.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Root Debuff and Precision Buff are paused.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Kraven sets a Trap at the Opponent location, the Trap arms after 5 second(s) and lasts until triggered. New Traps replace existing ones. As a Defender Traps are placed at his location and arms immediately. Traps are not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction.
If the Opponent is already rooted by a Trap, Critical Damage Rating is increased by 40.0 for the duration of this Attack instead.
Bleed effects are paused.
Gain a non-stacking True Accuracy Buff for 20 second(s). Triggering a Trap refreshes this effect.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a Precision Buff, increasing Critical Rating by 34.0 for 20 second(s). Triggering a Trap refreshes this effect. Max 5 stacks.
The first hit is Unblockable and inflicts a Poison Debuff, reducing Health Recovery by 30% and Dealing 100.0 Direct Damage over 3 second(s).
If the Opponent is rooted, refresh all Bleed effects.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Cruelty Buff, increasing Critical Damage Rating by 50.0 until Kraven is knocked down.
If the Opponent is rooted they gain no Power during the Special and the potency of the Cruelty Buff is increased by 100.0%.
If the Opponent is not rooted but a Trap is placed, even if not armed, the Trap springs regardless of the Opponent’s position.

synergy.note: When Immune to an Incinerate effect, gain a non-stacking +15% Bulwark Passive for 15 seconds.

signature.title: SPIRIT RIDER
lines: The pause for activating the Blessing with the fewest stacks lasts an additional +86.8 seconds.
Kushala's Damaging Debuffs have a 1.9% chance for each active Blessing to be replaced with matching Passives with -1% increased potency. This chance is doubled against Cosmic Opponents.

Kushala does not benefit from the Despair Mastery. Instead, she reduces the Opponent's Regeneration Rate by 800.0% for each Debuff or personal Damaging Passive active on them, up to a maximum of 100.0%. Each rank in the Despair Mastery increases this reduction by +-1% and the maximum by +10%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Kushala's connection to her Spirit of Vengeance grants her immunity to all Bleed and Incinerate effects.
All attacks deal Energy Damage.
Combat Power Rate is reduced by -20.0%.
Personal Damaging effects are paused during Kushala's Special Attacks.

cards.title: HUNTER OF MIGHT
lines: Light Attacks have a 40.0% chance to place an indefinite Ignition Buff on the Opponent. This chance increases by +2000.0% flat if the Opponent is Soul Barbed. Max stacks: -1.
When the Opponent gains a Buff, Kushala Passively gains 2.0% of her Max Power.
Kushala does not benefit from the Mystic Dispersion Mastery. Instead, each rank increases the amount of power she gains on Buff activation by 1000.0%.

cards.title: BLESSINGS OF THE EAGLE
lines: Gain a Blessing of Wisdom when either Champion performs a Well-Timed Block, allowing Kushala to Block Unblockable attacks from non-Science Champions and Passively Regenerate 25.0% of the damage taken from Blocked hits.
Gain a Blessing of Justice when either Champion is struck by the first hit of a Heavy Attack, making the Opponent more aggressive and increasing the potency of Kushala's Damaging effects by 10.0%.
Gain a Blessing of Power when either Champion Intercepts their Opponent, increasing Kushala's Ability Power Rate by 15.0% and reducing the Opponent's by the same amount.

Blessings are not affected by Ability Accuracy. Each Blessing lasts for 12 seconds, plus an additional +1500.0 seconds flat if activated while either Champion is performing or recovering from a Special Attack 1 or 2.
When activating a Blessing while both other Blessings have more active stacks, pause all Blessings for 3 seconds.
The Ability Accuracy of Kushala's personal effects and the Parry Mastery is increased by 35.0% for each unique Blessing active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On the final hit, each Buff on the Opponent has a 50.0% chance to be Nullified. For each Buff Nullified, inflict an Incinerate Debuff, dealing 200.0 Energy Damage over 18 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit consumes 30.0% of the Ignition Buffs on the Opponent to inflict a 10.0 potency Soul Barb Debuff for 15 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
This duration is increased by +75.0 seconds for each Buff consumed and for each Incinerate effect on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: For each active Blessing, inflict a Degeneration Debuff, dealing 100.0 Direct Damage over 8 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

synergy.note: When defeating #X-Men, gain a Cross-Fight Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 20%. The Fury Buff potency increases by 200% when defeating any Wolverine.
Until Lady Deathstrike activates Ferocity for the first time each fight, when the Opponent activates a Special Attack, she gains an Unstoppable Passive for the duration of the Special.

signature.title: CYBERNETIC ASSASSIN
lines: The number of hits in the Combo Meter required to gain an Armor Up Passive is reduced to 1500.0 and max stacks is increased by 4.
Ferocity also increases the potency of Ruptures by 1.0% per Armor Up.
For every 2.5% of the Opponent’s Max Health prevented by Heal Block, inflict a Rupture Debuff dealing 10.0% of Lady Deathstrike’s Armor Rating as Physical Damage over 3 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Incoming Bleeds and Poisons potency is reduced by 90.0%, and the Willpower Mastery potency is reduced by 50.0%.
Against Mutants, Lady Deathstrike's Ability Accuracy cannot be modified.
All nail attacks inflict a Severe Rupture Debuff, dealing 68% of Lady Deathstrike’s Armor Rating and 7% of her Attack Rating as Physical Damage over 6 seconds.

cards.title: FEROCITY
lines: When inflicting Ruptures or when struck, gain a Ferocity Charge plus one per Armor Up Buff.

At 7000.0 Charges, gain a Ferocity Passive for 3 seconds, or 9.0 as a Defender, but start paused. Ferocity starts paused until Lady Deathstrike Blocks an attack. While no Armor Up effects are active, Ferocity expires twice as fast.
While Ferocity is active, gain +50.0 Attack Rating and Special Attacks become Passively Unblockable, but Lady Deathstrike cannot gain new Ferocity Charges.

When the Opponent activates a Special Attack 1 or 2, 25.0% chance per Armor Up effect to gain an Unstoppable Passive for the duration of the Special while reducing the Offensive Ability Accuracy of the attack by 1500.0% per Armor Up, to a max of 75%.

cards.title: MACHINE BODY
lines: Start each fight with an indefinite Armor Up Buff, increasing Armor Rating by 12.5. If this Buff is removed by any reason, it restores itself after 12 seconds.
Every 25 hits in the Combo Meter grants an indefinite Armor Up Passive, increasing Armor Rating by 10.0. 20.0% chance to remove a stack when struck or when Blocking while in Ferocity. Max:-1.
Lady Deathstrike’s Regeneration Rate cannot be modified. True Damage hits remove one Regeneration effect.
All Heal Block effects on Lady Deathstrike are immediately removed, but her Willpower Mastery is removed for the original duration of the Heal Block.

cards.title: NANOBOTS REGENERATOR
lines: When struck by a Special Attack 1 or 2, gain a Nanobots Regenerator Passive for the duration of the Special Attack, Passively Regenerating 90.0% of hit damage taken over 0.5 seconds. While suffering from Bleed or Poison, Nanobots regenerate an additional 20.0% flat.
While Deathstrike doesn’t have her personal Armor Up Buff, Nanobots Regenerator is disabled.
While Nanobots Regenerator is active, Lady Deathstrike becomes immune to Armor Break and Rupture Debuffs.
When Intercepted, the potency of Nanobots Regenerator is reduced by -10.0% flat for 15 seconds. Max: -1. When this effect activates it refreshes all existing stacks.

cards.title: HEAL BLOCK
lines: Inflict a Heal Block Debuff for 6 seconds, paused during Lady Deathstrike's Special Attacks. Mutants cannot gain Unstoppable or Unblockable while her personal Heal Block is active

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a Torment Debuff for the duration of the Special, causing all damaging Debuffs to last 600.0 seconds longer. All Ruptures are paused during the Special.
Ferocity: +50.0 Attack Rating and Torment lasts for an additional 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Gain 2500.0 Ferocity Charges.
Ferocity: Regain and pause Ferocity with its duration increased by 600.0 seconds. If this effect unpauses, it pauses again if no attack is blocked for 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a non-stacking Relentless Passive, increasing Attack Rating bonuses from Ferocity by 35.0% and allowing Ruptures to be inflicted through Block for 30 seconds, paused while Ferocity is active.

synergy.note: When fighting against #Spider-Verse Heroes, on Special Attack activation, gain a Pursuit Passive for 13 seconds.

signature.title: REPTILIAN COMPLEX
lines: Increase the potency of personal Retributions by 5.0%.
Gain +2.5 Block Proficiency.
While the Opponent has at least 2 Bars of Power, they are inflicted with a -100.0% Wither Debuff.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Immune to Poison, and Immune to Heal Block while under the effect of a Buff or an Unstoppable effect.
Lizard’s Regeneration Rate can only be reduced below 50.0% by Skill Champions.

cards.title: LIZARD HEALING FACTOR
lines: When struck, gain a Regeneration Passive that recovers 60.0% of the damage taken over 20 seconds. Guaranteed Critical Hits do not trigger this Regeneration.
When inflicted by an Incinerate, Coldsnap, or Frostbite effect by a Skill Champion, lose one Regeneration effect.

cards.title: RENDING CLAWS
lines: All of Lizard’s attacks have a 25.0% chance to inflict a 10.0 Rupture Debuff for 6 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, for each Physical or Direct Damage Over Time effect on them (excluding effects from Masteries), deal a burst of 38.0 Physical Damage. This damage scales with Base Attack only, but scales up with the level of Special Attack used, and the Opponent’s current Power on activation.
Personal Ruptures have a 50.0% chance to be removed when they trigger this burst of damage.
Striking a non-Stunned Opponent with a Heavy Attack pauses all personal Debuffs on the Opponent for 15 seconds. This effect does not trigger if the Opponent was Stunned during any of the hits.
Intercepting the Opponent or Punishing their Heavy or Special Attacks inflicts a Tracking Debuff for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: For the duration of his own Special Attacks, Lizard is Buff Immune.

Each Special Attack hit that hits, is Blocked, or Whiffs inflicts a 20.0% Retribution Passive, lasting 12 seconds per level of the Special Attack, and is paused during Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.
If the Opponent Dodges a hit, Retribution is not inflicted.
While these Retributions are within 600.0 seconds of expiring, the Opponent is more likely to activate a Special Attack.

cards.title: PRIMAL RAGE
lines: When Immune to a Buff or when a Buff on Lizard is Nullified or Staggered, gain an Unstoppable Passive for 3 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. As an Attacker, if Lizard is struck while this Unstoppable is active, it starts a 1000.0 second cooldown.
While this Unstoppable is active, gain an Unblockable Passive and +85.0 Attack Rating.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a non-stacking 8.3% Rejuvenate Passive for 20 seconds. While this effect is active gain +60.0 Attack Rating.
On activation, gain a non-stacking 100.0% Fervor Passive for 20 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS 2 AND 3
lines: The final hit deals a burst of Physical Damage equal to 125.0% of all the damage the Opponent has taken during their own Special Attacks, up to a max of 2000.0 damage scaling with Lizard's starting Attack. Damage counting resets once the damage is dealt.
Special Attack 3 deals an extra burst of this Physical Damage, equal to 55.0% of the damage the Opponent has taken.

signature.title: FORTUNE FAVORS THE LUCKY
lines: 17.9% Chance to Nullify any Buff and replace it with a Bad Karma.
If Longshot Nullifies a True Strike, Unstoppable, or Unblockable Buff, Longshot gains a matching Buff for 1.99132 seconds.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Due to Longshot’s innate luck his Ability Accuracy can only be reduced through the effects of Debuffs.
Longshot's base Ability Accuracy is 300%. Modified chances are already displayed for Longshot’s abilities.

cards.title: GOOD KARMA
lines: Longshot cannot gain Good Karma while under the effects of Stun.
51.0% Chance to gain 1 Good Karma when attacked. Increased to 10200.0% if the attack was Dodged.
75.0% Chance to lose 100.0 Good Karma whenever inflicted with a Non-Damaging Debuff or Struck while Stunned. If the Opponent has Bad Karma active, remove 100.0 Bad Karma instead.
Whenever reaching 5 stacks of Good Karma, gain Pure of Heart for 14 seconds. Granting bonus effects from Special Attacks. This effect does not stack, but can be refreshed.
When Pure of Heart ends all remaining Good Karma is applied to the Opponent as Bad Karma.

cards.title: BAD KARMA
lines: When consuming Good Karma while the Opponent is below max stacks of Bad Karma, apply a Bad Karma on the Opponent for 12 seconds and refresh all existing stacks.
For each Bad Karma, Longshot gains 12.0% of Power generated by the Opponent.
Whenever the Opponent launches a Special Attack or a Heavy Attack all Bad Karma effects are refreshed.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: While Charging a Heavy Attack gain 100.0 Good Karma every 0.4 seconds.
Each hit consumes 100.0 Good Karma.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Consume 200.0 Good Karma.
This attack cannot Miss or be Auto-Blocked.
Pure of Heart is active: The first hit inflicts 7 instant Bleeds each dealing 40.0 Direct Damage. This damage benefits from Longshot's Critical Damage multiplier.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The Final Hit inflicts Incinerate dealing 15.0 damage over 12 seconds. Incinerate also removes Perfect Block chance and lowers Block Proficiency by 50%.
While this Incinerate is active the Opponent is Fate Sealed, Nullifying all Buffs. This Fate Seal also removes Bad Karma effects.

Each Buff and Bad Karma removed by Fate Seal combusts and inflicts Passive Incinerates dealing 90.0 energy Damage over 1 second(s). This damage benefits from Longshot's Critical Damage Rating. Max 10 stacks.
Pure of Heart is active: Instead of inflicting incinerate on the Final hit, the Incinerate triggers on activation of this Attack with it's expiry paused until the Attack ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Stun the Opponent for 3.5 seconds.
Pure of Heart is active: This attack gains up to 100.0 Attack Rating based on Longshot's Good Karma.

synergy.note: While the Opponent is Sundered, Luke gains +1000 Physical Penetration.

signature.title: TOUGH IT OUT
lines: Bulletproof skin grants Luke Cage an Indestructible Passive for 1.4174 seconds when struck.
After it expires, this ability goes on cooldown for 60.03329 seconds. This cooldown is paused while the Opponent is Stunned.
While his Indestructible is not on cooldown, Luke gains 9.7 Block Proficiency.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Bulletproof and near impenetrable skin provides Immunity to Bleed effects and reduces the damage of incoming non-contact Physical hits by 30.0%.
Luke Cage gains 30.0 Attack Rating for each unique Debuff on the Opponent.
Luke Cage gains 15.0 Attack Rating for each non-unique Debuff on the Opponent.
Luke's personal Trauma and Exhaustion Debuffs are paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: EXHAUSTION
lines: Luke’s powerful blows wear down his Opponents. Light Attacks have an 80.0% chance to inflict an Exhaustion Debuff, reducing Critical Damage Rating by --22.0 for 12 seconds. Chance to apply is reduced by 5% flat per stack on the Opponent. Max stacks: -1.
When struck by a Special Attack 3, inflict 200.0 of these Exhaustion Debuffs.
The Opponent’s Ability Power Rate is reduced by -25.0% for each Exhaustion Debuff on them, to a maximum of -1.
While the Opponent is suffering from at least 6 Exhaustion Debuffs, they suffer an indefinite Sunder Debuff, setting Critical Resistance to 0.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflict a non-stacking 35.0% potency Debilitate Debuff for 12 seconds. Luke’s Debilitate doesn’t affect stun Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Exhaustion and Trauma Debuffs on the Opponent are paused during Luke’s Special Attacks, and for 3 seconds afterwards per Bar of Power spent, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit deals a burst of 15.0 Physical Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Consume up to 5 personal Exhaustion Debuffs to inflict a Concussion Debuff for 25 seconds, reducing Ability Accuracy by -15.0% per Debuff consumed.
Against Mystic Opponents, apply an additional Concussion Debuff if 5 Exhaustions were consumed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a non-stacking Trauma Debuff for 30 seconds, causing all hits to deal an additional 20.0% of the damage recently dealt as a burst of Physical Damage.
Inflict 4 Exhaustion Debuffs, each reducing Critical Damage Rating by 22.0 for 30 seconds. Max Stacks: -1.

signature.title: THE SHINING ASSASSIN
lines: When a non-Damaging Debuff on Lumatrix expires naturally, Passively reduce incoming damage by 29.8%.
The Opponent’s Instant Damaging effects have their Ability Accuracy reduced by -19.9%, doubled when fighting Science Champions.

cards.title: SKILLED EIDOL PHYSIOLOGY
lines: Lumatrix is a Skill Eidol and thus has a Fractured Power Bar and is Immune to Bleed and Rupture effects.
Personal effects other than Fury are paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
Start each fight with an indefinite -25.0% Endurance Passive. When the Opponent Misses while Lumatrix is Blocking, also gain a -25.0% Endurance Passive for 20 seconds. Max stacks: 3.
Lumatrix can charge their Heavy Attack for -1 seconds, and their Heavy Attack hits grant the Opponent -20.0% less Power. While Invisible, this reduction is extended to all hits.

cards.title: CUNNING
lines: Lumatrix’s 40.0% Cunning Passives last 12 seconds, and 1 Cunning is gained when Lumatrix has 1 or more full Bars of Power remaining after activating a Special Attack.
Gaining Lumatrix’s Cunning refreshes all personal Cunning. While Lumatrix’s Cunning is at max, all hits are Guaranteed Critical Hits.

cards.title: MISDIRECTION
lines: When Lumatrix starts charging their Heavy Attack, they gain an Evade Charge for 2 seconds. This starts indefinitely paused, and will not activate while Invisible or while Lumatrix’s Invisibility is on cooldown.
When Lumatrix stops charging their Heavy Attack, this Evade Charge is removed. As a Defender, this is unpaused instead.
Against non-Mutant Opponents, gaining this Evade Charge also inflicts the Opponent with a Tracking Passive for 5 seconds.
While this Evade Charge is active, Lumatrix gains a 100.0% chance to Evade Basic Attacks.
The Opponent becomes more aggressive while this Evade Charge is active, or while Invisible.
Performing any Evade consumes the Evade Charge and grants 100.0 Cunning. Performing a personal Evade also inflicts a Stun Passive for 1 second.

cards.title: DECEPTION
lines: When performing an Evade, Lumatrix gains an Invisibility Passive for 3 seconds, paused during Lumatrix’s attacks. As an Attacker, activating a Special Attack while the Evade Charge is active also grants this Invisibility.

While Invisible or while Lumatrix is performing their Special Attack 1, gain Stun Immunity, increase personal Cunning potency by 100.0%, and pause all personal effects other than Invisibility and Stun.
When the Opponent is knocked down by a Heavy Attack or when the Opponent activates a Special Attack, this Invisibility is removed.
If this Invisibility ends without Lumatrix knocking the Opponent down with a Heavy Attack, it goes on cooldown for 20 seconds.
This cooldown is removed by punishing a Special Attack, activating a Special Attack, or by knocking the Opponent down with a Heavy Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain 100.0 Cunning.
Just before the final hit, activate Invisibility. If already Invisible, also gain an Unblockable Passive for 2 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain 300.0 Cunning. As a Defender, also gain Lumatrix’s Evade Charge, and pause it until the end of this Special Attack.
On the first landed hit, gain a +75.0 Fury Passive for 20 seconds. If Unblockable, gain 1 additional Fury Passive. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On activation, gain 700.0 Cunning, activate Invisibility, and pause it for -1 seconds.
While this pause is active, Lumatrix’s Invisibility will not be removed when the Opponent is knocked down by a Heavy Attack or when the Opponent activates a Special Attack.

signature.title: THE GOBLIN QUEEN
lines: Madelyne starts each Quest with a Goblin Horde that persists until the end of the Quest. When she defeats a Defender, she summons another. Max stacks: 98.5 (rounded down).
For each Horde, Madelyne starts each fight with a -5.0% Uncanny Passive. These last until she activates a Special Attack.
In the Pre-Fight Menu, Madelyne can expend Hordes to carry out various tasks:
Crib Swap — The first Buff the Opponent gains is immediately Nullified. After -1 seconds, they gain a +60.0 Cruelty Buff for 30 seconds.
Goblin Instigators — While the pit is active, the Opponent is inflicted with a 30.0% Infuriate Debuff.

cards.title: SCYTHE OF SORROWS
lines: When the Scythe Interrupts an Opponent’s Heavy Charge, or Punishes their Heavy, Combo-Ending, or Special Attack, it places a +10000.0 Misery Buff for 6 seconds.
Time slows briefly when a Hindered Defender charges a Heavy Attack or finishes a Combo-Ending Attack.
When a Buff with reduced potency activates on the Opponent, inflict a Degeneration Passive dealing up to 3000.0 Direct Damage, scaling with the Buff’s missing potency, over 9 seconds.
Cosmic Opponents suffer --100.0% Inexorable Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: FORCE FIELD
lines: Madelyne starts each fight with a Force Field with integrity equal to 20.0% of her Max Health.
While charging her Heavy Attack, Madelyne converts Power into integrity, converting faster the longer she charges.
When Madelyne would take damage from being struck by or Blocking hits, the Force Field’s integrity takes 5000.0% or -1% (respectively) of the damage instead.
When preventing damage, the Force Field expends less integrity the higher the Opponent’s Block Penetration.
As an Attacker, while her Force Field has integrity, Madelyne is Immune to Bleed and Rupture. When Immune to one or more of either, the Force Field gains +-1% of starting integrity.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Beam hits restore +5.0% of starting integrity to Madelyne’s Force Field, increased by an additional +2.0% for each Buff on the Opponent, up to -1. Power Gain Buffs count as 3 Buffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: At the end of this attack, Madelyne summons a pit of grasping, clawing arms for 15 seconds, if not already active.
When the Opponent enters the pit, inflict a -80.0% Hinder Debuff and a Fear Passive, both for 3 seconds. While in the pit, Misery, Hinder, and Fear effects are paused.

While Madelyne is in the pit, her Parry Stun expires 100% faster but is paused while charging Heavy Attacks, and she gains a 100.0% Inexorable Passive. During Cosmic Special Attacks, this becomes a Special Inexorable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Once used, this attack cannot be used again for -1 seconds.
Power Steal all Bars of Power that are completely full. Madelyne gains 50.0% of the Power Stolen.
After 10 seconds, for each Bar stolen this way, the Opponent gains a Power Gain Buff, granting -1% of a Bar of Power over 1500.0 seconds.

synergy.note: Activating a Special Attack 2 Gain a non-stacking +450 Precision Buff for 20 seconds.

signature.title: NEUTRONIUM MIGHT
lines: Activating a Special Attack grants an additional 3 Neutronium, as well as Refresh Personal Fury Effects.
Each Neutronium also grants Maestro +200.0 Block Penetration.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: An enhanced immune system and advanced armaments provide full Immunity to Poison, Shock, and Incinerate.
Maestro has given up his Superiority in order to become the most powerful Cosmic, gaining an extra +20.0 Attack Rating against Tech Champions.

cards.title: NEUTRONIUM
lines: Maestro gains 1 Neutronium per second, disabled during Superior Rage. He gains them 25% slower against Mystic Champions.
Second Medium Attacks grant Maestro 3 Neutronium.

After being knocked down, Maestro cannot gain Neutronium for 6 seconds. This cannot be triggered again for 800.0 seconds after it expires. If one of Maestro’s Buffs expires naturally, these durations are removed.
If one of Maestro’s Buffs expires naturally, he cannot gain Neutronium for 8 seconds.
Whenever Maestro is Immune to an effect or has a Buff Nullified, gain 300.0 Neutronium. This has a 5 second cooldown.

cards.title: ISO-8 BUFFS
lines: ISO-8 Buffs cannot be affected by Ability Accuracy and last for 36 seconds.
At 10 Neutronium, gain a Glancing Buff causing all incoming Basic Attacks to have a 100.0% chance to Glance.
At 20 Neutronium, gain a Pierce Buff of 5.0 potency.

At 30 Neutronium, gain a Cosmic Radiation Buff. While active, Opponents near Maestro take 10.0 Energy Damage per second. While Maestro is suffering from Atrophy, reduce the potency of the Energy Damage by 50%.
When Maestro would gain a ISO-8 Buff, retrigger all other ISO-8 Buffs from previous thresholds.

cards.title: SUPERIOR RAGE
lines: At 40 Neutronium, Maestro enters Superior Rage and gains +25.0 Attack Rating.
During Superior Rage, 1 Neutronium expires every second. While Maestro is suffering from Atrophy they expire 50% faster.
When entering Superior Rage, remove all personal Buffs and gain a Passive copy retaining the same potency and effects.
When knocked down during Superior Rage, Maestro loses 500.0 Neutronium.
Maestro cannot gain Neutronium for 6 seconds after Superior Rage ends.
Superior Rage ends when Maestro has 0 Neutronium, removing all personal Buffs, Passives, and any cooldowns for Neutronium.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Activating a Special Attack grants 2 Neutronium.
Superior Rage: On activation, inflict a Root Passive until the final hit of the Special Attack. This will not trigger while Maestro is suffering from Atrophy.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit deals a burst of 20.0 Energy Damage. Deal an additional burst of Energy Damage for each active personal Fury effect. As a Defender this Damage scales with Base Attack Only.
Superior Rage: This can trigger through Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, for each active ISO-8 Buff or Passive, gain a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by +12.0 for 36 seconds. Max stacks: 3.
Superior Rage: Gain Fury Passives instead of Buffs, and gain an Energy Penetration Passive causing all attacks to ignore 50% of the Opponent’s current Energy Resistance for 36 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 2000.0 Neutronium.
Superior Rage: Inflict a Stun Debuff for 4 seconds.

synergy.note: While the Opponent has 0 power, gain a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by 15%.
Dash back and hold Block for 1.5 seconds to gain an infinite Duration Precision Buff increasing Critical Rate by 250.
Gain a 30% Stimulate Passive while Blocking.
Gain Bleed Immunity, 20% Ability Accuracy, and +900 Armor Rating.

signature.title: LIMBO CONTROL
lines: When a Limbo Buff is placed on the Opponent, also inflict a non-stacking Degeneration Passive dealing 17.5 Direct Damage over 20 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: While Dodging back, Magik cannot be struck by attacks.
While Defending the Potency of the Mystic Dispersion Mastery is reduced by -50.0%.

cards.title: LIMBO
lines: Upon filling a Bar of Power, Magik puts the Opponent in Limbo by placing a Limbo Buff on them for 2.5 seconds, paused during Special Attacks.
While in Limbo, the Opponent is inflicted with a -75.0% Neutralize Passive. Against Cosmic Opponents, this potency is 125% instead.
When triggering Limbo, Magik also places an indefinite +0.0 Fury Buff on the Opponent.
Each Buff that ends on the Opponent while in Limbo inflicts a Degeneration Passive dealing 35.0 Direct Damage over 20 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
All Degeneration effects are paused while in Limbo.
If Limbo ends while Magik has less Health than when it started, she Instantly Regenerates 100.0% of all Blocked damage and 50% of all other damage taken during Limbo.
Limbo will not re-trigger while already active.

cards.title: FALTER
lines: While the Opponent is in Limbo, charging a Heavy Attack inflicts a Falter Passive that increases the Opponent's aggression for 1.5 seconds.
While the Opponent is in Limbo, Dashing forwards inflicts a Falter Passive for the duration of the Dash.
If an attack Misses as a result of either of these Falters, both go on cooldown until Limbo ends.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: If the Opponent is in Limbo, apply a -80.0% Buff Deceleration Passive to them until Limbo ends, and remove any other personal Buff Acceleration or Buff Deceleration effects.
If the Opponent is in Limbo, gain an Unblockable Passive until the end of the Heavy Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: The Opponent cannot gain Power while being struck by or blocking these attacks.
If the Opponent is in Limbo, apply a 400.0% Buff Acceleration Passive to them until Limbo ends, and remove any other personal Buff Acceleration or Buff Deceleration effects.

During Magik’s Special Attacks all personal Degeneration effects on the Opponent become Dire, increasing their tick rate by 400.0%. As a Defender they only become Dire if the Special Attack hits or is Blocked by the Attacker.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: For every 2 Degenerations the Opponent was suffering from at the start of this attack, each hit inflicts 1 Degeneration Passive dealing 17.5 Direct Damage over 3 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On activation, this attack gains +35.0 Attack Rating for each Buff and Degeneration effect on the Opponent up to -1 total.
All personal Degeneration effects on the Opponent become Dire, increasing their tick rate by 400.0% for 3 seconds.

synergy.note: Special Attack 2 grants a +20% Fury Buff for 6 seconds.

signature.title: EVOLVE BUT REMEMBER
lines: Magneto’s Bleed and Armor Break Debuffs gain up to +45.0% duration based on how much bonus special damage he’s gaining from Prowess Effects. Max Potency at +150% Prowess.
Knocking out an opponent grants an additional Persistent Charge.

cards.title: MAGNETISM
lines: #Metal opponents suffer an indefinite Magnetized Passive which is applied 1 second(s) after the start of the fight and does the following:
--70.0% Ability Accuracy & -15.0% Combat Power Rate. Incoming Debuffs gain +25% duration.
Magneto gains +30.0 Attack rating.

cards.title: MUTATION
lines: Magneto’s attacks deal Energy damage instead of Physical. Additionally, he gains +1000.0% base Special Attack damage.
Magneto’s mastery over metal is so great he can staunch the flow of bleeding with a thought, granting Immunity to Bleed effects.

cards.title: PERSISTENT CHARGE
lines: Magneto begins each Quest with 600.0 Persistent Charges.
Defeating an opponent grants 1 Persistent Charge. If they’re #Metal, gain 2 Persistent Charges.
Landing hits and being struck grants a 5.0% chance per Persistent Charge to gain a 10 second Prowess Buff, granting +10.0% Special Damage. Max Stacks: 7.

cards.title: PRE-FIGHT: GUIDANCE BOOST
lines: Magneto can spend 200.0 Persistent Charges in the pre-fight screen to place a Guidance effect on the fight, which lasts until the Defender is defeated. These effects don’t stack and can be used by Allies.
Attackers in the fight gain +1500.0% Attack rating.
#Metal and #Hero attackers trigger Passive Stun effects with the Parry Mastery instead of Debuffs which gain +0.5 seconds duration.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: 100% chance to gain a Prowess Buff, lasting 30 seconds and granting +35.0% Special Attack damage. Max Stacks: 3.0.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: All Prowess Buffs are Paused for the duration of the attack. Magneto’s personal Special Attack effects gain bonuses based on how many Prowess Buffs Magneto has when the attack starts.
1+ Prowess: +50.0% Ability Accuracy.
3+ Prowess: +50.0% Buff & Debuff Duration.
6+ Prowess: +50.0% Buff & Debuff Potency.
9+ Prowess: Attack grants the opponent 80.0% less Power.

synergy.note: At the start of each fight, inflict a 35% Torment Passive for 30 seconds.
Activating a Special Attack grants a non-stacking Vicious Buff increasing the potency of Damage Over Time Debuffs by 50% for 10 seconds.
Start each fight with a 10% Vicious Passive for 30 seconds.

signature.title: STRENGTH OF THE SWAMP
lines: Activating a Special Attack grants Man-Thing a non-stacking Regeneration Passive, healing 10.0% of missing Health over 10 seconds.

cards.title: MADE OF MUSH
lines: Man-Thing is made of swamp mush, and lacks any meaningful weak points to exploit, this makes it Immune to Armor Break or Shatter effects, and prevents Critical Hits from dealing bonus Damage.
Man-Thing’s lack of blood also makes it Immune to Bleed effects.

cards.title: EMPATHIC AGITATION
lines: Man-Thing reacts to powerful emotions, gaining +500.0 Agitation when struck by any attack, when hitting a Buffed Opponent with a Medium Attack, or when Nullifying a Buff. Max Agitation: 100.0.
As Man-Thing’s Agitation grows so does its Attack, gaining up to 100.0 Attack based on Agitation.
Agitation falls off over time, falling off faster the longer it’s been since it last increased.
If the Opponent is a #Villain or has an active Buff, Man-Thing will wait 5 second(s) after each increase before Agitation begins to fall off.

cards.title: ACIDIC SECRETIONS
lines: As a Defender, when Man-Thing makes contact with the Opponent during a Basic Attack, it has up to a 25.0% chance based on its current Agitation to Nullify a Buff on the Opponent.

cards.title: TOXIC PUSTULES
lines: Any Buff other than a Toxic Pustule Nullified on the Opponent has a 100.0% chance to become a Toxic Pustule lasting for 15 seconds.
Whenever a Toxic Pustule Buff is Nullified it has a 100.0% chance to burst becoming a Poison Debuff and an Armor Break Debuff.
The Poison Debuff does 92.5 damage over 15 seconds, and reduces Regeneration effects by 30%.
The Armor Break Debuff reduces Armor by -10.0 and lasts 15 seconds.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: 100.0% Chance to gain an Unstoppable Buff for 1 second(s). Cooldown: 500.0 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: 100.0% chance to Nullify each Toxic Pustule Buff on the Opponent. Armor Break and Poison Debuffs caused by bursting Toxic Pustules with this ability have 5000.0% increase potency.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: When Activating a Special Attack Man-Thing has a 100.0% Chance to place a Toxic Pustule Buff on the Opponent lasting 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% Chance on Contact, to place a Toxic Pustule Buff on the Opponent lasting 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% Chance to Nullify up to 2 Buff(s) per Hit.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% Chance to grant a Fury Buff increasing Attack by up to 80.0 based on Agitation for 30 seconds.
100.0% Chance to place a Poison Debuff on the Opponent causing up to 147.5 damage based on Agitation over 20 seconds, and reducing all Regeneration by 30%.
100.0% Chance to place 200.0 Toxic Pustule Buffs on the Opponent lasting 15 seconds.

synergy.note: Become immune to Nullify. Each time Nullify is prevented, gain a non-stacking Precision Buff, granting +350 Critical Rating for 15 seconds.

signature.title: EMPOWERED BY SIN
lines: Each time a Stagger expires naturally on the Opponent Mangog has a 8.0% chance to gain +100.0 Hatred.
While Unstoppable Mangog Passively Regenerates 10.0% of incoming hit damage instantly.
Gain +0.9 Attack Rating per Hatred.
Gain +1.0 Critical Damage Rating per Hatred.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Immune to Armor Break Debuffs and all Bleed effects.
Mangog suffers --40.0% Combat Power Rate, instead gaining 5% of a Power Bar every second while below 2.0 full Bars.
If struck while Unstoppable, gain a non-stacking Fury Buff granting +100.0 Attack Rating for 10 seconds.

cards.title: HATRED OF A BILLION BILLION BEINGS
lines: Mangog starts with 300.0 Hatred. Hatred is unaffected by Ability Accuracy and cannot be gained more than once every 0.2 seconds.
Gain +100.0 Hatred each time either champion finishes a 5-hit combo.
Gain +100.0 Hatred when Nullifying a Buff.
Each stack of Hatred grants the following:
+10.0 Energy Resistance.
+3.1 Armor Rating.
+2.8 Critical Rating.

cards.title: ENRAGED
lines: Activating a Special Attack with 1000.0 stacks of Hatred triggers Enrage, causing Hate to fall off over 8 seconds after the Special Attack ends.
While Enraged, each time Mangog would gain Hate, Enrage is paused for 3 second(s) instead.
Take 50.0% less damage from enemy attacks and the Recoil Mastery.
Gain an indefinite Unstoppable Buff, this is removed when Enrage expires or if Mangog is struck by a Special Attack.
During Special Attacks 1 and 2 gain an indefinite Unblockable Buff.
Basic Attacks that make contact with the Opponent have a 70.0% chance to inflict a 14 second Stagger Debuff.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Heavy Charging can be held for an extended duration and deals a burst of up to 500.0 Energy Damage based on charge time.
While Enrage is not active, consume 2 Hatred to inflict an Armor Break Debuff for 15 seconds, reducing Armor Rating by -10.0.
While Enraged, gain +220.0% Ability Power Rate while Charging.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation gain +200.0 Hatred, this bypasses the gain cooldown.
The second and final hits inflict a Stagger Debuff for 14 seconds.
If Enraged, gain a non-stacking Energy Protection Buff, granting full immunity to Shock, Incinerate, Coldsnap, and Frostbite effects for 15 seconds. This Buff is paused while Enraged.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit deals a burst of 45.0 Energy Damage.

The first hit Steals the Opponent’s Power above their nearest Full Bar, if they have less then 1 Full Bar of Power, all their Power is stolen. Mangog gains 100.0% of the Power stolen from this attack.
If Enraged the final hit inflict a Stun Debuff for 3 seconds. If the Opponent is struck the Stun is removed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Nullify up to 1000.0 Buffs from the Opponent.
Gain a non-stacking Regeneration Buff healing +2.5 Base Health over 5 seconds. This is increased by an additional +2.5 Base Health for each Buff that was Nullified during this attack.
If Enraged this attack inflicts a Stun Debuff for 2 seconds.

synergy.note: While at least 1 personal Cruelty Buff is active, gain a Precision Passive, increasing Critical Rating by 350.
Start each fight with an indefinite +500 Precision Buff.
Gain a True Accuracy Buff for 10 seconds when the Opponent is inflicted with Sleep.

signature.title: CELESTIAL MADONNA
lines: All Tranquilize effects under 100% potency have their potency increased by 0.0% flat.
Inflicting a Mixed Emotion Passive while the Opponent is inflicted with Tranquilize effect pauses all Tranquilize effects for 0 seconds.

cards.title: TRANQUILIZE
lines: While not performing an action, rather than running, Mantis stands still to inflict a -25.0% potency Tranquilize Passive, or 100% against Science Champions. This Tranquilize begins paused and lasts for 1 second when Mantis performs an action.
Mantis can toggle her ability to stand still when not performing an action by double tapping Block.

As a Defender, Mantis’ Opponent is permanently inflicted with a -25.0% potency Tranquilize Passive, or 100% against Science Champions. While the Opponent has a Regen effect active, this Tranquilize is removed. The Salve and Willpower Masteries do not remove this Ability.
Whenever the Opponent fails to inflict a Debuff due to Ability Accuracy Reduction while inflicted with Tranquilize, the Opponent gains 100.0 indefinite Mixed Emotion Passive.

cards.title: MIXED EMOTIONS
lines: Dashing backwards after landing the first, second, or third Light Attack inflicts a non-stacking Infuriate Debuff for 7 seconds, making the Opponent more aggressive and reducing their Offensive Ability Accuracy by 50.0%. This ability has a 14 second Cooldown.
Intercepting the Opponent while they are inflicted with this Infuriate Debuff inflicts 200.0 indefinite Mixed Emotion Passives.
Landing a Light Combo Ender inflicts a non-stacking -20.0 potency Intimidate Debuff for 7 seconds. This ability has a 14 second Cooldown.
Hitting the Opponent's Block while they are inflicted with this Intimidate Debuff inflicts 200.0 indefinite Mixed Emotion Passives.
Opponents can only be inflicted with either an Infuriate or Intimidate. Inflicting one will remove the other or its cooldown.
For each Mixed Emotion on the Opponent, they lose -3.4 Block Proficiency. Whenever Mantis is knocked down, she loses her focus and the Opponent loses 1 Mixed Emotion Passive.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack while close to the Opponent consumes all Mixed Emotions on the Opponent to inflict a Sleep Passive for 0.5 seconds, increased up to 4 seconds based on the amount of Mixed Emotions consumed. This ability cannot be activated with no Mixed Emotions on the Opponent and cannot be activated on Defense.

Mantis’ Heavy Attack can be charged for an extended duration. While charging, Mantis builds up Fury Passives over time, each increasing Attack Rating by 30.0. When Mantis releases her Heavy attack, these Furies remain for 5 seconds. Max: 10.
Each hit grants Mantis a Cruelty Buff, increasing her Critical Damage Rating by 19.0 for 12 seconds. Max: 2.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Mantis waves her hand to inflict an Encroaching Sleep Passive for 14 seconds. Upon expiry, inflict a Sleep Passive for 2 seconds. This Encroaching Sleep can be removed early if Mantis is struck by a Special Attack while the Opponent has a Prowess effect.

On activation, Mantis attempts to Purify up to 2 Debuffs. For each Purify that does not remove a Debuff, Mantis gains a Cleanse Passive for 16 seconds. Each Cleanse will consume itself to instantly Purify the next Debuff applied to Mantis.
Whenever a Debuff is purified due to these effects, Mantis inflicts 200.0 indefinite Mixed Emotion Passives on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If this Special Attack was activated during Mantis’ Heavy Attack, this Special Attack deals Guaranteed Critical Hits.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a -100.0% potency Tranquilize Debuff for 26 seconds.

synergy.note: The final hit of Masacre’s Heavy Attack inflicts an Intimidate Debuff for 10 second(s), making the Opponent more defensive and reducing their Block Proficiency by 20%. This ability can’t be activated again until the next time Masacre’s bat ignites.

signature.title: ENTHUSIASTIC PUNISHMENT
signature.trigger: Champion Attacks - If Opponent has 0 Incinerate Debuffs
lines: Masacre’s fervor for the job grants him the following:
+10.0 Combat Power Rate while attacking.
+29.0 Critical Rating.

cards.title: FAILED INCINERATE EFFECTS
lines: Each time an Incinerate effect fails to apply due to an Immunity, the target instead takes a burst of 67.5 Energy Damage.

cards.title: BASEBALL BAT ATTACKS
lines: First, second and third Light Attack, as well as the first Medium and Heavy attack utilize the Baseball Bat.

cards.title: BASEBALL BAT ATTACKS
lines: This attack gains +25.0 Block Penetration.
Landing a Critical Hit, being Blocked, or striking an opponent that has an Incinerate Debuff grants 1 Ignition Charge for 20 seconds.
Critical Hits deal an additional 10.0% of damage dealt as a burst of Energy Damage for each Ignition Charge.
While Ignited, Masacre cannot gain Ignition Charges.
Upon reaching 1000.0 Ignition Charges, all Charges are consumed and Masacre’s Bat becomes Ignited for 20 seconds.

cards.title: BASEBALL BAT ATTACKS
lines: This attack gains +40.0 Block Penetration.
When Striking a Block, Passively gain Power equal to what an unblocked Attack would have granted.
This attack Incinerates the enemy, dealing 67.5 Energy Damage over 5 seconds. This effect also removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50% while it's active.
These Incinerate Debuffs gain +1 second(s) duration for each Incinerate on the opponent. Max: +500.0 Seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a Disorient Debuff lasting 12 seconds and reducing Defensive Ability Accuracy and Block Proficiency by 50%. +200.0% Duration if the opponent doesn't have an Incinerate Debuff.
Machete Hits have a 100.0% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff, causing 75.0 direct damage over 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: +1337.6 Attack Rating if Blocked.
+40.0 Block Penetration if Ignited.
If Masacre strikes into a Block, he will avoid incoming attacks for 1 seconds granting them a 100.0% chance to Miss.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack Incinerates the enemy, dealing 300.0 Energy Damage over 5 seconds. This effect also removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50% while it's active.

synergy.note: After performing a personal roar or howl ability, gain a non-stacking 15% increase to Rupture and Bleed potency for 5 seconds.

signature.title: THE FEARLESS ONE
lines: While Unstoppable, M’Baku gains +15.0% Combat Adrenaline.
When an Evade or Auto-Block fails to trigger due to True Accuracy, M'Baku deals a burst of 100.0 Direct Damage. Cooldown: 5 seconds.
Reaching 50 Combo Meter for the first time each fight indefinitely increases the duration of M’Baku’s personal Furies by 8.7%.

cards.title: GHEKRE’S MIGHTY ROAR
lines: M’Baku has -100.0% Resistance to Coldsnap along with immunity to Frostbite effects.

After finishing a Heavy Attack, M’Baku stands still for 0.75 seconds, releasing a Mighty Roar that grants him a non-stacking +25.0 Fury Passive for -1 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
As a Defender, M’Baku has a 60% chance to gain this Fury after performing a Heavy Attack.
While a personal Fury is active, M’Baku’s attacks have a 35.0% chance to inflict a 25.0 Bleed Debuff for 10 seconds.

cards.title: OVERWHELMING STAMPEDE
lines: While a personal Fury is active, Dashing forwards from outside striking distance grants an Unstoppable Passive for 2 seconds, paused for the duration of the Dash.

This Unstoppable is removed and can’t be activated during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. After the final hit of their Special, it can be triggered by Dashing forward, or by performing a Medium Attack within striking distance.
While Unstoppable, M’Baku gains a Combo Shield Passive.
While Unstoppable, all his hits grant +100.0 Combo Meter.
Striking the Opponent with Basic Attacks pauses this Unstoppable for 0.2 seconds.

cards.title: GHEKRE’S BLESSINGS
lines: M’Baku unlocks additional abilities as his Combo Meter increases.
Every 1000.0 hits in his Combo Meter, M’Baku gains a True Accuracy Passive for 6 seconds, paused during the Opponent's Special Attacks.
While at 2000.0 or more Combo Meter, M’Baku’s Unstoppable is paused during his Special Attack 1 and Strikers.
While at -1 or more Combo Meter, all hits while M’Baku’s Unstoppable is active gain up to +75.0 Critical Rating scaling with M’Baku’s Combo Meter, maxing at 75 Combo.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, refresh all personal Furies.
The first and final hits each Purify 200.0 non-Damaging Debuffs on M’Baku, granting +200.0 Combo Meter for each Debuff Purified this way.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit deals a burst of Direct Damage equal to 15% of all the damage the Opponent has taken prior to this attack while M’Baku’s personal Unstoppable is active, up to 730.0 damage per hit scaling with his starting Attack. Damage counting resets after the final hit.
On the final hit, consume -1 Combo Meter to gain M'Baku's Mighty Roar Fury.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Purify all Debuffs and gain a non-stacking +10.0 Fury Passive for 60 seconds with +10.0% flat potency per Debuff Purified. Max potency increase: +-1%.
Gain +500.0 Combo Meter and an indefinite Cleanse Passive for each Debuff Purified this way. Max Cleanses: 500.0.

signature.title: LIVING STRANDS
lines: While at least 300.0 personal Fury Buffs are active, when Medusa would be struck twice by a Special Attack or struck twice within 0.7 seconds by a non-Heavy Basic Attack, she has a 29.0% chance to remove any Stun effects on her and Auto-Block the attack.
Whenever Medusa inflicts Armor Shattered or gains a Fervor Buff, gain a True Accuracy Buff for 35 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.

cards.title: FURY BUFFS
lines: Every 3 seconds, while not at max stacks, Medusa gains a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by ++9.5.
The first -1 Fury Buffs are indefinite. The rest last 14 seconds, but are paused until Medusa reaches her max.

cards.title: ARMOR SHATTERED
lines: When the Opponent is suffering from at least 6 Armor Break Debuffs, they are replaced with an Armor Shattered Debuff and an Armor Break Debuff reducing Armor Rating by -65.0 for 35 seconds.
While Armor Shattered, this Champion's #Robot Opponents also suffer from shattered systems, which reduces Combat Power Rate, Ability Power Rate, and Ability Accuracy by -100%.
While the Opponent is Armor Shattered, Medusa’s Light and Heavy Attacks gain a 50.0% chance to inflict an indefinite Bleed Debuff, dealing 2.0 Direct Damage per second until Armor Shattered ends.

signature.title: THE SMARTEST MAN IN THE BATTLEREALM
lines: Mister Fantastic’s Offensive Combat Power Rate is increased by 9.7% for each Careful Study Passive on the Opponent.
Mister Fantastic gains an additional flat 2000.0% chance to Evade any Unblockable attack. This increases by 3.0% every time the Opponent starts an Unblockable hit, capped at 50% for basic attacks.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: 5.0% flat chance to Evade for each non-Damaging Debuff on either Champion. Does not trigger during a Well-Timed Block.
Attack Rating is increased by +8.0 for each Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: PREPARED FOR ANYTHING
lines: Before the fight, choose up to 300.0 unique Debuffs to place on the Opponent at the start of the next fight. Each Debuff costs 1 Persistent Charge.
Mister Fantastic starts with 400.0 Persistent Charge(s), and can have up to 9. When Mr. Fantastic finishes a fight, he gains 1 Persistent Charge for each unique Debuff on the Opponent.
These Debuffs each last 15 second(s), and are refreshed when the Opponent is knocked down.
The Debuffs are applied even if a different Champion enters the fight.
Debuff potency scales with the rarity of Mr. Fantastic. If different versions of a Debuff are applied, only the strongest one triggers.

cards.title: PREPARED FOR ANYTHING - PRE-FIGHT DEBUFFS
lines: Inflict a Petrify of 40.0% Potency.
Suppress the Opponent, decreasing their Combat Power Rate by 25.0%.

Debuff Siphon the Opponent, increasing the potency of Damage over Time Debuffs on them by 25.0%, and reducing the potency of those effects on allies by the same amount. This does not affect abilities that trigger at the start of the fight.

cards.title: OPPONENT ACTIVATES A SPECIAL ATTACK
lines: When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, place an indefinite Careful Study Debuff on them for that Special Attack.
A Careful Study Debuff lowers the Attack Rating of each Hit in the Special Attack by 25.0%.
If Mister Fantastic was struck by the last hit of the Special Attack, place 100.0 additional copy of the Debuff.
All copies of the Debuff are Purified when the Opponent activates a different Special Attack than the one that triggered the Debuff.

cards.title: CAREFUL STUDY
lines: When the Opponent has 300.0 copies of a Careful Study Debuff, they are combined into a Passive that lasts for the rest of the fight, and the next 5 fights the Opponent participates in.
Careful Study Passives count as 300.0 Debuffs for Reed’s other abilities.
Each Passive prevents future matching Careful Study Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: When this Attack is activated, 100.0% chance to place a Stagger Debuff and a Taunt Debuff that lowers Attack Rating by 40.0%. Each lasts for 9 second(s).
This Taunt is removed when the Opponent activates any Special Attack.
The next time a Staggered Opponent triggers a Buff, that Buff and all other Buffs triggered at the same time will be immediately Nullified.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: When this Attack is activated, re-trigger Mister Fantastic's selected Pre-Fight Debuffs once each.
The last hit Shocks the Opponent, dealing 60.0 Energy Damage over 5 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If the Opponent has at least 1 Debuff, gain a Passive Fury for 20 second(s), increasing Attack Rating by 30.0 for each Debuff on the Opponent.

synergy.note: Striking the Opponent while their back is against the wall grants a 500 potency Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds. This does not reapply if active.
Activating a Special Attack immediately after a Basic Attack lands inflicts an 8% Fatigue Debuff for 8 seconds.
Once per fight when reaching 10 stacks of Light Energy gain an indefinite Regeneration Buff, healing 1% of base health every second.

signature.title: CORRUPTING TOUCH
lines: Whenever a Nullify, Stagger, or Fateseal is prevented by Mister Negative’s immunity, deal a burst of 1.0 Physical Damage.
While suffering from Degeneration, Regenerate +1.2 Health per second.
Each Light Energy grants +1.0 Energy Resistance.
Each Dark Energy deals 1.5 Physical Damage every second while the Opponent is suffering from a non-damaging Debuff. This scales with Base Attack only.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Mister Negative is immune to all Nullify, Stagger and Fateseal effects.
The potency of the Opponent's Degeneration effects are reduced by -40.0% for each unique Debuff they suffer.
When Evading, Mister Negative counter-attacks with a hit dealing a burst of 85.0 Physical Damage and granting the Opponent Power equal to a Medium Attack.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit grants a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by +15.0 for 10 seconds.
While Charging a Heavy Attack, if 100.0 or more Light Energy are active, gain 100.0% Evade chance against Basic Attacks.

cards.title: LIGHT ENERGY PASSIVE
lines: Whenever either champion performs a Well-Timed Block, gain +200.0 Light Energy.
Dashing back removes all Buffs on Mister Negative, granting +100.0 Light Energy per Buff removed.
Light Energy lasts indefinitely until reaching 10 stacks after which all stacks will expire over 6 seconds.

cards.title: DARK ENERGY PASSIVE
lines: If Mister Negative performs an Evade or is Knocked down, all Light Energy is converted into Dark Energy.
Dark Energy lasts indefinitely until reaching 10 stacks after which all stacks will expire over 16 seconds.
While suffering from Disorient, all Dark Energy is removed and additional Dark Energy cannot be gained.
Each time Dark Energy is gained, inflict a -1% Delirium Debuff lasting a flat 80.0 second(s) per Light Energy converted.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation gain a Bulwark Passive for 30 seconds, increasing Block Proficiency by +25.0 for each Light Energy, then convert all Light Energy into Dark Energy.
The final hit inflicts an Exhaustion Debuff, lowering the Opponent’s Critical Damage Rating by 60.0 for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The 1st hit inflicts a Petrify Debuff of 80.0% Potency for 20 seconds.
The 2nd hit inflicts another Petrify if 1000.0 or more Dark Energy are active.
The 3rd hit inflicts a Degeneration Debuff, dealing up to 135.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.
The final hit consumes all remaining Dark Energy, inflicting 1 additional Degeneration for each Dark Energy consumed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a 60.0% Delirium Debuff for 20 seconds.
All Light Energy is consumed, each Regenerating 1.3 Health.
All Dark Energy is consumed, each dealing a burst of 85.0 Direct Damage to the Opponent.

synergy.note: Each time the opponent uses a Special Attack they become Power Locked for 6 seconds.

signature.title: ENGINEERED PERFECTION
lines: Each time Mister Sinister defeats an opponent, he extracts their genetic code, gaining a different Passive ability for the rest of the quest depending on the defeated Champion’s Class. [Max 3.0 of each Passive, 1000.0 Passives total.]
Mister Sinister starts each fight with 3 of these effects at random. These do not persist between fights and do not count toward the max Passives.
Mutant: Prowess, increasing Special Attack Damage by 9.9%.
Skill: Precision, increasing Critical Rating by 4.9.
Science: Regen Rate, increasing Regeneration Rate by 4.9%.
Mystic: Combat Power Rate, increasing Power Rate by 4.9%.
Cosmic: Fury, increasing Attack Rating by 9.9.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Mister Sinister’s Telepathic Mastery renders him Immune to Taunt and Reversed Controls.
Mister Sinister reduces the potency of incoming Bleed effects by 100%.
Mister Sinister’s Telekinetic Powers allow him to Block Unblockable Special Attacks, except against Tech Champions.
Well-Timed Blocks grant a Bulwark Passive, increasing Block Proficiency by +10.0 for 10 seconds. Max: -1.
Whenever a Skill Champion Purifies a Debuff, reduce the Ability Accuracy of their Purify Abilities by 2500.0%, up to -100%.

cards.title: MOLECULAR REGENERATION
lines: Regeneration Rate is increased by 1.0% for every hit on the opponent’s Combo Meter up to 5000.0 hits.
Mister Sinister’s Regeneration Rate cannot be reduced.

100.0% chance to Regenerate 70.0% of damage dealt by enemy Critical Hits over 0.5 seconds. Abilities cannot modify the Ability Accuracy, Duration, or Potency of this ability, aside from effects that would modify Mister Sinister's Regeneration Rate.

cards.title: WHILE CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Pauses the duration of Damaging Debuffs, Stun, Concussion, and Power Steal on the Opponent.
Charging a Heavy Attack for 1 second grants a Vicious Passive, increasing the potency of Damaging Debuffs by 30% for 8 seconds.
Charging a Heavy Attack for an additional 1 second triggers Mister Sinister's Genetic Manipulation. For the next 7 seconds, he inflicts a 10 second Bleed Debuff on himself every 0.7 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Transfer all Damaging Debuffs on Mister Sinister to non-#Robot Opponents, converting them into Degeneration Debuffs dealing 90.0 Direct Damage over 6 seconds. This ability activates even if this attack is Blocked or avoided.
Mister Sinister inflicts himself with a non-stacking 0 potency Bleed Debuff for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict Concussion, reducing the opponent’s Ability Accuracy by -100.0% for 6 seconds. This ability activates even if this attack is Blocked or avoided.

synergy.note: When inflicted with a non-Damaging Debuff, gain a 2.5% Energize Passive for 10 seconds. Max stacks: 10.

signature.title: BACKGROUND INVESTIGATION
lines: Misty analyzes the Opponent’s Class in order to gain a unique effect for a short period to counter them. When the fight starts, Misty takes 1 seconds to investigate the Opponent. When the investigation is complete, Misty gains an effect lasting 18 seconds before restarting her investigation.
Science: Misty instantly Purifies all Debuffs and her Instant Purification chance jumps to 100%
Skill: Misty gains a Fury Buff for each Bleed Debuff currently on her, increasing Attack Rating by 20.0.
Mutant: The mysteries of the X-gene elude Misty’s superb detective skills.
Tech: If the Opponent has 2 or more Armor Up Buffs when Misty's Special Attack 1 connects, a second Armor Break is applied.
Cosmic: Inflict a Disorient Debuff, decreasing their Block Proficiency by 5% and Defensive Ability Accuracy by 10% for each unique buff on the Opponent.
Mystic: Inflict a Suppression Debuff, reducing Opponent Combat Power Rate by 10% for each bar of power on the Opponent.

cards.title: ANTI-METAL AND CRYOGENIC CHARGES
lines: Misty has the ability to build Anti-Metal and Cryogenic Charges using her metallic arm. These Charges provide benefits once they reach certain thresholds or become balanced, putting Misty into Equilibrium. Maximum 12 Charges Each.
For each Anti-Metal Charge, Misty gains a 3.0% chance to instantly Purify any incoming Debuffs.
For each Cryogenic Charge, Misty gains a 1.0% chance to Evade attacks.

cards.title: BUILDING CHARGES
lines: When either Champion performs a Well-Timed Block, Misty gains 2 Anti-Metal Charges. Against Science Champions, Misty gains 3 Charges instead.
When either Champion Dodges an attack, Misty gains 2 Cryogenic Charges. Against Science Champions, Misty gains 3 Charges instead. Cooldown: 0.80 Seconds.
When Misty performs a Light combo ender, she gains 1 Anti-Metal Charge.
When Misty performs a Medium combo ender, she gains 1 Cryogenic Charge.
Misty’s Heavy attack raises her lower charge by 3 if there is a difference of at least 3 between her two Charges. First hit increases Anti-Metal, final hit increases Cryogenic.
When Misty gets struck by a basic attack, she has a 20.0% chance to increase her lower charge by 1, if they are currently equal, both Charges get increased by 1.

cards.title: MASTER OF PARRY AND DEXTERITY
lines: Misty Knight benefits from Rank 1 of the Parry and Dexterity Mastery Bonuses, even if they are not activated.
If the Parry Mastery has already been activated, Misty starts with an extra 2 Anti-Metal Charges.
If the Dexterity Mastery has already been activated, Misty starts with an extra 2 Cryogenic Charges.

cards.title: EQUILIBRIUM
lines: Whenever both of Misty's Charges become equal, she gains non-stackable Buffs. If Misty is at max Charges and gains another, the Buffs are refreshed if they are not on cooldown.
When balanced at 3 or more Charges, Misty gains a Precision Buff for 14 seconds, increasing Critical Rating by 3.0 per charge.
When balanced at 6 or more Charges, Misty becomes Unblockable for 6 seconds. Once expired, this Ability goes on cooldown for 6 seconds.
When balanced at 9 or more Charges, Misty gains a Bionic Overcharge Buff, dealing guaranteed Critical Hits for 6 seconds. Once expired, this Ability goes on cooldown for 6 seconds.
All Equilibrium Buffs are paused during Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Consumes all Anti-Metal Charges, increasing Attack Rating by 20.0 per Charge.
If Misty consumes 6 or more Anti-Metal Charges, the attack becomes Unblockable.
If Misty consumes 9 or more Anti-Metal Charges, inflict an Armor Break Debuff on the first hit, reducing Armor Rating by -30.0 for 16 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Consumes all Cryogenic Charges to inflict a Coldsnap Debuff, dealing 200.0 Energy Damage over 14 seconds

While this Coldsnap is active, all basic attacks inflict an indefinite Frostbite Passive and Critical Hits inflict 1 additional Frostbite. When this Coldsnap expires naturally, all Frostbites are shattered, removing them and dealing 27.0 Energy Damage each.
If Misty consumes 6 or more Cryogenic Charges, the Opponent is Stunned for 2 second(s) when all Frostbites shatter.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Instantly Max out both Charges, gaining all effects of Equilibrium.
Gain an Energize Buff that increases Combat Power Rate by 35.0% for 14 seconds.

synergy.note: At the end of Special 1, inflict a non-stacking 100% Petrify Debuff for 4 seconds.
Take 50% less Poison Damage.
Each time the opponent uses a Special Attack they become Power Locked for 6 seconds.

signature.title: MASTER PLAN
lines: M.O.D.O.K.’s personal Debuffs gain 15.0% increased Ability Accuracy.
When M.O.D.O.K. is attacked while the Force Field is active, he removes all Stun effects on himself. Personal Auto-Blocks are considered Well-Timed Blocks and can trigger the Parry Mastery
When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, M.O.D.O.K. removes all of their True Strike and True Sense effects.

cards.title: FLUX PASSIVE
lines: M.O.D.O.K.’s attributes fluctuate throughout the fight in a complex and seemingly unpredictable manner. It would take a super-genius to calculate the pattern…
Up to +120.0 Attack Rating.
Up to +28.0 Block Proficiency.
Up to +190.0 Critical Damage.
Up to +40.0% Combat Power Rate.
Up to +100.0% increased Defensive Ability Accuracy.
Reduce the Ability Accuracy of Opponent’s True Strike and True Sense effects by a Flat -1%, up to -100.0%.

cards.title: FORCE FIELD
lines: M.O.D.O.K. starts each fight with a Force Field active. When removed or caused to fail, it goes on cooldown for 8 seconds, then reactivates. If fighting a Skill Champion, the Force Field starts on cooldown.
The Force Field’s Ability Accuracy cannot be reduced, unless fighting a Skill Champion.
While the Force Field is active, M.O.D.O.K. gains +8.0 Block Proficiency and has a -1% chance to Auto-Block incoming attacks. Triggering this Auto-Block removes the Force Field.
While the Force Field is active, the Opponent's Ability Power Rate is reduced by up to -100.0% based on Flux.
As a Defender the Force Field also grants a Steadfast Passive.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Modok’s Critical Rating is set to -1, and cannot be increased by outside sources.
Every -1th Hit gains +80.0 Critical Rating. If triggered during a Special Attack, the bonus persists for the rest of the Special.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: During each hit, the Opponent’s current Combat Power Rate is reduced by -100.0%.
During this attack, the Opponent suffers --250.0% Ability Power Rate and Regeneration Rate.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit has a 60.0% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff dealing 60.0 Direct Damage over 6 seconds. Max stacks: 3.
Bleed duration is increased by up to 100.0% based on Flux.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Each rocket has an -1% chance to inflict one of the following Debuffs:
Bleed dealing 60.0 Direct Damage over 8 seconds
Incinerate dealing 60.0 Energy Damage over 4 seconds.
-10.0 Fatigue for 12 seconds.
22.0 Exhaustion for 9 seconds.
A 6 second Weakness with 45.0% potency.
Poison dealing 75.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.
-66.0 Armor Break for 11 seconds.
Heal Block for 7 seconds.
-85.0% Concussion for 11 seconds.

synergy.note: Start each fight with J. Jonah’s Smile for the Camera! Falter effect available. It can be re-used after 2 completed Audience Prompts.
Heavy attacks Incinerate the Opponent, dealing 80% of Mojo's Attack Rating as Energy damage over 6 seconds.
When a Prompt is completed, Mojo gains an Unstoppable Buff for 5 second(s).

signature.title: BIG MOJO ENERGY
lines: When Mojo activates his Anti-Life Field, if he has at least 5 million Followers, he also gains a Fury Buff for the duration of his Anti-Life Field, increasing Attack Rating by +98.5.
Additionally, Mojo starts each Quest with 100.0 million Persistent Subscribers, up to 5 million.
At the beginning of the fight, each Subscriber gives him a Follower. His Followers can never fall below his Subscribers.
When Mojo wins a fight, if he has more Followers than Subscribers, he gains 100.0 million Subscribers. When Mojo loses a fight, he loses 1 million Subscribers.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Mojo gains -30.0% less Power from landing Hits.
Physical Resistance decreased by -15.0.

cards.title: AUDIENCE PROMPTS
lines: After the start of the fight, Mojo receives a random Prompt from his adoring audience, who want to see certain actions performed. These Prompts last for 8 second(s).
If either Champion does what the audience wants, the Prompt is completed and Mojo gains 100.0 million Followers.
If a Prompt expires without being completed, the Prompt is failed and Mojo loses 500.0 million Follower(s).
When a Prompt is completed, Mojo activates his Anti-Life Field for 7 second(s).
Mojo receives a new Prompt when his Anti-Life Field expires or a Prompt is failed.
Prompts are paused during any Special Attack.
Prompts are unaffected by Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: ANTI-LIFE FIELD
lines: The Opponent is inflicted with a -90.0% Atrophy Passive for the duration of the Field, unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
Any time a Buff is Nullified or Expires off the Opponent, Mojo Passively Degenerates them for 77.0 Damage over 6 second(s).
The Anti-Life Field is paused during any Special Attack.

cards.title: AUDIENCE ADORATION
lines: Mojo gains additional Passive abilities based on how many Followers he has.
1.0 million - Any time a Buff expires or is Nullified off the Opponent, Mojo heals for 3.0% of his Missing Health over 2 second(s). This does not stack.
3.0 million - When a Prompt is completed, Mojo gains up to 50.0% of a Bar of Power based on how many Followers he has.
500.0 million - Completing a Prompt has a 100% chance to place a Hater Buff on the Opponent for 20 second(s). Basic Attacks have a 15.0% chance to place one. Haters have no effect.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If the Anti-Life Field is active, trigger its Degeneration for every million Followers Mojo has, up to 500.0 million.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Trigger the Anti-Life Field Degeneration for every million Followers Mojo has, up to 500.0 million.

cards.title: POSSIBLE AUDIENCE PROMPTS
lines: Activate a Special Attack
Charge a Heavy Attack
Dash backwards
Block a Hit
Use Dexterity to avoid a Hit
Hold Block for 1.5 second(s)
Inflict a Stun
When any Buff expires or is Nullified
Back into the corner
Idle for 1 second(s)
Punish a Special Attack, by striking the Opponent while they're recovering from the Attack
Knock down a Champion

signature.title: GIGANTO JR.’S REVENGE
lines: Gain up to 70.0 Critical Damage Rating based on missing Health.
Gain up to 20.0 Attack Rating while Unstoppable based on missing Health.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Shock Immunity: Giganto Jr.’s tough monster hide does not conduct electricity granting immunity to Shock effects.
While Frenzy is not active and Mole Man is below 1000.0 Monster Mass, Mole Man’s heightened senses allow him to predict his opponent’s movements granting him passive True Accuracy.

cards.title: MONSTER MASS
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a Monster Mass when inflicted with a Debuff. This has -70% chance when fighting Mutant Champions. Max 2000.0 Stacks. Debuffs are Purified 1 second(s) after. At 5 Monster Mass or above, this time is decreased to 0.5 second(s).
Each Monster Mass grants +15.0 Physical Resistance.

Blocking Basic Attacks grants an Unstoppable Buff for 0.85 seconds, allowing for an immediate counter-attack. Well-Timed Blocks do not trigger this Unstoppable Buff. This ability removes 1 Monster Mass.

Gain a 75.0% chance to Resist a Block Break while at least 1 Monster Mass is active. Adding points into the Stand Your Ground Mastery also increases this chance. If the chance to Resist a Block Break is raised to 100%, this ability also Resists Unblockable hits. Resisting an Unblockable or a Block Break removes all Monster Mass.
Gain a Monster Mass if a Debuff fails to apply to Mole Man due to an Immunity.

cards.title: FRENZY
lines: When above 500.0 Monster Mass, activating an Unstoppable effect activates Frenzy, allowing all hits to be guaranteed Critical Hits. Frenzy also activates when reaching Max Monster Mass.
During Frenzy Monster Mass cannot be removed but each Mass expires after 2 second(s) and Debuffs can no longer be Purified.
After Monster Mass falls to zero, Mole Man cannot be Frenzied for 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Gain 200.0 Monster Mass.
Inflicts a Shock Debuff dealing 70.0 over 14 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If Frenzied: This attack pauses Unstoppable Buffs and is Unblockable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 1000.0 Monster Mass and become Frenzied if not on Cooldown.

synergy.note: While Psionic Transcendence is not active, gain a +750 Energy Resistance Buff.
Hitting the Opponent’s Block with Basic Attacks grants a non-stacking Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by 20% for 4 seconds.
When Moondragon would be Knocked Out, gain a Death Immunity Passive for 6 seconds. Additionally, Punishing the Opponent’s Special Attacks triggers a Mind Blast.

signature.title: DISCIPLE OF THE SHAO-LORN
lines: Heavy Attacks gain 9.0 Critical Rating while under 1 Bar of Power.
Heavy Attacks inflict an indefinite Energy Vulnerability Debuff. If punishing a Special Attack, trigger a Mind Blast instead.
Special Attacks are Passively Unblockable.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Moondragon’s telepathic power grants her Immunity to Reversed Controls.
Reduce the potency of incoming Bleed, Power Sting, Degeneration, and Poison effects from Champions or Quest Buffs by -30.0%.

cards.title: MIND BLASTS
lines: Mind Blasts are triggered when Interrupting Heavy Attacks or hitting the Opponent’s Block with Moondragon's first Medium or Light Attack. Mind Blasts do not trigger on Well-Timed Blocks.
Starting a Combo by Intercepting Dash Attacks or Interrupting Medium and Light Attacks triggers Mind Blasts for the entire 5-hit Combo.
Mind Blasts deal a burst of 20.0 Energy Damage and grant 1% of Max Power.

cards.title: PSIONIC CHARGES
lines: Gain 1 Psionic Charge when triggering a Mind Blast.
While suffering from Bleed, Power Sting, Degeneration, or Poison effects from Champions and Quest Buffs, gain a Psionic Charge every 0.75 seconds.
Psionic Charges grant +18.0 Critical Damage Rating.

cards.title: PSIONIC TRANSCENDENCE
lines: Upon reaching 2000.0 Psionic Charges, Moondragon Purifies all Debuffs and enters Psionic Transcendence for 15 seconds.
Gain 1 Psionic Charge for each Debuff Purified.
Upon entering Psionic Transcendence, inflict 5 indefinite Energy Vulnerability Debuffs reducing Energy Resistance by 15.0. Max Stacks: 25
Inflict an additional Energy Vulnerability Debuff when gaining new Psionic Charges.
Reduce the potency of incoming Bleed, Power Sting, Degeneration, and Poison effects from Champions by an additional flat 50.0%.
Moondragon’s hits cannot be Evaded.
Psionic Transcendence is paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks and for 2 seconds when a Psionic Charge is gained.
All stacks of Energy Vulnerability and Psionic Charges are removed when Psionic Transcendence ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After the final hit, gain 300.0 Psionic Charges and begin channeling to gain up to 6 more. Moondragon stops channeling if she performs an action or is struck.
After the final hit, incoming Basic Attacks Passively Miss for 3.1 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: All hits deal a burst of 40.0 Energy Damage, multiplied by Moondragon’s Critical Damage Multiplier.
Psionic Transcendence is paused during this attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
