lines: Inflict an Incinerate Debuff, dealing 230.0 Energy damage over 25 seconds. Incinerate also removes Perfect Block Chance and decreases Block Proficiency by 50% while active.
If Psionic Transcendence is active, this attack inflicts a Critical Incinerate Passive, multiplying its Energy Damage by Moondragon’s Critical Damage Multiplier.
Psionic Transcendence is paused while this Incinerate is active.

cards.title: PRESENCE OF THE MOONDRAGON
lines: Moondragon starts each quest with 100.0 Persistent Charge, which can be spent in the Pre-Fight screen on the Presence of the Moondragon ability.
Gain 100.0 Persistent Charge back each time an Opponent is knocked out by Moondragon. Max Stacks: 3
Presence of the Moondragon: At the start of the next fight, gain 3 Passive Dragon of the Moon charges granting immunity to Reversed Controls. Remove 1 charge when this immunity is triggered.

synergy.note: At the start of each fight, inflict a 35% Torment Passive for 30 seconds.
Start each fight with a 10% Vicious Passive for 30 seconds.
Psionic Glide inflict a 15% Weakness Debuff for 15 seconds. These cannot re-trigger if active.

signature.title: THE LIVING VAMPIRE
lines: When the Opponent is Immune to a personal Bleed, 25.0% chance to inflict a Rupture Debuff instead, dealing Physical Damage and copying the Bleed's behavior.
When taking Direct Damage from any source, gain a non-stacking Undying Passive that falls off after not taking Direct Damage for 2 seconds. Cooldown: 800.0 seconds.
While Undying is active, instantly Regenerate 10.0% of all Direct Damage taken. Against Skill Champions, the potency of this effect is reduced by 50%.

cards.title: PSIONIC GLIDE
lines: To perform a Psionic Glide, Dash forward from outside of striking distance or during the Opponent’s Special Attack, causing all incoming attacks to Passively Miss Morbius and increasing the speed of the fight until completing his first Medium Attack.
Psionic Glide’s Medium Attack is Passively Unblockable and gains +250.0 Attack Rating.

Psionic Glide’s Medium Attack also inflicts a Bleed Debuff, dealing 1.0 Direct damage over 24 seconds. This ability can be inflicted through Block. If the Opponent is recovering from a Special Attack, inflict 4 Bleeds instead.
After performing a Psionic Glide, gain a 100.0% Fervor Buff, for 10 seconds. While this effect is active, Morbius cannot perform a Psionic Glide.

If the Fervor Buff is Nullified or fails due to Ability Accuracy reduction, Morbius replaces it with an identical, non-stacking Passive. The Fervor Passive does not prevent Morbius from performing a Psionic Glide. Failing due to Ability Accuracy will delay the Passive for 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: BLEED EFFECTS
lines: 20.0% chance for Basic Hits to inflict a Bleed Debuff, dealing 1.0 Direct Damage over 24 seconds.
Each Damaging Debuffs on the Opponent lowers Regeneration Rate by -10% and Ability Power Rate by -5.0%. Max Debuffs: 10.

Morbius does not benefit from the Despair Mastery. Instead, while the Opponent is suffering from any Damaging Debuff, lower their Regeneration and Ability Power Rate by +-5.0% for each rank invested. This ability does not stack.
When the Opponent is suffering from 10+ Damaging Debuffs, inflict a non-stacking 25.0% Petrify Debuff, for 10 seconds, paused while the Opponent has 10+ Damaging Debuffs.
While the Opponent is Petrified, Morbius gains +1.0% Combat Power Rate for each Damaging Debuff on the Opponent. Max Debuffs: 30.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 50.0% chance on each hit to inflict a Bleed Debuff, dealing 1.0 Direct Damage over 24 seconds.
Personal Fervor Buffs are paused during this attack and expire immediately when it is complete.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Personal Damaging Debuffs are paused during this attack.

If the Opponent is Petrified, the second hit becomes a Guaranteed Critical Hit, consuming all damaging debuffs on the Opponent and increasing Attack Rating by +40.0 for each Debuff consumed. Max Debuffs: 40 .
Passively regenerate 15.0% of the damage dealt by the second hit, up to 10% of Max Health.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If the Opponent is Petrified, gain +40.0 Attack Rating for each Damaging Debuff on the Opponent but do not consume them. Max Debuffs: 40.
Passively regenerate 15.0% of damage dealt, up to 10% of Max Health.

synergy.note: While fighting Mystic Champions, Mordo is Immune to Fate Seal.
While fighting Mystic Champions, Mordo is Immune to Nullify.

signature.title: MYSTICAL BARRIER
lines: By conjuring a magical barrier, Mordo gains 45.0 Energy Resistance while he remains Blocking.

If the opponent strikes Mordo’s Block while they have a True-Type Buff, he has a 69.0% chance to Nullify that Buff and replace it with a Detonate Buff lasting 20 second(s). Detonate deals a burst of 70.0 Energy Damage when it’s Nullified or Expires.

cards.title: ASTRAL FORM
lines: Mordo is Immune to Passive Ability Accuracy reductions.
While the opponent has at least 1 Buff, gain +20.0 Attack Rating.

Every 8 second(s), Mordo gains a Power Gain Buff granting 1 Bar of Power over 500.0 second(s). This Buff is removed if Mordo is struck. If fighting as a Defender, Mordo will behave less aggressively while this Buff is active.

cards.title: WHILE STUNNED
lines: When attacked by a Basic Attack while suffering from a Stun Debuff, Mordo will Purify the Stun and Evade the hit with a Counter-Attack that inflicts a Degeneration Debuff dealing 80.0 Direct Damage over 2.5 seconds.
Mordo cannot Evade or counter-attack while suffering from a Concussion or Fatigue Debuff.

cards.title: BLOCKING
lines: If Mordo holds Block for more than 0.5 second(s), his Block will not be broken by Unblockable Special Attacks.

cards.title: WHILE CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Continually gain Fury Buffs, each granting +20.0 Attack Rating for 17 second(s). Max: -1 Buffs. Exponentially gain more Buffs the longer the Heavy Attack is charged.
If Mordo is below 1 Bar of Power, he will Passively gain 50.0 Bar(s) of Power per second.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 30.0% chance to inflict a 3 second Stun Debuff.
100.0% chance to inflict a Degeneration Debuff, causing 80.0 Direct Damage over 2.5 second(s). If the opponent has at least 1 Buff, this effect can be triggered through a Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100% chance to inflict a 12.0 potency Soul Barb Debuff for 14 seconds. Mordo also reduces the Regeneration Rate of Soul Barbed Opponents by 80.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100% chance to gain -1 Fury Buffs, each granting +50.0 Attack Rating for 17 second(s).
Up to 50.0% chance based on lost Health to gain a Regeneration Buff in place of a Fury Buff, recovering 15.0 Health over 6 second(s).

signature.title: CASE CLOSED
lines: Whenever one or more of the Opponent’s Debuffs fail to trigger due to reduced Ability Accuracy, they gain 479.8 Sleep Charges (rounded down). As a Defender, this includes Debuffs from Quest Nodes on Mr. Knight.

1.5 seconds after reaching 10000.0 Charges, inflict a Sleep Passive for 3 seconds and remove 10000.0 Charges. Cooldown: -1 seconds. The timer to inflict this Sleep is paused during any Special Attack.
As a Defender, when the Attacker activates a Special Attack, they lose 2500.0 Sleep Charges per level of the Special Attack.
As an Attacker in Battlegrounds, at the start of each fight inflict -1 -10.0% Injury Passives for 3.9195 seconds.

cards.title: KHONSHU’S PROTECTION
lines: While Mr. Knight is Blocking, the Opponent’s Attack Rating during hits is capped at 90.0% of what it was at the start of the fight. While he is Dodging back, the cap is 30%.
Whenever Mr. Knight's Dexterity Mastery fails to activate from an incoming attack, he gains an Unstoppable Passive for 0.75 seconds.
While the Opponent is Sleeping, Mr. Knight does not idle. He doesn’t want to waste the opportunity.

cards.title: PHASES OF COMBAT
lines: Mr. Knight cycles through different Moon Phases during combat. Each Phase lasts 12 seconds before moving to the next Phase. The order of the Phases are: Waning Moon, New Moon, Waxing Moon, Full Moon, then back to Waning Moon.
While the Moon is Full, Light Attacks and Special Attacks are Guaranteed Critical Hits, and Critical Hits land through Block.
While the Moon is Waxing or Waning, Light Attacks gain +20.0 Critical Rating.
Whenever the Moon Phase changes, gain a +67.0 Light Proficiency Passive for 18 seconds. Max: -1.

cards.title: TRANQUILIZE
lines: Mr. Knight's Well-Timed Blocks inflict a -10.0% Tranquilize Debuff for 15 seconds. Max: -1.
As a Defender, whenever the Moon Phase changes, inflict a -10.0% Tranquilize Passive for 15 seconds.
If the Opponent is not a Mutant, the Ability Accuracy of their non-Damaging Debuffs is further reduced by -25.0% per personal Tranquilize on them. Only affects Champion Abilities and Masteries.

cards.title: CRACK THE CASE
lines: Attacking the Opponent while they are Sleeping, or are charging or performing a Heavy or Special Attack inflicts an indefinite -10.0% Injury Passive. Doing so with a Light Attack inflicts 1.0 additional Injury. Max: -1.

Inflicting 1 or more Injury in this way triggers a cooldown of 10 seconds. When a personal Injury would be inflicted while the cooldown is active, instead shorten the cooldown by 400.0 seconds per attempted Injury.
When the Opponent is Inflicted with an Injury effect, if they have at least…
100.0+, refresh 2 personal Light Proficiency Passives.
200.0+, inflict a Panic Debuff for 15 seconds.
400.0+, inflict 1.0 personal Tranquilize Debuff. Against Science Champions, this triggers at 3 or more Injuries instead.
500.0+, inflict a non-stacking 30.0% Reckless Debuff for 10 seconds. This Reckless is removed the next time the Opponent charges a Heavy attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If the Moon Phase changed during this attack, the final hit inflicts a Sleep Passive for 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, the next time Full Moon activates or if it is already active, pause it and all personal Light Proficiency Passives for 12 seconds.
As a Defender, on activation inflict 200.0 personal Tranquilize Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a non-stacking Regeneration Buff, restoring 1.0% of Max Health over 9 seconds. Potency is increased by -1% while below 50.0% Health. This is refreshed when the Moon Phase changes or a personal Injury is inflicted.
Refresh all personal Tranquilize and Light Proficiency effects.

synergy.note: When dashing forward Mysterio has 70% chance to inflict the Opponent with Falter for the duration of the dash. Opponents suffering Falter have a 100% chance to Miss their attacks.
When fighting against #Spider-Verse Heroes, on Special Attack activation, gain a Pursuit Passive for 13 seconds.
Grants Immunity to Revers Controls.

signature.title: LETHAL GAS
lines: Mysterio generates 1 Chemical Gas every 20 seconds.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Mysterio’s Ability Accuracy cannot be decreased and he’s immune to all Poison effects, however if knocked down by a Spider-verse Hero or inflicted with Armor Break Debuff, his helmet is cracked for 10 seconds, temporarily disabling these benefits.

cards.title: CHEMICAL GAS
lines: Mysterio’s second Medium attack generates 1 Chemical Gas, stacking up to 3 total. Gas can’t be generated while his helmet is cracked.

Landing a Heavy Attack with 1 or more Chemical Gas consumes them and inflicts the Opponent with a single Poison Debuff, dealing 160.0 direct damage scaling with Base Attack, per Chemical Gas consumed over 8 seconds and reducing health recovery by 30%.
While inflicted by Mysterio’s Poison, Spider-Verse Heroes can’t Evade.

cards.title: ON FOURTH LIGHT ATTACK
lines: 100% chance to inflict a Heal Block Passive, preventing the Opponent from healing for 1 second(s). This duration increases by +2 seconds for each Chemical Gas Mysterio has. This hit is a projectile and does not make contact with the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Mysterio gains a Reflection Gas Passive lasting 4 seconds and all his Chemical Gas is consumed, each adding 1 second to it’s duration.

If struck while Reflection Gas is active the incoming damage is stored. Upon expiry 70.0% of the taken damage is reflected onto the Opponent and Mysterio immediately Regenerates 100.0% of the damage he took.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Mysterio gains an Illusion Gas Passive lasting 4 seconds and all his Chemical Gas is consumed, each adding 1 second to it’s duration.
While active, the Opponent is inflicted with a Power Drain Debuff losing 6.0% of their max Power per second.
While active, all incoming attacks have a 25.0% chance to Miss, increasing to 100.0% while charging a Heavy Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Mysterio gains a Frenzy Gas Passive lasting 10 seconds and all his Chemical Gas is consumed, each adding 4 seconds to it’s duration.
While Frenzy Gas is active Mysterio gains 260.0 Attack Rating and the potency of his Poisons are increased by 300.0%.

signature.title: HYDROKINETIC ARMOR
lines: Namor takes 24.9% reduced damage from all sources while attacking his Opponent. When Namor ends an Attack, any damage prevented by Hydrokinetic Armor is captured and sent back to the Opponent as Energy Damage.

cards.title: ID_UI_STAT_ATTRIBUTE_TRIGGER_SUBTITLE_OUTRAGE
lines: Namor can have a maximum of 3000.0 Stacks of Outrage.

Every 3.0 seconds Namor gains 100.0 Outrage. Each time Namor is affected by a Stun Debuff, he reduces the time between each Outrage generated by 0.5 seconds. Once Namor activates IMPERIUS REX the timer is reset back to 3.0 seconds.
Namor generates 100.0 Outrage whenever he is affected by a Bleed or Incinerate Debuff.
Namor generates 100.0 Outrage whenever a Bleed or Stun Debuff fails to apply due to an Immunity or chance, or whenever the Opponent Purifies a Debuff.
Namor does not gain Outrage when failing to apply Bleed Debuffs to Robots. He does not hold them responsible for their lack of blood.

cards.title: ID_UI_STAT_ATTRIBUTE_TRIGGER_SUBTITLE_IMPERIOUSREX
lines: If Namor has 1500.0 stacks of Outrage he can Dash Back and hold Block for 1.2 seconds to instantly gain 1.0 bar of Power and activate IMPERIUS REX.
If Namor has 30.0 stacks of Outrage he instantly generates up to 9500.0% of his Max Power and activates IMPERIUS REX.
Namor's Special Attacks deal up to 24000.0% additional damage based on active stacks of Outrage
Special Attacks cost 9000.0% less Power. However, Namor Drains 15.0% of a bar of Power every second. Each Special Attack Namor launches applies an additional Drain of 5% per second.
While IMPERIUS REX is active, Namor cannot gain Power from any sources other than his own abilities.
Once Namor has 0 Power remaining, all stacks of Outrage are removed and IMPERIUS REX ends.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: While IMPERIUS REX is active, launching a Heavy Attack consumes 1500.0 stacks of Outrage to generate 100.0% of a bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit has a 50.0% chance to inflict a Bleed dealing 100.0 Direct Damage over 8 seconds
While IMPERIUS REX is active, Namor generates twice as much Outrage from all sources for the duration of this Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit has a 50.0% chance to inflict Stun lasting 2.5 seconds.
While IMPERIUS REX is active this attack is Unblockable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Passive Fury increasing Attack Rating by 300.0 for 20 seconds. While this Fury is active, Namor's Opponents gain 0 Power when struck by Special Attacks.

synergy.note: Opponents that are Immune to personal Incinerates are inflicted with matching Rupture Passives with 60% of the original potency. These Ruptures are still treated as Incinerates by the rest of Negasonic’s abilities and effects.

signature.title: OFFENSIVE PREDETERMINATION
lines: As an Attacker, Negasonic’s Evade Counter-Attack inflicts 80.0 Incinerates, rounded up, and personal Incinerates are paused during her Special Attacks. Additionally, Striker Hits and Counter-Attacks pause Incinerate and Incinerate Vulnerability as if they were Light Attacks.
As a Defender, start each fight with 39.0% of a Bar of Power.

cards.title: PERSONAL PASSIVES
lines: During the fight, Negasonic can inflict the following Passives.
Incinerate: Deals 35.0 Energy Damage over 14 seconds. Max Stacks: -1
Incinerate Vulnerability: 50.0% potency. Lasts 16 seconds and doesn’t stack.
Stun: Lasts 2 seconds. If the Parry Mastery is active, it also inflicts a Stun Passive for 2 seconds.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Utilizing bursts of atomic energy, all of Negasonic’s attacks deal Energy Damage and do not make contact.
Medium Attacks inflict 100.0 Incinerate if the Opponent has fewer than 5 personal Incinerates active on them.
Light Attacks pause all currently active personal Incinerates and Incinerate Vulnerability Passives for 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: PRECOGNITION
lines: Negasonic enters each fight with a Precognition Charge which allows her to Evade an attack and Counter-Attack, inflicting a Stun Passive. This Evade won’t activate while Blocking.
15.0% chance to Evade Medium and Light Attacks that make contact, increased to 100.0% while charging a Heavy Attack.
100.0% chance to Evade an Opponent’s Counter-Attack.

cards.title: PRECOGNITION
lines: Each time Evade activates or is prevented from activating, Precognition goes on cooldown for 25 seconds.
Additionally, Precognition goes on cooldown each time Negasonic is knocked down or inflicted with a Power Burn, Power Drain, or Power Lock effect.
Each time the opponent lands a Critical Hit, including through Block, 150.0 seconds is removed from the cooldown.
While fighting Tech Champions, Precognition begins on cooldown.

cards.title: WHILE FIGHTING SKILL CHAMPIONS
lines: The Opponent’s Bleed, Evade, and True effects suffer --100.0% Ability Accuracy. Additionally, Precognition does not go on cooldown from Evading a Counter-Attack.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: This attack can be charged 500.0 seconds longer than normal.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit refreshes all personal Incinerates, even if Blocked.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: After performing the first hit, rapidly pressing Block builds up dormant Incinerates, up to 1600.0, which are inflicted by the final hit.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflicts 1.0 Stun and Incinerate Vulnerability as well as 3 Incinerates, all at +5000.0% duration.

signature.title: LIFE MODEL DECOY
lines: When Nick would be knocked out, his Life Model Decoy is destroyed instead and he returns to the fight with a permanent Fury’s Fury Buff and Stun Immunity. However, Nick loses his Infinity Formula and begins taking Direct Damage equal to 500.0% of his health per second for the rest of the quest while above 30% max health. The destruction of Nick’s decoy Removes all Effects and isn't affected by Ability Accuracy reduction.

cards.title: BATTLE SCARS
lines: When striking a Bleeding Opponent Nick’s Critical Rating is increased by 10.0 and his attacks ignore 100% of Physical Resistance.
While the Opponent is not under the effect of a Regeneration Buff all of Nick’s Bleeds are 100% more potent.

cards.title: BASIC ATTACKS
lines: Ending a combo with a Light Attack has a 100% chance to inflict a Bleed, dealing 45.0 damage over 1 second.
Landing any Medium Attack has a 100% chance to inflict a Bleed, dealing 2.5 damage over 6 seconds.
Landing a Heavy Attack has a 100% chance to inflict up to 3 stacks of Bleed, each dealing 5.0 damage over 12 seconds.
When hitting into Auto-Block Nick is Stun Immune and has a 100% chance to inflict a Bleed dealing 5.0 damage over 12 seconds.
Knocking down the Opponent Purifies Nick's non-damaging Debuffs.

cards.title: INTERNAL BLEED
lines: If the Opponent gets 8 stacks of Bleed, their Bleed effects are removed and replaced with a Passive Internal Bleed effect which deals 270.0 damage over 30 seconds.
While Internal Bleed is active all the Opponent's Bleed Debuffs have an increased duration of 20.0 seconds per Tactical Charge.

cards.title: TACTICAL ADVANTAGE CHARGES
lines: Nick starts the fight with 6 Charges when fighting an Avenger.
When Nick is Struck he has a 100% chance to gain 1 Tactical Charge. Reduced to 25% against Mutant Opponents.
While Nick is under the effect of a Fury Effect, Tactical Charge durations are paused.
Nick loses 1 Charge every 6 seconds, decreasing to every 4 seconds while at or above 10 total Charges. Additionally if the Opponent performs a Well-Timed Block Nick loses 1 Charge.
At 5+ Charges: Nick's attacks can’t Miss or be Evaded.
At 10+ Charges: Nick's Purify effects now target all Debuffs.
At 15+ Charges: Nick becomes Unblockable.
At 20+ Charges: All Charges are removed and replaced with a Fury’s Fury Buff which grants 180.0 Attack Rating for 10 seconds. All Tactical Charge gains are doubled while Fury’s Fury is active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, Nick gains 4 Tactical Charges.
Any hit after the first inflicts a Disorient Debuff, reducing Block Proficiency by 50% and Defensive Ability Accuracy by 70% for 8 seconds. This will not trigger while already active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Nick slashes his Opponent causing up to 4 stacks of Bleed, each dealing 25.0 damage over 8 seconds.
50.0% chance to stun the Opponent for 3 seconds. Stun chance increases by a flat 10% for each of Nick’s Tactical charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Additional 200.0 Attack if Fury’s Fury is active.
Additional 200.0 Attack if Internal Bleed is active.

synergy.note: New Pre-Fight spell: Siphon – When the Opponent finishes a Special Attack, Nico Power Steals 80% of their remaining Power over 2 seconds and gains 50% of the Power Stolen.
New Pre-Fight spell: Siphon – When the Opponent finishes a Special Attack, Nico Power Steals 80% of their remaining Power over 2 seconds and gains 50% of the Power Stolen.

signature.title: W.I.T.C.H.
lines: Whenever a Buff or personal effect on the Opponent other than Poison is prevented or removed by Immunity, Nico inflicts a 19.7 Poison Passive for 12 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Personal effects on the Opponent are paused during Nico’s Special Attacks.
When Nico causes an attack to Miss, she Passively gains 0.3 Adrenaline. Cooldown: 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: BLOOD MAGE
lines: As a Defender, Nico stores 40.0% of all damage taken as Adrenaline, and while she has more than 5.0% Adrenaline stored, she gains an indefinite 15% Flourish Passive.
Each time Nico gains a total of 5% of her Max Adrenaline, gain a +20.0 Fury Passive for 15 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
When Nico activates any Special Attack, she Passively Converts up to 4.0 Adrenaline to Health per level of the Special Attack.
Nico starts each fight with 100.0% of the Adrenaline she finished her previous fight in the same Quest with. Personal Furies gained at this time gain 200.0% increased duration.

cards.title: HEX GIRL
lines: Nico’s Heavy charge and third Light Attack place an indefinite Pentacle Buff on the Opponent.
When the Opponent gains a Buff, Nico Passively gains -1% of her Max Power. When one or more Buffs are prevented or removed by Immunity, she gains 3.0%.
Nico does not benefit from the Mystic Dispersion Mastery. Instead, each rank increases the base potency of personal Power Gains by -1%.
Passively gain 1.0% of missing Health as Adrenaline when a Buff on the Opponent is prevented or removed by Immunity. Cooldown: 1 second.
Nico can inflict a Buff Immunity Debuff for 11 seconds, refreshed when Nico casts any Special Attack. As a Defender, this is a Passive instead.

cards.title: STAFF OF ONE
lines: Nico is magically bound to the Staff of One, a powerful artifact that can cast potent spells. Each lasts until the Opponent is defeated and cannot be cast again within the same quest.
As a Defender, Nico always casts Unworthy.

cards.title: SPELLS OF THE ONE
lines: Unworthy - Nico inflicts her personal Buff Immunity at the start of the fight.
Absorb - Nico gains a 55.0% Stimulate Passive while Blocking.
Ward - Nico gains Immunity to Poison and Rupture effects.
Burn - Nico’s Poison effects are replaced by Incinerates, but deal 3000.0% reduced damage.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: As an Attacker, the first hit consumes 7.0% of Nico's current Health and stores it as Adrenaline.
On the final hit, or when canceling this attack with a Special 1 or 2, gain a Zeal Passive for 6 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a Halt Passive for 13 seconds, refreshed when Nico casts any Special Attack. Does not apply if active.

The final hit deals a burst of 150.0 Energy Damage, increased by 20.0% for each Damaging effect on the Opponent, up to -1. This can trigger through Block. As a Defender, the total potency is reduced by 50%.
After the final hit, Nico gains an Invisibility Passive for 4 seconds. If this causes an attack to Miss, it goes on cooldown for 1000.0 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit inflicts a 300.0 Poison Debuff for 30 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
If a Cosmic Opponent is Immune to any of Nico’s Poisons, she inflicts a matching Acid Burn instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack gains +40.0 Attack for each Damaging effect on the Opponent.
The first time this attack is used each fight, Nico increases the duration of personal effects by 50.0% for the rest of the fight.

synergy.note: Guillotine: Critical Hits have a 50% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 70% of Attack as Direct Damage over 4.5 seconds. Punisher, Moon Knight: Medium Attacks have a 30% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 50% of Base Attack as Direct Damage over 3 seconds. As the Moon waxes, the chance to Bleed on Medium Attacks is 100%.

signature.title: BOARD TO DEATH
lines: The final hit of Night Thrasher's Heavy Attack has a 35.0% chance per active Gadget Debuff to inflict a Taunt Debuff for 10 seconds.
Striking a Taunted opponent with Skateboard Attacks grants a permanent Fury Buff, increasing Attack by 9.0. Max 10 stacks. When Knocked Down these Buffs are lost.
After being Knocked Down Night Thrasher has a 24.0% chance to Purify all Debuffs.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Well Timed Blocks and successful Dodges grant 5% of max Power while Night Thrasher is under 1 Bar of Power.

cards.title: SKATEBOARD ATTACKS
lines: Champions of the Contest never see the skateboard coming. Attacks using the skateboard have passive True Accuracy.

cards.title: ON OPPONENT KNOCKDOWN
lines: Refresh the duration of all active Gadget Debuffs and Purify -100.0 Debuff on Night Thrasher.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Night Thrasher uses the Shock Baton to inflict a 40.0 Shock Debuff for 15 seconds. This Debuff's damage updates with changes to Attack Rating.

If this attack is activated after striking with a Light Attack, Night Thrasher instead uses the Smoke Capsule Gadget, inflicting Disorient. Disorient reduces Enemy Defensive Ability Accuracy by 50% and lowers the opponent’s Block Proficiency by 50% for 15 seconds.

If this attack is activated after striking with a Medium Attack, Night Thrasher instead uses the Explosive Gadget to inflict a 40.0 Incinerate Debuff for 15 seconds. This Debuff's damage updates with changes to Attack Rating.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a +25.0 Precision Buff for 18 seconds. For each Unique Debuff effect on the opponent, base potency is increased by another +25.0.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Passive Debilitate, extending the duration of all Debuffs by 75% for 45 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Refresh all active Gadget Debuffs with the extended duration.

signature.title: NEYAPHEM HERITAGE
lines: Nightcrawler's Evade Chance can only be lowered by Tech Champions.
Increase the Potency of Nightcrawler's Instant Bleeds and Critical Damage Rating by 7.0% of his Current Prowess Potency.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Dodging back and holding Block for 2 seconds, Nightcrawler will swap between Neyaphem and Swashbuckling mode.
Ending a Combo with a Light Attack or Dodging back and holding Block for 2 seconds causes Nightcrawler to swap between Neyaphem and Swashbuckling modes.
While Dodging back, Nightcrawler cannot be struck by attacks.
Whenever Nightcrawler successfully Dodges an attack this way, gain a 10.0% Prowess Passive for 20 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Critical Hits inflict an instant Bleed dealing a burst of 60.0 Direct Damage. The potency of this Bleed is reduced by -1% for each Armor Up Buff on the Opponent.

cards.title: NEYAPHEM MODE
lines: Nightcrawler gains a 22.0% chance to Evade all incoming attacks. This chance is increased by 15% against Physical Attacks.

cards.title: SWASHBUCKLING MODE
lines: Second Medium Attacks grant a Precision Passive, increasing Critical Rating by +15.0 for 15 seconds. Max stacks: 5. When activating these Precisions, pause Nightcrawler’s personal Prowess and Precision effects for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Neyaphem Mode: On activation, gain a non-stacking Evasion Passive increasing the chance for Evades to trigger by 33.0% for 10 seconds.
Swashbuckling Mode: Gain a 10 second 100.0% Prowess Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Neyaphem Mode: Reduce Opponents Block Proficiency by --44.0 for the duration of this Attack.
Swashbuckling Mode: Inflict the Opponent with a 15 second Bleed Vulnerability, increasing the potency of incoming Bleed effects by 50.0%

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a non-stacking Incinerate Passive dealing 5.0 Energy Damage over 30 seconds. While active, all of Nightcrawler’s personal Bleed effects turn into Incinerates with the same potency.

synergy.note: If a personal Shock effect is prevented by Immunity. Nimrod inflicts matching Incinerate Debuffs instead. Incinerate reduces Block Proficiency by 50% and prevents the activation of Perfect Block.

signature.title: ZERO TOLERANCE
lines: During Eradicate Protocol, Special Attacks are Passively Unblockable. Once Eradicate Protocol triggers, Nimrod's next Special Attack has the potency and duration of its effects increased by 9.9%.
As an Attacker, against a Mutant, Nimrod gains +1 Armor Up Buff when gaining a personal Armor Up. As a Defender, instead gain +1 Armor Up per Mutant on the Attacker's team.

cards.title: AS A DEFENDER
lines: When the Opponent fills a Bar of Power, inflict a Special Lock Passive for 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: SUPERIOR MUTANT HUNTING ROBOT
lines: Advanced Robotics provides Immunity to Bleed & Poison effects.
Incoming Armor Breaks cannot remove Nimrod's Armor Ups and suffer -100.0% reduced potency.
Attacks deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
Against Mutants, gain Immunity to Ability Accuracy Modification.

cards.title: ADAPTIVE PROTOCOLS
lines: Nimrod starts each fight in TITAN Protocol, and can swap to BLITZ Protocol. Swap Protocols every 11 seconds or when landing a 4th Light Attack.
At the start of each fight, and when the Protocol timer expires naturally, gain 1 Armor Up Buff. All personal Armor Ups grant +20.0 Armor Rating for 20 seconds.
Gain 1 Protocol Charge for each [TITAN] or [BLITZ] effect gained or inflicted during Nimrod's Special Attacks.
Gain 1 Protocol Charge when gaining an Armor Up effect, or when the Opponent gains a Prowess or Regeneration effect.
At 10 Protocol Charges, activate a Special Attack to launch ERADICATE Protocol for 16 seconds, combining the effects of both TITAN and BLITZ Protocols.

cards.title: TITAN PROTOCOL
lines: Reduce the damage of incoming Critical Hits by 20.0%. This potency is increased by 25.0% per active Armor Up effect.
When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, inflict a 40.0% Cowardice Debuff for 15 seconds.
Well-Timed Blocks grant 100.0 personal Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: BLITZ PROTOCOL
lines: Attacks gain +40.0 Attack Rating. This potency is increased by 25.0% per active Armor Up effect.
When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, inflict Power Drain Debuff, draining 150.0% of a Bar of Power over 15 seconds.
Attacks Invalidate 1 Prowess and remove 1 Regeneration effect, replacing each with a Shock Debuff dealing 20.0 Energy Damage over 1.5 seconds. This can trigger through Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: [TITAN]: Gain a non-stacking 54.0% Energize Buff for 25 seconds.
[BLITZ]: On hit, inflict a non-stacking -35.0 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 25 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: [TITAN]: Gain an Unstoppable Buff for 5 seconds, paused until the Special Attack ends.
[BLITZ]: Each hit inflicts a Shock Passive, dealing 185.0 Energy Damage over 2 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: [TITAN]: Gain non-stacking Self-Repair Passive healing 12.5% of missing Health over 15 seconds. This Self-Repair is lost if Nimrod is Stunned.
[BLITZ]: Deal a burst of up to 1200.0 Energy Damage based on the Opponent's missing Health.

signature.title: AERODYNAMIC
lines: Whenever Northstar would gain Momentum, gain a +4.3 Physical Resistance Passive for 6 seconds. Duration is increased by +3.0 seconds per Momentum. Max stacks: -1.
While a Physical Resistance effect is active, gain a Reinforce Passive, and incoming hits have 4.4% reduced Block Penetration.

cards.title: SPEED BURST
lines: Speed Burst starts the fight on cooldown for 24 seconds.

When the cooldown expires, activating a Special Attack during or after a Dash, Dash Attack, or after Punishing a Heavy or Special Attack activates Speed Burst for 12 seconds. Then it goes on cooldown again.
While Speed Burst is active, Northstar’s Special Attack costs are reduced by -25.0%.
Speed Burst is paused while Northstar is using a Dash, Medium Attack, Striker, or during either Champion’s Special Attacks.
As a Defender, Speed Burst activates immediately when the cooldown expires.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Light Attack Hits have a 30.0% to 10.0% chance to grant a Reverb Charge, scaling down with how many Charges he has.
Medium Attack Hits cause the cooldown for Speed Burst to briefly expire faster.
Against Skill Champions, the first hit of the second Medium Attack inflicts or refreshes a non-stacking Armor Break Debuff, lowering Armor Rating by -8.0 for 12 seconds.
While that Armor Break is active, the Opponent’s Critical Resistance is lowered by -80.0%. If it is Purified, Northstar gains 1 Reverb Charge.

cards.title: MOMENTUM
lines: Activating a Special Attack grants 100.0 indefinite Momentum per level of the Special Attack. When a Skill Opponent Evades, gain 1.0 Momentum.
The cooldown for Speed Burst is reduced by -300.0 seconds per Momentum.
As an Attacker with at least…
200.0 Momentum: Become Passively Unstoppable while performing a Dash or Dash Attack.
600.0 Momentum: If the first or second hits of a Special Attack hit the Opponent’s Block, become Passively Unblockable for 0.75 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: On activation, 100.0% chance to gain a 12.0% Prowess Buff per Momentum for 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
All Special Attack hits gain +30.0 Critical Rating during Speed Burst.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a Slow Passive for 10 seconds. Duration is increased by +4 seconds per Momentum.
Each hit has a 15.0% chance to pause personal Prowess and Reverb effects for 2 seconds. These pauses can stack, and expire one at a time.
Independently, if the hit was Critical, 100.0% chance to grant an additional pause.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit converts one Reverb Charge into a 12.0% Reverb Passive for 14 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
If the hit was Critical, gain 200.0 Reverb Passives instead.
Independently, if Speed Burst is active, converting a Reverb Charge has a 20.0% chance to grant an additional Reverb.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 800.0 Reverb Charges.
Once per fight, Northstar’s chance to trigger Prowess, Reverb, Reverb Charges, and pause effects is permanently increased by 200%.

synergy.note: If this Champion is a Herald, Special Attacks pause Nova’s Personal Fury and Unblockable Effects for 8 seconds and Heavy Attacks inflict a non-stacking Energy Vulnerability Debuff, lowering Energy Resistance by 20% for 12 seconds.

signature.title: THE HUMAN ROCKET
lines: Nova’s Medium Attacks gain up to 49.0 Bonus Attack Rating based on the distance travelled in the last executed dash.
At 75+ Nova Charges: Nova’s Auto Block triggers the Parry Mastery. This effect cannot interrupt Special Attacks.
The duration of Buffs is increased by 19.0%.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: When successfully striking opponents Nova has --30.0% Offensive Combat Power Rate.
While dashing forward, Nova passively gains up to 20.0% of a Bar of Power based on the distance travelled.
Nova’s Medium Attacks do not make Contact and deal Energy Damage.
Nova starts the fight with a permanent Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by 70.0. If Nullified, Removed, or prevented in any way this Buff goes on cooldown for 12 seconds.
When Nova is struck with True Strike, Unblockable, or guaranteed critical hits Opponents have -70.0% Attack Rating.

cards.title: WORLDMIND INTERVENTION
lines: While Nova has a Fury Buff active, being struck when dashing forward activates Auto-Block allowing Nova to automatically block incoming Basic Attacks. This does not count as a Well-Timed Block. Triggering this ability removes all Fury Buffs and consumes 25 Nova Charges.

cards.title: NOVA CHARGES
lines: Nova enters the fight at 0 Nova Charges and passively generates them over time. Nova Charges passively generate slower the more charges he has.
While dashing forward Nova generates additional Nova Charges. More Nova Charges are generated the farther he travels.
If struck with True Strike, an Unblockable attack, or a guaranteed critical hit, generate 5000.0 Nova Charges.
When one of Nova’s Buffs is Nullified, remove 2500.0 Charges, and prevent Nova Charges from being generated for 6 seconds.

cards.title: NOVA FORCE
lines: Nova’s Medium Attacks deals 33.0% of damage done as a burst of Energy Damage.
At 25.0+ Nova Charges: Nova’s Second Medium Attack deals an additional 22.0% of damage done as burst Energy Damage. Activating this ability consumes 25.0 Nova Charges.
At 50.0+ Nova Charges: Auto-Blocks can be triggered while Stunned. Activating this ability Purifies Stun Debuffs.
When reaching 75.0 Nova Charges: Gain a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by 32.0 for 10 seconds and refresh Nova's active Fury Buffs while below maximum stacks. Max 4 stacks.

When reaching 100.0 Nova Charges: Gain an Unblockable Buff for 3 seconds. This ability consumes 100.0 Nova Charges when this Buff expires, is Nullified, or prevented and prevents Nova Charges from being generated for 6 seconds.
Against Tech Champions, consuming Nova Charges inflicts an Armor Break Debuff reducing Armor by -20.0 for 24 seconds. This can only stack once.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: This attack pauses all Fury Buffs for 3.5 seconds.
Consume 25.0 Nova Charges to gain an Energize Buff increasing Combat Power Rate by 30.0% for 7 seconds.
If activated at 75+ Nova Charges, gain a True Strike Buff allowing Nova to ignore Armor, Resistances, Auto-Block and Evade effects for 7 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Gain a Nova Surge Buff granting +10000.0% additional Nova Charge generation for 9 seconds.

Consume up to 50.0 Nova Charges to deal up to 55.0% of damage done as burst Energy Damage with each hit of this attack. Potency of Energy Damage is increased by 100% while Nova has his personal Unblockable Buff Active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Consumes all Nova Charges and deals 0.5% of damage done as an additional burst of Energy for every Nova Charge consumed.
Re-activate Nova’s permanent Fury Buff if it is on cooldown.

synergy.note: When inflicted with a Shock effect, gain an indefinite Shock Resist Buff, increasing Shock Resistance by 50%.

signature.title: PROTECTOR OF NINE REALMS
lines: When either Odin or his Opponent is knocked down, if the Opponent has any of the following Buffs, Odin gains a corresponding Buff, lasting 10 second(s). Max 1 stack(s) each:
Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 10.0.
Armor Up Buff, increasing Armor Rating by 10.0.
Resist Physical Buff, increasing Physical Resistance by 7.5.
Resist Energy Buff, increasing Energy Resistance by 7.5.
Critical Resistance Buff, increasing Critical Resistance by 5.0.

cards.title: ODINSLEEP
lines: At the start of Odin’s first fight as an Attacker and every fight as a Defender, gain Odinsleep's effects.
When Odin’s teammates win a fight, at the start of Odin’s next fight, gain Odinsleep's effects.
Odinsleep grants an indefinite Aptitude Buff at the start of the fight, increasing the potency of Fury, Armor Up and Precision Buffs by 15.0%. Max 2 stack(s).

cards.title: ODINFORCE
lines: When either Odin or his Opponent are knocked down, gain an Odinforce Charge.
With 200.0 Odinforce Charge(s), the next attack with an Odinforce effect will consume all Odinforce Charges and trigger a bonus effect.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: On hit, gain an Energize Buff, increasing Combat Power Rate by 10.0% for 10 second(s). Max 1 stack(s).
Odinforce: On hit, gain an Energize Buff for each of Odin’s unique Buffs, increasing Combat Power Rate by 5.0% for 10 second(s). Max 5 stack(s).

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: While in striking distance, pause the duration of all Odin’s personal Buffs.
At the start of each fight, gain an indefinite Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 120.0. Max 2 stack(s).
At the start of each fight, gain an indefinite Armor Up Buff, increasing Armor Rating by 56.6. Max 2 stack(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a True Strike Buff, ignoring Armor, Resistances, Auto-Block and Evade effects for 10 second(s).
Odinforce: On activation, gain a Bulwark Buff, increasing Block Proficiency by 25.0 for 10 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, pause the duration of all Buffs on Odin until the Special Attack ends.
The last hit deals a burst of Direct Damage for each of Odin’s unique Buffs. Each dealing 2.75% of the Opponent's Max Health, up to 928.1.
Odinforce: On activation, refresh the duration of all personal Buffs on Odin.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a copy of all personal Buffs Odin has gained at any time during the fight.
Odinforce: Gain an Extend Buff, increasing the duration of all future Buffs by 25.0% for 15 second(s). Max 1 stack(s).

cards.title: ALL-FATHER ODIN’S VAULT
lines: Odin can place a Cross-Fight on the next fight from the pre-fight screen, the next teammate excluding Odin that enters the fight gains the Cross-Fight for the entire quest.
Thrudstok: Each fight, gain an indefinite Aptitude Buff, increasing the potency of Fury, Armor Up and Precision Buffs by 15.0%.

Draupnir: Each fight, gain an indefinite Protection Buff, preventing the loss of more than 15.0% of Max Health from a single source. This Buff is removed when struck by a Special 3 Attack and does not mitigate the damage.
Stormbreaker: Each fight, gain an indefinite Shock Resist Buff, increasing Shock Resistance by 90.0%.

signature.title: MIDNIGHT ANGEL
lines: Top-tier armaments grants 300.0 Ranks of the Deep Wounds Mastery, which is enhanced to include Shock Debuffs and inflict Instant Shocks.
While Okoye's Health Points are lower than her Opponent's, all Endurance and Precision Buffs on her expire -4.0% slower.

cards.title: ENHANCED DEXTERITY
lines: Elite Wakandan training grants 200.0 Ranks of the Dexterity Mastery.
Precision Buffs gained from Dexterity last +3 seconds and can stack up to 2000.0 times. Striking the Opponent only removes 1 Dexterity Precision Buff per hit.
Start each fight with 15 Dexterity Precision Buffs.
Medium Attacks grant 200.0 Dexterity Precision Buffs.
Avoiding an attack with Dexterity grants 300.0 Precision Buffs.

cards.title: MASTERY BONUS RANKS ABOVE MAX
lines: Any Mastery Ranks Okoye gains stack with any Ranks already invested. Additional Ranks beyond the Max Rank do not further increase the effectiveness of the Mastery.
For each Rank above Max, the benefits of the Opponent’s Suture, Coagulate, Serum Science, and Mystic Dispersion Masteries are reduced by -25.0%. Max: 100.0%.

cards.title: DEBUFFS AND CRITICAL DAMAGE MULTIPLIER
lines: Instead of increasing Critical Damage, Okoye’s Critical Damage Multiplier grants increased Debuff duration, excluding Stun. Okoye’s modified Debuff duration can be seen in brackets.
Dodging an attack inflicts the Opponent with a non-stacking Ensnare Debuff for 12 (18.0) seconds.

Critical Hits inflict a Bleed and Shock Debuff, dealing 12.0 Direct Damage and Energy Damage over -1 (4.5) seconds. Each time an Immunity prevents a Bleed or Shock Debuff, refresh 4.0 Bleed and 4.0 Shock Debuffs on the Opponent.

cards.title: COMBO SHIELD & COMBO METER
lines: Okoye starts each fight with an indefinite Combo Shield Passive.
Light Attacks grant +100.0 Combo Meter per hit.

When Okoye’s Combo Meter reaches 50.0, gain a 6000.0% Vicious Passive for 20 seconds which can’t re-trigger while active. While this Vicious is active, pause all Precision Buffs on Okoye. When this Vicious ends, Okoye’s Combo Meter is lost.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACK
lines: The final hit consumes -2000.0 Combo Meter to remove and re-inflict up to 10 personal Bleed or Shock Debuffs on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL AND HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit is a Guaranteed Critical Hit.
Critical Hits pause all Buffs on Okoye and all Debuffs on the Opponent, excluding Stun, for 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a non-stacking 6000.0% Endurance Buff for 14 seconds. While active, each time a Debuff on Okoye expires, gain +2.0 Combo Meter and 2.0 Dexterity Precision Buffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: For every 10.0% Max Health the Opponent is missing, this attack gains +20.0 Attack Rating and the Opponent Passively suffers -10% Ability Accuracy.

signature.title: LETHAL DOSE
signature.trigger: Passive - Opponent has 10 or more Death Spores
lines: Death Spores on the opponent deal 9.6 damage per second. This damage scales with Base Attack only.
Omega Red’s Basic Tentacle Hits have a 8.5% chance to be Unblockable.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: When striking with Tentacle Hits, reduce the damage of the Opponent's Passive Degeneration and Direct Damage effects by -100.0% for 0.20 second(s).

cards.title: DEATH FACTOR
lines: While near the opponent, Omega Red inflicts 1 Death Spore every 50.0 second(s) up to a maximum of 10. Once the opponent is out of range they lose 1 Death Spore every 0.1 second(s), unless they are suffering from a Degeneration Debuff. Death Spores are not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction.
Each Death Spore lowers the opponent’s Armor Rating by 5.0 and reduces their chance to Purify Debuffs by 10.0%.
Death Spores struggle to affect mechanical components and are inflicted 400.0 times slower against Robots.

cards.title: DEATH FIELD
lines: While Omega Red is suffering a Bleed Debuff or Passive, he emits the Death Field.

The Death Field causes Death Spores on nearby opponents to Passively Degenerate them, dealing 3.6 damage per second for each Death Spore on them. The Death Field is not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction and its damage scales with Base Attack only.
While the Death Field is active, the limit for Death Spores on the opponent increases to 3000.0.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflicts a Degeneration Debuff for 7 second(s), dealing 15.0 damage for each Death Spore on the opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Removes all Death Spores from the opponent to inflict Life Steal, Stealing 8.1 Health from the opponent for each Death Spore removed by this attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Omega Red emits the Death Field for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Removes all Death Spores from the opponent to inflict Essence Steal for 3 second(s), Passively Stealing both 14.0 Health and 3.3% of Current Power from the opponent for each Death Spore removed by this attack.

synergy.note: For each Armor Up consumed during a Special Attack, inflict an Armor Break Debuff reducing Armor Rating by 10% for the duration of that Special Attack.
Incinerate and Plasma Debuffs inflicted by Medium combo enders instantly Power Drain the Opponent for 5% of their Max Power.

signature.title: PRIME TECHNOLOGY
lines: Omega Sentinel gains 14.0 Passive Energy Resistance for each personal non-Damaging Debuff on the Opponent.
Omega Sentinel’s Special Attack 2 inflicts an additional Incinerate Debuff for each Prowess effect on the Opponent, up to a maximum of 5.
For each Armor Up that is consumed by a Special Attack, there is a 10.0% chance for Omega Sentinel to gain a new Armor Up.

cards.title: CYBERNETIC NANOTECH
lines: Omega Sentinel’s nanotech allows her to take no damage from Bleed and Poison effects and grants her immunity to the regen reduction from Poison.

When inflicted with a Bleed or Poison effect Omega Sentinel gains a Self-Repair Buff healing 20.0% of missing health over 10 seconds. This ability does not stack and ends early if Omega Sentinel is Stunned.

cards.title: INCINERATE
lines: All of Omega Sentinel’s Incinerate Debuffs deal 70.0 Energy damage over 6 seconds. Against Mutants, inflict an identical Plasma Debuff instead.

cards.title: NANO SHIFTING
lines: Omega Sentinel can rotate through Nanite Carapace, Electrostatic Pole and Plasma Wave weapons. When selected from the pre-fight screen, Omega Sentinel starts the fight with that Weapon active. Landing a Heavy Attack rotates her current Weapon.
Omega Sentinel’s second Medium Attack inflicts a Debuff that is determined by her current Weapon.
If the Opponent is inflicted with 3 or more of her personal non-Damaging Debuffs, she inflicts an Incinerate Debuff instead.
Nanite Carapace: Inflict a Cowardice Debuff, reducing Special Attack Damage by 10% for 8 seconds.
Electrostatic Pole: Inflict a Heal Block Debuff, preventing the Opponent from healing for 8 seconds.
Plasma Wave: Inflict a Tracking Debuff, bypassing the effects of Miss for 8 seconds.
Finishing a combo with a Light Attack or landing a Heavy Attack pauses all personal Debuffs on the Opponent for 7 seconds.

cards.title: ADAPTIVE BODY
lines: Omega Sentinel’s Adaptive Body grants her Immunity to Nullify, Stagger and Fateseal effects. Against Mutants, her Ability Accuracy cannot be modified.

Gain an indefinite Armor Up Buff whenever either champion makes contact with the same Basic Attack twice in a row, increasing her Armor rating by 30.0. Gain an additional Armor Up against Mutants. Max 10 Stacks.

When Omega Sentinel would be struck at 10 or more Armor Up Buffs, consume all Armor Ups, Purify any Stun Debuffs and gain a 100% chance to Auto-Block for 2 seconds. This Auto-Block can trigger Parry. As a Defender this ability requires 500.0 Armor Ups instead.
When Omega Sentinel's Auto-Block timer starts, inflict an Incinerate Debuff. Against Mutants, inflict an identical Plasma Debuff instead.
When Struck by a Heavy Hit while Auto-Blocking, gain a 100% chance to Resist a Block Break.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: When activated, all of Omega Sentinel’s personal Debuffs are paused for the duration of the Special Attack and for 2 seconds afterwards.

On contact, consume up to 5 Armor Ups, increasing the duration of all Debuffs inflicted or refreshed by this Special Attack by 1 second per Armor Up consumed. All Debuffs triggered by Special Attacks can trigger through Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The last hit refreshes all personal non-Damaging Debuffs on the Opponent. If there are no Debuffs to refresh, instead inflict 2 Debuffs with the type and potency determined by Omega Sentinel’s current Weapon for 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The last hit inflicts an Incinerate Debuff on the Opponent, and an additional one for each personal non-Damaging Debuff on the opponent. Against Mutants, inflict an identical Plasma Debuff instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: On activation, consume all personal Incinerate and Plasma Debuffs on the Opponent. Deal a burst of 200.0 Energy Damage for each Debuff consumed.
If the opponent is not inflicted with any personal Incinerate or Plasma Debuffs, instead inflict 6 Incinerate Debuffs. Against Mutants, inflict an identical Plasma Debuff instead.

signature.title: PURE PSIONIC ENTITY
lines: Onslaught can Block Unblockable Special Attacks from Skill Champions.
Daunted Potency is increased by 3.0%.
For each non-Damaging Debuff or personal non-Damaging Passive on the Opponent, Onslaught’s Special Attacks gain +0.1 Block Penetration.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: First Light and first Medium Attacks do not make contact with the Opponent.
Incoming Bleed, Incinerate, and Shock potency is reduced by -150.0%.
Onslaught’s Debuffs gain 50.0% increased Ability Accuracy against Skill Champions.
If a personal Debuff or the Stun from the Parry Mastery is Purified or prevented due a Debuff Immunity, re-inflict the Debuff as a Passive.

cards.title: CRUSH
lines: When the Opponent’s Combo Meter passes a multiple of 1000.0, gain a non-stacking Crush Charge. When starting an attack consume the Charge and inflict a Crush Debuff for 3 seconds. When struck by a Special Attack the Crush Charge is removed.

cards.title: DAUNTED
lines: When either Champion Well-Timed Blocks, inflict an indefinite Daunted Debuff of 15.0% potency. Max: -1.
While Daunted is active, Onslaught disables the Opponent's Willpower Mastery.

cards.title: NEUROSHOCK
lines: Either Champion’s attacks have 15.0% chance to inflict a Neuroshock Passive, dealing 16.0 Energy Damage over 12 seconds. Critical Hits and Unblockable Special Hits have their chance increased by +-1% flat, or double against Skill Champions.
If Onslaught is the Defender, Dodging backward removes one Neuroshock. #Metal Champions cannot remove Neuroshocks. This effect has a 2.5 second cooldown.
While suffering from Shock, Incinerate, Plasma, or Coldsnap, inflict a Neuroshock every 100.0 second.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit pauses all personal Damaging effects for 1.5 seconds. If the Opponent is not suffering from a Stun Debuff, inflict a Daunted Debuff and the pause lasts for 1000.0 seconds instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit has a 100% chance plus a flat 50.0% chance to inflict a personal Neuroshock Passive, and an Organic Magnetism Debuff of 2.6% potency for 16 seconds. These can be inflicted through Block. Max: -1.
While Organic Magnetism is active, this Special costs -33.0% less Power and is more likely to be activated.
If the duration of Organic Magnetism Debuff is reduced by any means, on expiration it re-inflicts itself as a Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, inflict a Delirium Debuff of 30.0% potency for the duration of the Special. This will not trigger when fighting an Opponent with #Psychic Shielding.
On hit, replace all Neuroshocks with Degeneration Passives, each dealing 65.0 Direct Damage over 6 seconds. On the first hit of this Special, this effect can trigger through Block. Max -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Stun Passive for 3 seconds.
This Special cost 4.5% less Power for each personal Neuroshock on the Opponent, to a max of 33% less Power.
Inflict 2000.0 Neuroshock Passives and refresh all existing stacks.

synergy.note: Knocking down the Opponent grants a non-stacking +100 Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds.

signature.title: TO ACT IS TO BE COMMITTED
lines: Personal Precision Passives gain 10.0% increased potency.

Each Debuff on Patriot grants 4.9 Block Proficiency. Against Science Champions, Patriot's Block Proficiency cannot be reduced below where this ability would set it, and the Opponent's Block Penetration is locked to 0.

cards.title: GET BACK UP AGAIN
lines: Incoming Weakness effects and the potency of the Opponent's Inequity Mastery suffer -76.0% reduced potency.
For each Debuff on Patriot, he gains +13.0 Attack Rating. Max Benefit at 7.0 Debuffs.
Patriot gains an indefinite Steadfast Passive while suffering from at least 500.0 non-Damaging Debuffs. Against Science Champions, this threshold is reduced to -1.
Patriot's Base Regeneration Rate is 44.0% and cannot be lowered further.
While a Science Opponent has a Fury Passive active and Patriot is Blocking, he inflicts a 40.0% Weakness Passive. This Weakness gains up to 100.0% increased potency based on Patriot’s missing health.

cards.title: PRODIGIOUS TACTICIAN
lines: Patriot gains an additional hit in his Combo Meter when striking the Opponent or their Block with a Light Attack or when Blocking an attack.
As a Defender, Patriot starts each fight with an indefinite Combo Shield Passive.
When either Champion Well-Timed Blocks, Patriot gains a Vigilance Passive for 3 seconds.
If a personal Precision is not active, knocking down the Opponent grants Patriot a +40.0 Precision Passive for 5 seconds.
Personal Precision effects allow Patriot to land Critical Hits into Block and pause for 0.5 seconds when the Opponent or their Block is struck.

cards.title: HEROIC RESOLVE
lines: Resolve Debuffs are indefinite and have no effect. Max stacks: -1.
When the Combo Meter rises past a multiple of 10, Patriot gains one Resolve Debuff and increases his Critical Damage Rating by +8.0 for the rest of the fight.
Whenever a non-Damaging Debuff on Patriot other than Resolve ends for any reason, gain one Resolve Debuff.
When Patriot is struck by the final hit of a Special Attack, he loses one Resolve, or two against Mutants.

cards.title: SUDDEN REVERSAL
lines: As a Defender, when Patriot would be struck by a Basic Attack, he consumes 700.0 Resolve to execute a Reversal.
When Reversing, gain a non-stacking Fury Passive, increasing Attack Rating by +150.0 for 12 seconds.

As an Attacker, if Patriot would be struck by a Basic Attack while charging a Heavy Attack, he consumes -1 Resolve to execute a Reversal and gain two personal Precision Passives, and his Fury gains 87.0% increased duration.
Patriot’s Heavy can be charged for an extended duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each of the four hits grant +300.0 additional Combo Meter.
For each multiple of 10 the Combo Meter passed during this attack, the final hit inflicts one 25.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 30 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If this attack is activated while the Opponent is standing up after a Reversal, it is Passively Unblockable, and personal Fury and Precision Passives are paused during the Special and for 8 seconds after.
Projectile hits inflict 70.0 Rupture Debuffs for 6.5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: The first three times this attack is used, Patriot reduces the number of Resolve Debuffs consumed by his Reversal by 1 for the rest of the fight.
Refresh personal Fury and Precision Passives.

synergy.note: While the Sync-Shield is active, Peni can trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks.
Whenever Incinerates is prevented by an immunity, she inflicts a Shocks.
While the Sync-Shield is active, become Stun Immune.

signature.title: TEENAGE WEAPON
lines: When the Opponent fills a bar of Power or recovers more than 5.0% of Max Health at once, inflict a Heal Block Passive, preventing the Opponent from healing for 2 second(s).

Whenever the Opponent Heals while Heal Blocked, inflict an instant Incinerate dealing 5.0% of the Health they would have gained as Energy Damage. If the Salve Mastery is active, the Mastery is removed.

cards.title: SP//DR SUIT
lines: Immune to Poison and Incinerate Effects due to Oscorp’s cutting-edge SP//dr Suit technology.
Opponent's True Strike, True Accuracy, and True Sense effects suffer --100.0% Ability Accuracy.
When the Opponent fills a bar of Power, gain +100.0 Spider-Sense charge(s), up to 10 charge(s). Any additional charges last for 22.0 second(s). Charges cannot be prevented by Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: SYNC-SHIELD
lines: Peni starts the fight with an active Sync-Shield. The Sync-Shield’s max strength is based on her Opponent’s Attack Rating. This ability is not affected by Class Advantage. While fighting as Defender, max strength is increased by 100.0%.
When Peni would take damage from a Blocked or Auto-Blocked Hit, the Sync-Shield takes up to 100.0% of the damage instead.
When the Sync-Shield runs out of strength, it goes on cooldown for 20 seconds, after which it reactivates at max strength.

cards.title: SYNC-SHIELD
lines: SPIDER-PROTOCOL: When Peni would be Struck, +8.0% chance per Spider-Sense charge to consume 4.0 charges, purifying any Stun Debuffs and gaining 100% chance to Auto-Block for 2 second(s). This does not trigger Parry and cannot be prevented by Ability Accuracy.

When Peni would Auto-Block a Hit, Burn 25.0% of a bar of Power and inflict Direct Damage proportionate to the amount lost. This ability cannot be prevented by Ability Accuracy. All personal Power Burn Effects scale with Base Attack only.
When Blocking or Auto-Blocking a Hit, Peni cannot be Stunned and Locks the Opponent’s Power.
When Peni would be Struck by a Heavy Hit while Auto-Blocking, gain 100.0% chance to Resist a Block Break.
When performing a Well-Timed Block, gain 6.0% of a bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: SPIDER-PROTOCOL: With 11.0+ Spider-Sense charges on activation, inflict a Power Burn Debuff during this Special Attack, burning 75.0% of a bar of Power over 6 second(s).
After activation, gain +400.0 Spider-Sense charges. Additionally, if the Opponent fills a bar of Power during this Special Attack, gain +3 bonus Spider-Sense charges.
The first hit doesn’t grant Power and Burns 25.0% of a bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, pause the duration of all Spider-Sense charges until the Special Attack ends.
Each Web Shooter hit inflicts an instant Incinerate, dealing 12.0 Energy Damage for each Spider-Sense charge.

SPIDER-PROTOCOL: With 8.0+ Spider-Sense charges, the last hit consumes all charges inflicting an Incinerate Debuff per charge, each dealing 135.0 Energy Damage over 8 second(s). Incinerate also removes Perfect Block chance and lowers Block Proficiency by 50%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Power Burn Debuff, burning 150.0% of a bar of Power over 15 seconds.
If the Sync-Shield's on cooldown, it’s restored at 100.0% strength. Add a flat 50% to the Sync-Shield’s current strength. Max 200.0% strength.

synergy.note: When the Stun from Cosmic Flame Aura fails due to Immunity, gain an indefinite Untouchable Passive. This is removed when Phoenix stops charging her Heavy or a Special Attack is activated.

signature.title: THE ETERNAL PHOENIX
lines: 50.0% chance to start each fight with an indefinite Rite of the Phoenix Charge.
Each of Phoenix’s personal Fury Buffs, up to 6, reduces the Opponent’s Auto Block Ability Accuracy by -19.6%.
When Phoenix starts a fight with exactly 60%, 40%, or 20% of her Maximum Health, she gains a Regeneration Buff healing 20.0% of her Max Health over 30 seconds.

cards.title: PHOENIX FORCE
lines: The uncontrollable Phoenix Force provides Immunity to Incinerate, Power Drain, Power Burn, Power Lock, Special Lock, and Heal Block.

When Phoenix strikes her Opponent with a Light or Medium Attack, she gains a Phoenix Force Charge lasting 0.7 seconds, paused during Strikers, Striker Openings, Phoenix's Special Attack 2, and Cosmic Flame Aura. They are refreshed whenever she gains another.

When the Parry Mastery activates, but does not Stun the Opponent, Phoenix gains 400.0 Phoenix Force Charges, reduced by 1 for each consecutive trigger (Minimum: -1) and all Charges expire 75.0% slower until one is gained from another source.
When one or more Phoenix Force Charges expire naturally, they become a Regeneration Buff healing 0.4% of Phoenix’s Max Health per Charge over 6 seconds.

cards.title: CHARGING HEAVY ATTACK
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack after landing any non-Combo-Ending Basic Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for a fixed 2.5 seconds, removed when the Opponent is struck. Unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
Charging her Heavy Attack triggers Phoenix’s Cosmic Flame Aura for 2.5 seconds, if it is not already active. When triggered this way, it ends early if Phoenix stops charging her Heavy Attack.
Over the course of its duration, while the Opponent is near, Cosmic Flame Aura inflicts a number of Incinerate Debuffs equal to 1 plus the number of active Phoenix Force Charges when it started.
Each Incinerate deals 10.0 Energy Damage over 30 seconds. Max stacks: -1. When one is replaced due to the stack limit, inflict an Instant Incinerate with triple the potency.
While the Aura is active, Phoenix’s Combat Power Rate is reduced by -100.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ECHO
lines: Finishing the Special Attack grants a Special Echo Buff for 60 seconds, paused during Phoenix’s Special Attacks. Does not stack as a Defender.
Activating Special Attack 1 or 2 with 300.0 or more Special Echoes grants Phoenix an Unblockable Buff for the duration of the attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a +15.0 Fury Buff, plus an additional one for every 5 Incinerates on the Opponent. Max stacks: -1.
These Buffs last 3 seconds and expire one at a time, but are paused while Phoenix does not have 3 Bars of Power.
Special Echo: Gain a Power Gain Buff granting 125.0% of a Bar of Power over 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit of the fiery vortex grants 100.0 Phoenix Force Charge.
Landing the final hit activates Cosmic Flame Aura for 4 seconds. After ending, Phoenix Force Charges expire 75% slower until a new one is gained.
Special Echo: When Cosmic Flame Aura would expire naturally, reactivate it 100.0 time.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Once per fight, gain an indefinite Rite of the Phoenix Charge if not already active. The Charge is consumed when Phoenix would be Knocked Out to gain an Immortality Buff and a Regeneration Buff healing 20.0% of her Max Health, each lasting -1 seconds.
Consume all personal Fury Buffs, Power Gain Buffs, and Phoenix Force Charges.
Special Echo (Consume): Gain a Regeneration Buff for 10 seconds, healing 0.3% of Max Health per Fury and Power Gain consumed.

signature.title: THE FULL SPECTRUM
lines: Photon's improved control over the Electromagnetic Spectrum grants her Immunity to all Neutralize effects.
For every Debuff on the Opponent, their Block Proficiency is reduced by 9.9 and Photon's is increased by half as much.
Photon has a 13.4% chance to inflict one of her personal Energy Vulnerability Debuffs on the Opponent when struck by or Blocking a Light Attack.

cards.title: LIVING ENERGY
lines: When Stunned, Photon loses control of her solid form and gains a 100.0% Untouchable Passive for 2.5 seconds. If an Opponent Misses during this effect, it goes on cooldown for -1 seconds.
Photon's altered body composition grants her Immunity to all Bleed and Power Steal effects.
Photon can trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks, and all of her attacks deal Energy Damage.
Whenever the Opponent is inflicted with a Debuff, Photon inflicts a non-stacking 80.0% Petrify Passive for 0.5 seconds.
If the Opponent has the Willpower Mastery active, it is removed.

cards.title: BASIC ATTACKS
lines: Photon's Medium Attacks cannot Miss.
Both Champions' first Medium Attack inflicts a 10.0% Suppression Debuff on Photon's Opponent for 5 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Photon's first and third Light Attacks inflict a -15.0 Energy Vulnerability Debuff for 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
The first hit of either Champion's Heavy Attack inflicts a non-stacking Sunder Debuff on Photon's Opponent for 15 seconds.

cards.title: ELECTROMAGNETIC CHARGES
lines: Photon gains Electromagnetic Charges in various ways that persist between fights. Max stacks: 2500.0
+1 Charge when the Opponent is inflicted with a Debuff, or when the Opponent activates a Special Attack.
+400.0 Charges when the Opponent Misses. Cooldown: 3 seconds.

cards.title: PURE LIGHT FORM
lines: While at 10.0 Charges or more, Dodging back and holding Block for 120.0 seconds or being knocked down pushes Photon into her Pure Light Form and grants the following effects. This happens automatically at max Charges, or when Photon activates a Special Attack with at least -1 Charges as a Defender.
Gain an indefinite Fury Passive for every 5 Charges, each increasing Attack by +25.0.
Photon cannot Miss, and personal Debuffs expire -50.0% more slowly.
Photon cannot gain Electromagnetic Charges and each Charge lasts 0.9 seconds, falling off one at a time. All effects are removed when Charges fall to zero.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: While in Pure Light Form, Photon's Special Attacks cannot be avoided with the Dexterity Mastery.
Electromagnetic Charges pause during the Opponent's Special Attacks, and for 3 seconds when Photon punishes the Opponent's Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a 10.0% Overload Debuff for 8 seconds. If Pure Light Form is active, inflict an additional Overload Debuff. Max stacks: -1.
In Pure Light Form, the final hit is Passively Unblockable except against Well-Timed Blocks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a Taunt Debuff for 10 seconds.
In Pure Light Form, this attack is Passively Unblockable, Electromagnetic Charges are paused for the duration, and Photon gains a 100% Untouchable Passive for 3 seconds after the final hit.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Max stacks of Electromagnetic Charges increases by 500.0 until the end of the fight. This effect can occur -1 times.
If at or above -1 Charges, gain a non-stacking Regeneration Passive, healing 6.0 Health over 8 seconds. This Passive pauses for 0.5 seconds when the Opponent is struck.

signature.title: MARTYR OF DEATH
lines: Increase the base potency of Phyla’s Resonance Buff by +0.0%.
While suffering from an Energy Damaging effect against non-Mystic Opponents, Phyla gains 300.0 Oblivion Energy per second.

Defeating an Opponent with Phyla’s Special Attack 2 or 3 grants Phyla an additional 0.0 (rounded up) Oblivion Energy at the start of her next fight. If the defeated Opponent was the Avatar of Life, Adam Warlock, this value is doubled.

cards.title: THE AVATAR OF OBLIVION
lines: Phyla’s hybrid Kree and artificial Eternal physiology causes her attacks to deal Energy Damage, grants Immunity to Poison, Special Lock, in addition to taking no damage from Power Burn effects.
Phyla’s Offensive Combat Power Rate is reduced by --10.0% and cannot be reduced further while fighting Tech Champions.
Phyla’s Ability Power Rate cannot be reduced below 100.0% by non-Mystic Champions.
Phyla’s Special Attack hits deal True Damage against non-Mystic Champions.

cards.title: PRECISION CHAIN
lines: The first hit of a Basic Combo and Combo-Enders grant a +20.0 Precision Buff for 3.5 seconds, paused during Strikers, Special Attacks, and Phyla’s Heavy Attack. These are refreshed when gaining a new one.
Interrupting any attack with a Light or Medium Attack causes the following non-Combo-Ending hits in the 5-hit Combo to grant a personal Precision Buff.
Dodging an attack with the Dexterity Mastery grants a personal Precision instead. Cooldown: 0.3 seconds.
As a Defender, when Phyla is struck by the same Basic Attack twice in a row, she gains a personal Precision Buff.
While at or above 3 personal Precisions, gain an Undermine Buff.
While at or above 5 personal Precisions, Phyla’s Special Attacks have 100.0% Critical Hit chance.

cards.title: OBLIVION ENERGY
lines: When Phyla gains a Buff, she gains -1 Oblivion Energy. As a Defender, this becomes 300.0 Oblivion Energy instead.
Overstacking personal Precisions Buffs grant 100.0 additional Oblivion Energy.
When Phyla breaks her Opponent’s Auto-Block while Undermine is active, she gains 1000.0 Oblivion Energy. Cooldown: 2 seconds.
When Phyla has her Power Drained or Burned, she gains up to 5000.0 Oblivion Energy for every Bar of Power lost.

cards.title: UNLEASH OBLIVION
lines: Releasing Heavy Attack Unleashes Oblivion. As a Defender, Phyla instead Unleashes Oblivion upon reaching 100 Oblivion Energy. Unleashing Oblivion consumes all Oblivion Energy to grant:

A non-stacking 0.0% dormant Resonance which becomes an active Buff during Phyla’s next Special Attack. For every 10 Oblivion Energy consumed, this Resonance gains 2000.0% base potency. As a Defender, this Resonance instead has 50% base potency.
A 0.75 second Power Gain Buff, granting 6.7% of Max Power for every 10.0 Oblivion Energy consumed, up to -1% of Max Power. While active, Phyla is Immune to Power Drain and Power Burn.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: This Special Attack consumes all of Phyla’s Power at the time of activation, granting Oblivion Energy based on the amount of Power consumed, up to 20.0 per Bar of Power. If activated while above 2 Bars of Power, grant up to 30.0 Oblivion Energy per Bar instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This Special Attack can only be activated while Phyla has her dormant Resonance.
Cancelling into this Special Attack after the second hit of Phyla’s Heavy Attack grants +20.0 Attack Rating for the duration of the Special.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack gains +8.2 Attack Rating for each Buff on Phyla. If the Opponent is at or below 5% of their Max Health, instead deal a burst of Direct Damage equal to 5% of the Opponent’s Max Health.
Once per fight, Phyla’s personal Precisions have their duration increased by 20.0%.

synergy.note: Backing up to the left wall begins a 30 second timer. If the Opponent hits the right wall within that time, gain a +50% Fury Passive for 20 seconds. The timer cannot restart until it has failed or the Fury has ended.

signature.title: HEART AND SOUL
lines: While Skill Opponents are suffering from Pixie’s personal Neuroshocks, they cannot Evade.
When Pixie would gain a Soul Wisp while her personal Prowess are active, there is a 0.0% chance to gain an additional Prowess lasting for the time remaining on her Prowess.
As a Defender, for each active Special Attack Cooldown, Pixie has a 20.0% chance to cast Mists of Morpheus and Evade incoming Basic Attacks.

cards.title: MUTANT PIXIE DREAM GIRL
lines: If Pixie’s personal Debuffs are Purified, they are re-inflicted as Passives. If the Stun from the Parry Mastery is Purified, inflict a Stun Passive for 1.5 seconds. These abilities do not work against Cleanse effects.
Pixie’s personal non-Damaging Debuffs and the Parry Mastery cannot have their durations modified.
Pixie’s Heavy Attack can be charged for an extended duration.
Skill Opponents have their True Accuracy Ability Accuracy lowered by 100% and cannot lower Pixie’s personal Evade Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: SPELLCASTING
lines: Pixie can perform various actions to cast Spells. Special Attacks count as Spells. All Spells have Cooldowns which prevent them from being activated.
As an Attacker, Special Attack Spells start on Cooldown.
Either Champion’s Light Attacks shorten Pixie’s active Cooldowns by -1 second.
As an Attacker, casting Spells grants Pixie Soul Wisps which enhance Special Attacks 2 and 3. Max Soul Wisps: -1.

cards.title: GRANT 2: COUNTER-EVADE - MISTS OF MORPHEUS
lines: While charging a Heavy Attack, when Pixie would be struck by a Basic Attack or the final hit of a Special Attack, she casts Mists of Morpheus and Evades. This also occurs when she is struck by a Combo-Ending Attack.
When Pixie Evades, she Counter-Attacks.
Her Evade inflicts a non-stacking 31.5 Neuroshock Debuff for 14 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
As an Attacker, her Counter-Attack inflicts a Sleep Passive for 1.6 seconds.

cards.title: GRANT 2: HEAVY ATTACK - OSHTUR’S REFUSAL
lines: The first hit casts a non-stacking Oshtur’s Refusal Debuff, reducing the potency of the Opponent’s Shock and Bleed effects by 90.0% for 15 seconds, paused during the Opponent's Special Attacks.
As a Defender, a non-stacking Oshtur’s Refusal Passive is cast when Pixie’s Opponent crosses a Bar of Power. When cast this way, it does not have a Cooldown.

cards.title: GRANT 4: SPECIAL ATTACK 1 - SLICES OF SERAPHIM
lines: Each hit inflicts a 51.5 Neuroshock Passive for 2.5 seconds. These Neuroshocks scale with Pixie’s Special Damage. As a Defender, these instead scale with Base Attack only.

cards.title: GRANT 6: SPECIAL ATTACK 2 - SIHAL NOVARUM CHINOTH
lines: On activation, gain a -50.0% Power Efficiency Passive for the duration of this Special Attack.

On activation, convert all Soul Wisps into +15.0% Prowess Passives for 20 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. These cannot expire during Pixie’s Special Attacks. While active, Pixie cannot gain Soul Wisps.

cards.title: GRANT 1: SPECIAL ATTACK 3 - PIXIE DUST
lines: Gain a -33.0% Power Efficiency Passive for the duration of this Special Attack.
Consume all Soul Wisps to increase Pixie’s Attack Rating by +51.5 per Soul Wisp consumed for the duration of this Special.

signature.title: KRAKOAN SOVEREIGNTY
lines: While below 7500.0 Channeling Charge(s), gain 1 Charge(s) per second. While Defending, this rate is doubled and Charges are gained for the entire fight.
Gain up to +10.0% Prowess Potency, scaling with the Opponent’s Power Meter.

cards.title: MUTATION
lines: Professor X’s first Medium Attack is the only Basic Attack that makes contact with his Opponent. All of Professor X’s attacks are Psychic and deal Energy Damage.
Immune to Reversed Controls due to his mastery over Telepathy.

cards.title: FALTER
lines: When Professor X would be struck by a Basic Attack, he inflicts a Falter Passive, giving the Opponent’s attacks a 100% chance to Miss for 2 second(s). This ability has a 2000.0 second cooldown but starts on a 10.0 second cooldown.
When the Opponent lands a Special Attack, Falter is removed.
Avoiding an attack while Dodging backwards during Falter’s cooldown reduces the duration by 100.0 second(s).

cards.title: PERSISTENT CEREBRO CHARGES
lines: Start each Quest with 100.0 Cerebro Charge(s).
Gain 100.0 Cerebro Charge(s) when Professor X wins a fight.
Cerebro Charges increase the potency of Professor X’s Synergies.

cards.title: CHANNELING
lines: Professor X channels his telepathic abilities, gaining 1000.0 Channeling Charge(s) per second at the end of his Special 1 and 2 Attacks and while charging his Heavy Attack.
When Power Burned or Drained, lose 5000.0 Channeling Charge(s).
While at 2500.0+ Channeling Charges, Professor X cannot be Evaded and gains a Vigilance Passive, allowing Attacks to bypass Miss. This will not trigger against Techs or those with #Psychic Shielding.

While at 5000.0+ Channeling Charges, using the fourth Light Attack inflicts Mind Control on the Opponent. When activating a Special Attack with 100 Channeling Charge(s), automatically inflict Mind Control.

cards.title: CHANNELING
lines: Complete Channel or Cancel by Heavy Attacking: Gain +10.0 Channeling Charge(s).
Cancel by Blocking, Charging a Heavy Attack or using a Light, Medium or Special Attack: Gain a Prowess Buff increasing Special Attack Damage by 40.0% for 36 second(s).
Cancel by Dashing Backwards: Refresh the duration of all Prowess Effects on Professor X.

cards.title: MIND CONTROL
lines: Mind Control lasts 0.5 second(s) for every 1000.0 Channeling Charge(s).
The Opponent is Locked from gaining Power or using any of their Special Attacks.
Mind Control's duration is paused during Professor X’s Special Attacks, except while Channeling.
