Professor X’s Special Attacks are Unblockable and cost up to 7000.0% less Power based on the number of Channeling Charges. Reduced to 40% against Techs or those with #Psychic Shielding.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain 2500.0 Channeling Charge(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The last three hits deal a burst of 80.0 Energy Damage. This ability scales with Special Attack Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Prowess Buff for each Cerebro Charge, increasing Special Attack Damage by 60.0% and lasting 40 second(s). Max 4.0 stack(s).

synergy.note: Punishing the Opponent’s Special Attacks grants a +300 Cruelty Passive for 10 seconds.
If the Opponent is not Faltered, Prowler has a 20% chance to Evade Basic Attacks while not Blocking.
Personal Power Drain becomes a Power Burn, dealing 3.5% of Attack as Direct Damage for every 1% of Max Power Burned.
Can activate a Pre-Fight Ability granting Immunity to Reverse Controls, but controls are inverted for the whole fight.

signature.title: COURTESY OF THE PROWLER
lines: While the Opponent is Faltered, Prowler gains +20.0 Critical Rating.
While Prowler has at least 30 Fury effects, his Special Attacks are Passively Unblockable.

cards.title: PROWLER'S SUIT
lines: Custom-made flak armor grants Immunity to Bleed and Incinerate, and increases Prowler’s Block Proficiency during the Opponent’s Special Attacks by +35.0.
Unyielding, unrelenting. Prowler is Immune to Falter and has 115% Ability Accuracy.
Prowler does not benefit from the Collar Tech Mastery. Instead, he gains +20.0 Critical Damage Rating for each rank invested.

cards.title: PNEUMATIC GAUNTLETS
lines: Medium Attacks are non-contact pneumatic blasts that cannot be Evaded.
When Prowler would land a Critical Hit, he instead inflicts a Rupture Passive dealing the Critical Damage the hit would have dealt as Physical Damage over 1 second.

cards.title: GAS PELLETS
lines: Prowler’s second Medium Attack inflicts a Falter Passive for 3 seconds, paused during his Special Attacks, which can not be inflicted if the Opponent is already Faltered. If it causes a Miss, it goes on cooldown for 10 seconds.
If Prowler’s Special Attacks would be Punished, he inflicts a Falter Passive for 1 second.
While the Opponent is Faltered, they are more aggressive.

cards.title: POWER CREEP
lines: After the Opponent activates a Special Attack, Power Drain their remaining Power and inflict a Power Lock Passive lasting for 1.5 seconds after the final hit of their attack.
For every 1.1% of the Opponent’s Max Power that is Drained or Burned, gain 1 Power Creep Charge.
On Prowler’s Special Attack activation, each Charge is converted into a Fury Passive granting +4.0 Attack Rating for 10 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. Max stacks: 30.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Landing a Heavy Attack against an Opponent with 0 Power causes the final 4 hits to inflict a non-stacking Incinerate Debuff dealing 150.0 Energy Damage over 20 seconds.
If a personal Rupture expires on an Incinerated Opponent, it explodes, dealing a burst of 45.0 Physical Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a Pursuit Passive for 30 seconds.
The final hit inflicts a Taunt Debuff for 4 seconds.
This Special Attack does not grant Power to the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit refreshes and pauses all personal Ruptures until the final hit of this Special Attack.
Each hit inflicts a Rupture Passive dealing 20.0 Physical Damage over 1 second.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Prowler ditches the niceties and Overcharges his gauntlets until the end of his next Special Attack.

While Overcharged, Prowler gains +50% Combat Power Rate, but cannot activate Special Attacks 2 or 3. Additionally, Power Creep Charges are not removed on conversion, and new Fury Passives do not count towards the cap.
As an Attacker, grant the Opponent a 100% Power Efficiency Passive for 30 seconds.

synergy.note: Heavy Attack inflicts a non-stacking Incinerate Debuff dealing 120% of Attack as Energy Damage over 15 seconds.

signature.title: OPEN WOUNDS
lines: Whenever a Bleed Debuff on the Opponent expires, there is a 25.0% chance to inflict a 28.9 Bleed Passive for 2 seconds. These Bleeds scale with Base Attack only.
While Punisher’s Precision is active, the chance of this effect is increased by a flat +100.0%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Punisher doesn’t have time to bleed. He has -40.0% Bleed Resistance and is Immune to Wither.
For every 20% Health either Champion is missing, Punisher gains an indefinite -20.0% Endurance Passive. Max stacks: -1.

When Punisher is cornered, Punishes a Special Attack, or Intercepts an Opponent, he gains a Grit Passive for 2 seconds. This Grit will not trigger against Mutants, and is paused while cornered and when an Opponent or their Block is hit.
Punisher’s Light Attacks can Critically Hit through Block.

cards.title: MAKE THEM BLEED
lines: Punisher’s Critical Hits inflict a 33.0 Bleed Debuff for 8 seconds. As a Defender, this effect scales with Base Attack only.
Against Science Champions, the Ability Accuracy of Punisher’s personal Bleed effects cannot be reduced.

When the Opponent is inflicted with 8 or more Bleed effects at once, inflict a 50.0% Bleed Vulnerability Passive for 15 seconds and remove and re-inflict all of Punisher’s personal Bleed Debuffs on them. This will not trigger while already active.

cards.title: PAIN TOLERANCE
lines: Each time a Champion or their Block is hit by a first or third Light Attack, Punisher gains an indefinite +7.0 Physical Resistance Passive. Max stacks: -1.
Striking Punisher with a second Medium Attack removes 100.0 stack of Physical Resistance. Mutants remove 1 extra stack.

As an Attacker, when Punisher would gain a personal Physical Resistance, he has a 3.0% chance per Physical Resistance to gain a non-stacking +50.0 Fury Passive for 4 seconds, paused during Punisher’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: INDESTRUCTIBLE PUNISHER
lines: Every 33% Max Health lost, the stubborn Punisher gains an Indestructible Passive for 4 seconds, unaffected by Ability Accuracy. The first two Health thresholds can only be triggered once per Quest.
Punisher’s Indestructible will not trigger and is removed if he is Marked.

If this Indestructible triggers during a Mutant’s Special Attack, the Indestructible is delayed until a second after their Special Attack ends, unless they are a #Villain. A delayed Indestructible lasts for 1 second instead of 4.
As a Defender, his personal Indestructible is paused unless either Champion or their Block is hit. The effect is not paused if a Mutant has a Regeneration effect.
While Indestructible, Punisher's attacks become Guaranteed Critical Hits and he can land Critical Hits through Block.

cards.title: FIGHT WITH IMPACT
lines: The first hit of a Special Attack grants Punisher a +5.0 Impact Passive for every Physical Resistance he has active. These last for 20 seconds, increased to 40 seconds against #Villains. Max stacks: -1.
When starting a fight against a #Villain, Punisher gains one of these Impact Passives.
Punisher’s Heavy Attack refreshes all personal Impact Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: If Punisher has an Impact or Indestructible effect active, Punisher’s gun shots into Block are Guaranteed Critical Hits.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit inflicts a non-stacking -50.0% Injury Passive for 20 seconds.

If activated while Punisher's Unstoppable is active, pause it until the end of this attack, Punisher’s gun shots deal Guaranteed Critical Hits, and the final shot gains additional bonuses that can trigger through Block:
Grant Punisher a +30.0 Precision Passive for 10 seconds.
Increase the tick rate of all Bleed Debuffs on the Opponent by 300.0% for the duration of the Precision.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: While below 1 Bar of Power, each hit into Block grants 15% of a Bar of Power.
On activation as an Attacker, Purify all Petrify Debuffs.
As an Attacker, if the final hit lands into the Opponent’s Block, Punisher gains an Unstoppable Passive for 1.75 seconds and the Opponent is more likely to cower behind their block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: +40.0 Attack Rating for each personal Endurance.
+250.0 Attack Rating if Punisher is Indestructible.

synergy.note: Heavy Attacks have a 100% chance to grant a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by 25% for 10 seconds.

signature.title: RETRIBUTION 2099
lines: A last-minute upgrade to the Punisher’s arsenal allows him to begin each fight with an additional 2500.0% charge in his Nano-Tech Battery and also gains a new Nano-Tech Automatic Effect.
Opponent hits 3 Bars of Power - 40.0% of the Battery is drained to drain 60.0 Bars of Power and inflict a Power Lock Debuff for 2 seconds.

cards.title: NANO-TECH
lines: The Nano-Tech Battery begins the fight with 4000.0% of max charge.
Every 3.5 seconds, the Battery triggers a recharge.
If the opponent has 0 Buffs, the Battery recharges 900.0%.
If the opponent has 1 Buff, the Battery recharges 700.0%.
If the opponent has 2 or more Buffs, the Battery recharges 400.0%.

cards.title: NANO-TECH
lines: Opponent activates a Regeneration Buff - 1500.0% of the Battery is drained to infect the opponent with nano-inhibitors and Heal Block them for 10 seconds. This Debuff automatically reapplies itself if a Regeneration Buff is still active when it expires.

Punisher drops below 15.0% Health - the Battery is drained entirely to grant a Regeneration Buff lasting 10 seconds and healing up to 35.0 Health based on how full the Battery was. This effect can only activate once per fight.
Punisher lands a Heavy Attack - 1000.0% of the Battery is drained to inflict a 1.5 second Stun Debuff.

cards.title: NANO-TECH
lines: When the Battery hits 100%, it immediately goes into Overdrive and continually drains. It also cannot recharge until it is drained entirely and switches back to recharge mode.
While in Overdrive: Punisher gains +150.0 Attack Rating and his attacks cause his opponent to gain 90.0% less Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The Punisher momentarily switches his battery into Overcharge mode, gaining 2000.0% charge over 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 15.0% of the Battery is drained to activate Auto-Targeting. Auto-Target attacks cannot trigger a Passive Evade and gain 40.0 additional Critical Rating.

Grenade Launcher: 100% chance to inflict a stacking Armor Break Debuff removing an Armor Up and reducing Armor Rating by -60.0 for 15 seconds. If the Battery has at least 10.0% charge, it expends that amount to double the duration of this Armor Break.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 40.0% of the Battery is drained, to inflict a non-stacking 90% potency Disintegration Debuff, dealing 220.0 Direct Damage over 20 seconds.

synergy.note: #DimensionalBeings: Gain Bleed Immunity, 20% Ability Accuracy, and +900 Armor Rating.

signature.title: ETERNAL DAMNATION
lines: If the Opponent is Knocked Out while Demonic Rampage is active, their soul is instantly Captured.
The duration of Class Soul Abilities are increased by +9.0%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Purgatory’s demonic nature provides Immunity to Incinerate and causes all attacks to deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
Combat Power Rate is decreased by -40.0%.

cards.title: CLASS SOUL ABILITIES
lines: Purgatory gains additional abilities depending on the Opponent’s Class.
Mystic Soul: When the Opponent launches a Special Attack, gain a 60% Block Regeneration Passive for 6 seconds.
Cosmic Soul: When filling a Bar of Power, Nullify 100.0 of the Opponent’s Buffs. Whenever an Opponent’s Buff is Nullified or prevented with Neutralize, gain an Unblockable Buff for 2 seconds.
Tech Soul: When filling a Bar of Power, inflict an Armor Break Debuff, reducing Armor Rating by -28.0 for 9 seconds.
Mutant Soul: At the end of the Opponent’s Special Attacks, Power Steal 40.0% of their remaining Power, gaining 150.0% of the Power Stolen over 4 seconds.
Skill Soul: When a personal Debuff on the Opponent ends or is prevented from activating, inflict a Slow Passive for 12 seconds.
Science Soul: A chemically-tainted soul cannot be stolen.

cards.title: SOUL NEUTRALIZE
lines: As Purgatory gains Power, the Bloodline sword steals the soul from the Opponent’s body, inflicting Soul Neutralize, which counts as an indefinite, 10.0% Neutralize Passive. Max stacks: 10.
Soul Neutralize is not affected by Ability Accuracy.
Inflict 1 Soul Neutralize at the start of each fight and when filling a Bar of Power. As a Defender, inflict 200.0 each time.
At 1000.0 Soul Neutralizes, the Opponent’s soul is Captured, granting their Class Soul Ability for the remainder of the Quest.

cards.title: CHAMPION ATTACKS - BLOODTHIRST
lines: When either Champion lands a Basic Attack or performs a Well-Timed Block, gain 500.0 Bloodthirst.
Purgatory loses 500.0 Bloodthirst if she goes 4 seconds without increasing her Bloodthirst. This timer is paused during any Special Attack and expires 20.0% slower for each Buff on the Opponent.
Gaining Bloodthirst Passively grants up to 9.0% of a Bar of Power based on current Bloodthirst over 1.5 seconds.
At 100 Bloodthirst, enter Demonic Rampage.

cards.title: DEMONIC RAMPAGE
lines: For 15 seconds, Purgatory gains +80.0 Attack Rating and her Special Attacks gain Rampage enhancements.
Demonic Rampage is paused during all Special Attacks and for 3 seconds each time Purgatory fills a Bar of Power.
Striking with a Medium Combo-Ender consumes 50.0% of a Bar of Purgatory’s Power to inflict an Incinerate Debuff, dealing 90.0 Energy Damage over 4 seconds.
When Demonic Rampage ends, reset Bloodthirst to 0.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: If the Opponent is Knocked Out, their soul is instantly Captured.
Rampage: Gain a Fury Buff granting +80.0 Attack Rating for 6 seconds, paused during Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On Activation, gain 2500.0 Bloodthirst.
Rampage: Each hit Passively Regenerates 15.0% of the damage dealt.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Rampage: This attack is Passively Unblockable.

synergy.note: When 50 or more Whiplashes expire at the same time, inflict a non stacking Special Concussion Debuff, reducing Ability Accuracy by 50% during Specials for 25 second(s).
Gain 8.3% Degeneration Resistance for every 100 Momentum Charges.

Backing up to the left wall begins a 30 second timer. If the Opponent hits the right wall within that time, gain a +50% Fury Passive for 20 seconds. The timer cannot restart until it has failed or the Fury has ended.

signature.title: SUPER SPEED
lines: Terminal Velocity duration increases by 10.0 second(s), and Wither max Stacks increase by 3.
When 6000.0 stacks or more of Whiplash expire at the same time, inflict a Stun Debuff for 5 second(s).

While the Opponent is suffering from a personal Stun, their Combat Power Rate is reduced by 5.0% and striking the Opponent with Light and Medium attacks locks them in place and increases Quicksilver’s Speed.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: 100% chance to Evade attacks when Dashing or while Stunned. This ability has a 15 second(s) cooldown. Guaranteed Critical Hits ignore this Evade and triggers the cooldown.

When Dodging Back, Quicksilver cannot be struck by Attacks. Whenever he successfully dodges an Attack, he inflicts a Wither Debuff of 35.0% Potency lasting 10 second(s). Max 3.0. Dexterity Mastery is replaced, but points in it increase the potency by 5% flat.
When the Opponent loses a Bar of Power, pause all Trauma and Wither Debuffs for 10 second(s).

cards.title: WHIPLASH
lines: Basic Attacks have a 35.0% chance to inflict a Whiplash Debuff, dealing 50.0 Physical damage after 12 second(s). Dodging an Attack and Second Medium refreshes Whiplash.
The Medium, Light, Medium Combo or reaching 5000.0 stacks of Whiplash causes all stacks to expire and burst into damage after 2 second(s). Delay pauses during the Opponent's Specials.
When Quicksilver would Evade or when the Opponent Dodges an Attack, 50.0% chance to inflict a Whiplash Debuff.
When the Opponent Well-Timed Blocks, one Whiplash is removed.

cards.title: MOMENTUM
lines: Dodging Backwards grants 1200.0 Momentum Charges, and basic hits grant 1 Charge.
As a Defender, gain 10000.0 Charges every 15 second(s) unless the Attacker gains 20.0 Hits in the Combo Meter by the end of this duration.
Every 10000.0 Charges reduces Evade cooldown by 1 second(s).
At 30000.0 Charges, Quicksilver cannot Miss and inflicts a Slow Debuff.
At 60000.0 Charges, he can trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact Attacks and his Evade Ability Accuracy cannot be reduced.

At 90000.0 Charges enter Terminal Velocity Mode, increasing the Dodge invulnerability window by 33.33% and retaining all Momentum abilities for 10.0 second(s). While active, gaining Charges instead pauses Terminal Velocity for 0.25 second(s).

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Double Momentum Charges gained for 20 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain 15000.0 Momentum Charges.
Last hit refreshes all stacks of Wither and Whiplash.
Terminal Velocity: Attack Rating is increased by 75.0 and attacks become Unblockable except against Well-Timed Blocks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: First hit inflicts a Trauma Debuff for 15 seconds, Trauma causes hits and Whiplashes to deal an additional 70.0% of the damage recently dealt as burst Physical Damage.
Terminal Velocity: Terminal Velocity and Whiplash are paused during this Special and the last hit doubles the amount of Whiplashes on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 90000.0 Momentum Charges. For every 120.0 Charges gained above maximum, Terminal Velocity is paused for 1 second, up to a maximum of 15 seconds.
Terminal Velocity: Inflict a Stun Debuff for 6 second(s). Whiplash Ability Accuracy is increased by 40.0% flat and max stacks before it bursts doubles until Terminal Velocity expires.

signature.title: SYMBIOTIC EMPOWERMENT
lines: Special Attacks generate +1 Symbiote Buff with 90.3% reduced Potency.

cards.title: PERSISTENT BLOODLUST
lines: After Winning a Fight, gain 1 Bloodlust for the remainder of the Quest. If defeating a #Spider-Verse Champion, gain +1 Bloodlust.
Lose 100.0 Bloodlust when defeated.

cards.title: FRENZY
lines: While the Opponent has less than 15.0% health remaining, activate Frenzy. Each Bloodlust increases this threshold by a flat 10%, reaching 65.0% at max Bloodlust.
Frenzy also triggers a True Sense Buff bypassing the effects of Miss and Auto Block. If Frenzy ends, this Buff is removed.
Gain 15.0 Attack Rating. Additionally gain 15.0 Attack Rating for each Bloodlust. Each stack suffers from 15% reduced Potency

cards.title: SPECIAL ACTIVATION
lines: Activating Special Attacks creates a Buff based on the last attack launched. Buffs last for 15 seconds but start Paused. Buffs are unpaused the next time one of them is triggered.
Light Attack: Energize, granting 25.0% Combat Power Rate. Aptitudes increase the Potency of these Energize Buffs by 75%.
Medium Attack: Fury, granting 60.0 Attack Rating.
Heavy Attack: Aptitude, granting 120.0% increased Fury, Precision, and Armor Up Potency.

cards.title: CARNAGE BOMBS
lines: Each Energize Buff inflicts Power Drain, draining 10.0% max Power over 15 seconds.
Each Fury Buff inflicts inflicts Armor Break, reducing Armor by -20.0 for 15 seconds.
All other Buffs inflict Incinerate, dealing 175.0 Energy Damage over 15 seconds. Incinerate also prevents Perfect Block and reduces Block Proficiency by -50%.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Carnage Bomb Debuffs inflicted by this attack have 65% reduced Duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Symbiote Attacks: All 5 hits deal a burst of direct damage equal to 100.0% damage dealt. Potency increased by 100.0% for each Unique Debuff on the Opponent.
Shrapnel Blast: Incinerate, dealing 150.0 Energy Damage over 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Carnage Bombs: Inflict Carnage Bomb Debuffs.
After Burner: All 3 hits deal a burst of 100.0 energy damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Activate Frenzy for 30 seconds.
Inflict 7 Random Carnage Bomb Debuffs with 50% increased Duration.

synergy.note: While the Ablative Shield is Fractured, gain an indefinite Passive Fury, granting +10% Attack Rating until the Shield is repaired.

signature.title: ENHANCED COMBAT DURABILITY
lines: Maximum Durability for the Ablative Shield is increased by +1.0 for every 40.0 signature levels obtained. Max increase of +5.
Heavy and Special attacks gain +10.0 Critical Rating for each unique Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: ABLATIVE SHIELD
lines: Red Guardian is immune to Buffs. Whenever a Buff is prevented by immunity he gains +100.0 Durability for his Ablative Shield instead.
The Ablative Shield starts each fight at 9.0 Durability and can stack up to a max of 1000.0. Each blocked hit removes 1 Durability. Well-Timed Blocks do not remove Durability.
Each Stack of Durability increases Perfect Block chance by 5.0%. Perfect Blocks reduce incoming damage to 0.
While the Shield is intact, Red Guardian can block Heavy and Unblockable Attacks and gains 40.0 Block Proficiency.
Blocking a Heavy or Unblockable Attack reduces Shield Durability to 0, however all hits of the incoming Attack can be blocked.
When reaching 0 Durability the Shield is Fractured, entering cooldown for 18 second(s). When cooldown ends, the Shield is repaired at 7.0 Durability.

cards.title: ON FRACTURE
lines: Carbonadium shards from the Ablative Shield burst onto the Opponent, inflicting a Stun Debuff for 1.9 seconds.
Inflict a non-stacking Trauma Debuff for 12 seconds, Trauma causes each hit to deal an additional 100.0% of the damage recently dealt as burst Physical Damage.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Gain +25.0 Attack Rating for each unique Debuff on the Opponent.
Refresh all Slow, Fragility and Trauma Debuffs on the Opponent.
While the Ablative Shield is on cooldown, charging a Heavy Attack grants Red Guardian a 0.8 second Unstoppable Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation inflict a non-stacking Slow Debuff for 16 seconds.
While the Opponent is suffering from Slow, Red Guardian’s Combat Power Rate is increased by 25.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation if the Ablative Shield was intact, gain +32.0 Attack Rating throughout this Special.
If this Attack strikes the Opponent the Ablative Shield is Fractured, removing all Durability. Each stack of Durability removed grants an additional +12.0 Attack Rating to each hit of this attack.
During this attack any Debuffs inflicted last 100.0% longer.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If the Ablative Shield is active, it's Durability is set to max. If the Ablative Shield is Fractured its cooldown ends immediately.
100.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff for 1.9 seconds.
100.0% chance to inflict a 30 second Fragility Debuff. Attacking a Fragile Opponent grants +180.0 Critical Damage Rating and reduces Block Proficiency by 50%.

synergy.note: When hitting the Opponent with his first Heavy Hit, Red Hulk consumes a Heat Charge and inflicts an Armor Break Debuff, reducing the Opponent’s Armor Rating by 50% for 8 seconds.

signature.title: SECOND STRIKE
lines: General Ross prepares to cross the line in the sand, beginning the fight with 2 Heat Charge(s) ready and for each charge he gains 3.0 Physical Resistance.
Additionally, each Heat Charge provides him -8.0% Incinerate Damage Resistance.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Whenever Red Hulk loses 10% of his Max Health, he gains 1 Heat Charge. For each Heat Charge he has, his contact attacks deal an additional 18.0% of the damage dealt as a burst of Physical Damage. Max Stacks: 10
Whenever Red Hulk is inflicted with a Poison or Incinerate Debuff, his altered state Removes it and has a 100.0% chance to convert it to a Heat Charge.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Excess heat from this attack causes Red Hulk to gain 200.0 additional Heat Charge(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Expends 2.0 Heat Charge(s) to Regenerate 5.0 Health.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Red Hulk expends 3.0 Heat Charge(s) to Incinerate his opponent, dealing 400.0 Energy Damage over 8 seconds. This effect also removes Perfect Block Chance and reduces Block Proficiency by 50% while it's active.

signature.title: CUBE AFFINITY
lines: While charging a Heavy Attack, generate 3.0% Power per second and Red Skull’s Heavy Attack can be charged for an extended duration.
Every 10th Basic Attack grants Red Skull 1 Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Red Skull is Immune to Nullify, Fate Seal, and Stagger effects from Champions.
Against Mutants, Red Skull’s Ability Accuracy cannot be modified.

cards.title: ARMOR UP
lines: Start each fight with 5 indefinite Armor Up Buffs, each increasing Armor Rating by 10.0.
When either Champion fills a Bar of Power, gain 1 Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: OVERWHELMING PRESENCE
lines: For each Armor Up Buff, Red Skull gains the following bonuses:
+5.0 Attack Rating.
+5.0 Critical Resistance.
+5.0 Energy Resistance.
--10.0% Opponent Stun Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: BLOCKING A BASIC ATTACK
lines: Consume 1 Personal Armor Up Buff to Power Drain 10% of the Opponent’s Max Power and deal 10.0 Direct Damage for each Armor Up Buff on Red Skull.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflict a non-stacking Heal Block Debuff for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain an Auto-Block Passive granting a 100% chance to Auto-Block Basic Attacks for 3 seconds. Duration is paused until the Special Attack ends, and is consumed when triggered. Auto-Block will not trigger while Red Skull is Unstoppable.
The first hit pauses all Shock Debuffs on the Opponent for 6 seconds.
Each hit deals a burst of 60.0 Energy Damage. Deal an additional burst of Energy Damage if the Opponent is suffering from a Shock Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain an Unstoppable Buff for 2 seconds, plus 0.5 seconds per Armor Up Buff on Red Skull. Duration is paused until the Special Attack ends, and is consumed when struck.
Each hit inflicts a Shock Debuff dealing 18.0 Energy Damage over 6 seconds, plus 1 second per Armor Up Buff on Red Skull.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Drain 100% of the Opponent’s Power. For every 10.0% of Max Power Drained this way, gain an Armor Up Buff.

signature.title: RHINO ARMOR
lines: Gain Critical Resistance equal to 9.8% of Physical Resistance.
While at 15+ personal Physical Resistance, making contact with the Opponent pauses personal Breach, Taunt, and Trauma Debuffs for 0.098 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Rhino's thick hide reduces the Opponent's Bleed Ability Accuracy by -75.0%.
Rhino gains no benefits from Critical Rating, and instead increases his personal Fury duration by up to 200.0 second based on Critical Rating bonuses. Max bonus gained at -1 Critical Rating.

cards.title: PHYSICAL RESISTANCE
lines: When Rhino inflicts a Debuff, is struck, or Blocks a hit, he gains a +2.5 Physical Resistance Passive for 15 seconds, refreshed when he gains a new one. Multiple Physical Resistances cannot be gained from a single trigger.
If struck while under the effect of a personal Unstoppable, consume -1 personal Physical Resistances to reduce the hit damage by 60.0%. This does not trigger against Special Attack 3.
As a Defender, when the Opponent Dodges back, remove 100.0 personal Physical Resistance. Cooldown: 2.5 seconds.

cards.title: RHINOCEROS RESISTANCES
lines: Rhino gains cumulative benefits based on how many personal Physical Resistances are active.
5+ Physical Resistance: When gaining a personal Physical Resistance, inflict a 5.0% Trauma Debuff for 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
10+ Physical Resistance: When starting a Dash or Medium Attack, gain an Unstoppable Passive for 1.5 seconds. If struck while this Unstoppable is active, it goes on cooldown for -1 seconds.
15+ Physical Resistance: Rhino becomes Stun Immune while Unstoppable.

cards.title: CHARGE!
lines: When Rhino Dashes forwards, he inflicts a non-stacking 5.0% Taunt Debuff for 5 seconds. As a Defender, he instead inflicts a Breach Debuff for -1 seconds. This Breach will not trigger while already active.

Performing a first Medium Attack grants Rhino 1 Fury Passive, and he gains up to 6 more while Dashing forwards based on the distance travelled. Each Fury grants +7.5 Attack Rating, and lasts 2.5 seconds. Max stacks: 20.
These Furies are refreshed when Rhino starts a Dash, Intercepts the Opponent, or Punishes their Heavy or Special Attacks.
These Furies are paused while Rhino is Dashing, and during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
If Rhino starts a Dash while at max Furies, pause them for 2 seconds after the Dash, and inflict a Breach Debuff for 2 seconds. This Breach will not trigger while already active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Personal Fury, Unstoppable, and Trauma effects are paused during Rhino’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On hit, inflict a Stun Debuff for 1.75 seconds.
On activation, if at 10+ personal Physical Resistances, gain an Unstoppable Passive for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit inflicts an 8.8% Trauma Debuff for 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
The final hit refreshes all personal Trauma Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a -20.0% Intimidate Debuff for 10 seconds.

signature.title: NEVER BACK DOWN
lines: When the Opponent fails to gain a Buff due to reduced Ability Accuracy while Rintrah is below 20 Mystical Charges, Rintrah gains a Power Gain Buff granting 1.4% of Max Power over 2 seconds. Max: 3.
When struck by or Blocking an attack while Unstoppable, Passively Regenerate 0.8% of missing Health.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Incoming Armor Break Debuffs suffer -50% potency for each other Armor Break already on Rintrah, to a minimum of 0% potency. Rintrah gains +15.0 Attack Rating per Armor Break Debuff on him.
All of Rintrah’s Rupture Debuffs deal 15.0 Physical Damage over 15 seconds.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: When either Champion lands a hit, Rintrah has a 60.0% chance to inflict a non-stacking -100.0% Neutralize Passive for 3 seconds.
Against Cosmic and Superior Champions, instead the Neutralize chance is 100.0%, potency is -200.0%, and duration is 6 seconds.

cards.title: MYSTICAL CHARGES
lines: Gain 100.0 Mystical Charge when the Opponent is inflicted with Rintrah’s personal Neutralize.
Gain 200.0 Mystical Charges when the Opponent fails to gain a Buff due to reduced Ability Accuracy.
Lose -500.0 Mystical Charges when knocked down.
After inflicting any personal Rupture, a Mystical Timer starts for 15 seconds. When it expires, all Mystical Charges are lost.

cards.title: MYSTICAL CHARGE EFFECTS
lines: -1+ Charges: When either Champion Strikes their Opponent or their Block with a Light Attack, inflict 1 Rupture Debuff.
1000.0+ Charges: Rintrah’s Special Attacks are Passively Unblockable
1000.0+ Charges: When Rintrah Strikes his Opponent or their Block, and his back is to the wall, he becomes Passively Unstoppable for 6 seconds.
15+ Charges: Rintrah is Stun Immune.
2000.0+ Charges: When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, Rintrah inflicts a Root Debuff on himself until the end of the Special Attack. This Root has no cooldown.

cards.title: ROOTED
lines: When Rintrah strikes his Opponent or their Block with his fourth Light Attack while their back is to the wall, he inflicts a Root Debuff on himself for 6 seconds. Cooldown: 1200.0 seconds.
While Rooted for any reason, Rintrah becomes Passively Unstoppable, inflicts a Taunt Debuff of 20.0% potency, and increases his Energy Resistance and Critical Resistance by +1.0 per Mystical Charge.
While Rooted for any reason, inflict 2 additional Ruptures when either Champion is struck by or Blocks a contact attack.
While affected by a personal Root, performing a Heavy or Special Attack removes the Root and inflicts 500.0 Rupture Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, pause all personal Ruptures on the Opponent for 4 seconds.
The final hit removes all Mystical Charges and gains +40.0 Attack Rating per personal Rupture on the Opponent.
When this Special Attack ends, remove all personal Ruptures from the Opponent and remove the Mystical Timer if it’s active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Passively Regenerate 1.0% of missing Health per Mystical Charge.
After this Attack, the Opponent will have their back to the wall.

synergy.note: When Rocket inflicts Armor Break using his Heavy Attack, he gains an Armor Up Buff increasing Armor Rating by 400 for 10 seconds. Max: 5.

signature.title: MASTER TECHNICIAN
lines: While the Opponent is under the effect of an Armor Break Debuff they are Passively Heal Blocked, whenever the Opponent would gain health from regeneration, they are inflicted with a Power Drain Debuff, draining 0.0% of their current Power over 0.5 seconds for each Armor Break Debuff on them. If the Opponent has the Salve Mastery active, it is removed.
Rocket’s Shield System grants him 0.0 Crit Resistance.
While Dormant, Rocket’s Shield System grants him 0.0 Block Proficiency. This effect also persists while the Shield System is activated.

cards.title: SCRAP METAL
lines: Even while in a fight, Rocket actively hunts for metal scraps to make weapons of mass destruction.
All of Rocket’s Attacks gain increased Critical Rating by 15.0 for each hit in the Combo Meter.
Whenever Rocket lands a Critical Hit, Rocket chips away at the Opponent’s Armor and Weapons, granting him 2 Scrap Metal. This value becomes 3 when fighting against #Metal Opponents.
Whenever an Armor Break effect removes an Armor Up Buff from the Opponent, Rocket steals the broken Armor pieces and gains 1000.0 Scrap Metal.

cards.title: SHIELD SYSTEM
lines: Whenever Rocket Dashes back and holds block for 1.2 second(s), he will use 25 Scrap Metal to construct a dormant Shield System to protect him from threats.
When Rocket is struck with the dormant Shield System, it will activate and last for 6 seconds. Activated Shield Systems grant the following effects:
+ 35.0 Armor Rating.
+ 35.0 Physical Resistance.
+ 30.0% Special Attack Resistance.
Combo Shield, preventing Rocket’s Combo Meter from resetting when struck.
The Shield System can also Block Unblockable Attacks from Mutant Champions. A Shield System will activate early when Rocket would be struck by a Mutant’s Unblockable Attack.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit of Heavy Attack consumes 10 Scrap Metal to inflict an Armor Break Debuff. Max: 5. This Armor Break lasts 15 seconds and reduces Armor Rating by -10.0. This ability cannot be activated while under 10 Scrap.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts a Rupture Debuff, dealing 90.0 Physical Damage over 12 seconds.
Each hit consumes 15 Scrap Metal to Power Drain the Opponent. Draining 15.0% of the Opponent’s Current Power over 1 second. This ability does not activate if Rocket has less than 15 Scrap Metal.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Rocket takes all of his Scrap Metal and constructs a destructive Grenade. Rocket gains up to 52.0 increased Attack Rating for the final explosion based on the amount of Scrap Metal consumed.
This explosion inflicts an Armor Break Debuff, lasting 30 seconds and reducing Armor Rating by up to -42.0 based on the amount of Scrap Metal consumed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Rocket uses his Scrap Metal to make the Big Blaster to annihilate his Opponent’s Power Bar. Consume all Scrap Metal to Inflict a 12 second Power Drain Debuff, draining up to 2 bars of the Opponent’s Power based on the amount of Scrap Metal consumed.
While this Power Drain is active, the Opponent is also Passively Special Locked.
This devastating blast also inflicts a Bleed Debuff, dealing 320.0 Direct Damage over 30 seconds.

signature.title: UNRELENTING AGILITY
lines: While at 7 Cruelty Passives, Ronin gains a Passive Evasion on the next incoming Attack for 0.3 seconds. Removes 3 Cruelty Passives when Ronin Evades an attack. Successful Evades do not grant Stance Abilities.
When Ronin Evades an attack, gain a Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by 12.0 for 12 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: When Ronin would Miss an Attack or be Evaded he gains a Cruelty Passive increasing Critical Damage by 55.0. Max 7 stacks.

cards.title: SWORD ATTACKS
lines: Attacks using the Sword have a 15.0% chance to inflict Bleed dealing 35.0 Direct Damage over 3.5 seconds. Critical Strikes using the Sword have a 100% to inflict Bleed.
Intercepting attacks has +40.0 Critical Rating.
Against Bleed Immune Champions gain a Cruelty Passive when Ronin would inflict a Bleed. This cannot occur more than once every 2.5 second(s).

cards.title: STANCE PREPARATION
lines: Ronin prepares his Stances by performing light attacks. Light 1 prepares Guard Stance, Light 2 prepares Wraith Stance, and Light 3 prepares Demon Stance.
Dodging back after preparing a stance makes Ronin enter a Stance. Stances are not affected by Ability Accuracy Reduction.
When entering a new Stance, gain a Cruelty Passive increasing Critical Damage by 55.0. Max 7 stacks.

cards.title: WHEN ENTERING A STANCE
lines: When reaching 7 Cruelty Passives, gain a Precision Passive increasing Critical Rating by 65.0 for 18 seconds.

cards.title: GUARD STANCE
lines: Well Timed Blocks activate the Parry Mastery, stunning opponents even if their attack is non-contact. Ronin gains +35.0% chance to Perfect Block.
Entering this stance has a 100.0% chance to Purify a Debuff.

cards.title: WRAITH STANCE
lines: All attacks reduce Defensive Ability Accuracy by -40.0%.

cards.title: DEMON STANCE
lines: All Bleeds gain +75.0% Ability Accuracy and can be inflicted on Blocked hits.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Enters a prepared Stance.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Inflicts a Bleed that deals 35.0 Direct Damage over 3.5 seconds for each active Cruelty Passive.
Removes all Cruelty Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by 26.0 for 35 seconds. Each active Cruelty Passsive increases the Attack Rating by an additional 26.0.
Removes all Cruelty Passives.

synergy.note: Activating a Special Attack 1 grants a +560 Armor Up Buff for 15 seconds. Max stacks: 2.
On an Auto-Block Counter-Attack, inflict a 560 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 15 seconds. Max stacks: 2.

signature.title: ENHANCED ORGANIC CIRCUITRY
lines: The damage of the Instant Disintegration inflicted by Special Attack 2 is increased by 5.0%.
While Organic Circuitry is active, the Opponent’s Stun Ability Accuracy is reduced by 5.0%. This effect is disabled while the Opponent has an active Undermine effect.
After gaining Organic Circuitry, the first time Ruby hits the Opponent’s Block, Organic Circuitry pauses for 5 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Ruby Thursday is Immune to Delirium.

The Opponent’s True Strike, True Accuracy, and True Sense effects have their Ability Accuracy reduced by -100.0%. For each Daunted on Ruby, the Opponent’s Neuroshock Ability Accuracy is reduced by a flat 50%, to a max of 150.0%.
When Ruby would land a Critical Hit, she instead inflicts an Instant Rupture dealing the Critical Damage the hit would have dealt.
Every third hit Ruby lands does not increase her Combo Meter.

cards.title: WHEN BLOCKING AN ATTACK
lines: When Ruby takes damage from Blocking an Opponent with an active Pierce effect, she inflicts a 10.0% Disintegration Debuff, dealing 50.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.
If Ruby’s Block is broken by an Unblockable attack, inflict this Disintegration with its damage increased by 200.0%. Undermine Block breaks do not trigger this effect.
If Ruby’s Block is broken by an Unblockable Basic Attack, she activates a Combo Interruption Passive, knocking herself down.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED
lines: When struck by a Light 1, Medium 1, or a Heavy Attack, inflict a -20.0% Suppression Passive for 6 seconds. Max stacks: -1. This effect has a 0.7 second cooldown, and does not trigger when Ruby is Intercepted or if the Opponent has an Undermine effect.

cards.title: AUTO-BLOCK
lines: On the final hit of her Special Attacks, Ruby gains an Auto-Block Passive for 6 seconds or until triggered. When Auto-Blocking a Basic Attack, Ruby Counter-Attacks with a Laser Beam.

As a Defender, when Ruby takes damage an 8 second timer starts. If she takes damage equal to 2000.0% of her Max Health within this time period, she gains her Auto-Block Passive. This timer will not re-trigger while active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain an Organic Circuitry Passive for 12 seconds, paused during Strikers and Special Attacks.

While Organic Circuitry is active, hitting the Opponent or a non-Well-Timed Block inflicts an Instant 0% Disintegration, dealing Direct Damage scaling with Ruby’s Armor and Attack Rating. As a Defender, it scales with Base Attack.
At the end of this Special Attack, inflict a Special 2 Lock Passive for 15 seconds. While this effect is active, the Opponent is more likely to activate Special Attack 1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This Special Attack can only be activated while Organic Circuitry is active, and is Passively Unblockable. This Unblockable’s Ability Accuracy cannot be reduced by Mutants.
As an Attacker, each hit inflicts a 5.0% Disintegration Debuff dealing 20.0 Direct Damage over 3 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

The final hit removes Organic Circuitry and inflicts an Instant 0% Disintegration, dealing 60.0 Direct Damage per second Organic Circuitry has been active, to a max of 30 seconds. As a Defender, this damage is reduced by 66.7% and scales with Base Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a 25.0% Disintegration Debuff dealing 900.0 Direct Damage over 20 seconds.
Gain a 25.0% Energize Passive for 20 seconds.

synergy.note: After performing a personal roar or howl ability, gain a non-stacking 15% increase to Rupture and Bleed potency for 5 seconds.

signature.title: UNTAMED HEART
lines: When struck or when blocking a Critical Hit, Sabretooth gains a Regeneration Passive, healing 25.0% of the damage taken from the hit over 25 seconds. These Regenerations are removed and new ones cannot be gained if Sabretooth is Heal Blocked.
Fury and Regeneration effects receive a permanent +70.0% flat Ability Accuracy.
If Sabretooth does not hit or get struck by the opponent for more than 5 seconds, he starts losing Regeneration stacks over time.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Sabretooth can withstand incredibly cold temperatures, providing him Immunity to Cold Damage like Coldsnap and Frostbite.

cards.title: PERSISTENT CHARGE
lines: At the start of the fight, if Sabretooth has 0.0 Persistent Charges, he will randomly receive between 3 and 6.0 Persistent Charges.

At the start of the fight, if Sabretooth has a Persistent Charge, he consumes one, re-activating up to 3000.0 of his Fury effects that were active at the end of his last fight as permanent Passive Fury effects.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Every 10.0 hits on Sabretooth’s or 5 hits on the opponent’s Combo Meters, Sabretooth gains a Fury. Against Skill Champions, Sabretooth also inflicts an Armor Break if he is attacking, reducing the opponents Armor Rating by -20.0 for 10 seconds.
Fury increases Attack Rating by 25.0 for 6 seconds.
Sabretooth lives for the thrill of the kill and starts each fight in Battlegrounds with 500.0 Passive versions of this Fury.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Dodging back and allowing Sabretooth to idle for 1.4 second allows him to convert a temporary Fury Buff into a permanent passive effect.
Sabretooth can convert a maximum of 5 permanent Fury passives in a fight. Fury effects from previous fights do not count towards this limitation.
Sabretooth cannot convert his passive Fury effects while fighting if he has 15 or more permanent passive Fury effects active.
Once Sabretooth has converted the maximum number of Fury Passives during a fight, the Fury Buff from his Combo Gain gains 20000.0% increased duration and 50% increased potency.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: 80.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 80.0 Direct Damage over 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation and on the final hit, converts personal Fury Buffs into a permanent Passive Fury effect.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Activates a Fury effect and immediately converts it to a Passive effect, increasing Attack Rating by 15.0 permanently.
The final hit grants Sabretooth a Regeneration Passive, recovering 10.0% of missing Health over 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gains a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 45.0 for 2 seconds.

synergy.note: After Special Attack 3, Sandman gains a Fury Passive granting 30% Attack Rating for 10 seconds.

signature.title: THE RUDE SANDSTORM
lines: While Unstable, Sandman gains an indefinite Fury Passive granting +20.0 Attack Rating.
Sandman's Heavy Proficiency Passives grant an additional +6.3 Attack Rating.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Sandman is Immune to Bleed, Poison, and Shock effects.
Sandman's Personal Debuffs can be inflicted through Block, are paused during all Special Attacks, and expire one at a time every second.
Knocking Down the Opponent with a Heavy Attack grants Sandman an indefinite Heavy Proficiency Passive increasing his Attack Rating by +100.0 during Heavy Attacks. Max Stacks: 8.

cards.title: RESISTANCE UP PASSIVES
lines: Sandman gains an indefinite +5.0 Resistance Up Passive every time he strikes the Opponent with a Light or Medium Attack. As a Defender he gains 3 of these when striking the Opponent’s Block with a Light or Medium Attack.
Striking Sandman or his Block with a Critical Hit removes 100.0 Resistance Up. When Sandman would receive a Bleed, Incinerate, or Shock effect from a Skill champion, he also loses 1 Resistance Up.
Sandman's Resistance Ups are unaffected by Ability Accuracy Modification.

cards.title: UNSTABLE
lines: At 20 Resistance Ups Sandman becomes Unstable. Unstable lasts 20 seconds or until Sandman runs out of Resistance Ups, and Unstable is paused during all Special Attacks. While Unstable Resistance Ups can no longer be gained and Sandman loses 1 Resistance Up when he or his Block is struck, increased to 2 as a Defender. All Resistance Ups are lost when Unstable expires.
While Unstable, Sandman gains an indefinite Unstoppable Passive. When becoming Unstable, Sandman also inflicts 1000.0 Suppression Debuffs of 5% potency.
Sandman’s Light and Medium Attacks consume 1 Resistance Up on Hit, Block, or Whiff. If the attack strikes the Opponent or a Block that is not Well-Timed, deal a burst of 5.0 Physical Damage.

The final hit of Sandman’s Heavy Attack consumes up to 5 Resistance Ups, and the final hits of his Special Attack 1 and 2 consume up to 3 Resistance Ups. For each time the Opponent has been Knocked Down since Unstable started, deal a burst of 4.0 Physical Damage on hit for each of Sandman’s personal Debuffs they’re suffering. Max Debuffs: 20.

cards.title: QUICKSAND!
lines: If Sandman is struck by a Basic Attack while he charges his Heavy Attack, he ignores the hit by becoming Passively Indestructible.
Striking the Opponent with the first hit of his Heavy Attack Passively Roots them for 2.25 seconds. If the Opponent has the Stand Your Ground Mastery active, it is removed while they are Rooted.
Striking a Rooted Opponent with a Heavy Attack locks Sandman in place until the Root expires, or until he Dodges back.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, Sandman gains 100.0 Resistance Up, then gains 100.0 Resistance Up on each hit. As a Defender, he instead gains 5 Resistance Ups on activation.
On activation, inflict 200.0 Petrify Debuffs of 8% potency, then each hit inflicts 200.0 additional Petrify Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, Sandman gains 2 Resistance Ups, then gains 100.0 Resistance Up on each hit. As a Defender, he instead gains 10 Resistance Ups on activation.
On activation, inflict 600.0 Decelerate Debuffs of 7% potency, then each hit inflicts 3 additional Decelerate Debuffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict 30 Physical Vulnerability Debuffs of -1.0 potency.
Gain 2000.0 Resistance Ups. While Unstable, instead of gaining Resistance Ups, Sandman inflicts an additional 2000.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuffs.

signature.title: OLD BEAST OF THE NORTH
lines: When below 40% of max health, getting struck by a Contact Attack has a 7.4% chance to activate Sasquatch’s healing factor, Passively Regenerating 5.0% of missing health over 20 seconds. Max stacks 3.
During Wrath of Tanaraq, Sasquatch becomes Passively Unstoppable during Special and Heavy Attacks and the Opponent’s Defensive Combat Power Rate is reduced by -1.8% when struck by these Attacks.

cards.title: FROM THE BUSH
lines: A thick fur coat provides -90.0% Coldsnap resistance along with immunity to Frostbite effects and Armor Break Debuffs.
If Regeneration Rate is inverted, all Regen effects are removed.
Gain +25.0% Combat Power Rate if the Opponent has a Buff or is suffering from a Stagger Debuff, this is increased to +50.0% if the Opponent has 4 or more of these effects.

cards.title: MEDIUM ATTACKS
lines: 30.0% chance to inflict a Rupture Debuff, dealing 50.0 Physical Damage over 17 seconds. +70% chance during Wrath of Tanaraq.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflict Stagger for 14 seconds. Max 2.

cards.title: SPIRIT OF RAGE
lines: Light Attacks have a 30.0% chance to build 1 Rage. Chance increased to 100% on the 3rd Light Attack in each combo.
Build 1 Rage every 4.5 seconds that Sasquatch didn’t land a hit.
Each stack of Rage reduces incoming damage from all sources except Special 3 by 5.0% per stack.
Rage is not affected by Ability Accuracy reduction but is prevented while suffering from an Enervate or Exhaustion Debuff.

cards.title: WRATH OF TANARAQ
lines: If Sasquatch has 5.0 or more Rage, each stack gained above this threshold has a flat 10.0% chance to remove all stacks and trigger Wrath of Tanaraq. This lasts for 1.7 seconds per stack removed.
During Wrath of Tanaraq Sasquatch is Stun Immune.
Gain 35.0 Block Penetration and +50.0% Combat Power Rate.
Special Attack 1 and 2 cost -50.0% less power and Special Attack 3 costs 25% less Power.
While the Opponent has 3 full Bars of Power, Special and Heavy Attacks will Power Drain 5.0% of their max Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit refreshes the Opponent's Rupture Debuffs. This can trigger into the Opponent's block.
If the final hit is blocked it has a 20.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff for 3 seconds. Chance increased to 100% during Wrath of Tanaraq.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first 2 hits remove the Opponent's Rupture Debuffs, gaining 140.0 Attack Rating for each Rupture removed. This increased by 50.0% if activated during Wrath of Tanaraq.
The final hit inflicts up to 3 Rupture Debuffs, each dealing 150.0 Physical Damage over 17 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Passively Regenerate 10.0% of missing health over 5 seconds. This is increased by a flat +1.0% per Rage Stack.
Gain up to +500.0 Stacks of Rage and enter Wrath of Tanaraq. These stacks don’t count toward the Regeneration.

synergy.note: When Sauron activates a Special Attack with Max Health, inflict 3 Incinerate Passives, dealing 100% Attack Rating as Energy Damage over 6 second(s). Max 6 stack(s).

signature.title: DOCTOR'S GIFT
lines: After the start of the fight, if the Opponent attempts to inflict a Bleed, or Incinerate effect while a Degeneration Passive is active, inflict the Opponent with a Passive version of that effect dealing +300.0 damage over 2 seconds.
Increase personal Prowess Passive Potency by a flat 1.4%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Immune to all Power Steal, Poison, and Sauron's Regeneration Rate cannot be decreased or increased by outside sources.
Take -95% less damage from Bleed effects and gain +25.0% Critical Resistance while Bleeding.
When Sauron is struck, 30% chance to gain a Regen Passive healing 10.0% of the damage taken per personal Prowess Passive effect he has.
Light Attacks have 35% chance to deal 50% of the damage dealt as a burst of Physical Damage. This ability can also trigger through block.

cards.title: PROWESS (MAX: 10)
lines: Each time one of Sauron’s Abilities fails to trigger due to chance gain a 10.0% Prowess Passive. Gain an additional 2 Prowess Passive if Sauron's Ability fails due to Ability Accuracy modification.

At 7 Prowess Passives, Dash Attacks, Heavy and Special Attacks grant an Unblockable Passive for 4 seconds. This Unblockable Passive is paused during Special Attacks and has a 10 second cooldown unless Sauron's Ability Accuracy is being modified or Sauron is affected by a Degeneration.
At 10 Prowess Passives, Dashing Attacks, inflict a Bleed Passive, dealing +75.0 damage over 4 seconds. This ability can also trigger through block.
Landing the first hit of a Heavy Attack will consume 3 Prowess Passives and gain a Fury Passive, granting +50.0 Attack Rating for 4 seconds

cards.title: ALL SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: All Prowess Passives are removed at the end of Special Attacks.
On activation, pause the Degeneration Passive from Extinction Mode for 8 seconds.

cards.title: EXTINCTION MODE
lines: While at 10 Prowess Passives, when you hit the Opponent, inflict a Degeneration Passive, dealing +40.0 direct damage over 5 seconds.
Increase Physical Burst Potency by 50.0% and all personal Abilities have 100% Ability Accuracy.
If the Degeneration Passive from Extinction Mode expires, remove all Prowess Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After this Special Attack ends, for each physical burst hit dealt to the Opponent, heal for 25.0% the damage dealt for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: After this Special Attack ends, increase the Potency of all personal burst Physical Damage by 100.0% for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: After this Special Attack ends, inflict a Degeneration Passive, dealing +25.0 direct damage over 5 seconds per personal Passive effect that has expired on Sauron or on the Opponent. (capped at 30) Reset after Special 3 activation.

synergy.note: When Veil of Fortune Triggers, 50% chance to gain a Prowess Buff, granting 100% Special Attack Damage for 15 second(s).
Gain a 30% Stimulate Passive while Blocking.

signature.title: VEIL OF FORTUNE
lines: Whenever a Critical Hit occurs for either player, there's a 17.0% chance the Scarlet Witch triggers her chaos magic, generating 0 - 8 Buffs or Debuffs.

synergy.note: When Chaos Surge activates, 8% chance to gain an Aptitude Buff increasing Fury, Precision, and Armor Up Buffs by 30% for 18 seconds.
When gaining one Instability Gain a Prowess Buff, granting 50% Special Attack Damage for 15 second(s).
Chaos Surge creates Regeneration instead of Prowess, granting 4% of missing health over 12 seconds. Prowess can no longer be copied, but Regeneration can.
Gain a 30% Stimulate Passive while Blocking.

signature.title: ORGANIZED CHAOS
lines: Against Cosmic, Mystic, Tech Opponents: 20.0% chance per Instability to inflict a Petrify or Armor Break Debuff for 3 seconds.
Against Cosmic, Mutant, Skill Opponents: 20.0% chance per Instability to inflict a Power Sting or Heal Block Debuff for 3 seconds.
Petrify of 39.7% Potency.
Armor Break: reducing Armor by 19.9.
Power Sting: Deal 59.7 direct damage on activation of Opponents Special Attacks.
Heal Block: Stopping all healing effects.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.

cards.title: INSTABILITY
lines: On Special Activation, gain 1 indefinite Instability. 1 Instability is removed when knocked down by a Special Attack.
If 6+ Instability are active for 10.0 seconds, inflict Opponent with Degeneration, dealing 300.0 Direct Damage over 6 seconds.
When the above Degeneration expires, remove all Instability.

cards.title: CHAOS SURGE
lines: Every 4 seconds, activate Chaos Surge, granting both Champions a 20.0% chance per Instability to gain 1 randomly selected Buff. Small chance to grant all Buffs.
Armor Up, granting +35.0 Armor Rating for 12 seconds.
Fury, granting +50.0 Attack Rating for 12 seconds.
Cruelty, granting +50.0 Critical Damage Rating over 12 seconds.
Prowess, granting 120.0% Special Attack Damage for 12 seconds.
Unblockable, lasting 4 seconds.
Buffs are not granted to Champions launching Special Attacks.
If Scarlet Witch Nullifies any Armor Up, Fury, Cruelty, Prowess, or Unblockable Buffs, she gains her matching Chaos Surge Buff.

cards.title: BEFORE THE OPPONENT LANDS AN ATTACK
lines: While blocking, 15.0% chance to Nullify 1 Buff. Increased to 10000.0% during the Well-Timed Block window.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Consume 1 Instability to create a non-stacking Power Gain Buff, generating 100.0% of a Bar of Power over 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first successful hit creates 1 Instability.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit inflicts a Random Debuff. Duration is increased by 20.0% for each Buff on either Champion. Max 100.0%.
Poison, dealing 160.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds. Poison also reduces the Opponents Regeneration Rate by 30%.
Inflicts Coldsnap, dealing 160.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds.
Incinerate, dealing 160.0 Energy Damage over 10 seconds. Incinerate also prevents the activation of Perfect Block and reduces Block Proficiency by 50%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Nullify up to 5 Buffs on the Opponent. Each Buff Nullified this way increases this attacks Attack Rating by 30.0.
Remove all Instabilities, each inflicting a Passive Degeneration dealing 275.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.

synergy.note: Gain a Fury Passive for each Sting Debuff on the Opponent, increasing Attack Rating by 10%.

After a fight begins, receive a basic Headline prompt to complete within 7 seconds. Completing it pays out a Power Gain Passive, granting 25% of a Bar of Power over 8 seconds. Receive a new Headline 20 seconds after one ends.

On a Heavy Attack inflict a Slow Debuff lasting for 10 second(s). Opponents with Natural Class Advantage cannot be slowed. When the Opponent fails to Evade, Scorpion inflicts a burst of Sting Debuff Damage.

signature.title: CYBERNETICALLY ENHANCED ARMOR
lines: While a non-Skill Opponent is suffering from Taunt, Scorpion gains a Steadfast Passive during their Special Attacks. Scorpion-Sense is removed when the Steadfast ends.

If the Opponent is inflicted with Petrify and they attempt to Heal, Scorpion Passively Regenerates 79.0% of the Health denied to them due to any reduced Regeneration Rate. Each tick of this healing cannot exceed 0.2 health, this value scales with Base Health.

cards.title: PRE-FIGHT: STING DEBUFF
lines: Sting Debuffs are Damage over Time Debuffs that Scorpion inflicts on Medium Attacks. His default Sting Debuff is a Poison Debuff, but he can choose between Shock and Rupture Debuffs in the Pre-Fight Screen.
Poison: inflict 3.0 Direct Damage Damage over 13 seconds and reducing health recovery by 30%.
Shock: inflict 7.0 Energy Damage over 13 seconds.
Rupture: inflict 7.0 Physical Damage over 13 seconds.
On fight entry Scorpion gains Immunity to the Damage over Time effects he did not select with this Pre-Fight, Shock and Rupture Immune by default.
If the Opponent triggers a Special Attack while suffering from his personal Sting Debuffs inflict a burst of 40.0 Sting Debuff Damage per stack of Sting Debuff.

cards.title: SCORPION-SENSE
lines: When the Opponent Evades or at the end of their Special Attacks, Scorpion gains a non-stacking Scorpion-Sense Passive, granting 20.0% chance to Evade for 15 second(s). When Scorpion-Sense expires it goes on a cooldown for 1000.0 seconds.

When Scorpion Evades an attack or when his Evade is prevented by Ability Accuracy reduction, he inflicts a Sting Debuff. If he Evades successfully, his Scorpion-Sense Passive is removed, he Counter-Attacks, and he deals a burst of Sting Debuff Damage, scaling with Base Attack. Scorpion will not attempt to Evade while Blocking.

As a defender, he gains Scorpion-Sense every 15 second(s) unless the Attacker reaches their current Combo count plus 2000.0 Combos by the end of this duration. Reaching the targeted Combo Count removes any existing Scorpion-Sense and triggers its cooldown.

cards.title: TORMENT DEBUFF
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack grants a Torment Charge, however holding the Heavy Attack grants a Torment Charge every 0.4 second(s)
Landing a Heavy Attack converts all Charges into Torment Debuffs. Landing Special Attack 1 or 2 while charging converts one extra Debuff per Charge.
Torment Debuffs lasts for 10 second(s) but pauses during Specials, and causes all damaging Debuffs to last 100.0 second(s) longer flat.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts a Sting Debuff. This effect has a 50.0% chance to go through block.
Final Hit: Inflict a Taunt Debuff for 12 seconds, reducing Attack Rating by 15.0%.
If the Opponent fails to launch a Special Attack before the Taunt Debuff expires, Scorpion inflicts a non-stacking Suppression Debuff, reducing Combat Power Rate by -25.0% for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: All Sting Debuffs are Paused for the duration of the Special, and refreshed by the end of it.

Final Hit inflicts 2 Bursts of Sting Debuff Damage per Sting Debuff on the Opponent, and also inflicts a Petrify Debuff of 40.0% Potency that lasts for 20.0 seconds. The Petrify can be inflicted through Block.
The Potency of the Sting Debuff Bursts are increased by 10.0% for each stack of Torment Debuff converted during this Special.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict the Opponent with a Stun Debuff, stunning the Opponent for 3 seconds, and inflict 1000.0 Torment Debuffs that last for 15.0 seconds.
While these Torments are active, charging Heavy grants a Fury Charge instead of Torment Charges.
Attacking from Heavy Charge grants a Fury Buff per charge, max 20 stacks, increasing Attack Rating by 20.0 for 20 second(s). While charging, Torment and Fury stacks are paused.

signature.title: BAD HAIR DAY
lines: When Madness is consumed by Scream, 35.0% chance to gain a Regeneration Buff healing 3.0% of missing Health over 5 seconds.
Against #Spider-Verse Heroes, each stack of Madness reduces the Opponent’s Evade Ability Accuracy by -12.5%.
Against #Symbiotes when gaining Madness, each stack of Madness grants a 12.5% chance to gain 100.0 extra Madness.
Against Tech Champions, each stack of Madness reduces the Opponent’s Armor Up Ability Accuracy by -12.5%.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: All hits have a 25.0% chance to inflict a Bleed Debuff dealing 15.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.

When the Opponent is inflicted with a personal Bleed, also inflict a -5.0 Armor Break Debuff for 10 seconds, plus 0.5 seconds for each rank invested in the Deep Wounds Mastery. If a personal Bleed is prevented by an Immunity, inflict 2 Armor Breaks.

cards.title: MADNESS PASSIVES
lines: Enter each fight with 400.0 Madness Passives. When these expire naturally, or on Scream’s fourth Light Attack, they are all refreshed and 2 Madness are gained.
The first Madness lasts 18 seconds, with each additional Madness increasing their own expiry rate by 20%.
Madness is paused for 0.5 seconds when the Opponent is struck by a Basic Attack and is paused indefinitely during the Opponent’s Special Attacks or while Strikers are active.
At 6 or more Madness, the Opponent’s Stun Debuffs suffer -100.0% reduced Ability Accuracy.
When knocked down by a Special Attack, when a personal Buff is Nullified, or when Incinerated by a Mystic Champion, Scream loses 2 Madness. If Madness falls to 0, 100.0 is gained after 9 seconds.

cards.title: HYBRID BUFFS
lines: When Madness is refreshed its icon changes to reflect the currently selected Hybrid Buff, cycling through Scream’s indefinite Hybrid Buffs in the order listed below:
A 25% Vicious Buff, a 20% Energize Buff, a 25.0 Bulwark Buff, and a 25.0 Impact Buff.
Hybrid Buffs can only be gained while Madness is at 100.0 or more. Either Champion’s second Medium Attack grants Scream the currently selected Hybrid Buff.
When gaining a Hybrid Buff with 2 of the currently selected Hybrid Buff, Madness is refreshed instead.

While at 2 stacks of any Hybrid Buff, when Scream would gain a Hybrid Buff she also gains a non-stacking Undermine Buff for 5 seconds. As an Attacker, this Undermine is paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: AUTO-BLOCKS
lines: When Madness is consumed by Scream, gain a non-stacking Auto-Block Buff for 5 seconds that is removed when Auto-Blocking a contact attack.
This Auto-Block Buff grants a 100.0% chance to Auto-Block Basic Attacks. These count as Well-Timed Blocks and have a 100.0% chance to resist a Block Break by a Heavy Attack.
When successfully Auto-Blocking an attack, gain 1 of the currently selected Hybrid Buff and inflict a personal Bleed.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack consumes 1 Madness to inflict a -30.0% Infuriate Debuff for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: During Scream’s Special Attacks, all personal Debuffs on the Opponent and all personal Buffs other than Regeneration on Scream are paused.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain +20.0 Attack Rating for each unique Buff on Scream for the duration of this attack.
Each hit consumes 1 Madness to grant Scream a 100.0% Fervor Buff for 20 seconds. On any hit with 0 Madness, gain 1 Madness and then gain Madness instead of Fervor for the rest of this attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, consume all Madness. If 4 or more Madness were consumed, gain an Unblockable Buff for the duration of this attack.

On each of the final four hits, deal a burst of 15.0 Direct Damage for each personal Debuff on the Opponent. The potency of these bursts increases by 8% for each Madness consumed during this attack. Max Debuffs: 30.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain up to 800.0 Madness, and up to 2 of each Hybrid Buff. Then, until the end of Scream’s next Special Attack, abilities that consume Madness during Special Attacks consume 0 but still grant their outlined effects.

synergy.note: Gain 66% Heal Block duration. Inflicting a Heal Block also inflicts a Cowardice Debuff, reducing Special Attack Damage by 95% for the duration of the Heal Block.

signature.title: SECONDARY ISO BATTERY
lines: Personal Debuffs other than Intimidate gain 19.1% duration.
Once per fight when dropping below 20.0% Max Health, Sentinel activates -1 Armor Up Buffs granting +50.0 Armor Rating for 3.5 seconds, expiring one at a time.
Each time one of these Armor Up Buffs ends for any reason other than Pulverize or Sentinel's personal abilities, Sentinel Passively gains 90% of a Bar of Power.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Sentinel bots are Immune to Poison, Bleed, Armor Break, Coldsnap, and Frostbite effects.

cards.title: ANALYSIS CHARGES
lines: Sentinel monitors the target. When they repeat the same action consecutively, Sentinel gains 6 Analysis Charges. Actions include Light Attacks, Medium Attacks, Heavy Attacks, Dodging, and Blocking an attack.
With its code focused towards the X-Gene, Sentinel gains twice the amount of Analysis Charges while fighting Mutant Champions.
When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, if it matches their previously activated Special Attack, gain 2000.0 Analysis Charges.
As a Defender, or in Battlegrounds, Sentinel starts each fight with 2500.0 Analysis Charges. Amount not increased against Mutants.

cards.title: ANALYSIS CHARGES
lines: For every -1 Analysis Charges, Sentinel gains the following:
+9.0 Armor Rating and Critical Resistance.
+10.0 Attack Rating.
Special Attacks cost -3.0% less Power.
The potency of incoming Instant Damaging effects from Champions is reduced by -5.0%.

cards.title: ANALYSIS COMPLETE
lines: At max Analysis Charges, Sentinel gains the following abilities:
Personal Debuffs can be inflicted through the Opponent’s Block.
Shock, Incinerate, Heal Block, and Armor Break Debuffs gain 50.0% increased duration and 100.0% increased Ability Accuracy.
While charging a Heavy Attack, Sentinel becomes Passively Unstoppable for 1 second. If Sentinel is struck while this Unstoppable is active, it goes on cooldown for 500.0 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The final hit inflicts a Shock Debuff, dealing 133.0 Energy Damage over 4 seconds. If Sentinel is at 3 Bars of Power, he consumes 30.0% of a Bar to inflict an additional Shock Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack destroys the current Sentinel bot and removes all Buffs and Debuffs that were on it. Then a spare Sentinel bot is called in to take its place, which arrives at full Health.

Spare Sentinel bots are Persistent, with only 100.0 available per Quest. As a Defender, regain -1 spare Sentinel at the end of the fight. While no spare Sentinel is available, this Special cannot be activated.

signature.title: MOLECULAR REFORMATION
lines: When Struck by a basic attack, gain an Indestructible Passive for -1 seconds. Cooldown for 90 seconds.
When Sentry enters a Solar Form with more than -1 Solar Energy, he pauses personal Debuffs on the Opponent for 0.1 second(s) for each Solar Energy over -1.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Sentry is Immune to all Nullify, Fateseal, and Incinerate effects.
Sentry converts any Critical Damage Rating bonuses into Attack Rating, increasing his Attack by up to +100.0.

cards.title: BULWARK BUFF
lines: Whenever Sentry inflicts a Debuff, gain a +2.5 Bulwark Buff for 25 seconds.
If Sentry would gain a Precision Buff from the Dexterity Mastery he instead gains one of his Bulwark Buffs. This ability cannot grant more than 100.0 Bulwark Buff every 0.5 seconds.
While a personal Bulwark Buff is active, Mystic Champions’ Combat Power Rate cannot exceed the amount they started the fight with.

cards.title: BUFF CONVERSION
lines: On the final hit of a Special Attack convert all Active Buffs into a 15 second Passive of the corresponding type.
Any effects not listed are converted into Fury Passives.
Bulwark Passives have a +5.0 potency. Max Stacks: -1.
Fury Passives increase Attack Rating by +10.0. Max Stacks: -1.
Regeneration Passives heal for +1.5 health. Max Stacks: -1.

cards.title: SOLAR FORMS
lines: Whenever Sentry converts a Buff into a Passive he gains 100.0 Solar Energy. When reaching -1 or more Solar Energy, consume all then change Solar Forms in the order of Base, Absolute Strength, then Brilliant Might.
While not in a Solar Form, Sentry’s Basic Attacks inflict a 1.0 Exhaustion Debuff for 20 seconds. Max Stacks: -1.
Absolute Strength Empowers Medium and Light Attacks. While active, Empowered Attacks inflict a 1000.0% Wither Debuff for 20 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Brilliant Might Empowers Heavy Attacks. While active, Empowered Attacks inflict 2 +-10.0 Energy Vulnerability Debuffs for 20 seconds. Max Stacks -1.
All Empowered Attacks deal an additional 50.0% of the damage dealt as a burst of Energy Damage, and gain +3.0 Attack Rating for each Debuff on the Opponent up to -1 debuffs.
When reaching -1 Solar Energy while in Brilliant Might, remove any Solar Forms, and gain a [00a2ff]Reality Warp[-].

cards.title: REALITY WARP - PERSISTENT CHARGE
lines: Sentry gains 100.0 Reality Warp whenever he wins a fight and loses 100.0 whenever he is defeated.
Each Reality Warp increases the Attack Rating Empowered Attacks gain per Debuff by 50.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a non-stacking Halt Debuff for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, Sentry gains 100.0 of his Personal Fury Passives for each Debuff on the Opponent, up to -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Instead of Solar Energy, Sentry gains a Regeneration Buff for each Buff converted into a Passive by this attack.
Regen Buffs generated from this attack heal +1.0 over 15 seconds. Max Stacks: -1.

synergy.note: Start the fight with an indefinite Armor Up increasing Armor Rating by [30, 60, 100].

signature.title: ANCIENT MOLECULAR CONTROL
lines: While Sersi’s Glancing Buff is active, Glanced hits grant a Regeneration Buff healing 1.0% of damage taken per Transmutation over 3 seconds. This ability activates before checking Armor and Resistances and cannot be triggered by Blocking. Transmutation Buffs that exceed the maximum do not count towards this ability.
Gain a Power Gain Buff, generating 15.0% of a Bar of Power over 1.5 seconds each time Sersi’s Fury or Glancing Buffs expire or are Nullified.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Sersi’s control of matter prevents her Regeneration Rate from being lowered below 0%.

cards.title: GLANCING BUFF
lines: Taking damage equal to or more than 120.0% of the Opponent’s Attack Rating in a single hit activates a Glancing Buff for 10 seconds.
While this buff is active, gain a 100.0% chance for incoming attacks to Glance. This effect then goes on cooldown for 7 seconds.
Charging a Heavy Attack has a 100.0% chance to activate a Glancing Buff for 10 seconds.
Glancing Buffs are paused for 4 seconds during Sersi's Special Attacks.

cards.title: TRANSMUTATION BUFFS
lines: Transmutation Buffs are indefinite and reduce the duration of Bleeds, Shocks, Incinerates, and Heal Blocks by 3000.0%. Max 90%. Transmutation Buffs that exceed the maximum last 8 seconds.
Gain a Transmutation Buff when Sersi’s Glancing Buff is activated. Gain an additional Transmutation Buff if the Glancing Buff activates due to being Struck.
Gain a Transmutation Buff on a Medium Combo Ender. Gain an additional Transmutation Buff while the Glancing Buff is active.
Gain a Transmutation Buff when an Armor Up is triggered on either champion or when inflicted with a Special Lock.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Far from Opponent: While at or above 1 Transmutation Buff gain an Unblockable Buff for 2.75 seconds.
Gain +30.0 Attack Rating for each Armor Up on either champion for the duration of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Close to Opponent: Gain a True Damage Buff ignoring Armor and Resistances for 12 seconds. Consume 1 Transmutation Buff to extend the duration of this Buff by 900.0 seconds.
Far from Opponent: Inflict a Stun Debuff for 2 second(s). Consume 1 Transmutation Buff to refresh all personal Fury and True Damage Buffs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Close to Opponent: Gain a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by 30.0 for 24 seconds. Consume all Transmutation Buffs and gain an additional Fury Buff for each Transmutation Buff consumed. Max 15 Stacks.
Far from Opponent: Regenerate 5% of the damage dealt. Consume all Transmutation Buffs for an additional 300.0% for each Transmutation Buff consumed.
On the last hit, deal an additional 3300.0% of damage dealt as a burst of Energy Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict an Incinerate Debuff, dealing 45.0 Energy damage over 12 seconds. Incinerate Debuffs also remove Perfect Block Chance and decrease Block Proficiency by 50% while active.
Inflict an additional Incinerate Debuff for each Transmutation Buff consumed throughout the fight. Max 2500.0.

synergy.note: When inflicted with a non-Damaging Debuff, gain a 2.5% Energize Passive for 10 seconds. Max stacks: 10.
Dodging an attack with Perfect Timing inflicts a Falter Passive, causing 100% of the Opponent’s attacks to Miss for 2 second(s). Contact Attacks bypass this Falter and remove the effect.

signature.title: MASTER OF KUNG FU
lines: Critical Hits deal 10.0% of hit damage as a burst of Physical Damage. This ability is based on hit damage before checking Block Proficiency, Armor and Resistances.
Shang-Chi can perform Critical Hits through the Opponent’s Block. Personal abilities that trigger on Critical Hits will trigger through Block.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Critical Hits grant +8.0 Critical Damage Rating for the rest of the fight. Max 300 hits.

cards.title: WUSHU STRIKES
lines: All Wushu Strikes start Readied and can be performed by Landing Hits or Striking into Block with a series of specifically ordered Attacks. Performing a Wushu Strike Unreadies it indefinitely.
The last hit is a Guaranteed Critical Hit, provides 1 Chi Charge and activates bonus effects:
Disarming Strike (Medium, Medium): The last hit cannot be interrupted. Remove the Opponent’s Unstoppable effects and inflict a Slow Debuff for 5 second(s) for each Readied Wushu Strike.

Cleansing Strike (Medium, Light, Medium): Purify 300.0 Debuff(s). Gain 1 indefinite Cleanse Passive for each Readied Wushu Strike, lasting until this Wushu Strike is Readied again. When a Champion with Cleanse is inflicted with a Debuff, it is immediately Purified and Cleanse is removed.

Breaking Strike (Medium, Light, Light, Medium): The last hit becomes Unblockable when Striking into a Block. Gain an Unblockable Buff, lasting 150.0 second(s) for each Readied Wushu Strike and pausing during Shang-Chi’s Special Attacks.
Pin-Point Strike (Medium, Light, Light, Light, Medium): Inflict a Stun Debuff lasting a flat 65.0 second(s) for each Readied Wushu Strike.

cards.title: PERFECTLY-TIMED DODGES AND BLOCKS
lines: Shang-Chi has a short window of time where he can use Perfect-Timing while performing a Well-Timed Block or Dodging an Attack, granting him 1 Chi Charge.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Gain a Precision Buff for each Chi Charge, increasing Critical Rating by 5.0, over 15 second(s). Max 4 stack(s).
All Unreadied Wushu Strikes are Readied and personal Stun Effects on the Opponent are removed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Landing this attack or Striking into Block will perform the last Wushu Strike used with equal potency, excluding the Pin-Point Strike. If no Wushu Strike has been used, the Cleansing Strike is performed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit is a Guaranteed Critical Hit.
Consume all Chi Charges, increasing the Attack Rating of each hit by 30.0 for each Chi Charge.
All Unreadied Wushu Strikes are Readied.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain +40.0 Critical Damage Rating for the rest of the fight.
Gain 400.0 Chi Charge(s).

synergy.note: While charging or releasing a Heavy Attack, Evade the first incoming Basic Attack. Cooldown: 20 seconds.
Power Steal is replaced with a Power Gain, granting 160% of a Bar of Power per second.

signature.title: LIVE AND DIE FOR YOUR IDEALS
lines: As an Attacker, Shathra starts each fight with a Regeneration Passive, healing -0.0% of her Base Health for each stack of Vengeance over 4 seconds.
Whenever a Buff on the Opponent expires naturally, Shathra has a 0.0% chance to inflict a personal Vulnerability.
If Shathra is defeated while she has any Vengeance, she gains 1 additional Vengeance.

cards.title: ETERNAL SOUL OF VENGEANCE
lines: Shathra starts each Quest with 0 Persistent Vengeance. Start with 200.0 Vengeance while fighting in Battlegrounds or Duels.
When Shathra defeats an Opponent, she gains 1 Vengeance. Vengeance gained is increased by 100.0 against Cosmic Champions and #Spider-Verse Heroes.
For each Vengeance, Shathra gains +6.7 Attack Rating.

cards.title: ASTRAL WASPS
lines: Shathra’s Light and Medium Attacks inflict 1000.0 to 16 indefinite Astral Eggs onto the Opponent, or 16.0 to -1 if they are Stunned. Max stacks: 500.
Whenever a Buff on the Opponent expires naturally, inflict 3 to -1 Eggs.
When Shathra activates a Special Attack, all Eggs hatch into 1 indefinite Astral Wasp each. Max stacks: 500.
