During Shathra's Special Attacks 1 and 2, the Astral Wasps attack. For each level of the Special Attack, the Opponent receives +1.5 Energy Damage every second per 10 Wasps.
As a Defender, when the Attacker taps Block, they swat away Wasps, removing -1200.0. If no Wasps are active, Eggs are removed instead.

cards.title: SACRIFICE FOR YOUR QUEEN
lines: Shathra has abilities that can kill her own Astral Wasps. For every 15 Wasps killed, their bodies dissolve into a -3.5 Vulnerability Passive for 12 seconds, paused during Shathra’s Heavy and Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.
Charging a Heavy Attack kills 180 Wasps per second to Power Steal 35.0% of a Bar of Power from the Opponent, granting -1% of the Power to Shathra. This ability builds up over 0.6 seconds.
This Power Steal is removed when Shathra releases her Heavy Attack, runs out of Wasps, reaches 3 Bars of Power, or the Opponent runs out of Power.
The potency of the Mystic Dispersion Mastery is reduced by 50.0%, but each rank increases the percentage of Stolen Power Shathra gains by +1500.0% flat, up to -1%.
Shathra’s fourth Light Attack kills -1 Wasps to Nullify 1 Buff on the Opponent. This cannot trigger below -1 Wasps.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a non-stacking -70.0% Atrophy Passive for 20 seconds. This Atrophy is refreshed when Shathra performs any Special Attack.
This Atrophy cannot have its Ability Accuracy modified by Cosmic Champions, and disables the Stand Your Ground Mastery while active.
The final hit inflicts 30000.0 to 350 Astral Eggs. As a Defender, this becomes 100.0 to -1 Eggs.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, inflict 500.0 personal Vulnerability Passives. If activated after the first hit of Shathra’s Heavy Attack, inflict an additional -1 Vulnerability Passives.
If activated while charging or performing a Heavy Attack, this Special Attack becomes Passively Unblockable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: As an Attacker, this Special Attack cannot be activated unless Shathra is charging a Heavy Attack.
Gain a Regeneration Passive, healing 1000.0% of missing Health over 8 seconds. This also recovers 100% of missing Health caused by Energy Damage from damaging effects.
Inflict a Stun Passive for 3.5 seconds.

cards.title: DIVINE WASP-TOTEMS
lines: Once per quest, Shathra can consume 1 Vengeance in the Pre-Fight Menu to place a Cross-Fight Wasp-Totem on the next fight. The next #Spider-Verse Hero to enter this fight becomes a Wasp-Totem for the rest of the Quest, gaining the following abilities:
Poison Immunity. Whenever a Poison fails due to Immunity, gain a +10.0% Fury Passive for 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Performing an Evade, Auto-Block, or Miss starts a 5 second timer. If a Special Attack is activated while this timer is active, it becomes Passively Unblockable.

signature.title: MOJOWORLD GLADIATOR
lines: Overstacking Shatterstar’s Daunted Debuffs inflicts a bonus 5.0% Daunted Passive for 10 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
Shatterstar’s superstar status in the Mojoverse allows him to provide a Cross-Fight Sponsor offer in the Pre-Fight screen. A Sponsor can only be used once per Quest.
The next Mutant or Mystic Champion that enters a fight with a Sponsor signs a deal and causes incoming Bleed Debuffs from Quest Nodes to suffer -80.0% potency for the next 4 fights.

cards.title: BROUGHT TO YOU BY MOJOVISION
lines: Due to Mojovision’s strict censorship guidelines, incoming Bleed effects suffer -100.0% reduced potency.
Incoming Poison and Incinerate Debuffs from Quest Nodes suffer -40.0% reduced potency. This is doubled in Alliance War.

cards.title: GLANCING
lines: Holding Block for 0.3 seconds grants a Glancing Passive until Shatterstar stops Blocking.

When the Opponent Glances against Shatterstar, Offensive Ability Accuracy is reduced by 25.0% and damage is reduced by 0%, or 25% against Skill Champions. Damage is reduced by an additional 5% per Daunted on the Opponent up to -1% total.
Shatterstar’s personal Glances consume -100.0 Combo from the Opponent’s Combo Meter. Consume 1 additional Combo from Special Attack Glances.

cards.title: DAUNTED DEBUFFS
lines: Shatterstar’s Daunted Debuffs have 20.0% potency and last 10 to -1 seconds depending on how many are already active.
Personal Daunted Debuffs expire one at a time and are paused during Special Attacks and Strikers.
Against non-Tech Champions, personal Daunted Debuffs cannot have their duration lowered, and they cannot be Purified during Shatterstar’s Heavy Attack.
Interrupting the Opponent’s Heavy Attack inflicts 200.0 Daunteds.
When Shatterstar or his Opponent’s Combo Meter reaches a multiple of 10, inflict 100.0 Daunted. Inflict 1 additional Daunted if this happens during Shatterstar’s Heavy or Special Attack.

cards.title: DAUNTED EFFECTS
lines: At 2+ Daunteds: Blocking 2 consecutive Basic Attacks inflicts a non-stacking 10.0% Reckless Passive for 3 seconds.
At 4+ Daunteds: Gain a Pursuit Passive against non-Tech Champions.
At 6+ Daunteds: As an Attacker with 2 Bars of Power that hasn’t used their Special Attack 3, gain a -40.0% Uncanny Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts an Instant Bleed, dealing 22.0 Direct Damage plus an additional 22.0 for each Uncanny effect on Shatterstar.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: After activation, gain a non-stacking -10.0% Uncanny Passive for 20 seconds.
The final two hits inflict Instant Bleeds, each dealing 100.0 Direct Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This Special Attack can only be used once per fight.
Gain 2 indefinite -10.0% Uncanny Passives.

signature.title: CITING PRECEDENT
lines: Tireless research grants a benefit based on the opponent’s Class.
Science: 29.0% chance with each hit landed to Purify a Debuff.
Mystic: +14.0 Attack Rating and She-Hulk’s attacks cause the opponent to gain 25.0% less Power.
Cosmic: +6.0 Attack Rating for each Buff the opponent has.
Tech: Opponent suffers -14.0% Armor Up effect duration & Potency.
Mutant: Opponent suffers -19.0% Ability Accuracy during Special Attacks.

cards.title: INDUCE PANIC
lines: She-Hulk’s sharp intellect and overwhelming strength panics her foes, increasing their chance to launch a Special Attack by 15.0% for each of her personal Passive Fury effects.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED & WHEN ATTACKING
lines: 11.0% chance to gain a Passive Fury effect, increasing attack by 35.0 for 8 seconds.

cards.title: OPPONENT ACTIVATES A SPECIAL ATTACK
lines: When a non-Skill Opponent activates a Special Attack, She-Hulk refreshes all personal Fury Passives.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: If the opponent is Unstoppable, this attack cannot be interrupted. If the attack lands, the Unstoppable effect is removed and She-Hulk gains a Passive Fury, increasing attack by 70.0 for 8 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Extensive weight training allows She-Hulk’s personal Passive Fury effects and all Stun Debuffs to last up to 50.0% longer, based on the size of her opponent. Larger opponents grant longer effects.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a Passive Fury effect, increasing attack by 35.0 for 8 seconds.

synergy.note: Gain Immunity to Rupture effects, and the Ability Accuracy of She-Hulk’s personal Debuffs and the Parry Mastery can only be reduced by Skill Champions.

signature.title: STARE DECISIS
lines: She-Hulk eats punks like you for breakfast. Her long career of stomping noobs grants her a benefit based on the Opponent's class.
Science: When the Opponent activates a Special Attack, inflict an indefinite 4.9% Special Concussion Debuff. Max stacks: -1.
Mystic: While the Opponent is below a Bar of Power, personal Fear and Trauma Debuffs expire 14.9% more slowly.
Cosmic: She-Hulk’s personal Debuffs gain 2.9% increased duration per Unique Buff on the Opponent. Max benefit at 5 Buffs.
Tech: While below a Bar of Power, She-Hulk gains +4.9% Combat Power Rate.
Mutant: During the Opponent's Special Attacks, She-Hulk gains a +6.2 Bulwark Passive.

cards.title: AGGRESSIVE NEGOTIATIONS
lines: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
When striking the Opponent or when struck, She-Hulk has a 40.0% chance to inflict a 1400.0% Trauma Debuff for 12 seconds.
For each Trauma on the Opponent, the chance to inflict is reduced by 2% flat, to a minimum of 10.0%, and the potency is increased by 100.0%.
She-Hulk doesn’t share. Her Trauma Debuffs are paused during her Strikers.

cards.title: INSPIRE FEAR
lines: She-Hulk’s voracious appetite for destruction terrifies her victims, increasing their chance to launch a Special Attack by 8.0% for each of her personal Trauma Debuffs on the Opponent.
When a non-Skill Opponent activates a Special Attack, She-Hulk refreshes all personal Trauma Debuffs on them.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: If the Opponent is Unblockable, She-Hulk’s Heavy Attack can not be interrupted by Basic Attacks or the final hit of Special Attacks. If the attack lands, all Unblockable effects are removed and She-Hulk inflicts 200.0 personal Trauma Debuffs.
Each hit against a non-Skill Opponent inflicts a non-stacking Fear Debuff for 12 seconds.
While her personal Fear is active, She-Hulk cannot Miss.
Each hit against a non-Skill Opponent inflicts a non-stacking Fear Debuff for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a personal Trauma Debuff.
Each hit inflicts a -15.0% Spectre Debuff for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, inflict 200.0 personal Trauma Debuffs.
Each hit inflicts a -55.0% Wither Debuff for 22 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict an indefinite 20.0% Debilitate Debuff. Max stacks: -1.
Reinflict all personal Trauma Debuffs on the Opponent.
Inflict a 30.0% Weakness Debuff for 12 seconds.

synergy.note: Activating a Special Attack inflicts a 50% Cowardice Debuff for 10 seconds.
Medium Attacks inflict a Shock Debuffs dealing 20% of Attack over 2 seconds.

signature.title: PERCUSSIVE KICKBACK
lines: Whenever Shocker is Stunned or the Opponent gains a Prowess, gain 300.0 Vibro-Shock Charges.
Shocker’s first Special Attack 1 in each fight costs 0.0% less Power.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Shocker’s custom padded suit grants him Immunity to Shock effects and Concussion Debuffs, and reduces the duration of incoming Stuns by 50%.
If the Opponent has the Limber Mastery active, it is removed.
Shocker cannot land Critical Hits, but all his attacks reduce the Opponent's Armor Rating by his Critical Rating.

cards.title: VIBRO-SHOCK CHARGES
lines: Landing or being struck by a Light or Medium Attack grants 1 indefinite Vibro-Shock Charge.
At 50+ Vibro-Shock Charges, while Dashing forwards Shocker is Passively Unblockable. If this Dash Attack breaks the Opponent’s Block, this effect goes on cooldown for 3000.0 seconds.
If Shocker is struck while Unblockable, remove 5000.0 Vibro-Shock Charges.

cards.title: AUTO-BLOCK
lines: At 50+ Vibro-Shock Charges, if Shocker would be struck by a Special Attack, consume 2500.0 Charges to Auto-Block the rest of the attack.

cards.title: MEDIUM ATTACKS
lines: +2.0% chance per Vibro-Shock Charge to Invalidate an Opponent’s Prowess. Max: 10000.0%.
+0.5% chance per Vibro-Shock Charge to inflict a Stun Debuff for 0.8 seconds. Max: 2500.0%.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack consumes a Vibro-Shock Charge every 0.05 seconds and can be charged until all Vibro-Shock Charges are consumed.
The final hit gains +100.0 Attack Rating per Vibro-Shock Charge consumed. This scales with Base Attack but benefits from Class Advantage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: +1.0% chance per Vibro-Shock Charge to inflict a Stun Debuff for 3 seconds. Cooldown: 10 seconds.
At 50+ Vibro-Shock Charges, this attack is Passively Unblockable.
At the end of this attack, gain 3000.0 Vibro-Shock Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a -30.0 Physical Vulnerability Passive and a Stun Passive for 5.0 seconds, plus 0.05 seconds per Vibro-Shock Charge.
These effects are not affected by Ability Accuracy and are removed once the Opponent is struck 3 times.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a 10000.0% Energize Passive until the next time Shocker reaches 2 Bars of Power.
While this Energize is active, Vibro-Shock Charge max is increased to 15000.0.

signature.title: VIBRANIUM AEGIS
lines: Against Special Attacks, Shuri can block Unblockable attacks and has -0.0% Perfect Block chance for each of her personal Armor Up Passives.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Shuri’s adaptive technology ensures her Ability Accuracy cannot be altered, and grants her Immunity to Shock and Precision effects.
Shuri cannot land Critical Hits without a Guaranteed Critical effect.
Shuri’s attacks are non-contact and deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.

cards.title: KINETIC MATRIX
lines: Gain an indefinite Matrix Charge when struck or when Blocking attacks (5 on a Well-Timed Block). Lose 300.0 charges when struck by True Damage.
At max charges, new Matrix Charges become Armor Up Passives, increasing Armor Rating by 10.0 for 1 second, expiring 1 at a time. Max Armor Ups: 20.

cards.title: LIGHT AND MEDIUM ATTACKS
lines: Consume 1 Matrix Charge to inflict a Shock Debuff dealing 22.0 Energy Damage over 22 seconds. Max stacks: 50.
Shocks inflicted with Critical Hits become Critical Shock Passives, multiplying their Energy Damage by Shuri’s Critical Damage Multiplier. Max stacks: 50.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: On Heavy Charge, consume 10 Matrix Charges to gain a 100% Untouchable Passive for 5 seconds.
On Heavy hit, refresh any active Shock effects on the Opponent and consume all personal Guaranteed Critical Passives to convert that many active personal Shock Debuffs into Critical Shock Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: On hit, refresh any active Shock effects and pause them for the duration of the Special Attack.
Predictive targeting AI ensures Shuri’s Special Attacks cannot be Evaded.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit grants Shuri a Matrix Charge and an indefinite Guaranteed Critical Passive, plus an extra Guaranteed Critical Passive for every 1000.0 Shock Debuffs the Opponent is suffering.
These Guaranteed Critical Passives are consumed by Shuri's Light and Medium hits to become Guaranteed Critical Hits.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a Shock Debuff for each Critical Shock the Opponent is suffering, each dealing 22.0 Energy Damage over 22 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain 20 Matrix Charges.
Deal a burst of 37.5 Direct Damage for each Shock and Critical Shock effect the Opponent is suffering.

synergy.note: Medium Attacks inflict a Rupture Debuffs dealing 20% of Attack over 2 seconds.
Medium Attacks inflict a non-stacking 25% Spectre Debuff for 3 seconds. Spectre Debuffs gain +25% flat potency.

signature.title: CRAZY STUFF HAPPENS, I PUNCH IT
lines: Striking the Opponent with a Heavy Attack or while their back is against the wall inflicts a Slow Debuff for 2 seconds, paused while Silk has a personal Fury Passive or while the Opponent remains against the wall.
While this Slow is active, during Silk's attacks the Opponent suffers --9.3% Regeneration Rate.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Silk’s heightened agility keeps her one step ahead of danger. Incoming Ruptures and Slows suffer -9000.0% duration.
While Dodging back, Silk cannot be struck by attacks. She does not benefit from the Dexterity Mastery, but each rank grants her +20000.0 Critical Rating.

cards.title: SILK-SENSE
lines: Silk has a 100% chance to Evade Special Attacks.
After triggering or when Silk is Critically Hit, this effect goes on cooldown for 25 seconds or until the Opponent is struck 2000.0 times.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: Silk’s attacks inflict a 10.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 1.2 seconds. Max stacks: 50.0.
Silk’s Physical Vulnerability Debuffs are refreshed when the Opponent is struck, and removed when the Opponent activates a Special Attack or is knocked down.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: While charging a Heavy Attack, if the Opponent is within striking distance and suffering from any of Silk's Physical Vulnerability Debuffs, inflict a Stun Debuff for 1.2 seconds.
The first hit grants Silk a Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by +60.0 for 1.2 seconds. Max stacks: 3.0.
Silk’s Fury Passives are refreshed when the Opponent is struck, and removed when the Opponent activates a Special Attack or is knocked down.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The final hit deals a burst of 120.0 Physical Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit inflicts a Sunder Debuff for 30 seconds.
The final hit deals a burst of 200.0 Physical Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Knocking down the Opponent with this Special Attack does not remove Silk’s active personal effects.
Inflict a Stun Passive for 4 seconds. While this Stun is active, the Opponent suffers -10000.0% Combat Power Rate and Silk’s is increased by +10000.0%.

signature.title: ON THE HUNT
lines: Activating a Special Attack grants a +0.8 Cruelty Passive for each Shock effect on the Opponent for 15 seconds. Max stacks: 10
Light and Medium Attacks that Intercept the Opponent have a chance to inflict an additional S:I Bounty Hunter Shock Debuff with +9.8% flat increased Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: S:I BOUNTY HUNTER
lines: Light and Medium Attacks: 30.0% chance to inflict a Shock Debuff dealing 70.0 Energy Damage over 30 seconds. Max stacks: 30
Heavy Attacks: Cannot Miss, and the final hit inflicts a non-stacking 40.0% Disorient Passive for 18 seconds. Against Science Champions, the potency is 100%.
When a personal Shock effect fails to trigger due to Immunity, deal a burst of 75.0 Energy Damage.

cards.title: SABLE MINE
lines: If the Opponent moves into a Sable Mine, it triggers, inflicting an instant Shock dealing a burst of 30.0 Energy Damage. That Sable Mine then goes on cooldown for 4 seconds, deactivating the burst Damage and Critical Shock effect. Mines are not triggered during Opponent's Special Attacks.
All Sable Mine cooldowns are removed upon performing an Intercept or punishing a Special Attack.
As an Attacker, if Silver Sable passes over a Sable Mine, she's granted a 80.0% Fervor Passive for 12 seconds and Purifies 1 non-Damaging Debuff. Max Fervor Stacks: 3.
Knocking Silver Sable into or over a Sable Mine via a Heavy Attack, Special Attack 1 or Special Attack 2 removes the Mine without triggering it.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On the final hit, set a Sable Mine in front of the Opponent that arms after 2 seconds and lasts until the next Sable Mine is set. Each subsequent Special Attack 1 sets an additional Sable Mine, up to a max of 3.
As a Defender, the Sable Mine spawns at Silver Sable’s location, arms immediately, and only 1 can be set.
On the final hit, inflict a Tracking Passive for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit grants a non-stacking +100.0 Cruelty Buff for 20 seconds.

If the Opponent is knocked into a Sable Mine via a Special Attack 2, convert up to 1500.0 personal Shock Debuffs into Critical Shock Passives. These last 5 seconds and multiply their potency by Silver Sable’s Critical Damage Multiplier.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Refresh all personal Buffs, Debuffs, and Passives and pause them for 20 seconds.
Deal a burst of 200.0 Energy Damage. Additionally, detonate all Sable Mines, dealing an additional burst for each Mine and setting them all on cooldown.

signature.title: SILVER SHOGUN
lines: Silver Samurai lives for the big fight, yearning for a challenge. At the start of a Battlegrounds or final Quest node fight, he grants the Opponent 20.0 Combo Meter and he gains a 12.8% Power Efficiency Passive for 30 seconds.
Each hit of Special Attacks 1 and 2 gain +-0.2 Critical Rating per Daunted on the Opponent.

cards.title: BUSHIDO ~ THE WAY OF THE SAMURAI
lines: Silver Samurai can generate tachyon charges within his own body, making all his attacks deal Energy Damage and granting him -100.0% Resistance to Bleed effects.
Silver Samurai always believes in a fair fight, granting his Opponent a Combo Shield Passive while their Combo Meter is at or below 100.0.
While the Opponent's Combo Meter is below 80, Silver Samurai's second Medium Attack grants them 1000.0 Combo Meter.
If striking a non-Stunned Opponent, the first hit of Silver Samurai's Heavy Attack grants them 1000.0 Combo Meter.
If Silver Samurai’s Heavy Attack is cancelled into a Special Attack, grant the Opponent 1000.0 Combo Meter.

cards.title: DAUNTED
lines: When Silver Samurai consumes the Opponent’s Combo, they are inflicted with an indefinite 8.0% Daunted Passive for every 5 Combo consumed.
When Silver Samurai is knocked down, 100.0 personal Daunted is removed.
While the Opponent has at least 5000.0 Combo Meter or is suffering from 8+ Daunteds, Silver Samurai prepares for impact, gaining a Reinforce Passive.

cards.title: BREAK THEIR FORM
lines: While Silver Samurai is Unblockable, the Opponent is inflicted with a 35.0% Overload Passive.

After Silver Samurai consumes the Opponent’s Combo Meter, if the Opponent is suffering from 1600.0+ Daunted effects, he gains an Unblockable Passive for 7 seconds, paused during Special Attacks and Strikers. This will not trigger while already active.
When this Unblockable expires, remove 5000.0% of Silver Samurai's personal Daunteds. Against Tech Champions, remove 66% instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation and on the first two hits of this attack, consume up to 1000.0 Combo from the Opponent’s Combo Meter.
During this attack, increase the potency of Silver Samurai's Overload Passives by 10.0% per Daunted on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit consumes up to 10000.0 Combo from the Opponent’s Combo Meter.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a non-stacking -35.0% Power Efficiency Passive for 30 seconds.
Inflict a non-stacking 15.0% Overload Passive for 60 seconds.

synergy.note: When the champion gains 4+ Buffs, gain an Aptitude Buff, increasing the potency of Precision, Fury and Armor Up Buffs by 25% for 15 seconds. Cooldown: 15 seconds.

Silver Surfer: If this Champion is a Herald, performing Special Attack 1 while the current dormant icon’s corresponding Buffs exist will refresh all active Buffs and grant a True Sense Buff for 15 seconds. This ability cannot be activated while all 3 Rotating Buffs are active.

signature.title: ENERGIES OF THE UNIVERSE
lines: All Buffs on Silver Surfer have 5.0% increased Potency.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Silver Surfer takes --100.0% damage from Coldsnap, Incinerate, and Shock Debuffs. Each stack of these Debuffs count as a Unique Buff for any of Silver Surfer's abilities.
Each hit deals a Burst of 12.5 Energy Damage for each Unique Buff. This scales with base attack only.

cards.title: THE POWER COSMIC BUFF
lines: At the start of the Fight, Silver Surfer generates an indefinite Power Cosmic Buff. If this Buff ends for any reason it will return in 9 seconds.
While the Power Cosmic Buff is active Silver Surfer rotates between dormant icons every 2 seconds in the order of Combat Power Rate, Fury, then Armor Up.
Consuming the Power Cosmic Buff converts the dormant icon into an active Buff and inflicts 3 Armor Break Debuffs each reducing the Opponent's Armor Rating by -15.0 for 12 seconds. Max 3 Stacks.

cards.title: ROTATING BUFFS
lines: Refresh the expiry of all active Buffs when creating a Rotating Buff that does not already exist.
Combat Power Rate: Increase Combat Power Rate by 15.0% for 15 seconds.
Fury: Increase Attack Rating by 50.0 for 24 seconds.
Armor Up: Increase Armor Rating by 50.0 for 24 seconds.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: If available, consume the Power Cosmic Buff and create a Phase Buff, causing Opponent's 100.0% chance to Miss for 1.1 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Pause the Duration of Silver Surfer's Power Cosmic Buff Cooldown, his Rotating Dormant icons, and all active Buffs until the Special Attack ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If available, consume the Power Cosmic Buff and create 2 Buffs based on whichever dormant icon was active.
If at least 300.0 Unique Buffs are active when launching this Special Attack gain a Vigilance Buff allowing all attacks to bypass Miss for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Silver Surfer increases the potency of any bursts of Energy or Physical damage by 180.0% for the duration of this Special Attack.
If at least 3 Unique Buffs are active when launching this Special Attack, Silver Surfer creates an Unblockable Buff for 4 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain an Aptitude Buff increasing the potency of Silver Surfers Fury, Armor Up and Precision Buffs by 25.0% for 24 seconds, then Retrigger each of Silver Surfers active Rotating Buffs. Max 1.
Each Aptitude Buff on Silver Surfer also increases the potency of his Combat Power Rate Buffs by 25.0%.

signature.title: WOLF OF THE STARS
lines: When Solvarch’s Block would be Broken due to Unblockable or Crush effects, consume 550.0 Armor Up Passives (rounded up) to gain a Steadfast Passive for 2 seconds. If the hit is from a Special Attack reduce the Armor Up cost by 50% (rounded down).
While Solvarch has a Steadfast, they are Immune to Crush.

cards.title: TECHNICAL EIDOL PHYSIOLOGY
lines: Solvarch is a Tech Eidol and thus has a Fractured Power Bar and is Immune to Bleed and Poison effects.
Solvarch’s Regeneration Rate cannot be reduced below 50.0%. Against Mutants it cannot be reduced below 100.0%.
Solvarch's Parry Mastery can trigger its Stun against non-contact attacks.
Solvarch cannot land Critical Hits, but gains +15.0 Attack Rating for each Energize effect on them.

cards.title: ARMOR UPS
lines: Start each fight with 5 indefinite Armor Up Passives granting +20.0 Armor Rating. These Armor Up Passives can be removed by Armor Breaks.
While Solvarch has any Armor Up effect, the Opponent's Critical Penetration is reduced by --80.0% flat.

cards.title: ISO CORE
lines: The ISO Core inside Solvarch’s chest can be in either Absorb Mode or Release Mode, starting each fight in Absorb Mode with 2500.0 Core Charge.
Against non-Cosmic Opponents, when Charged to 100, Solvarch inflicts a non-stacking 50.0% Kinetic Discharge Passive for 10 seconds, paused while at 100 Core Charge.
When Solvarch takes Energy Damage they Passively Regenerate 50.0% of the damage taken and build 10.0 Core Charge.
When Solvarch takes damage from a Mutant, they build 1000.0 Core Charge.
When the Opponent is inflicted with a Coldsnap Debuff, Solvarch builds 500.0 Core Charge.
When Solvarch activates a Special Attack, they build 1000.0 Core Charge for each full Bar of Power remaining.

cards.title: ISO CORE
lines: Build 100.0 Core Charge every second.
Solvarch's second Medium Attack inflicts a Coldsnap Debuff dealing 30.0 Energy Damage over 20 seconds.

cards.title: ISO CORE
lines: Lose -400.0 Core Charge every second.
Gain a Reverb Passive with up to 300.0% potency based on current Core Charge.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Tapping Block during Solvarch’s Special Attacks grants bonuses for each tap.
Absorb Mode: Consume 10 Core Charge to gain an indefinite Armor Up Passive granting +20.0 Armor Rating. Max stacks: 10. These Armor Up Passives can be removed by Armor Breaks.
Release Mode: Consume 1 Armor Up effect to gain a +15.0% Energize Passive for 14 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. Max stacks: 10.
Solvarch gains an additional +50.0% Combat Power Rate while at max Energize stacks.
As a Defender, Solvarch converts all available Core Charge or half of available Armor Ups over the course of their Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, switch the ISO Core Mode.
Absorb Mode: If Solvarch has at least 5 Armor Up Passives, the final hit Power Drains 30.0% of the Opponent's current Power.
Release Mode: If Solvarch has at least 5 Energize Passives, the final hit inflicts a Stun Debuff for 2.5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Absorb Mode: The final hit inflicts a Power Drain Debuff, draining 2.0% of the Opponent’s current Power per second, for 10 seconds, paused while in Absorb Mode.
Release Mode: The final hit inflicts a Heal Block Passive for 15 seconds, paused while in Release Mode.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: At the end of this attack, consume all of Solvarch's Core Charge and enter Absorb Mode.

synergy.note: Gain Passive Prowess whenever a Blessing activates, increasing Special Attack damage by 15%. These last until the end of the Synergy Champion's next Special Attack, and are capped at 3.

signature.title: RING OF OBLIVION
lines: Sorcerer Supreme gains +9.4% Ability Accuracy.
The Potency of Blessings is increased by 4.7%.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Basic attacks deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
Sorcerer Supreme gains 70.0% less Power from Attacking, Blocking, and being Struck, but gains 25.0% of her Max Power every 9 second(s).

cards.title: PASSIVE - BLESSINGS OF THE REALM
lines: Sorcerer Supreme rotates between different Blessings every 8 second(s), in the order of Cyttorak’s Ferocity, Raggadorr’s Resolve, and Ikonn’s Ingenuity.
Each fight starts in Cyttorak’s Ferocity, unless a different Blessing is chosen on the Pre-Fight Screen.
Cyttorak’s Ferocity grants +50.0 Attack Rating and increased Critical Damage Rating.
Raggadorr’s Resolve grants +40.0 Armor and 30.0% Perfect Block chance.
Ikonn’s Ingenuity grants all hits Power Steal for 3.0% of the Opponent’s current Power. Sorcerer Supreme gains 150.0% of the Power Stolen.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: All Special Attacks store Runes of the current Blessing. Stored Runes have no effect.
After Runes are stored, Sorcerer Supreme then consumes up to 100.0 of each Rune to trigger different effects.
Runes of Cyttorak Armor Break the Opponent for 12 second(s), reducing Armor Rating by --50.0.
Runes of Raggadorr Passively Regenerate Sorcerer Supreme for 2.0 Health over 12 second(s). While this is active, Sorcerer Supreme Regenerates 75.0% of the damage she takes from Blocked Hits.
Runes of Ikonn Slow the Opponent for 12 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Store 200.0 Rune(s) of the current Blessing.
The first hit has a 100.0% chance to Nullify 100.0 Buff off the Opponent.
After this attack, Sorcerer Supreme casts a Nullification Aura around herself for 10 second(s). Every 75.0 second(s) the Opponent spends in the Aura, 1.0 of their Buffs is Nullified.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Store 300.0 Rune(s) of the current Blessing.
After consuming Runes, Pause all Rune effects until 5 second(s) after this attack ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: The first time this is used in a fight, store a permanent Rune of the current Blessing. This Rune is never consumed.
Subsequent uses store 2 non-permanent Runes instead.
Attack Rating is increased by up to +300.0 based on stored Runes.

signature.title: WEB WARRIOR
lines: With greater experience in the Contest, Spider-Gwen learns to do whatever a spider can and gains the following ability improvements:
Slow Debuff lasts 49.0 seconds longer.
+4.0 Critical Damage Rating for each Spider-Sense charge.
Special 2 Stun reduces Power & Health gains by an extra +-4.0%.
+9.0% Hunter-Spider and Trap-Spider ability duration.

cards.title: SPIDER-SENSE
lines: Spider-Gwen begins each fight with 1 charge of Spider-Sense active. Each charge grants +15.0 Attack Rating and a 7.0% chance to Evade all Champion Attacks. Max: 5 charges.
When struck 500.0 times, gain 1 Spider-Sense charge.
100.0% chance when struck by an opponent with a True Strike Buff to Nullify that Buff and gain a Spider-Sense charge.

cards.title: EVADE EFFECTS
lines: +550.0% Evade Ability Accuracy vs. Unblockable Special Attacks.
While Blocking, this Champion will not attempt to Evade.

cards.title: EVADE AN ATTACK OR LAND A COMBO-ENDING ATTACK
lines: Active Hunter-Spider and Trap-Spider effects have their effect duration paused for 0.5 seconds. During Special Attacks, these effects are also paused for the full duration of the attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100% chance to gain a Passive Trap-Spider effect for 10 seconds. This grants +55.0 Critical Damage Rating and allows attacks a 30.0% chance to Enervate the opponent, preventing them from gaining Power when struck for 5 seconds.
Gain 100.0 Spider-Sense charge after activating this attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a 4 second Stun Debuff.
This Stun Debuff also reduces Regeneration Rate and Combat Power Rate by -80.0% while active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to gain a Passive Hunter-Spider effect for 18 seconds, causing each attack to deal a burst of extra Physical Damage equal to 55.0% of Spider-Gwen’s attack damage dealt.

synergy.note: When triggering Porker Poppers 30% chance to inflict a Concussion Debuff, reducing Ability Accuracy by 40% for 10 second(s).

signature.title: HAMMING IT UP
lines: Whenever Spider-Ham Evades, he places a Porker Popper on the Opponent.
Whenever Spider-Ham is Struck while Stunned, 30.0% chance to remove 100.0 Spider-Nonsense and place a non-stacking Porker Popper on the Opponent.
These Porker Poppers last for 6.9295 second(s) and deal 35.0 Damage.
While Spider-Nonsense is at 10, it lasts for an additional 18.2 second(s) before resetting.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: +12.0 Physical Resistance.

cards.title: SPIDER-NONSENSE
lines: Spider-Ham’s cartoonish nature increases the more danger he is in. Spider-Nonsense starts at 0 and increases over time as long as the Opponent has at least 100.0 Bar of Power, increasing faster for each additional Bar of Power they have.
Every stack of Spider-Nonsense reduces Degeneration effect potency by 15.0%, and Passively reduces damage taken during the Opponent’s Special Attacks by 5.0%.
While Spider-Nonsense is at 600.0 or more, Spider-Ham has a 35.0% chance to Evade. This Evade will not trigger while Blocking.
While Spider-Nonsense is at 10, Spider-Ham will not gain any for 6.5 second(s), after which it resets back to 0.0. Spider-Nonsense resets to 300.0 against Mystic Champions.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Remove 200.0 Spider-Nonsense.

cards.title: MEDIUM ATTACKS
lines: 50.0% chance to place a Porker Popper on the Opponent for 9 second(s), dealing 60.0 Direct Damage when they activate a Special Attack.
The chance is increased by 25.0% flat if the Opponent is Stunned or Spider-Ham is Unblockable.

cards.title: DASH BACK AND HOLD BLOCK
lines: Activate Spider-Sense, granting 100.0% chance to Evade. This Evade will trigger even while Blocking.
When this Evade triggers, Spider-Sense goes on cooldown for 12 second(s).

cards.title: EVADE EFFECTS
lines: Whenever Spider-Ham Evades, he becomes Unblockable for 1.2 seconds and inflicts the Opponent with a Taunt Debuff for 700.0 seconds.

cards.title: PORKER POPPERS
lines: Any Power Sting Debuff on the Opponent is automatically upgraded into a Patent Pending Peter Porker Power Popper Debuff. Porker Poppers are still treated as Power Stings for all other abilities.
Whenever a Porker Popper is triggered, there is a 8.5% chance per Spider-Nonsense for it to be replaced by 1 new Porker Popper(s), each lasting 9 second(s) and dealing 60.0 Damage.
Porker Poppers deal a burst of up to 75.0 additional Passive Direct Damage when they trigger, scaling with how much Power the Opponent had.
The additional damage is increased by 60.0% for each Bar of Power the Opponent had when they were triggered.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: After this Special Attack, Taunt the Opponent for 7 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack is Unblockable if the Opponent is Taunted.
Set Spider-Nonsense to 1000.0, and pause its reset timer for 7 second(s).
Place 3.0 Porker Poppers on the Opponent, each lasting 9 second(s) and dealing 60.0 Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If the Opponent has triggered fewer than 15 Porker Poppers in this fight, place 400.0 Porker Popper(s) on them.

If the Opponent has triggered 15 or more Porker Poppers in this fight, place a Porker Popper on them for every Porker Popper that was triggered. This can only occur once per fight. Max: 2500.0 Porker Poppers.
Each Porker Popper placed by this Attack lasts for 10 second(s) and deals 60.0 Damage.

synergy.note: Special Attack 3 inflicts a Poison Debuff, dealing 85% of Attack in Direct Damage and reducing health recovery by 30% over 25 second(s).

signature.title: PERSISTENT RUPTURES
lines: Ruptures have 10.0% chance to not be consumed when a Burst of Physical Damage triggers.
+5.0% Combat Power Rate while the Opponent is affected by a Wither Debuff.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Spider-Man 2099 is immune to Buffs. Whenever a Buff is prevented by immunity he instead pauses his personal Debuffs for 5 second(s). Personal Stun Debuffs cannot be paused.
While Dodging backward, Spider-Man 2099 is not struck by attacks. Dodging an attack this way triggers his Debuff pausing ability.
Gain 75.0% Damage Resistance if the Opponent is under the effect of True Strike or if the hit deals True Damage.

cards.title: RUPTURE
lines: Light and Medium attacks have 25.0% chance to inflict Rupture, dealing 20.0 Physical Damage over 10 second(s). 100% chance to inflict Rupture on a block if the Opponent is suffering from a Wither Debuff.
An Opponent takes a Burst of 30.0 Physical Damage for each Rupture on them if they reach zero power or when they gain a bar of Power. Ruptures are consumed after this effect takes place.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflict an Exhaustion Debuff, decreasing Critical Damage Rating by -15.0 and the potency of their Power Gain effects by 15.0% for 15 second(s). Max 5 stacks.

cards.title: RESISTANCE UP
lines: When attacked there is a 100.0% chance to gain an indefinite 4.0 Resistance Up Passive.

Interrupting Spider-Man 2099 while he is charging a Heavy Attack removes all Resistance Up stacks. If at least 20.0 stacks were removed this way, he inflicts a Wither Debuff with a potency of 12500.0% for 20 second(s).
When Spider-Man 2099 pauses his personal Debuffs, he consumes 500.0 stacks of Resistance Up and increases the pause duration by 5 second(s). This effect has a 10.0 second(s) cooldown.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Last three hits have 100.0% chance to inflict Physical Vulnerability Debuff, decreasing Physical Resistance by -10.0 for 15 second(s). Max 15 stacks
On activation gain 15.0 stacks of Resistance Up Passive, increasing Physical Resistance and Energy Resistance by 4.0.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation inflicts a Wither Debuff with a potency of 125.0% for 15 second(s). Max 5.0 stacks.
Each hit deals a Burst of 37.5 Physical Damage per Unique Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Stun Debuff for 4 second(s).
Inflict a Slow Debuff, lasting 25 second(s). Slow counts as 400.0 Unique Debuffs.

synergy.note: Heavy Attack inflicts a non-stacking Injury Debuff for 13 seconds. Hitting an Injured Opponent bypasses 100% of Physical Resistance.
On Evade, inflict a Physical Vulnerability Debuff reducing the Opponent’s Physical Resistance by 413 for 30 second(s).

Spider-Man can use Perfect-Timing while performing a Well-Timed Block or Dodging an attack to inflict a Physical Vulnerability Debuff reducing the Opponent’s Physical Resistance by 1400 for 30 seconds. Max 3 stack(s).

Gain a Lizard Regeneration Passive at the start of each fight, granting +600 Attack Rating and recovering 2% of Base Health over 20 seconds. Increase the amount healed by Lizard Regeneration by +3% flat.
While at 5+ Webbing, inflict an indefinite Shock Debuff dealing 60% of Attack as Energy Damage per second.
If this Champion is a Wasp-Totem, Spider-Man’s personal Taunt Ability Accuracy is increased by 75%. Additionally, at 7+ Webbing, inflict a 30% Wither Debuff.

signature.title: SPIDER-SENSE
lines: Increased agility coupled with a sixth sense for imminent danger grants a 6.0% chance to Evade attacks. This does not trigger while Blocking, unless the attack is Unblockable.
The duration of Spider-Man’s personal Taunts is increased by 6.1 seconds.
The potency of Spider-Man’s personal Taunts is increased by 0.0% flat.
400.0+ Webbing: The Debuffs from Webbing can stack up to -1 times.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Spider-Man’s Basic Attacks have a 25.0% chance to inflict a Taunt Debuff for 7 seconds, reducing their Attack Rating by 1.0%. This chance increases by a flat -1% against Stunned Opponents.
Spider-Man has a 2.0% chance to Evade attacks for each Taunt effect on the Opponent. This does not trigger while Blocking, unless the attack is Unblockable.
The duration of Stun Debuffs on non-Skill Opponents cannot be reduced, and while the Opponent is Stunned their Ability Power Rate is reduced by -50.0%.

cards.title: WEBBING
lines: Spider-Man uses his Special Attacks to web up his Opponent. As more Webbing is applied, the Opponent suffers various non-stacking Debuffs. Webbing falls off slowly as the Opponent attacks and moves.
-1+ Webbing: Debilitate Debuff of 35.0% potency.
-1+ Webbing: Decelerate Debuff of -50.0% potency.
-1+ Webbing: Suppression Debuff of -15.0% potency.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: While this Stun is active, the Opponent’s Physical Resistance is lowered by -30.0 for each Taunt on them.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Applies -1 stacks of Webbing.

signature.title: WHATEVER A SPIDER CAN
lines: Each time Miles completes a Spider-Challenge he gains a Passive Fury increasing Attack Rating by +35.0 for 12 seconds.
Additionally, he may now complete Spider-Challenges multiple times during the fight instead of just once each. However, each Spider-Challenge can still only grant 1 Spider-Sense Charge.

cards.title: WELL TIMED BLOCKS
lines: While performing a Well-Timed Block, Miles will not attempt to utilize his personal Evade or Miss.

cards.title: SPIDER-CHALLENGES
lines: To learn to be a hero, Miles Morales has a list of Spider-Challenges he can complete each fight. Completing a Spider-Challenge grants an indefinite Spider-Sense Charge. Max Charges: 300.0.
Each Spider-Sense Charge grants a Passive 7.0% chance to Evade incoming attacks as well as +10.0 Attack Rating.

cards.title: SPIDER-CHALLENGES
lines: Block 1500.0 attacks. Well-Timed Blocks count as 3 Attacks.
Land 5000.0 attacks. Intercepting attacks count as 10 hits.
Avoid 1000.0 attacks with Evade, Miss or the Dexterity Mastery. Special Attacks count as 2 hits each.

cards.title: SPIDER-CAMO
lines: Each time the opponent launches a Special Attack, Miles’ burgeoning abilities grant him a Spider-Camo Passive which is unaffected by Ability Accuracy and lasts 8 seconds.
Spider-Camo grants Attacks a 35.0% chance to Miss. This Miss chance is tripled against Unblockable attacks.
Spider-Camo also enhances Heavy and Special Attacks.
Once all Spider-Challenges are complete, Miles is In The Zone for the rest of the fight. While In The Zone, Spider-Camo will also activate each time Miles launches a Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Camo: Weakness gains +1000.0 seconds duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Camo: This Shock gains +30.0% Potency for each personal Unique Debuff that has been activated on the opponent this fight.

synergy.note: While the Opponent has more than 2 Bars of Power, inflict a Passive 65% Wither Debuff.

signature.title: SESHNAG
lines: Each Buff on the Opponent reduces the duration of Inexorable and Unstoppable effects on them by 3.0%, to a maximum of 80.0%.
Personal Energy Vulnerabilities are paused during Pavitr’s Special Attacks, and for 1.9697 seconds after for each level of the Special.
For every -1% of the Opponent’s missing Health, Pavitr’s Marked Passive gains 100.0% base potency, even if already active.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Pavitr’s attacks deal a burst of 6.0 Energy Damage and do not make contact with Cosmic Opponents.
For each Buff on the Opponent, Pavitr gains a 2.0% chance to Evade incoming attacks. Pavitr will not Evade while Blocking a Basic Attack.
Being Spider-Man is so easy that Pavitr does not need to benefit from the Mystic Dispersion Mastery.
Pavitr can toggle whether he starts to run after idling by double tapping Block during his Heavy or Special Attacks.

cards.title: SHAPE THE BATTLEFIELD
lines: At the start of each fight, Pavitr summons three Mystic Webs onto the stage, one at each wall and another in the center.

When Pavitr’s Opponent passes through a Mystic Web, it binds to them, placing a Spider-Seal Buff on them. The webs will then reform after 3 seconds, or instantly when Pavitr activates a Special Attack.
If Pavitr knocks his Opponent through a Mystic Web during a Special Attack, he places two additional Spider-Seals on them for each level of the Special Attack.

cards.title: THE SUBTLE BODY
lines: When the Opponent gains 1+ Buffs, Pavitr Power Steals 200.0% of their Max Power or 4% of their current Power, whichever is more.
This Power Steal’s base potency is increased by 12500.0% while the Opponent has an Energize or Power Gain Buff, and it does not trigger when the Opponent has 3 Bars of Power.

cards.title: TITAN HUNTER
lines: During the Opponent’s Special Attacks, Pavitr inflicts a 3500.0% Neutralize Passive for the duration of the attack and for 2 seconds afterwards. This Neutralize reduces the Ability Accuracy of True Buffs by an additional non-stacking 50.0%.
When a Buff is prevented by Neutralize or Marked, Pavitr places a Spider-Seal Buff on the Opponent.

cards.title: SEAL AWAY EVIL - SPIDER-SEAL BUFFS
lines: Spider-Seals are indefinite and have no effect on their own. Pavitr gains benefits based on how many are active on his Opponent.
500.0+ Seals: The Opponent acts more aggressively when not within striking distance, and Pavitr inflicts a second Neutralize during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.
1000.0+ Seals: Personal bursts of damage gain 400.0% increased potency.
15.0+ Seals: Activating a Special Attack grants a +17.0 Fury Passive for 45 seconds. Reaching 15.0 Seals for the first time during a Special Attack also grants this Fury. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The final hit Nullifies 1 Fury Buff and inflicts a Power Steal Passive, stealing 50.0% of a Bar of Power over 5 seconds. Cooldown: -1 seconds.

cards.title: WAITING TO STRIKE
lines: When Pavitr activates a Special Attack during the Opponent’s Dash or immediately upon Dodging, inflict a -20.0 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 18 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a -35.0% Marked Passive for 24 seconds, refreshed when Pavitr performs any Special Attack, unless he is Poisoned.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: During this attack, Pavitr gains an additional +22.0 Attack Rating for each personal Fury active.
The final hit consumes all but -1 Spider-Seals on the Opponent to deal a burst of 120.0 Energy Damage. Base potency is increased by 10% for each Buff consumed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Pavitr finishes this attack in the same place he activated it if he is on the Opponent’s side of the field.

synergy.note: On a Well Timed Block 33% chance to gain a Bulwark Passive, granting 700 Block Proficiency for 10 second(s).
Refreshing a Taunt by Dodging Back and Idling for 1 second also inflicts a Cowardice Debuff on the Opponent reducing Special Attack Damage by 25% for 10 seconds.
Medium Attacks inflict a Rupture Debuffs dealing 20% of Attack over 2 seconds.

signature.title: HERO'S MANTRA
lines: Great Power (Above 50% Health) - Spider-Man’s Taunt Debuffs last 2 seconds longer and each charge of Poise grants him an additional 10.0 Critical Rating.
Great Responsibility (Below 50% Health) - Spider-Man’s chance to Evade an attack increases by a flat +7.0% and each charge of Poise grants him 2.0 additional Block Proficiency.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED
lines: Spider-Man’s burgeoning Spider-Sense grants him a Passive 3.0% chance to Evade an incoming attack.

cards.title: STARK TECH AI
lines: Against Special Attacks the Stark AI warns Spider-Man of incoming danger and increases his Evade chance by a flat +60.0%.
If Spider-Man is struck by a Cosmic Champion or is struck by a Heavy Attack the Stark AI shuts down for 10 seconds while it Reboots and is completely inactive during that time.

cards.title: SMACK-TALK
lines: Each time Spider-Man Evades an attack or uses the Dexterity Mastery, he gains a charge of Poise. Cooldown: 0.8 Seconds.
Each charge of Poise grants 20.0 Attack rating.
If Spider-Man lands 500.0 uninterrupted attacks, he converts a Poise charge into a Taunt Debuff on the opponent for 3 seconds. Taunt effects lasts 50.0% longer against Villain champions.
Dodging back and allowing Spider-Man to idle for 1 seconds allows him to smack-talk his opponent and refresh an active Taunt.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: An EMP webshot drains 45.0% of the opponent’s Power Meter. Cooldown: 30 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 50.0% chance to Stun the opponent for 2 seconds. The chance is increased by 100.0% if the Stark AI is active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to Ensnare the opponent for 18 seconds. Ensnared Champions suffer 30.0% reduced Ability Accuracy and cannot trigger Passive Evade effects.

signature.title: S.H.I.E.L.D. ENHANCED SPIDER
lines: Increases the Potency of Fury Passives by 9.5%.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Spider-Man gains +40.0 Critical Rating versus Sinister Six and Symbiote champions.
When a Web Cartridge Debuff is replaced, gain a Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by 150.0 for 25 seconds.

cards.title: SPIDER-SENSE
lines: Spider-Man begins the fight with a Spider-Sense Charge granting him a Passive 100.0% chance to Evade incoming Basic Attacks when not Blocking.
When Spider-Man Evades an attack with his Spider-Sense, it goes on cooldown for 25 seconds.
Dashing back pauses Fury and Precision Passives for 3.5 seconds.

cards.title: S.H.I.E.L.D. WEB-SHOOTERS
lines: Spider-Man has 1 Persistent Charge which can be consumed before the fight to load either a Tranquilizer, Web-Foam, or Flash Bang Cartridge into his web-shooters. Only 1 type of Cartridge may be loaded.
Spider-Man starts the fight with 500.0 Charges of his loaded Web Cartridge.
If no Cartridge type is loaded, Spider-Man brings in Flash Bang Web Cartridges by default.
Spider-Man expends Web Cartridge Charges inflicting Web Cartridge Debuffs when striking with Light Attack 4 or Special Attack 2.
At the start of the fight, gain back 1 Persistent Charge if it was spent.

cards.title: S.H.I.E.L.D. WEB CARTRIDGE DEBUFFS
lines: Tranquilizer - 100% chance to inflict Enervate preventing the Opponent from gaining Power when struck for 3.75 seconds.
Web-Foam - 100% chance to inflict a Slow Debuff for 12 seconds. While the opponent is Slowed Spider-Man cannot Miss.
Flash Bang - 100% chance to inflict a Fragility Debuff. When attacking a Fragile Opponent, increase Critical Damage Rating by 180.0 and decrease their Block Proficiency by 50% for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Re-activates Spider-Sense if it is on cooldown.
If Spider-Sense is not on cooldown, gain a Precision Passive increasing Critical Rating by 80.0 for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The last two hits of this attack each expend a Web Cartridge Charge to inflict a Web Cartridge Debuff. These Debuffs have 250.0% duration.
The duration increase lasts until a Web Cartridge Debuff expires. Debuffs that are replaced do not count as having expired.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain back all spent Web Cartridge Charges.

signature.title: ARACHNOMANCY
lines: Blessing of the Astral Form: Gain 1.0% of Max Power when its cooldown triggers.
Blessing of the Spider Totem: Increases the Potency of Bursts of Energy Damage by 5.0%.
Blessing of the Web: Increase the Potency of granted Buffs by 5.0%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Both Champion’s First Medium Attack grants an indefinite Spider-Seal Buff to the Opponent that has no effect. Max 20.
Bursts of Energy Damage, personal Passive effects and Buffs cannot have their Ability Accuracy modified.
Each Unique Buff on the Opponent reduces their Ability Power Rate by -33.0%. The Power denied is transferred to Spider-Man.
When Spider-Seal is nullified or expires, Mystic Dispersion does not grant Power; instead it deals a Burst of 4.1 Energy Damage for every 1% of Power not gained.

cards.title: BLESSING OF THE ASTRAL FORM
lines: When the Opponent gains a Spider-Seal, Unblockable or Unstoppable Buff, Spider-Man gains the Blessing of the Astral Form, causing incoming Attacks to Miss for 3 second(s). Spider-Man can Block while this Blessing is active, unless the Opponent has an Unblockable Buff. This effect cannot be refreshed.
Nullifying Spider-Seal Buffs also triggers this Blessing and intercepting the Opponent while this Blessing is active grants 300.0 Spider-Seal Buffs to the Opponent.
If a Miss is triggered, this effect goes on Cooldown for 20 second(s), minus 300.0 per Unique Buff on the Opponent to a minimum of 10.0 second(s). Unblockable Buff attacks ignore this cooldown.

cards.title: BLESSING OF THE SPIDER-TOTEM
lines: When the Opponent gains a Buff, Spider-Man gains a Totem Charge. At 2000.0 Totems, or half as much as a Defender, he activates the Blessing of the Spider Totem, lasting for 20 second(s) and granting the benefits listed below:
His own First Medium Attacks Nullify Spider-Seal Buffs instead of granting them, dealing a Burst of 19.0 Energy Damage if a Spider-Seal was nullified.
Gain 55.0 Attack Rating, Combat Power Rate is reduced by 70%, but gains 25.0% of Max Power every 9 second(s).
When the Opponent gains a Buff, they also gain a Spider-Seal Buff and pause this Blessing for 1 second(s). Pause also triggers when nullifying a Spider-Seal.

cards.title: BLESSING OF THE WEB
lines: Heavy Attack grants the Blessing of the Web for 15 second(s). When the Opponent gains Fury, Precision, Cruelty, Armor Up, Regeneration or Pierce Buffs, Spider-Man gains the same Buff with its listed Potency and duration.
20.0% Potency Fury, Precision, Cruelty, Armor Up, and Pierce, and Regeneration, granting 220.0% of Max health. All Buffs last 10 seconds.
As a Defender, gain this Blessing every 15 second(s) unless struck by a Heavy Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit grants 100.0 Spider-Seal Buff to the Opponent.
Blessing of the Web: Last hit inflicts the Curse of the Web, reducing the Potency of Fury, Precision, Cruelty, Armor Up, Regeneration and Pierce Buffs by 95.0% for 20 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Last 3 hits deal 37.5 Energy Damage.
Blessing of the Spider Totem: Each hit Nullifies 1 Spider-Seal Buff and deals a burst of 49.0 Energy Damage per Buff nullified.
Both of these effects go through the Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Root Passive for 4 second(s). Rooted Champions cannot move, but can still Attack, Block and Dodge. Activating a Special Attack removes Root and prevents it from applying.
While the Opponent is rooted, any contact Power Steals for 200.0% of the Opponent’s current Power, gains 100.0% of the Power stolen, and any contact grants Spider-Seal Buffs to the Opponent.

synergy.note: Can activate a Pre-Fight Ability granting Immunity to Reverse Controls, but Controls are inverted for the whole fight.

signature.title: ENCORE!!
lines: When the Opponent finishes a Special Attack, inflict an Encore Passive for the corresponding Special. While an Encore is active, the Opponent is 70% more likely to throw the same Special Attack. Max stacks: -1. Encore Passives are removed if the Opponent performs a Special Attack different than the active Encore.
For each Encore Passive active, the Opponent’s Attack Rating during Special Attacks is reduced by 0.0%.
Inflicting an Encore Passive while an Encore is already active has a 0.0% chance to inflict a personal Rupture Debuff. This is not affected by Ability Accuracy modification.

cards.title: REBELLIOUS SPIRIT
lines: Spider-Punk’s brain and body have been annihilated countless times at concerts, granting him Immunity to Concussion Debuffs and Rupture effects.
Spider-Punk hates labels. For each #Tag on the Opponent and on Spider-Punk, Spider-Punk gains +0.3 Attack Rating.
Spider-Punk will Rupture his Opponent’s ears off. Personal Rupture Debuffs deal 110.0 Physical Damage over 14 seconds. Max stacks: -1. As a Defender, these scale with Base Attack only.
When Spider-Punk Intercepts his Opponent, he inflicts a -40.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 18 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: COUNTERCULTURE COUNTER-ATTACK
lines: When Spider-Punk would perform a Well-Timed Block against Basic Attacks, he has a 100.0% chance to Evade instead, inflicting a Stun Passive for 3 seconds. This Stun is removed when the Opponent is struck twice. This Evade has a cooldown of 1600.0 seconds.

While this cooldown is active, when Spider-Punk would be struck by a Light or Medium attack while Dashing forward, he has a 100.0% chance to Evade the hit, inflicting a Stun Passive for 2 seconds. As a Defender, this ability is always active.
Inflicting a personal Physical Vulnerability Debuff shortens the active cooldown by -1 seconds.

cards.title: CROWD MEMBERS
lines: Spider-Punk gathers a crowd wherever he goes. As a Defender or while fighting in Battlegrounds or Duels, start with 15000.0 Crowd Members. Otherwise, start with 0 Crowd Members.
When defeating an Opponent, half of Spider-Punk’s Crowd Members stay with him for his next match. If Spider-Punk is defeated, he loses all Crowd Members.

When either Champion Dodges a Special Attack or Punishes their Opponent’s Special Attack, Spider-Punk gains 1000.0 Crowd Members for each Bar of Power spent on the Special Attack. Cooldown: 0.2 seconds.
When Spider-Punk Evades after performing a Well-Timed Block, gain 3000.0 Crowd Members.
Knocking down Spider-Punk causes -1500.0 Crowd Members to leave.

cards.title: CROWD EFFECTS
lines: Crowd hype cranks the amps up to 11, increasing the potency of personal Ruptures by up to 182.0% based on Crowd Member count.
Above 200 Crowd Members, when Spider-Punk activates a Special Attack he gains an Unstoppable Passive for 3 seconds, paused until the end of the Special Attack.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit refreshes all personal Physical Vulnerability Debuffs.
The final hit inflicts a Taunt Debuff for 2 seconds and grants the Opponent no Power if they are above 1 Bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, remove all personal Ruptures on the Opponent. For each Rupture removed, each hit inflicts an Instant Rupture dealing a burst of up to 32.5 Physical Damage based on remaining time left on the Ruptures relative to the base Rupture duration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final 3 hits are guitar strum attacks that inflict a personal Rupture Debuff. These can be inflicted through Blocks that are not Well-Timed.

As an Attacker, three Chords are generated. Swiping up or down while the Chords are active amplifies the hit, bringing in 1000.0 Crowd Members. If all hits are amplified, inflict an additional Rupture.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Once per fight, personal Ruptures have their duration permanently increased by 25.0%.
Inflict 300.0 personal Rupture Debuffs.
If a Perfect result is achieved in the Special 3 Mini Game, Spider-Punk gains 15000.0 Crowd Members. This becomes 125 if the result was semi-perfect, or 100.0 if the Mini Game failed.

synergy.note: Completing a Headline inflicts a Degeneration Passive dealing 80% of Attack as Direct Damage over 5 seconds.
Completing a Headline grants a 4% missing Health Self-Repair Buff for 5 seconds.

signature.title: COWARDS HIDE BEHIND MASKS
lines: A completed Headline inflicts a 9.9% Cowardice Passive for 12 seconds and refreshes existing ones. These are paused during Special Attacks. Max stacks: -1.

Once per fight when J. Jonah takes a picture of the Opponent, he gains an indefinite +3.0 Austere Armor Up Buff. This Armor Up persists between fights if J. Jonah defeats the menace with at least one of these Armor Ups active. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: The Spider-Slayer’s robotics have thorough protection for J. Jonah’s physical body, providing Immunity to Bleed and Poison.

J. Jonah isn’t trained to land Critical Hits. When he would land a Critical Hit, the Spider-Slayer suit instead inflicts Instant Shocks dealing Energy Damage equal to the Critical Damage the hit would have dealt.
As a Defender, J. Jonah’s Shocks and Power Burns deal -70.0% less damage.
All of J. Jonah's personal effects, as well as the Parry and Dexterity Masteries, gain 25.0% increased Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: ANGER MANAGEMENT
lines: J. Jonah Jameson has a short fuse and doesn’t like being manipulated. When he is inflicted with Taunt, Infuriate, Intimidate, or Delirium, he becomes more aggressive and filled with a +40.0 Fury Passive for 12 seconds. Max stacks: 10.
J. Jonah’s personal Furies cannot end during his Special Attacks.
Similarly, J. Jonah is a natural at riling up his detractors. When the Opponent hits J. Jonah’s Block, he inflicts them with a -50.0% Obfuscate Debuff for 5 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPIDER-SLAYER ARMOR
lines: Start each fight with an indefinite +15.0 Austere Armor Up Buff.
Armor Ups gained after the first have a potency of +2.5 and duration of 20 seconds, expiring one at a time.
J. Jonah’s Shocks and Power Burns gain 15.0% increased potency for each active Armor Up effect, up to 20 Armor Ups.

cards.title: FRONT PAGE HEADLINE
lines: J. Jonah Jameson has the best Front Page Headlines in the business. After a fight begins, J. Jonah will improvise a Headline for how he will fight the latest menace and call out an action for the Attacker to complete.
Front Page Headlines have 700.0 seconds to be completed, with a 5 second cooldown. As a Defender, these timers are swapped.
If the Attacker completes a Headline:
J. Jonah gains a Spider-Slayer Austere Armor Up Buff.
Inflict a Slow Passive for 12 seconds, paused during Special Attacks. While a #Spider-Verse Hero is suffering from a Slow effect, J. Jonah can’t Miss.
When a Headline fails, J. Jonah loses 1 personal Armor Up.
No new Headlines are created during any Special Attacks. As an Attacker, Headlines are paused during the Opponent's Special Attacks.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACK
lines: As an Attacker, landing the final hit of a Heavy Attack during a Front Page Headline refreshes the Headline with a new choice.

cards.title: SMILE FOR THE CAMERA!
lines: As an Attacker holding block, J. Jonah can Swipe Up on his controls to take a picture of the Opponent, causing a blinding flash and Passively Faltering the Opponent for 3 seconds.
As a Defender, the camera is used automatically once J. Jonah starts to Block an attack. Auto-Block won't trigger this.
This effect goes on cooldown once used, and becomes available again after 200.0 Front Page Headlines have started.
When the Opponent Misses while Faltered, J. Jonah gains a personal Fury Passive. This can only trigger once per Falter.
J. Jonah and the Opponent have increased aggression while J. Jonah’s Opponent is Faltered. While J. Jonah’s personal Falter is active, he gains Stun Immunity.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: While the Opponent is below Max Power, each Special Attack hit Power Burns them, up to a combined total of 10%, 20%, or 30% of their Max Power based on the Special Attack used.
These Power Burns deal up to 18.9 Direct Damage for every 1% of Max Power burnt.

cards.title: POSSIBLE HEADLINES
lines: The Front Page Headlines J. Jonah requests can change depending on conditions in the fight, such as the existence of certain effects on a Champion, Power level, or who he is fighting against. Possible Headline actions:
I need pictures (of Spider-Man)!
Hit a Light Attack
Hit a Medium Attack
Charge a Heavy Attack
Block an attack
Stun the Opponent
Use Dexterity to Dodge an attack

synergy.note: Against Mystic Champions, gaining a Buff inflicts a 50% Concussion Passive for 0.5 seconds which cannot affect Nodes. While in a fight, count as #Hydra and a #Villain instead of a #Hero.

signature.title: HYDRA TRAINING
lines: When a personal Fury Buff is consumed or Nullified, 10.0% chance to gain an identical Fury Passive. The total amount of personal Fury Buffs and Passives cannot exceed -1.
Intercepting the Opponent has a 10.0% chance to grant a Fury Buff.
While Dodging back during the final hit of the Opponent’s Special Attacks, Spider-Woman has a 100% chance to Evade. This Evade does not trigger if the attack is successfully Dodged.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Spider-Woman is immune to Poison, Neutralize, and Power Steal.
All personal effects, except Stun and Power Gain, are paused during any Special Attack.

cards.title: FURY BUFFS
lines: Personal Fury Buffs increase Attack Rating by +7.0 for 15 seconds. This Buff duration cannot be reduced, and refreshes on an Evade or when Dodging a Special Attack with the Dexterity Mastery. Max stacks: -1.
For every 500.0 landed Basic Attacks, gain a Fury Buff. When starting a Combo against a non-Stunned Opponent, Critical Hits count as 2 hits.
When struck, 20.0% chance to gain a Fury Buff.

cards.title: DEBUFFS
lines: When Spider-Woman gains a Buff, inflict an 8.3% Debilitate Debuff for 20 seconds. Max stacks: -1. Against Mystic Champions, this Debuff becomes a Severe Debuff.

When a Buff on Spider-Woman is Nullified, Staggered, or expires naturally, inflict a non-stacking 50.0% Wither Debuff for 1 second. When this Wither ends, she gains a Power Gain Passive granting her the Power denied while it was active over 5.0 seconds.

Every 15.0 seconds, inflict a 100.0% Severe Fumble Debuff for 7 seconds. This timer pauses during Spider-Woman’s Special Attacks, and as a Defender, this Debuff cannot be inflicted during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. While this Fumble is active, Spider-Woman's attacks cannot be Evaded.
As a Defender, when the Opponent activates a Special Attack, Fumble is removed. Additionally, Spider-Woman is more likely to use Special Attack 1 while Fumble is active.

cards.title: VENOM BLASTS
lines: Personal Shock are Instants and deal a burst of 7.0 Energy Damage.
When a Buff on Spider-Woman is Nullified, inflict 200.0 instant Shocks.
When Spider-Woman inflicts a Shock or has one prevented by an Immunity, inflict a 33.0 Severe Power Sting Debuff for 10 seconds. As a Defender, Power Stings last for 7.0 seconds.

Power Stings deal an additional Burst of 14.0 Direct Damage when they trigger, scaling up with how much Power and number of bars of Power the Opponent had. As a Defender, this damage scales with Base Attack only.

cards.title: EVADE
lines: For each non-Damaging Debuff on both Champions, Spider-Woman has a +2.0% chance to Evade incoming attacks, up to a max of 2400.0%. This Evade does not trigger while Blocking.

When an attack strikes an Unstoppable Opponent or Misses, gain a 100.0% Evade Buff for 2 seconds. An Evade from this Buff can trigger while Blocking, and when it triggers, this effect goes on cooldown for 10.0 seconds or until a Buff on Spider-Woman is Nullified or she is Immune to an effect.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts an instant Shock, and consumes a Buff on Spider-Woman to inflict a second Shock. These can be inflicted through Block.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain 500.0 Fury Buffs and refresh all Buffs on Spider-Woman.
The final hit inflicts a non-stacking 100.0% Retribution Passive for 20 seconds. When an attack strikes an Unstoppable Opponent or Misses, this effect refreshes.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict 1500.0 instant Shocks.
Inflict a Stun Passive for 4 seconds.
Gain a non-stacking 33.0% Energize Buff for 10 seconds.

synergy.note: Gain Immunity to Reversed Controls.

signature.title: MOJOWORLD STUNTWOMAN
lines: While Dancing Blades are active, Spiral Instantly Regenerates up to 30.0% of damage taken from Blocked hits.
For each Fervor on Spiral, the durations of incoming Shock, Incinerate, and Poison Debuffs are reduced by -5.0%.

cards.title: DEADLY DANCER
lines: Spiral’s magical and martial mastery grants her Immunity to Falter, and increases the Ability Accuracy of Stun effects by 100.0%.
All of Spiral’s Weapon Attacks have --1% Offensive Combat Power Rate and a 1.0% chance to inflict a 20.0 Rupture Debuff over 10 seconds, paused during Spiral’s Special Attacks.
When a personal Rupture would be inflicted on the Opponent, if they are not at Max Power, Spiral Power Steals 1.0% of their Max Power, increased by -1% flat while the Opponent has a Power Gain Buff.
For each Buff on the Opponent, Spiral’s personal Rupture potency is increased by 10.0%.
Spiral does not benefit from the Mystic Dispersion Mastery. Instead, her personal Ruptures gain +100.0 second duration for each rank invested.

cards.title: MARTIAL FERVOR
lines: Each time Spiral performs a Light Attack, Medium Attack, Heavy Attack, Dodges back, or Blocks an attack, if it is not the same action as the one performed previously, she gains a 600.0% Fervor Passive for 13 seconds.
Fervors are paused during Spiral’s Special Attacks and while the Opponent has a Power Gain Buff.
Fervors are also paused for 10 seconds upon reaching the stack limit. When the pause expires, 1000.0 Fervors are removed. Does not expire while Fervors are paused by another ability.
Spiral has 0.6 Energy and Physical Resistance for each Fervor she has gained without repeating an action.
Fervors expire 100.0% faster for each one past the first two gained consecutively without making contact with the Opponent or Blocking an attack.

cards.title: BEFORE THE OPPONENT LANDS AN ATTACK
lines: While Blocking, Spiral’s mystical weapons have a 100.0% chance to Destroy one of each Fury, Precision, Unblockable, Death Immunity, Immortality, and Indestructible Buff on the Opponent, replacing them with Rubble Buffs lasting -1 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Beam hits gain 20.0 Attack Rating for each Rupture on the Opponent, increased by -1% for each Bar of Power Spent.
Spiral summons her Dancing Blades for 1000.0 seconds per Bar of Power spent, paused during Special Attacks.

cards.title: DANCING BLADES
lines: Against non-Science Opponents, while Dancing Blades are active, Spiral is not struck by attacks while Dodging backwards, and Precisions she would gain from the Dexterity Mastery are granted to the Opponent instead.

While Spiral is not Blocking an attack or Stunned, Dancing Blades can be fired as a single projectile when Spiral is struck by a Light Attack 2 or swipes up while holding Block. Cannot be fired while Stunned.
If the Opponent is struck by Dancing Blades, inflict a Stun Passive for 2 seconds as well as a non-stacking -20.0 Vulnerability Debuff for -1 seconds.
If the Blades strike the Opponent or their Block, Spiral triggers her Destroy.
As an Attacker, Dancing Blades cannot be fired for 2 seconds after being summoned by Special Attack 1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack gains Attack Rating based on Fervors instead of Ruptures.

synergy.note: When Untouchable starts, inflict a 40% Taunt Debuff for 7 seconds.

signature.title: FROM THE SPOTTED DIMENSION
lines: After a Portal Block ends, each hit of Ohnn’s next successful Light, Heavy or Special Attack deals an Instant Rupture dealing 20.0 Physical Damage for each Spot gained during that Portal Block.

While Untouchable, Attacks that strike the opponent while they are performing a Heavy Attack or recovering from a Special Attack grant Ohnn a Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by 25.0 Attack Rating for 7 seconds.

cards.title: WHEN STRUCK - SPOTS
lines: Johnathon Ohnn’s body is covered in portals to the Spotted Dimension, called Spots. Ohnn has a 20.0% chance when Struck to gain 1 Spot.

At 500.0+ Spots, being Struck by a Basic Attack grants Ohnn a 100% potency Untouchable Passive, causing incoming Attacks to have 100% chance to Miss for 5 seconds, paused during Ohnn's Special Attacks.
If Ohnn is struck while recovering from a Special Attack, 1 Spot is removed and cannot gain Spots for 4 seconds.

cards.title: WHILE UNTOUCHABLE
lines: Ohnn becomes Stun Immune, cannot gain Spots, and consumes all Spots when Untouchable ends.
When an incoming attack would Miss, inflict a Rupture Debuff, dealing 65.0 Physical Damage over 0.5 seconds.

Landing a hit pauses Untouchable for 0.3 seconds and inflicts a non-stacking Infuriate Debuff, making the Opponent more aggressive and reducing their Offensive Ability Accuracy by 60% for 200.0 seconds.
Incoming Attacks from the Opponent and Attacks that make contact with Ohnn inflict a Rupture Debuff, dealing 25.0 Physical Damage over 10 seconds. This ability scales with Base Attack Rating only.

cards.title: PORTAL BLOCK
lines: When Ohnn holds his block he gains a +80.0 Block Proficiency bonus per Spot and then after 0.50 seconds he opens a portal to the Spotted Dimension in front of him. While Ohnn is Defending, Portal Blocks activate immediately. This ability is not affected by Ability Accuracy.
Portal Block grants the following effects for 2 seconds:
Ohnn is locked in place and gains 1 Spot when the Opponent strikes into the Portal Block. At 10 Spots Ohnn’s Block Proficiency Bonus returns to 0.
+20.0% chance per Spot to resist Heavy Attacks and block Unblockable Attacks.
While Ohnn is affected by a Disorient effect, Portal Block does not trigger.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: After activation, gain 100.0 Spot per bar of Power spent.
At 10 Spots: Ohnn gains Untouchable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a Buff Immunity Debuff on Ohnn for 10 seconds. At 10 Spots this lasts 2000.0 seconds.
While active, each time Ohnn is immune to a Buff inflict a Rupture Debuff, dealing 25.0 Physical Damage over 10 second(s). This ability scales with Base Attack Rating only.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, if Ohnn is Untouchable, inflict a Physical Vulnerability Debuff, lowering Physical Resistance by 60.0 for 10 seconds. At 10 Spots this lasts 20 seconds.
Each hit deals a burst of 15.0 Physical Damage for each Rupture Effect inflicted on the Opponent since the start of the fight or Ohnn’s last Special 2 Attack. Max: 50 stacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain Max Spots.
Once per fight if Spot is at 10 Spots increase the duration of all personal Rupture Effects by 100.0% for the rest of the fight.

cards.title: FOUL PLAY
lines: Ohnn starts each quest with 100.0 Persistent Charge, which can be spent in the Pre-Fight screen on the Foul Play ability.
Gain +100.0 Persistent Charge each time an Opponent is knocked out. Max charge(s): 3.
Foul Play: During the next fight, when the Opponent is knocked down Ohnn’s Science teammate is inflicted with Buff Immune Debuff lasting 3 seconds.

synergy.note: Start each fight with an indefinite +500 Precision Buff.

signature.title: TACTICIAN
lines: As blows are exchanged, Star-Lord familiarizes with opponents' techniques, increasing Attack by 1.0 for each hit of the Combo Meter to maximum of 400 hits.
Star-Lord gains 1.0 Block Proficiency for every hit of his opponent's Combo Meter.

cards.title: ELEMENT GUN EFFECTS
lines: FIRE: Breaks the opponent's Armor, reducing Armor Rating by -39.0 for 8 seconds.
AIR: Shocks the opponent, dealing 191.0 Energy Damage over 6 seconds. Shocks ignore Physical Resistance, but not Energy Resistance.
WATER: Drains up to 50.0% of the opponent’s Max Power.
EARTH: Places a Heal Block on the opponent, stopping all healing effects for 11 seconds.

signature.title: THE FOUNDER'S SKILLFUL AWAKENING
signature.trigger: While a Combo Shield is Active
lines: Precision Buffs on Star-Lord expire -14.0% slower.
During Star-Lord’s Special Attacks, he takes 24.0% reduced damage from all sources.

cards.title: A LORD FORGED IN ISO
lines: Star-Lord’s Stellar Enhancement grants him a Fractured Power Bar.
The hit following a Critical Hit has 10.0% increased Combat Power Rate.
The duration of Star-Lord’s effects all benefit from Class Advantage. The increased duration for Class Advantage is shown in brackets for each effect.

cards.title: COMBO METER
lines: At the start of each fight, Star-Lord gains a Combo Shield Passive for 30 (42) seconds.
Light and Heavy Attacks grant +100.0 Combo Meter.
Each time Star-Lord crosses a Combo Meter threshold of 20, he gains an indefinite Persistent Cruelty Charge, increasing Critical Damage Rating by +90.0. Max stacks: -1.
+3.0 Attack Rating for each Persistent Charge.

cards.title: ELEMENT GUN
lines: Star-Lord’s Element Gun rotates through four elemental modes, starting with Earth, and rotating to the next Element in order each time the Element Gun is fired during Special Attacks 1 or 3.
The Element is also rotated when Star-Lord lands a second Medium Attack.

cards.title: ELEMENT GUN EFFECTS
lines: Earth: Inflict a Vulnerability Debuff for 15 (21) seconds, reducing Physical and Energy Resistance by -40.0.
Fire: Inflict a Critical Incinerate Debuff dealing 150.0 Energy Damage multiplied by Star-Lord’s Critical Damage Multiplier over 15 (21) seconds.
Water: Gain a Combo Wave Passive for 10 (14) seconds.
Air: Pause all other Element Gun effects for 10 (14) seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack is a Guaranteed Critical Hit.
On activation, gain a Combo Shield Passive for 20 (28) seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Each other Element can also activate, with each chance matching Star-Lord’s current Critical Hit Chance.
Refresh all Element Gun effects.

synergy.note: Interrupting any attack inflicts a Bleed Debuff dealing 20% of Attack as Direct Damage over 8 seconds.
Gain 2 Prowess every time Immunity triggers.
Gain 2 Prowess every time Immunity triggers.

signature.title: CONDUIT
lines: Launching a Special Attack grants Storm 1 Prowess Buff per level of Special Attack used. Additionally, each Prowess on Storm, to a maximum of 10, increases the Potency of her Shock Debuffs by +7.0%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Storm’s control of the elements grants her Immunity to Shock effects.

cards.title: PROWESS BUFFS
lines: Unless otherwise stated, Storm’s Prowess Buffs last 20 seconds and grant +20.0% Special Attack damage.
Each time either Champion lands a Critical Hit, gain 100.0 Prowess Buff(s).
Each time the opponent Purifies a Debuff, gain 200.0 Prowess Buff(s).
Each time Storm gains a Bleed effect, gain 200.0 Prowess Buff(s).
Each time Storm’s Immunity prevents a Shock effect, gain 200.0 Prowess Buff(s).

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: If a Skill Opponent Purifies a Stun Debuff it is replaced with a Passive Stun lasting 2 seconds.

signature.title: WRATH OF ORORO MUNROE
lines: While below 9.9% of her Max Health, Storm activates both Tempests as though they were her default Tempest.

Landing a Heavy Attack activates Storm's alternate Tempest for up to 793.0 seconds based on how long the Heavy Attack was charged. The Tempest will not activate while already active, and is paused during Storm's Heavy charge and Special Attacks.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Storm’s basic attacks deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
If the Opponent Purifies a Stun Debuff it is replaced with a Passive Stun lasting 2 seconds.
If the Opponent has an Endurance effect, Storm's Parry Mastery inflicts a Stun Passive instead, lasting 1.5 seconds.

cards.title: PRE-FIGHT ABILITY
