lines: By default, Ice Tempest is selected. If selecting a different Tempest in the Pre-Fight Screen, it becomes the new default. Default Tempests can be switched once per Fight.
When Power Locked, Power Burned, or Power Drained, Tempests are removed for 8 seconds.
Activation of Tempests is unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
Ice Tempest: Gain Immunity to Coldsnap and Frostbite. If selected as the default Tempest, incoming Basic and Special Attacks from Skill Opponents have a 60.0% chance to Glance.

Lightning Tempest: Reduce the potency of incoming Shock effects by 100%. If selected as the default Tempest, each active Prowess grants hits a 2.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff for 0.9 second(s). This Stun is Passive instead if the Opponent has an Endurance effect. Max: 16.0% chance.

cards.title: WHEN KNOCKED DOWN
lines: When Knocked Down, if not already active, Storm activates her Alternate Tempest for 12 seconds. Duration is paused during Heavy Attacks and Special Attacks.

cards.title: PROWESS
cards.trigger: WHEN EITHER CHAMPION FILLS A BAR OF POWER:
lines: Each Tempest generates a +4000.0% Prowess Buff. The first 3 Prowess Buffs last indefinitely. Additional Prowess Buffs last 10 seconds and are paused during Storm's Heavy charge and Special Attacks. Max stacks: 12.0.
If Storm has 600.0 Prowess effects active during a Special Attack, gain a Passive Unblockable for 2 second(s).

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack creates a dormant Prowess which charges from 0 to 100%.

Launching a Special Attack while charging a Heavy Attack converts this dormant Prowess into a Passive Prowess increasing the Special Attacks damage by up to 100.0% based on how long the Heavy Attack was charged.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Inflict a Passive Slow for the duration of this Special Attack.
Ice Tempest: Each hit grants a 10.0% Prowess Buff for the remainder of this Special Attack. Additionally, the final hit inflicts a 80.0 Coldsnap Passive for 14 seconds, scaling with Special Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit inflicts a 50.0 Shock Debuff for 9 seconds. When one of these Debuffs is Purified, inflict a 50.0 Instant Shock Passive. Both of these effects scale with Special Damage.

Lightning Tempest: If selected as the default Tempest, Shock potency is increased by up to 9000.0% based on the Opponent's current Power. Additionally, each Prowess reduces the Opponent's Defensive Combat Power Rate by 25%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: If both Tempests are already active, Storm increases her Attack Rating by 150.0 during this Special Attack.
After this Special Attack ends, Storm activates her alternate Tempest for 35 seconds. This duration is paused while charging Heavy Attacks and launching Special Attacks.

signature.title: SUBSTANTIAL PSIONIC POWER
lines: When gaining Telepathic Charges from any source other than this ability Stryfe has a 0.0% chance to gain +1 additional charge.
Whenever causing a Basic Attack to Glance, Stryfe has a 9.0% chance to Activate his Special 1 Invisibility for 300.0 seconds.
Winning a fight converts 30.0% of Telepathic Charges into Persistent Telepathic Charges.

cards.title: PSIONIC BLASTS
lines: Psionic blasts occur on Medium, Heavy and several hits in Special 2, these attacks are Psychic, deal Energy Damage instead of Physical and cannot be Evaded.
Reduce the Potency of incoming Passive Direct Damage by -100.0%.

cards.title: TELEPATHIC CHARGES
lines: Telepathic Charges are unaffected by Ability Accuracy reduction but cannot be gained while suffering Power Lock, Burn or Drain.
Champion Attacks gain +3.0 Attack Rating per Telepathic Charge.
55.0% chance to gain +100.0 Telepathic Charge when landing a Heavy Attack. Chance increased by a flat 15% for each full Bar of Power.
Gain +100.0 Telepathic Charge when struck by a Critical Hit.
Gain +100.0 Telepathic Charge each time Stryfe or his Opponent Misses.
When Struck at 500.0+ Telepathic Charges, consume 500.0 charges to cause the attack to Glance.
Striking an Opponent or into their Block while they are Unstoppable consumes +2 Telepathic Charges to remove the effect and inflict a Passive Stun for 1.2 seconds. Cooldown 8.0 seconds.

cards.title: ON FOURTH LIGHT ATTACK
lines: Consume 1 Telepathic Charge to inflict a Passive Concussion for 12 seconds reducing the Opponent's Ability Accuracy by -20.0%.
While the Opponent is suffering from a personal Concussion, Stryfe can block Unblockable attacks.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Deal a burst of 25.0 Energy Damage. +500.0% potency if Invisible.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The second hit in this attack inflicts a non-stacking Passive Shock, dealing 105.0 Energy Damage over 8 seconds. This Shock is removed and reapplied on each Psionic Blast.

After this attack ends, activate a telepathic cloak to go Invisible for 3 seconds, giving the Opponent a 100.0% chance to Miss. This will not trigger when fighting an Opponent with #Psychic Shielding.
If Stryfe lands an Attack, Blocks an attack, or the Opponent activates a Special Attack, his position is revealed and Invisibility is removed.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit and final 2 hits in this attack are Psionic Blasts, each dealing a burst of 30.0 Energy Damage. +80.0% potency if the Opponent is Shocked.
Psionic blasts gain +6.0 Attack Rating per Telepathic Charge.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain +500.0 Persistent Telepathic Charges, these last for the rest of the quest but are capped at 100.
Consume all Telepathic Charges, each becoming +1 additional Persistent Telepathic Charge.
Persistent Telepathic Charges cannot be consumed to trigger abilities, but still grant Attack Rating bonuses.
If the Opponent is Shocked, inflict a Passive Concussion for 30 seconds reducing the Opponent's Ability Accuracy by -30.0%.

synergy.note: Whenever the Opponent is immune to Incinerate they’re inflicted with a Slow Debuff for 8 seconds.

signature.title: GIDEON'S EXPERIMENTS
lines: Sunspot increases his maximum number of Solar Charges by 80.4.

cards.title: SOLAR CHARGES
lines: Sunspot is Immune to all Incinerate effects. Whenever Sunspot would be incinerated he instead generates 500.0 Solar Charges.
Sunspot starts a fight with his maximum Solar Charges. 100.0 charge expires every 3 second(s).

cards.title: FLARE STATE
lines: Sunspot maintains Flare State for as long as he has Solar Charges.
If under the effects of Shock or when running out of Solar Charges, Flare State is disabled and all stacks are removed.
Whenever Sunspot’s attacks make contact with his Opponent he expends 1 Solar Charge per hit for each stack of Flare State. Each charge expended increases the damage of that hit by 50.0.

cards.title: INCINERATES
lines: When Striking the Opponent, inflict an Incinerate for each Solar Charge expended, dealing 10.0 energy damage for 5 seconds.
Incinerates remove Perfect Block chance and lower the Opponents Block Proficiency by 50.0%.

If a Strike fails to apply an Incinerate on the Opponent due to chance, gain 1 Solar Charge and 10.0% of a bar of Power. If an Incinerate is purified, gain 1 Solar Charge per Incinerate purified and 10.0% of a bar of Power each time a Purify occurs.
As Sunspot gains Power the potency of any Power gained by Incinerates is reduced by up to 57.0%.

cards.title: ON WELL-TIMED BLOCKS
lines: For as long as Sunspot’s Opponent is Incinerated, Well-Timed blocks grant 100.0% Perfect Block chance for the duration of his Opponents Combo or Special Attack.
When Sunspot performs a Perfect Block he Purifies 100.0 Incinerate Debuff on his Opponent.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: While Charging a Heavy Attack, Sunspot Purifies 100.0 Incinerate Debuff on his Opponent every 0.18 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Gain an additional stack of Flare State.
Incinerates inflicted during this Special Attack last 900.0 seconds longer.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit expends up to 1500.0 Solar Charges.
For each stack of Flare State, Sunspot gains a Prowess effect increasing the damage dealt by this Special Attack by 200.0%

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Sunspot recovers up to his maximum Solar Charges.
For every 20.0 Solar Charges recovered Sunspot Inflicts 1 Incinerate Debuff dealing 100.0 Energy Damage over 12 seconds.

synergy.note: Each time you activate a Fury Buff there is a 100% Chance to place an Armor Break on the Opponent lasting 4 seconds, reducing Armor by 150. Max Stacks: 5
Start the fight with a Vigilance Buff, which prevents their attacks from Missing, and lasts 15 seconds.

signature.title: SELF SUSTAINING POWER
lines: While in Cosmic Energy Overload, Super-Skrull gains a Power Gain Buff, granting 1.5% of a Bar of Power per second.
Against Tech Champions, when Super-Skrull would inflict a personal Incinerate Debuff he instead inflicts a matching Nova Flame Debuff.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Immune to Shock, Incinerate, and Special Lock effects.
Fury Buffs also grant +3.0 Block Penetration.
Armor Up Buffs also grant +5.0 Critical Resistance.

cards.title: HYPNOTIC GAZE
lines: 10 seconds after the start of each fight, inflict a Falter Passive for 1 second.
This Falter starts paused and is unpaused when Super-Skrull is struck or the Opponent Misses.
When this Falter ends, inflict a non-stacking -25.0 Energy Vulnerability Passive for 22 seconds and start a Falter cooldown for 22 seconds. When this cooldown ends, reinflict the Falter.

cards.title: COSMIC ENERGY RECEPTOR BUFFS
lines: Every 1 second Super-Skrull reaches full Charge, and his next action creates an indefinite Buff, resetting the Charge.
Hitting the Opponent or their Block grants a +16.0 Fury Buff.
Being struck by or Blocking an attack grants a +16.0 Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: COSMIC ENERGY OVERLOAD
lines: Upon reaching his Cosmic Energy Receptor Buff limit, Super-Skrull enters Cosmic Energy Overload for 15 seconds, and cannot gain any more Cosmic Energy Receptor Buffs until it ends.
Super-Skrull gains additional non-stacking Buffs for 15 seconds based on the Armor Up or Fury Buffs active when he enters Overload.
300.0+ Armor Up Buffs: Gain a Vigilance Buff.
600.0+ Armor Up Buffs: Gain an Unblockable Buff.
300.0+ Fury Buffs: Gain an Undermine Buff.
6.0+ Fury Buffs: Gain a Nova Fists Buff. While active, all attacks inflict a 45.0 Incinerate Debuff for 1.5 seconds.
All indefinite Cosmic Energy Receptor Buffs are removed when Overload ends.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, convert up to 5.0 Fury Buffs into +16.0 Armor Up Buffs for 30 seconds and refresh any personal Vigilance and Undermine Buffs.
Being struck by or Blocking an attack grants a +16.0 Armor Up Buff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, convert up to 5.0 Armor Up Buffs into +16.0 Fury Buffs.
Hitting the Opponent or their Block grants a +16.0 Fury Buff.
Each hit inflicts a 140.0 Incinerate Debuff for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain an indefinite non-stacking Aptitude Buff increasing the potency of future Armor Up, Fury, and Precision Buffs by 60.0%.
100.0% chance to inflict a 3 second Stun Debuff.

synergy.note: Knocking down the Opponent with a Heavy Attack grants a non-stacking +300 Superior Cruelty Buff for 10 seconds. This Buff will not trigger if already active.

signature.title: EXTREMIS 3.0VERLOAD
lines: Further exploitation of the Extremis 3.0 virus grants Tony incredible rejuvenation capabilities. While below -1% Health, increase the potency of Superior Regenerations by 40.0%.
More time with the suit allows Tony to reduce the cooldown of the Endo-Sym Armor Auto-Block by -7.0%.
Whenever Tony is inflicted with a Bleed, Incinerate, or Shock effect, pause his personal Buffs for 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Tony’s Armor reduces the potency of incoming Bleed, Incinerate, and Shock effects by 5000.0%. This is further increased by -1% for each unique Superior Buff active.
Further advancement reduces the potency of the Willpower Mastery by 75%, but increases his Bleed, Incinerate, and Shock Resistance by 500.0% per active rank.
Each Buff Active on Iron Man Grants +5.0 Armor Rating.
Each Buff Active on Iron Man Grants +5.0 Attack Rating.

cards.title: ENDO-SYM ARMOR
lines: The symbiotic nature of Tony’s living armor protects him. He has a 2500.0% chance to Auto-Block incoming Basic Attacks while he has -1 or more unique Superior Buffs.

While he has -1 or more unique Superior Buffs, the chance to Auto-Block is increased by a flat 75.0% and it can now trigger the Parry Mastery. After triggering this way, Tony’s Auto-Block goes on cooldown for 20 seconds.

cards.title: SUPERIOR BUFFS
lines: Tony Stark is better than you, and so are his Buffs. All his personal Buffs are Superior, gain a bonus 100.0% Ability Accuracy, and have a max stack of -1 unless otherwise stated.

Unless otherwise stated, Superior Buffs last 35 seconds, minus 825.0 seconds for each unique personal Superior Armor Up, Energy Resistance, Crit Resistance, Amplify, or Regeneration active, and are paused during Special Attacks.
Using his Pre-fight Ability Tony can choose to make his first Buff a Superior Energy Resist, Armor Up, or Amplify.
Intercepting the Opponent with a Medium Attack, or striking them with a second Medium Attack randomly grants 100.0 unique Core Superior Buff that Tony does not already have.
Intercepting the Opponent with a Light Attack, or striking them with a fourth Light Attack randomly grants 200.0 Core Superior Buffs of a type Tony already has.
Refresh all Superior Buffs whenever a new unique Superior Buff activates. This does not apply to Superior Fury or Superior Power Gain.

cards.title: CORE SUPERIOR BUFFS
lines: Superior Armor Up - Increases Armor Rating by +10.0.
Superior Energy Resistance - Increases Energy Resistance by +10.0.
Superior Crit Resistance - Increases Critical Resistance by +10.0.
Superior Regeneration - Regenerate 0.0 Health every second. This increases by 150.0% when below -1% Health.
Superior Amplify - Increases Ability Power Rate by +1250.0%.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack grants a Superior Instinct Buff for 10 seconds, enabling Tony to trigger the Parry Mastery against non-contact attacks. This Buff will not trigger if already active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: For each unique Superior Buff on Tony, inflict an Armor Break Debuff, each reducing Armor Rating by -2.0 for 10 seconds.
If 2.0 or more unique Superior Buffs are active, gain a Superior Power Gain Buff, granting 4000.0% of a Bar of Power over 10 seconds. This Buff will not trigger if already active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain 100.0 copy of each active Core Superior Buff.
Inflict a non-stacking Armor Break Debuff for 15 seconds, reducing Armor Rating by -15.0 with -1% increased potency for each Buff on Tony.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a Superior Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by +50.0 for 10 seconds. While this Fury is active, pause all other Superior Buffs. This Buff will not trigger if already active.

synergy.note: Gain Passive Prowess whenever a Blessing activates, increasing Special Attack damage by 15%. These last until the end of the Synergy Champion's next Special Attack, and are capped at 3.
Activating a Special Attack grants a non-stacking Vicious Buff increasing the potency of Damage Over Time Debuffs by 50% for 10 seconds.

signature.title: SYMBIOMANCY
lines: Every 20 seconds place a Stagger Passive effect on the Opponent, lasting 1000.0 seconds.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Symbiote Supreme gains 100% less power from Attacking, Blocking, and being Struck. But gains 16.5% of his Max Power every 9 seconds.

cards.title: GENETIC POTENTIAL
lines: Each time a Buff or a Stagger effect on the Opponent ends gain 2500.0 Genetic Potential, to a maximum of 100.
Gain an additional 5000.0 Genetic Potential if a Buff ends due to a Nullify or Stagger effect.

cards.title: GENETIC BLESSINGS
lines: Symbiote Supreme can manifest 3 different Genetic Blessings, every 15 seconds he switches to the next in the following order: Chthon’s Cunning, Null’s Shadow, and Set’s Fangs.
Each time a Blessing triggers 100.0% of Genetic Potential is consumed to gain up to 10000.0% of a Bar of Power.

cards.title: CHTHON'S CUNNING
lines: 100.0% chance when this blessing is triggered to immediately Nullify all Buffs off the Opponent.
65.0 Direct Damage is Passively dealt to the Opponent for each Buff Nullified, based on Genetic Potential.
While active gain a 5.0% chance to place a Stagger Passive on the Opponent lasting 10 seconds on each Basic Attack Hit. Critical Hits increase the Chance to 5000.0%.

cards.title: NULL'S SHADOW
lines: 100.0% chance when this Blessing is triggered to gain a Protection Buff preventing Symbiote Supreme from taking more than 15.0% of his Max Health per hit, lasting for 10 seconds. This Protection threshold is reduced by 50% if the Opponent has an active Buff.
+40.0 Armor Rating and +40.0% Perfect Block Chance, based on Genetic Potential.

While active gain a 15.0% chance to place a Stagger Passive on the Opponent lasting 10 seconds each time Symbiote Supreme is Struck by or Blocks the Opponent. Well timed blocks increase the Chance to 5000.0%.

cards.title: SET'S FANGS
lines: 100.0% chance when this Blessing is triggered to gain a Fury Buff increasing Attack by up to 102.5 for 10 Seconds, based on Genetic Potential.
100.0% chance to cause a Bleed Debuff on every Hit, dealing up to 85.0 Direct Damage based on Genetic Potential and lasting 8 seconds.
Each hit of a Special Attack gains a 50.0% chance to place a Stagger Passive on the Opponent lasting 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: 100.0% Chance to Nullify 100.0 Buff. Gain 50 Genetic Potential if a Buff is Nullified.
Switch to the next Blessing.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: While Chthon’s Cunning is active each hit has a 100.0% chance to steal 15.0% of the Opponent’s Max Power.
While Null’s Shadow is active each hit has a 100.0% chance to place a Weakness Debuff on the Opponent reducing their Attack by 33.0% for 10 seconds.
While Set’s Fangs is active each hit has a 100.0% chance to place an Armor Break Debuff on the Opponent reducing their Armor by -50.0 for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to reset the Genetic Blessing timer, and activate all 3 Genetic Blessings.
+10000.0 Genetic Potential.

synergy.note: Striking the Opponent while their back is against the wall grants a 500 potency Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds. This does not reapply if active.

signature.title: GALACTUS' FAVOR
lines: If Terrax has less than 1 Power Cosmic at the start of a fight, he gains 200.0.
Terrax starts each fight with his Rock Field active and 33.0% of his max Power.

cards.title: GEOKINESIS
lines: Terrax is immune to Shock and Bleed effects due to his rocky body.
Terrax is immune to Power Drain, Power Steal, Power Burn, Power Lock, and Enervate effects from #Metal Champions due to his control over rock and earth.

cards.title: POWER COSMIC - PERSISTENT CHARGE
lines: Terrax gains 100.0 Attack Charge(s) whenever he attacks the Opponent and 2 Attack Charge(s) whenever the Opponent attacks him. Terrax gains 10.0 Attack Charge(s) whenever his attack misses the Opponent. Terrax gains 1 Attack Charge(s) every 0.5 seconds while the Opponent is inside his Rock Field.
When Terrax gains 5000.0 Attack Charges he converts them into 1 Power Cosmic. Max 2 per fight.
For each Power Cosmic, Terrax gains an additional +10.0% Combat Power Rate when struck while Indestructible. Max +60%.
For each Power Cosmic, Terrax gains an additional +110.0% Defensive Combat Power Rate when blocking an attack while Indestructible. Max +660%.

When Terrax starts a Rock Field, he gains 1 Indestructible Charge Buff for each Power Cosmic. 1 Indestructible Charge is removed each time Terrax is attacked. All remaining Indestructible Charges are removed when the Rock Field expires. Max 10 Indestructible Charges.
Terrax’s Indestructible Charge Buffs only ignore damage from attacks and do not ignore damage from Special 3 Attacks.

cards.title: ROCK FIELD
lines: While the Rock Field is active, Terrax’s attacks gain an additional 170.0 Attack Rating.
While the Rock Field is active, nearby Opponents take up to 42.0 Energy Damage for every second the Rock Field has been active, every 0.5 second(s). This scales with Base Attack only.
Every 0.5 second(s) there is a 35.0% chance to inflict an Armor Break Debuff, reducing the Opponent’s Armor Rating by -20.0 for 15 second(s). Max 10.
While the Rock Field is active, Terrax is more aggressive.

cards.title: LIGHT ATTACKS
lines: Terrax’s fourth Light Attack refreshes the duration of all personal Armor Break Debuffs on the Opponent.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The Rock Field power drain is paused while Terrax is charging his Heavy Attack.

If the Rock Field is active, this attack is a guaranteed Critical Hit, Terrax does not gain power from this attack and he gains up to 120.0 increased Attack Rating based on how long the Rock Field was active. On hit, the Rock Field ends and consumes 50% of a bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Special Attacks cost --100.0% less power, but after each Special Attack, Terrax’s Power Bar drains until he reaches 0 power. During this time, Terrax cannot use Special Attacks and his Rock Field is active.
Terrax loses power faster the longer his Rock Field has been active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If Terrax has less than 6 Power Cosmic, he gains 2000.0 Attack Charges.
If Terrax has 6+ Power Cosmic, he gains 300.0 Indestructible Charge(s) until the Rock Field expires after this Special Attack.
The Rock Field triggered after this Special Attack has a flat +40.0% increased chance to Armor Break the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The last hit grants Terrax a Power Gain Buff, generating 40.0% of his Max Power over 12 seconds. Max 1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Stun Debuff, lasting 2 second(s).
Inflict an Armor Break Debuff, reducing the Opponent’s Armor Rating by -40.0 for 25 second(s). Max 1.

synergy.note: Fury also grants a Power Gain Buff, gaining half of a bar of Power over 7 second(s).

signature.title: IMMORTALITY
lines: Granted near-immortality, Thanos the Mad Titan passively reduces his opponent's base Attack by -10.0%.

cards.title: WHEN STRUCK BY BASIC ATTACKS
lines: 10.0% chance to gain an Armor Up Buff for 6.5 seconds, granting +32.0 Armor Rating.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict Heal Block, preventing the target from recovering Health for 7 seconds.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: This Champion begins the fight with 16.0% Max Power.

synergy.note: Gain Immunity to Power Burn effects.
Gain Immunity to Power Drain effects.

signature.title: DEATH ARRIVES ALL THE SAME
lines: Personal effects expire up to 9.7% more slowly and gain up to 100.0% increased Ability Accuracy, scaling with Necrotic Energy. These bonuses have half potency at zero Energy.

At the start of Thanos’s first fight each Quest as an Attacker and each fight as a Defender, he gains 492.6 Necrotic Energy. This does not grant Counterpunch Charges and cannot happen again until Thanos’s teammates win a fight.
Personal Protections gain +1.0% flat potency per Necrotic Energy.

cards.title: DEATHLESS TITAN
lines: Thanos's long reign in deep space has twisted his Eternal Physiology, granting him Immuity to Coldsnap, Frostbite, and Poison.

The first time each fight Thanos loses a multiple of 2500.0% of his Max Health, he gains a 40.0% Protection Passive for 2 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks and unaffected by Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: NECROTIC ENERGY
lines: Gain +-1 Necrotic Energy when landing a hit. As a Defender, gain +200.0 when an Opponent strikes Thanos or his Block.

Thanos starts each fight with an indefinite Energize Buff, increasing his Combat Power Rate by 15.0%, increased by +0.5% flat per Necrotic Energy, or by +100.0% flat as a Defender. The potency of this Buff can only be modified by Thanos.
When this Energize is removed or prevented, it is restored after 8 seconds.

cards.title: UNSTOPPABLE SCION OF CHAOS
lines: For every 1000.0 Necrotic Energy he would gain, Thanos gains a Counterpunch Charge for 24 seconds, or 12.0 seconds as a Defender. Max stacks: -1.
Thanos does not spend Charges while Unstoppable, executing a Well-Timed Block, or when Blocking non-final hits of Special Attacks.
If Thanos would gain a Counterpunch Charge while at max stacks, he instead gains an Unstoppable Passive for 3 seconds.
Gaining Unstoppable inflicts a Panic Debuff for 5 seconds.
Interrupting the Opponent's attacks with a Heavy Attack or while Unstoppable grants +500.0 Necrotic Energy and pauses personal Furies and Armor Shattered for 8 seconds.

cards.title: MASTER OF WAR
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack after landing a non-Combo Ending Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for 0.75 seconds.
Each hit either Pulverizes one Armor Up effect if any are active or inflicts an Instant Corrosion if not, both dealing 20.0 damage.
On the final hit, or when canceling this attack with Special Attack 1 or 2, consume -1 Necrotic Energy to inflict a non-stacking 65.0 Armor Break Debuff and an Armor Shattered Debuff for 16 seconds.
Thanos does not inflict Armor Shattered if it is already active with more than 2500.0% of its duration remaining.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a Fury Buff increasing Attack Rating by +30.0 for 16 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
The first hit consumes 2000.0 Necrotic Energy. Each subsequent hit has a 40.0% chance to grant an additional Fury. If Energy was consumed, the chance is -1% instead.
After the final hit, gain a non-stacking Genesis Passive for 10 seconds, allowing Thanos to Passively Regenerate 200.0% of all damage taken by the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Some projectiles in this attack are nothing but a bad dream. The real ones ignore -80.0% of the Opponent’s Block Proficiency and Armor Rating.
Each hit inflicts a 50.0 Corrosion Debuff for 8 seconds and consumes -1 Necrotic Energy to apply two additional Debuffs.

As a Defender, Thanos consumes -1 Necrotic Energy to start a 0.75 second timer when the Opponent Dodges backwards during this Attack. Dodging again while this timer is active inflicts an Instant 50.0 Corrosion.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: The first time each fight this attack is used, Thanos draws on the Evolution Stone to permanently increase his maximum Necrotic Energy by +2000.0. Additionally, he gains one more Energy when striking the Opponent with Medium Attacks.
Inflict an indefinite Corrosion Passive, dealing 10.0 Physical Damage per second. Max stacks: -1.

signature.title: ULTIMATE ASGARDIAN WEAPON
lines: The Destroyer’s personal Power Gain pauses while at 3 Bars of Power. While any Power Gain effect is active, Special Attack 3 damage is increased by 1.0%.
The Protection Passive potency from Magically Enchanted Armor is increased by a flat 1.0% per Buff.

When struck, inflict an instant Rupture dealing 40.0% of the damage prevented by personal Protection as Physical Damage, to a max of 40.0 Damage. This Rupture also Destroys an Indestructible or Immortality Buff on the Opponent.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: The Destroyer is a magical non-magnetic construct Immune to Slow, Armor Break, Poison, and Bleed. Additionally, the Salve and Willpower Masteries are disabled.
The Destroyer is a killing machine devoid of emotions, it is Immune to Infuriate and Intimidate effects.
All Attacks Destroy any Indestructible and Immortality Buffs on the Opponent, replacing them with Rubble Buffs that last 15 seconds.
When the Opponent gains a Buff while attacking the Destroyer's Block, Destroy one of their newest Buffs and replace it with a Rubble Buff.

cards.title: MAGICALLY ENCHANTED ARMOR
lines: The Destroyer is Passively Unstoppable while Dashing towards the Opponent, plus 0.5 seconds after. If struck while Dashing and Unstoppable, this effect goes on cooldown for 1500.0 seconds or until the Opponent gains -1 Buffs.
While the Opponent has an active Buff, gain a Protection Passive, reducing damage taken by 500.0% for each Buff, to a max of -1 Buffs.

cards.title: DESTRUCTION CHARGES
lines: Gain 200.0 Destruction Charges when Immunity to Armor Break triggers, when the Opponent gains a Buff, or fails to gain a Buff due to Buff Immunity. Gaining Charges from Buff Immunity can only trigger once every 1.5 seconds.
Gain 500.0 Destruction Charges when Intercepting the Opponent and when Punishing a Heavy or Special Attack.
Lose 100.0 Charge when inflicted with a non-Damaging Debuff other than Stun.
Every 25.0 Charges, gain a Fury Passive granting +40.0 Attack Rating for 20 seconds. These Passives refresh on a Special Attack 3 or when the Opponent is knocked down. Max stacks: -1.
When reaching 100.0 Charges, consume them and gain a Power Gain Passive, granting 400.0 Bars of Power over 10 seconds. While this Power Gain is active, the Destroyer cannot gain new Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each attack grants 1000.0 Destruction Charges on a Hit, Block, or Whiff. If the Opponent Dodges the attack with the Dexterity Mastery or a Dexterity replacement, no Charges are gained. As a Defender, gain 15 Charges instead.
The final hit is Passively Unblockable and inflicts a non-stacking Hinder Debuff of -75.0% potency for 20 seconds. If the Opponent is against the wall, all hits are Unblockable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The first hit pauses any Degeneration effects for 10 seconds.
The Destroyer is Passively Unblockable during the final 3 hits.
The final hit deals a burst of 225.0 Direct Damage, but its potency is increased by 200.0% against an Opponent suffering from Degeneration.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflicts a Degeneration Passive, dealing 300.0 Direct Damage over 15 seconds.

Gain an non-stacking Energize Passive of 33.0% Potency for 10 seconds, paused during the Destroyer’s Special Attacks. While this Passive is active, Special Attack 3 cannot be activated and Specials 1 and 2 grant no Power to the Opponent.
Gain an Unblockable Buff for 6 seconds.

synergy.note: Heavy Attacks place an Energy Vulnerability Debuff on the Opponent, reducing Energy Resistance by 700 for 8 seconds.
Gain Bleed Immunity, 20% Ability Accuracy, and +900 Armor Rating.

signature.title: DARK DEALINGS
lines: The Hood becomes Immune to all Stun effects. Firing a Bullet while Invisible has a 24.0% chance to Steal 10.0% of the opponent’s current Power, gaining twice that amount in the process.

cards.title: HEX PISTOLS - LOADED BULLETS: 28
lines: The Hood’s Bullets Persist from fight to fight within a Quest.
Nullify a Buff: Load 200.0 Bullet(s).
Make the opponent Miss while Invisible: Load 100.0 Bullet(s) when the Invisibility ends.

cards.title: HEX PISTOLS
lines: 100.0% chance to Fire a Bullet and inflict a stacking Hex, lasting 12 seconds. Each Hex deals a burst of 50.0 Energy Damage when it expires and is Refreshed when a new Hex is gained.

cards.title: DASH BACK AND HOLD BLOCK FOR 1.2 SECONDS.
lines: 100.0% chance to gain an Invisibility Buff lasting 8 seconds.
When Ending: Invisibility goes on Cooldown for 6 seconds.
While Active: Hood’s Attacks gain +110.0 Critical Damage Rating and ignore 75.0% Armor Rating and Block Proficiency.
While Active: Incoming attacks have a 120.0% chance to Miss. Each time the opponent Misses an attack, this Miss chance is decreased by a flat 20.0% until the Invisibility ends.

cards.title: CRITICAL HITS
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict a non-stacking Stagger Passive lasting 5 seconds. When a Staggered opponent gains a Buff, all Buffs triggered at the same time are Nullified.
When this Stagger ends, it inflicts 15.0 direct damage on the opponent and heals The Hood for a matching amount.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If this Shock expires after lasting its full duration, 100.0% chance to inflict a Stun Debuff, lasting 3 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 100.0% Chance to apply a Fate Seal to the opponent, Nullifying all Buffs, and prevents any new Buffs from activating for 6.5 seconds. While this Fateseal is active the opponents Ability Accuracy is reduced by -65.0%. Inflicting Hex Passives refreshes this ability.
At the end of the attack, activate Invisibility.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: 100.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 110.0 Direct Damage over 10 seconds.

signature.title: ENIGMATIC MACHINATIONS OF THE MIND
lines: While the Leader has at least -1 personal Debuffs on the Opponent, he gains a Steadfast Passive. This becomes 400.0 Debuffs against Mystic Champions.
Personal Fury effects now have a duration of 0 seconds and are paused while the Green Door is open.
Intercepting the Opponent with a Light Attack has a 0.0% chance to randomly inflict a personal Spectre or Wither Debuff.

cards.title: COLOSSAL CRANIUM
lines: An enhanced immune system provides full Immunity to Poison.
As a Defender, while the Opponent’s Regeneration Rate is at or below 0%, their Willpower Mastery is disabled.

cards.title: PERSONAL DEBUFFS
lines: Personal Debuffs are Severe Debuffs, preventing them from being removed by Purify or Cleanse.
When either Champion lands their first Light Attack, the Leader inflicts a -20.0% Spectre Debuff for 18 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
When either Champion lands their third Light Attack, the Leader inflicts a -20.0% Wither Debuff for 18 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

For each personal Debuff on the Opponent, the Leader reduces incoming damage from all sources except Special Attack 3 by 100.0%. As a Defender, this becomes 3% against Skill Champions, or -1% against non-Skill Champions.

cards.title: GAMMA RADIATION AND THE GREEN DOOR
lines: The Leader generates 200.0 Gamma Radiation every second. For each Debuff on the Opponent, Gamma Radiation is generated 15.0% faster, up to -1%.

The Green Door is located in the center of the stage. It begins closed and is opened when the Leader reaches 100 Gamma Radiation. Defenders become more aggressive the closer they are to the Green Door.
While opened, -1 Gamma Radiation is consumed every second, paused during the Leader’s Special Attacks. Upon reaching 0 Gamma Radiation, the Green Door is closed.
Once closed, the Leader cannot generate Gamma Radiation for 4 seconds. If the Opponent has an Endurance effect active, this becomes -1 seconds.
When the Green Door is opened, the Leader gains a +1.5 Fury Passive for each personal Debuff on the Opponent, lasting until the Green Door is closed.

cards.title: WHILE THE GREEN DOOR IS CLOSED
lines: As an Attacker, when the Opponent activates a Special Attack while standing on the closed Green Door, they are inflicted with 200.0 personal Wither and Spectre Debuffs.

As a Defender, while the Opponent is standing on the closed Green Door, the Green Door will absorb 100.0 of the Leader’s personal Debuffs every 2 seconds, removing it with no penalty. Debuffs are absorbed twice as fast against Skill Champions.

cards.title: WHILE THE GREEN DOOR IS OPEN
lines: Whenever a non-Damaging Debuff is inflicted, gain an additional Fury Passive.

While the Leader’s Opponent is standing on top of the opened Green Door, every 0.5 seconds they are inflicted with an Instant Degeneration dealing a burst of 1.7 Direct Damage for each Debuff on them.
Remove -100.0 Gamma Radiation whenever the Opponent gains 1 Combo.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each hit inflicts 100.0 personal Spectre Debuff. These can be inflicted through Block.
On the final hit, if the Opponent’s Regeneration Rate is at or below 0%, inflict a 25.0% Vitality Passive for 9 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit inflicts 100.0 personal Wither Debuff.
On the final hit, if the Opponent’s Ability Power Rate is at or below 0%, inflict a non-stacking 3.0 Power Dissolve Debuff for 18 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Degeneration Debuff dealing 1200.0 Direct Damage over 14 seconds.

While the Green Door is open: Gain 10 personal Fury Passives and inflict an indefinite 10.0% Degeneration Vulnerability Passive. Max stacks: -1. These abilities activate before the Degeneration Debuff.

synergy.note: At the start of each fight and when activating a Special Attack 3, inflict a non-stacking Ensnare Passive for 15 seconds, refreshed on knockdown.
While charging or releasing a Heavy Attack, Evade the first incoming Basic Attack. Cooldown: 20 seconds.

signature.title: CONTINGENCY PLANS
lines: When The Maker’s Tactical Evasion Stun fails to be inflicted or is removed before its duration expires, inflict a non-stacking -7.9 Energy Vulnerability Passive and gain Stun Immunity for 4 seconds.

The Maker starts each fight with 1 Special Evade Charge that is consumed to Evade a hit during a Special Attack. This does not trigger during a Well-Timed Block. Gain 1 extra Charge for every -1 signature levels.
Remove all Special Evade Charges when struck by a Heavy Attack.
Gain a Special Evade Charge when the Plasma Mine is triggered during The Maker’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: The Maker has altered his being and developed an Immunity to Neuroshock and Reversed Controls.
The Maker hates luck. He cannot land Critical Hits, and all personal effects and the Stun from the Parry Mastery have -1% Ability Accuracy.

cards.title: PLANNING CHARGES
lines: The Maker starts each Quest with 400.0 Persistent Planning Charges.

In the Pre-Fight Menu, choose up to 3 Planned Obsolescence Passives to inflict on the Opponent at the start of the fight. Each Passive costs 1 Planning Charge and is inflicted even if a different Champion enters the fight.
The Maker’s teammates help progress his plans. For each fight he or a teammate wins, he gains 100.0 Planning Charge the next time he enters a fight.

cards.title: PLANNED OBSOLESCENCE - PRE-FIGHT PASSIVES
lines: All Planned Obsolescence Passives have a 15 second duration and are refreshed when the Opponent is knocked down.
Inflict a 6000.0% Special Power Drain Passive.
Inflict a 1600.0% Instants Siphon Passive.
Inflict a 2500.0% Cowardice Passive.
Planned Obsolescence potency is halved unless the Attacker is a Tech Champion or is one of The Maker’s outgoing synergy partners.
Planned Obsolescence potency scales with the rarity of Maker. If different versions of a Passive are applied, only the strongest one triggers.

cards.title: TACTICAL EVASION
lines: When The Maker would perform a Well-Timed Block against a Basic Attack, he Evades the attack instead.
When The Maker Evades a Basic Attack, inflict a Stun Passive for 3 seconds. This Stun is removed when the Opponent is struck twice.
When this Stun would be inflicted, the Stun and this Evade go on a shared cooldown for 8 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Heavy Attacks do not add to The Maker’s Combo Meter.
The final hit pauses The Maker’s Planned Obsolescence Passives for 500.0 seconds, and inflicts a Heal Block Debuff for 8 seconds.
The final hit inflicts an Instant Plasma dealing 45.0 Energy Damage multiplied by The Maker’s Critical Damage Multiplier.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Deploy a Plasma Mine in front of The Maker.

cards.title: PLASMA MINE
lines: If the Opponent moves onto the Plasma Mine, it triggers, inflicting an Instant Plasma dealing 110.0 Energy Damage multiplied by The Maker’s Critical Damage Multiplier. As a Defender, deal 1% of this damage.
The Plasma Mine needs to recharge after triggering. The Plasma Mine recharges while The Maker is charging his Heavy Attack and by a small amount when either Champion is struck.
Triggering the Plasma Mine inflicts a -10.0% Suppression Passive on the Opponent for 30 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
While suffering from one of The Maker’s Suppressions, they are also inflicted with a 75.0% Power Reroute Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, remove the recharge on the Plasma Mine.

If the Opponent is not Blocking, triggering the Plasma Mine during this attack overcharges it, increasing its base potency by 20000.0%, plus an additional -1% for each personal Suppression on the Opponent. Overcharging the Mine destroys it.
Gain 100.0 Planning Charge when triggering an overcharged Mine, plus 100.0 extra for every -1 personal Suppressions on the Opponent.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Re-trigger The Maker’s selected Pre-Fight Planned Obsolescence Passives.
At the end of this attack, The Maker moves an existing Plasma Mine behind his Opponent and empowers it for 12 seconds. The empowered Plasma Mine automatically recharges every 50.0 seconds.

synergy.note: Against Mystic Champions, gain a Steadfast Passive while at or above 3 Gamma Power.
While the Opponent has more than 2 Bars of Power, inflict a 65% Wither Debuff.
Gain immunity to Neutralize.

signature.title: RETALIATION
lines: If an Opponent ability fails due to his personal immunity or reduced Ability Accuracy they take a burst of 5.0 Physical Damage and the Overseer gains one Gamma Power. This Damage scales with Base Attack Only. This effect has a 1 second cooldown.
Striking the Opponent while they are recovering from Heavy or Specials Attacks deal a burst of 10.0 Physical Damage. This effect has a 1 second cooldown.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Immune to Nullify, Fateseal and Stagger effects.
An enhanced immune system provides full immunity to the Poisons of the Battlerealm.

cards.title: GAMMA POWER
lines: When the Opponent gains a Bar of Power gain an indefinite Gamma Power granting 15.0 Attack Rating and 17.0% Potency of his personal Debuffs from Specials. Max 6 Stacks.

cards.title: COSMIC MODE
lines: At 300.0 or more Stacks of Gamma Power, after launching a Special consumes all stacks and activates Cosmic Mode, lasting 3.33 second(s) per Gamma Power, but it is paused during Specials from the Overseer or the Opponent. Cosmic Mode lasts 50.0% longer for Defenders.

For each Gamma Power gained while in Cosmic Mode, instead gain a non-stacking Fury Buff granting 25.0 Attack Rating per Gamma Power used to enter the mode, with its total duration equalling its Cosmic Mode starting duration.
Light Attacks deal a Burst of 66.0 Physical Damage.

cards.title: AFTER OPPONENT LAUNCHES A SPECIAL
lines: Inflict an indefinite Special Concussion Debuff, reducing Ability Accuracy by 10.0% during Special attacks. Max 7.
Reducing a Combo of 300.0 or more to a lower amount removes one stack of Special Concussion.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Inflict a non-stacking Taunt Debuff for 10 seconds, reducing their Attack Rating by 20.0%. This ability goes on cooldown for 20.0 second(s) if activated.

cards.title: AFTER A SPECIAL
lines: Gain an Auto-Block Passive, giving 100.0% chance to Auto-Block Basic Attacks when Struck twice, it lasts for 7 second(s) or until triggered.
The Overseer is Stun immune while Auto-Block is active.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Inflict a Stun Debuff for 1.5 second(s).
Cosmic Mode: On activation gain a Regeneration Buff, recovering 7.0% of missing Health over 10 seconds. The Potency of this Buff is reduced by 10.0% for each Bleed Debuff on Overseer.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Inflicts a Disorient Debuff, reducing Defensive Ability Accuracy by 40.0% and Block Proficiency by 50% for 12 second(s). Ability Accuracy reduction scales with Gamma Power.
Cosmic Mode: Gain an Energize Buff, granting 25.0% increased Combat Power Rate for 12 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Physical Vulnerability Debuff, reducing Physical Resistance by -25.0 for 20 seconds.

synergy.note: Striking the Opponent while their back is against the wall grants a 500 potency Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds. This does not reapply if active.

signature.title: IMMORTAL RESILIENCE
lines: Each Culforce Charge grants up to +3.0 Attack Rating, scaling with how close the Opponent is to the wall.
The Serpent gains Immunity to Stun effects during the Opponent’s Special Attacks.

Once per fight, when the Serpent would be knocked out, he has a 125.0% chance to consume all Dread to gain a Death Immunity Buff for 4.998932 seconds. This Buff cannot be Staggered or Nullified. For each Dread consumed, this effect recovers 1.3% Max Health per second.
While his Death Immunity Buff is active, the Serpent gains -1% of a Bar of Power per second.

cards.title: ANCIENT TERROR
lines: The Serpent was sealed away once. He does not intend to be sealed away twice. His primordial, non-magnetic armor grants Immunity to Power Lock, Special Lock, Heal Block, and Fate Seal effects, and prevents his Ability Power Rate from being reduced below 50.0% by non-Mystic Champions.
Adaptations from eons beneath the sea grant Immunity to Coldsnap and reduce the duration of incoming Bleed effects by -90.0%.
The Serpent’s Combat Power Rate is reduced by 30.0% and cannot be reduced further, and he reduces the potency of incoming Power Drain and Burn effects by 6000.0%.

At the start of each fight, gain a Power Gain Buff, granting 25.0% of Max Power over 8 seconds. When this Buff ends or fails to activate, it goes on cooldown for 8 seconds, after which it triggers again.
As a Defender, inflict a Fear Debuff for 10 seconds whenever the Opponent activates an Unblockable or Unstoppable effect, unless Fear is already active.

cards.title: DREAD - PERSISTENT CHARGE
lines: The Serpent starts each quest with 1 Persistent Dread. Winning a fight grants him 1 Dread. As a Defender, he starts with 300.0.
At the start of the fight, gain an indefinite Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by +40.0 for each Dread.
For each Dread, the Opponent’s Critical Penetration and the potency of incoming Instant Damaging effects from Champions are both reduced by -20.0%.

cards.title: CULFORCE CHARGES
lines: +1 Charge when one or more Personal Buffs end or are prevented by Ability Accuracy or Immunity.
+1 Charge when the Serpent's Power is Drained or Burned. Cooldown: 2 seconds.
+1 Charge the first time an Opponent Dodges back during each of the Serpent’s Special Attacks.
+1 Charge per Bar of Power spent when the Opponent is knocked down by a Special Attack, plus another if knocked into the wall.
-1 Charge when the Serpent is knocked down by a Special Attack, minus another if knocked into the wall.
As an Attacker in Battlegrounds, start with 400.0 charges.

cards.title: CHANNELING THE CULFORCE
lines: At 4+ charges, gain a 40.0 Resistance Up Passive.
At 8+ charges, gain a 20.0 Pierce Passive. While active, attacks that strike the Opponent or their Block while their back is to the wall deal a burst of Energy Damage equal to 10.0% of Attack.
At 12+ charges, attacks that cause Evade or Miss abilities to fail deal a burst of 20.0 Direct Damage, and striking the Opponent’s Block pauses personal Power Gains and Furies for 0.35 seconds.

Whenever the Serpent gains a Charge, he also gains a 40.0% Inexorable Passive for -1 seconds, plus 0.3 seconds per Charge. This effect does not trigger if already active and is removed when struck by a Special Attack.
Whenever the Serpent would gain one or more Charges while at max Charges, he instead gains a Fury Passive, increasing Attack by +20.0 for 60 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: On activation, gain an Unblockable Passive for 0.65 seconds. If the first hit breaks the Opponent’s block, the Unblockable is paused, and as an Attacker the potency of the Serpent's Instant damage is increased by 70.0% until the end of the Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a Fear Debuff for -1 seconds, unless already active.
Projectile hits inflict an instant Coldsnap dealing 25.0 Energy Damage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Projectile hits deal a burst of 65.0 Direct Damage, multiplied by 250.0% of the Opponent’s Armor Rating.
After this attack, gain a Power Gain Buff, granting 15.0% of Max Power over 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain a non-stacking Hour of the All-Father Passive, doubling all Culforce Charge and personal Fury gains for 40 seconds.
If the Fury Buff from Dread is not active or if an Aptitude or Intensify is active, reapply it.
If this attack deals 0 damage, gain a Power Gain Buff, granting 200.0 Bars of Power over 1 second.

synergy.note: When reaching 0 Rock Stacks, gain a Grit Passive for 8 seconds.

signature.title: UNBREAKABLE SPIRIT
lines: Thing activates Protection for the next 5 second(s), reducing all damage by 0.0%, plus +1.0% for each Rock Stack.
Once this ability finishes, it goes into cooldown and cannot be reactivated for 20 seconds.
Unbreakable Spirit will also trigger when Thing is Stunned.

Unbreakable Spirit will also trigger when the Opponent would deal 300.0% or more of their Attack Rating with a Basic Attack, or 300.0% or more of their Attack Rating with a Special Attack Hit. This trigger ignores the ability cooldown.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Immune to Bleed, Shock, Armor Break, Armor Shattered, Nullify, Stagger, and Fate Seal effects.
Generate 1 Rock Stack when Struck.
Generate 1 Rock Stack when Blocking a Hit.
Generate 4 additional Rock Stacks with a Well-Timed Block.
Thing removes 300.0 Rock Stack(s) when he would receive a Bleed. This can't occur more than once every 2 second(s).

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Rock Stacks last indefinitely, up to 1500.0 Stacks. Any additional Rock Stacks last for 5 seconds. Rock Stacks are capped at 20.
For each Rock Stack, Physical and Energy Resistance is increased by +6.0.
Whenever a Rock Stack is removed or the duration expires, Thing gains a permanent Passive Fury, granting +3.0 Attack. These Fury effects are capped at 60.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED
lines: When Thing is Hit and he has 15 or more Rock Stacks, he becomes Unstoppable for 5 second(s) and removes 300.0 Rock Stack(s) instead of generating any.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: If Thing has 15 or more Rock Stacks, he removes all Rock Stacks and this attack is Unblockable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: If Thing has 15 or more Rock Stacks, he removes all Rock Stacks and this attack is Unblockable.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Thing is Unblockable and Unstoppable for 8 second(s).
If Thing has 15 or more Rock Stacks, he removes all Rock Stacks and he gains a Passive Fury for 8 second(s), increasing his Attack by +40.0.
If Thing has 20 Rock Stacks, his Furies from removing Rock Stacks and from this attack are +100.0% stronger for 8 second(s).

synergy.note: When facing Cosmic champions, The Mighty Thor inflicts Degeneration effects instead of personal Shocks, which count as Shocks for her abilities.

signature.title: THAT WHICH SMASHES
lines: When Thor activates a Special Attack, she Nullifies one Power Gain or Fury Buff on the Opponent.
While Thor is suffering from 7+ Shock effects, the Opponent is inflicted with a -44.0% Wither Passive.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Thor has -100.0% Shock Resistance.
Thor’s energy is focused on herself. The potency of the Mystic Dispersion Mastery is reduced by -50.0%.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Charging a Heavy Attack after landing a non-Combo Ending Attack inflicts a Stun Passive for 0.75 seconds.
If the Opponent is Stunned, Thor’s Heavy Attack gains +20.0 Critical Rating for each personal Shock effect on her.
When Thor strikes the Opponent with a Heavy Attack, she inflicts 2 Stagger Passives for 10 seconds.

cards.title: SHOCKINGLY MIGHTY
lines: All of Thor’s Basic Attacks have a 40.0% chance to inflict her with a Shock Passive that deals no damage and lasts 15 seconds. Max stacks: -1.
When Thor Nullifies a Buff, she inflicts herself with one of these Shocks.
Thor gains +13.0 Attack Rating for each Shock effect she is suffering from, up to 25.
Whenever a Stagger effect on the Opponent expires, or a Buff on them is Nullified, Thor pauses her personal Shock Passives for 5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a 65.0% Fervor Passive for 20 seconds. Max stacks: -1.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: For each personal Shock on Thor, the final hit inflicts a Shock Debuff dealing 50.0 Energy Damage over 2 seconds. Then, consume all of Thor’s personal Shock Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Thor gains a Power Gain Passive granting 50.0% of Max Power over 15 seconds.
While this Power Gain is active, Thor gains 60.0% Critical Rating.

synergy.note: Unblockable hits Nullify 1 Buff from the Opponent.

signature.title: WARRIOR SPIRIT
lines: Start the fight with Primal Sense and Huntress Sense for 299.7 seconds.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: On Hit, inflict a non-stacking Passive Neutralize of -100.0% Potency for 2.5 second(s). If this Neutralize is already active, its duration is refreshed instead.
While the Opponent is Neutralized, if they fail to gain a Buff through Chance, inflict Rupture dealing 5.0 Physical Damage over 1 second(s). Cooldown 1 second(s).

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: While Charging a Heavy Attack and 0.1 seconds after launching a Heavy Attack, all non-contact hits from Special Attacks have a 100.0% chance to Miss.
If Tigra Interrupts the Opponent's Attack or causes them to Miss while charging this attack, each Hit inflicts Rupture dealing 50.0 Physical Damage over 18 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: If the Opponent is far away from Tigra at any point during a Special Attack she gains Unblockable for the next hit.
Landing an Unblockable strike inflicts Rupture dealing 50.0 Physical Damage over 8 seconds.

cards.title: FIGHTING NON-COSMIC CHAMPIONS
lines: If affected by Weakness, Slow, or Exhaustion Debuffs, prevent the activation of Tigra’s personal Miss and Unblockable effects.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, alternate between triggering Primal Sense and Huntress Sense. Senses last for 14 seconds. Duration is paused while the Opponent is Neutralized.
Primal Sense: Whenever inflicting Rupture, deal a burst of up to 85.0 Physical Damage based on the number of damaging Debuffs on the Opponent. This damage is increased by 100% during Special Attacks.
Huntress Sense: 10.0% chance for all non-contact attacks from Special Attacks to Miss. Whenever inflicting Rupture or causing the Opponent to Miss, generate 1000.0% of a bar of Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Each hit has a 10.0% chance to inflict Rupture dealing 85.0 Physical Damage over 4 seconds.
Each damaging Debuff on the Opponent increases the chance of inflicting Rupture during this Special Attack by a flat 10.0%.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain Primal Sense and Huntress Sense for 1400.0 seconds.
Inflict a non-stacking, indefinite Rupture dealing 5.0 Physical Damage every 0.5 seconds. This Rupture is removed and reapplied each time Tigra lands an Unblockable strike.

signature.title: GRUDGE MATCH
lines: Whenever Titania inflicts a stackable personal Debuff, she has a 9.9% chance to inflict it twice.
When fighting #L and #XL Opponents, Titania’s Fury potency is increased by 9.9%.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Titania is immune to Buffs. She doesn’t need your help.
+10.0 Physical Resistance.

cards.title: HAYMAKERS
lines: Performing a Dash, a second Medium Attack, or charging a Heavy Attack grants Titania Unblockable, Unstoppable, and Indestructible Passives for 4 seconds. 30 second cooldown.
While these effects are active, each hit deals a burst of 5.0 Physical Damage for each Debuff on the Opponent.

cards.title: ADDING INJURY TO INSULT
lines: Whenever the Opponent is inflicted with a Debuff, Titania gains a Fury Passive increasing Attack Rating by +10.0 for 15 seconds, and Haymakers’ cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
All of Titania’s Debuffs can be inflicted through Block.

cards.title: LIGHT ATTACKS
lines: Inflict a 5% Suppression Debuff for 2 seconds, paused during Titania’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The first hit inflicts a Stagger Debuff for 8 seconds.

If the first hit lands while Haymakers’ effects are active, the final hit inflicts an extra stack of Titania’s active personal Debuffs. If this attack is canceled into a Special Attack, the extra Debuffs are inflicted on the final hit of the Special instead.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: The first hit inflicts a non-stacking Debilitate Debuff, extending the duration of any new Debuffs by 50% for 30 seconds.
Each hit inflicts a Weakness Debuff, reducing Attack Rating by 5% for 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a non-stacking -20.0 Physical Vulnerability Debuff for 20 seconds. This Debuff is refreshed whenever the Opponent suffers 4 or more Suppression Debuffs.
Each hit inflicts a Weakness Debuff, reducing Attack Rating by 5% for 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Immediately activate Haymakers with +50% duration, ignoring their cooldown.
Inflict 30% potency Fatigue, Exhaustion, Decelerate, Disorient, Falter, Stifle, Wither, Petrify, Cowardice, and Intimidate Debuffs on the Opponent for 4 seconds.

synergy.note: 30% chance to inflict a non-stacking Disorient Debuff reducing Defensive Ability Accuracy and Block Proficiency by 50% for 8 seconds when a Poison expires.

Backing up to the left wall begins a 30 second timer. If the Opponent hits the right wall within that time, gain a +50% Fury Passive for 20 seconds. The timer cannot restart until it has failed or the Fury has ended.
Activating a Special Attack grants a non-stacking Vicious Buff increasing the potency of Damage Over Time Debuffs by 50% for 10 seconds.

signature.title: PARALYTIC RESINS
lines: When any Stun or personal Poison Debuff is Purified, Cleansed, or prevented by Immunity, gain an indefinite +2.0% Prowess Passive. Max stacks: -1.

When a personal Poison Debuff is prevented by Immunity, if Toad has 10 or more Prowess Passives, consume all personal Prowess Passives to inflict a Stun Passive for 3 seconds. This cannot be inflicted during the Opponent's Special Attacks.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Toad is Immune to Poison and his Regeneration Rate cannot be reduced below 100%.

cards.title: PARALYTIC POISON
lines: When a Skill Opponent Purifies or Cleanses a Paralytic Poison Debuff, Toad has a 70% chance to inflict a 80.0 Paralytic Poison Passive for 30 seconds. This base potency scales with Toad's Special Damage.
When Toad is struck, he has a 7.0% chance to inflict a Paralytic Poison Debuff. Being struck with a Critical Hit has a 40% chance.
When the Opponent Dashes forward or Dodges back, they Purify one of Toad's Paralytic Poison Debuffs. Cooldown: 2 seconds.

cards.title: TONGUE ATTACKS
lines: Toad attacks using his Prehensile Tongue on his Second Medium, Special 1, and Special 2 Attacks.
100% chance to inflict a Paralytic Poison Debuff on Contact.

cards.title: AT MAX PARALYTIC POISON DEBUFFS
lines: Convert all Paralytic Poison Debuffs into a 20.0 Paralytic Poison Passive for 8 seconds. This base potency scales with Toad's Special Damage.
If the Opponent is not in a Special Attack, inflict a Stun Passive for 3 seconds. When it ends or if it would be inflicted during a Special Attack, it goes on cooldown for 10.0 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: Each hit Purifies 1 Paralytic Poison Debuff on the Opponent to inflict an Instant Poison dealing a burst of 60.0 Direct Damage.

cards.title: PARALYTIC SECRETION - REGENERATION
lines: If Toad is struck while he is near a wall, he begins to secrete paralyzing toxins and gains a Regeneration Passive healing 500.0% of missing Health over 8 seconds. These heal an additional 1% of missing Health for every hit in the Opponent's Combo Meter, up to 15.

When Toad is struck by a Critical Hit, or inflicted with a Bleed or Incinerate effect, he has a 20.0% chance to gain a personal Regeneration. Against Skill Champions, this gains +50% flat Ability Accuracy.
When Toad gains his Regeneration, he gains an indefinite 85.0% Prowess Passive. Max Stacks: -1.
While his Regeneration is active, Toad's attacks have a 40.0% chance to inflict a Paralytic Poison Debuff on contact with the Opponent.
Toad's attacks pause his Regenerations for 0.5 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain a Paralytic Secretion Regeneration Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, inflict a Slow Passive for 30 seconds.
Each hit inflicts an Instant Poison dealing a burst of 50.0 Direct Damage. This base potency scales with Toad's Special Damage.
At the end of this attack, remove all personal Prowess Passives.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a 100.0 Paralytic Poison Passive for 25 seconds. This base potency scales with Toad's Special Damage.
Removes all personal Prowess Passives.

synergy.note: Each time the opponent uses a Special Attack they become Power Locked for 6 seconds.

signature.title: NANO-INHIBITORS
lines: For each Armor Up effect active, Ultron releases more Nano-Inhibitors, reducing his opponent's Offensive Ability Accuracy by 7.0% per stack.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: function Armor(70.0 Armor Rating Increase, 8 seconds, every 15.0% Health lost)
function Evade(every 7 seconds)

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: function Heal Block(remove all Poison effects, 1.5 seconds per Poison removed)

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: function Fury(25.0 attack increase, 6 seconds, every 5.0 attacks)

signature.title: NANO-INHIBITORS
lines: For each Armor Up effect active, Ultron releases more Nano-Inhibitors, reducing his opponent's Offensive Ability Accuracy by 7.0% per stack.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: function Armor(70.0 Armor Rating Increase, 8 seconds, every 15.0% Health lost)
function Evade(every 7 seconds)

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: function Heal Block(remove all Poison effects, 1.5 seconds per Poison removed)

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: function Fury(25.0 attack increase, 6 seconds, every 5.0 attacks)

signature.title: KING OF NEW ASGARD
lines: While Valkyrie has at least 403.0 Pierce effect(s) active (rounded up), she gains an indefinite Grit Passive, unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
While Valkyrie has at least 403.0 Bulwark effect(s) active (rounded up), she is immune to Stun Debuffs.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Valkyrie gains +1 Combo Meter when striking into an Opponent’s Block, as well as 1.1% of her Max Power.

When striking into her Opponent’s Block with 3 or more active Pierce effects, her mythical sword Dragonfang cuts through their defenses to inflict an instant Bleed dealing them 70.0 Direct Damage, scaling with her Block Penetration.
When afflicted by a Non-Damaging Debuff, Valkyrie’s conviction gives her up to a 90.0% chance to Purify it, scaling with her Block Proficiency.

Valkyrie starts the fight with an indefinite passive Combo Shield that, when struck, prevents her from losing Combo for 3 seconds before falling off. As a Defender, this Shield does not fall off when struck while below 11 Combo.
Increase hit damage by 1% for every 1% of Armor Penetration that exceeds the Opponent's combined Armor Rating and Resistances.

cards.title: COMBO METER
lines: Performing Valkyrie's Light Combo Ender inverts her Combo Gain. While inverted, any time the Combo Meter would increase or decrease by any amount, it changes by the opposite amount instead, excluding Combo lost when struck. This ability is unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
Performing her Medium Combo Ender reverts her Combo Gain back to normal. It is also reverted at any time her Combo is less than 3
Whenever Valkyrie's Combo Meter rises past a multiple of 10, she gains an indefinite Pierce Buff of 37.0 potency. Maximum of -1.
Whenever Valkyrie's Combo Meter drops past a multiple of 10, she gains an indefinite Bulwark Buff, granting 25.0 Block Proficiency. Maximum of -1.
When a Pierce or Bulwark Buff is replaced, consumed, or expires off of Valkyrie for any reason, she gains a Passive version of that Buff with double the original potency for 5 second(s).

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: The final hit of this attack consumes all of Valkyrie’s Pierce and Bulwark Buffs, and inflicts an Intimidate Debuff on the Opponent, making them more defensive and reducing their Block Proficiency by -20.0, and lasting 1.2 second(s) for each Buff consumed this way.
This attack grants Valkyrie no Power.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Combo Gained during this attack is doubled.

On activation, grants 300.0 dormant Evade charges. Max. -1. Hitting the Opponent’s Block with a Combo Ender or the final hit of a Special Attack activates one of the charges, allowing Valkyrie to passively Evade one attack within the next 1 second(s), after which the charge expires.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On Activation, gain a Fury Passive lasting 13 seconds and granting 25.0 Attack Rating for each active Pierce and Bulwark effect. Hits into the Opponent’s Block gain double this Attack Rating increase.
While this Fury is active, Valkyrie’s Pierce and Bulwark effects are paused.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflicts an Intimidate Debuff, making the Opponent more defensive and reducing their Block Proficiency by -40.0 for 10 second(s).
Valkyrie gains another of her personal Combo Shields and 300.0 dormant Evade charges.

synergy.note: On a Heavy Attack gain an Aptitude Buff, increasing the effect of Fury, Armor and Precision Buffs by 50% for 10 second(s). This effect has a 10 second(s) cooldown.

After a fight begins, receive a basic Headline prompt to complete within 7 seconds. Completing it pays out a Power Gain Passive, granting 25% of a Bar of Power over 8 seconds. Receive a new Headline 20 seconds after one ends.

signature.title: AGGRESSIVE SYMBIOSIS
lines: Rapid evolutionary changes to the Symbiote grant Venom an additional Genetic Memory Buff at the start of the fight, as well as a 34.9% chance to gain a third Buff to start the fight.
Venom’s Genetic Memory Buffs also gain 5.0% Potency.

cards.title: GENETIC MEMORY
lines: Venom has a Klyntar Mutation Buff that refreshes itself every 9 seconds. When this effect activates, a random Genetic Memory Buff is gained from the list below. If Venom becomes Incinerated, the Mutation Buff is Nullified. Max Genetic Memory Buffs: 700.0.
Resist Physical: 15.0 increased Physical Resistance.
Armor Up: 10.0 increased Armor Rating.
Cruelty: 70.0 increased Critical Hit Damage.
Precision: 20.0 increased Critical Rating.
Fury: 15.0 increased Attack rating.

cards.title: KLYNTAR BUFF
lines: Venom’s Klyntar Mutation Buff provides +15.0 Attack and gains additional properties based on Venom’s opponent.
Hero Champions: +15.0% Bleed Ability Accuracy.
Spider-Verse Heroes: All attacks ignore Passive Evade effects.
Tech Champions: Power Burn & Power Drain Immunity.

cards.title: OPPONENT BELOW 18% HEALTH
lines: Venom’s bloodlust grants him True Strike and Unblockable Special Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Venom is unleashed, converting all Genetic Memory Buffs into Fury Buffs, each increasing Attack by 22.0 for 12 seconds.

signature.title: SYMBIOSIS APOTHEOSIS
lines: Twisted mutations grant the Aberration effect 4.9% charge at the start of the fight, as well the following Special Attack enhancements:
+11.0% siphon damage during Special 1.
Toxic Armor gains +25.0% duration.
500.0% Aberration charge is gained after Special 3.

cards.title: ABERRATION EFFECT
lines: When the continuous Aberration effect hits 100%, it resets to 0% and a random Symbiote Buff from either category is gained.
Each non-unique Symbiote Buff beyond the first suffers a stacking 10% Potency penalty [Example: Symbiote Regen #5 will suffer --40.0% Potency compared to the first Symbiote Regen Buff].

cards.title: SYMBIOTE BUFFS
lines: Fury: +65.0 Attack for 12 seconds.
Precision: +20.0 Critical Rating for 12 seconds.
Power Rate: +50.0% Combat Power Rate for 12 seconds.

cards.title: SYMBIOTE BUFFS
lines: Armor Up: +40.0 Armor Rating for 12 seconds.
Regeneration: Recover 9.0 Health over 12 seconds.
Perfect Block: +25.0% Perfect Block Chance for 12 seconds.

cards.title: LAUNCH A SPECIAL ATTACK OR LAND A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: All Symbiote Buffs are removed and stored in the RNA Bank. 3 Symbiote Buffs may be added to the RNA Bank each fight, and up to 1000.0 Buffs may be stored during each quest. Buffs won’t be removed or stored if the per-Fight or per-Quest limits have been reached.

cards.title: FIGHT START
lines: All Symbiote Buffs stored in the RNA Bank are activated.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Each strike has a 85.0% chance to siphon an additional 6.0 health from the opponent as direct damage and feed it to the Aberration effect, gaining +10% charge.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: 75.0% chance to apply a Toxic Armor Buff to the opponent, increasing their Armor by 30.0 for 15 seconds. Striking an opponent that has Toxic Armor deals up to +800% additional direct damage based on how high the opponent’s Armor is.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: This attack does not lock Symbiote Buffs into the RNA Bank; instead, it activates all Symbiote Buffs locked in the RNA Bank.

synergy.note: When fighting Bleed immune Champions, when inflicting Bleeds, inflict a matching Degeneration instead.
Inflict a 50% Infuriate Passive while Venompool is outside striking distance and has 2 or more Bars of Power.
Illogical DNA grants Immunity to Incinerate effects.
Gain Special Lock immunity, and this immunity counts for his Illogical DNA ability.

signature.title: DON'T STOP EVOLVIN'
lines: Venompool begins each Quest with 1 Persistent Charge, which he can spend in the Pre-Fight Menu to select one Blender Buff as his Fav Food for the next fight. The Fav Food is more likely to be chosen at random and gains +9.0% Potency.
Each time Venompool enters a fight, he gains his Persistent Charge back.

cards.title: COOKIN’ METER
lines: Venompool has a Cookin’ Meter which begins at 5000.0 Charges and gains 10.0 more Charges every 5 second(s).
Attacks from either Champion grants 400.0 Charges.
Each time the Cookin’ Meter hits 100, that amount is spent to grant a random, unique, indefinite “Blender Buff” which can be found at the bottom of the info page.

cards.title: ILLOGICAL DNA
