Inflict a Fear Debuff for 40 seconds.

synergy.note: Knocking down the Opponent grants a non-stacking +100 Cruelty Buff for 6 seconds.
Gaining a Bar of Power grants a Fury Buff, increasing Attack Rating by 20% for 10 second(s).
Last Hit of Special 2 inflicts a Slow Debuff for 10 second(s).
When neutralizing the Opponent Wiccan also inflicts a Tracking Debuff, bypassing the effects of Miss for the duration of the Neutralize.

signature.title: SPELL MASTERY
lines: Resistance Up also allows Wiccan to block Unblockable attacks from Cosmic Champions.
Incinerate effects have a 5.0% chance to not consume Shock Debuffs when creating a Plasma.
If the Opponent is Shock Immune, Shocks turn into Degeneration with the same Potency and Duration, but counts as Shocks for Wiccan's other abilities.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: Wiccan uses magic on his Basic attacks, causing them to deal Energy Damage instead of Physical.
Physical Resistance decreased by --30.0.
Immunity to Reversed Controls and Armor Break due his mastery of the Arcane Arts.
When struck by True Damage, instantly gain +40.0% of the Power gained from the Hit.
If inflicted with a Concussion or Disorient Debuff from a Science Champion, one Personal Passive or Debuff caused by Wiccan is removed.

cards.title: CANTRIPS
lines: When Well-Timed Blocked, inflicts a non-stacking Neutralize Debuff of -100.0% Potency that lasts for 10 second(s).

When the Opponent's ability fails due to reduced Ability Accuracy or Wiccan’s personal Immunities, inflict an Incinerate Debuff, reducing Block Proficiency by 50% and dealing 60.0 Energy Damage over 10 second(s).

cards.title: SPELLS
lines: Cast a Spell by performing a specific action. As a Defender Wiccan casts a Spell every 10 second(s) following the order below, but this timer resets and moves to the next Spell in order when Wiccan is knocked down, and pauses on his Specials.
Shield (Dash back and hold block for 1.2 second(s)): Gain a 20.0 Resistance Up Passive for 10 second(s). Max 3 Stacks.
Flame (Medium, Light, Light, Light, Medium): Inflicts an Incinerate Passive, reducing Block Proficiency by 50% and dealing 60.0 Energy Damage over 10 second(s).
Silence (Medium, Light, Light, Light, Light): Inflicts a non-stacking Neutralize Passive of -100.0% Potency that lasts for 5 second(s).

Arcane Theft (Heavy): Gain a Power Gain Passive, granting 1.0% of Max power over 10 second(s). Nullifies up to one Fury, Precision, or Power Gain Buff off the Opponent to increase the potency of the Power Gain Passive to 500.0%.
Pause all active Spells and Debuffs for 6 second(s) when casting a Spell that does not exist or activating a Special Attack.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation gain a Regeneration Buff, recovering 7.0% of missing Health over 6 second(s). Recovers 100.0% of missing health caused by Energy Damage from Bursts and damaging Debuffs.
Last 2 hits cast the last casted Spell with duration increased by 800.0 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: All hits inflict a Shock Debuff, dealing 80.0 Energy Damage over 15 second(s). Inflicting an Incinerate into a Shock, or vice versa, will fuse those two effects into a Plasma that has the property of both, lasting 6.0 second(s). Plasmas do not pause.

Last hit grants a non-stacking Power Efficiency Buff of -30.0% Potency, lasting for 3 second(s) plus 3 second(s) per unique Spell active at the beginning of the Special, and pauses during Specials. As a Defender this Buff always lasts 20.0 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict an Energy Vulnerability Debuff, reducing Energy Resistance by -65.0 for 20 second(s).

signature.title: BOUNDLESS RAGE
lines: Berserk Rage’s Cooldown Duration decreases by 200.0 second(s).
Start each Fight with a Regeneration Buff granting up to 7.5 Health based on the number of Rage Charges Weapon X ended the last fight with, up to 25.

cards.title: PASSIVE
lines: Immune to All types of Regeneration Rate Modification except due to Poison.
The Potency of all Bleed Effects is reduced by -50.0%

cards.title: RAGE
lines: Weapon X gains a Rage Charge each time he’s Struck, one of his Abilities fails to trigger due to Chance, or a Debuff is Purified off the Opponent.
Gaining Rage Charges as well as all of the Berserk Rage Effects are unaffected by Ability Accuracy Reduction.
At 2500.0 Rage Charges Weapon X snaps and enters a Berserk Rage lasting until his Rage Counters reach 0.
Upon entering Berserk Rage Weapon X goes Unstoppable for 4 seconds.
As long as he’s Berserk, and not Unstoppable, Weapon X’s Rage falls off one at a time, falling off faster the longer he’s been Berserk.
After Weapon X’s Berserk Rage ends all of its associated effects immediately end, and Weapon X cannot gain Rage Charges for 20 seconds.

cards.title: BERSERK RAGE EFFECTS
lines: Weapon X gains the following bonuses while in Berserk Rage:
Gain +100.0 Attack.
100.0% Chance when Struck to gain a Regeneration Passive healing 100.0% of the Hit Damage taken, over 5 seconds.
100.0% Chance when Struck to gain a Fury Passive granting +150.0 Attack, for 5 seconds. Max: 1 Stack.
Immune to All Stun Effects.
All Attacks become Unblockable.

cards.title: ATTACK MISSED OR EVADED
lines: Gain +200.0 Rage Charges.
100.0% chance to go Unstoppable for 1 seconds.

cards.title: WHEN ATTACKED
lines: While not in a Berserk Rage 50.0% Chance when Struck to gain a Regeneration Passive healing 40.0% of the Hit Damage taken, over 5 seconds.

cards.title: WHEN CHARGING A HEAVY ATTACK
lines: If Weapon X has any Rage Charges he gains a Passive Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds, then going on Cooldown for 1000.0 seconds.

cards.title: HEAVY ATTACKS
lines: If below 1000.0 Rage Charges double current Rage Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACKS
lines: Gain +5 Rage Charges.
If at or above 1500.0 Rage Charges, go Berserk.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: While Berserk gain +50.0 Attack.
100.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 100.0 Direct Damage over 5 seconds.
If this attack doesn’t Hit gain +500.0 Rage Charges.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: While Berserk each Hit pauses Rage fall off for 1 second(s).
If triggered while not Berserk gain up to +75.0 Attack based on Rage.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Gain Rage Charges up to 2500.0 and then go Berserk.
100.0% chance to inflict Bleed, dealing 100.0 Direct Damage over 15 seconds.

signature.title: MORE THAN JUST AN ANIMAL
lines: While a Skill Opponent is suffering from 8 or more personal Bleed or Rupture effects, activating a Special Attack or inflicting Eviscerating Stun inflicts a Marked Passive for 5 seconds.
When Laura is inflicted with a Bleed effect, she has a 0.0% chance to gain a personal Regeneration Passive.
Increase personal Vicious potency by 0.0%.

cards.title: BORN TO KILL
lines: Laura’s healing factor prevents her Regeneration Rate from being reduced below 100% and lowers the duration of incoming Bleed effects by 90.0% and Poison effects by 60%. However, her Critical Penetration is reduced by 30.0% flat.

Against Skill Champions, Laura’s Parry Mastery inflicts a Stun Passive instead, lasting for 1.5 seconds. For each rank invested in the Petrify Mastery, this Stun Passive reduces the Opponent's Regeneration and Combat Power Rates by 10%.

Performing an Intercept or Punishing the Opponent’s Special Attacks grants Laura a Pursuit Passive for 4 seconds, or 800.0 seconds against Skill Champions. This is paused during Laura’s Special Attacks. Hits that grant Pursuit cannot be Evaded.
The Wolverine Relic grants +10.0 Critical Rating while Laura has a Regeneration effect active.

cards.title: CELLULAR REGENERATION
lines: When Laura is struck, she has a 15.0% chance to gain a Regeneration Passive healing 15.0% of missing Health over 16 seconds. Max stacks: -1. As a Defender, these heal 3% of missing Health instead.
After knocking down her Opponent, Laura stands still for 1.4 seconds. If she does not perform an action before this ends, she consumes -1 Frenzy to gain a personal Regeneration Passive.

cards.title: FRENZY
lines: Laura builds up Frenzy throughout the fight by performing the following actions:
Striking the Opponent grants Laura 200.0 Frenzy. Striking the Opponent with a Pursuit effect active grants -1 Frenzy instead.
Dodging a Special Attack hit grants 400.0 Frenzy. Cooldown: 0.3 seconds.
Frenzy rapidly falls off after not gaining Frenzy for 2.6 seconds. It cannot fall off during Special Attacks, while hitting the Opponent’s Block, or while Laura’s Striker is active.
Gain up to +79.0 Critical Rating based on Frenzy, maxing at 100 Frenzy.

cards.title: LACERATING CRITICAL HITS
lines: Laura’s Critical Hits lacerate her Opponents, inflicting a 32.0 Bleed Passive for 12 seconds. All personal Damaging effects scale with Base Attack only but are affected by Class relationships.
If a non-Tech Opponent is Immune to one of these Bleeds, Laura changes her fighting style to instead inflict Rupture Passives, copying personal Bleed behavior but with 30.0% reduced potency.

cards.title: TAPPING INTO INSTINCTS
lines: As an Attacker, Laura’s fourth Light Attack while over 100 Frenzy inflicts an Eviscerating Stun Passive for 3 seconds. For every -1 Frenzy above 100, this duration is increased by 20.0 seconds. All Frenzy is consumed at the end of this Stun.

During Eviscerating Stun, Laura can rapidly perform Light Attacks. If the Opponent is suffering from a Bleed or Rupture effect, each Light Attack inflicts a matching Instant effect dealing a burst of 1.8 damage for each active matching effect.

Additionally, during Eviscerating Stun, the Opponent is locked in place, Laura cannot activate Strikers or Special Attacks, and her Combat Power Rate is reduced by -75.0%. Performing any action that is not a Light Attack ends Eviscerating Stun early.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: Personal Bleed, Rupture, and Cruelty effects are paused during this Special Attack and for 5 seconds after.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: On activation, gain a non-stacking 20.0% Vicious Passive for 10 seconds, paused during the Opponent’s Special Attacks. While active, Critical Hits inflict an additional personal Bleed Passive.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Consume all Frenzy to grant Laura a +25.0 Cruelty Passive for every 20.0 Frenzy consumed for 8 seconds. Max stacks: -1. These expire one at a time.

synergy.note: While Virtue of Valtorr is active, apply Incinerates instead of Energy Damage, for 4 second(s). Max Stacks: 5.

signature.title: MASTERY OF THE MYSTIC ARTS
lines: Wong can now select which Mandala he will start with in the Pre-Fight Menu.
At the start of the match, Wong will cast an enhanced Spell based on his Pre-fight Ability. It lasts 1 second(s) and cannot be removed by Wither, but still counts towards his total Spell count.
Wong’s Mastery over the Mystic Arts allows him to instantly Nullify Indestructible and Immortality Buffs on non-Science Opponents, when Nullified, Opponents receive a burst of 20.0 Energy Damage.

cards.title: MYSTIC ART MANDALAS
lines: Wong’s Tao Mandalas allow him to cast Eldritch Spells. Mandalas cycle: Orange, Green, Blue.
On Attack: Wong’s Fourth Light Attack will move the active Mandala forward by one.
On Defense: Wong’s active Mandala will rotate every 8 second(s). This timer is paused during Wong’s Special Attacks.

cards.title: ELDRITCH SPELLS
lines: Wong can cast Eldritch Spells, which are Passive and last 14 second(s). Spells can be stacked up to 3 times and are paused during Special Attacks and Wong’s Heavy Attacks.
Orange - Bastion of Balthakk. Wong increases his Physical Resistance by 32.5 and Wong’s basic attacks give him 1 Eldritch Energy on hit, even through Block.

Green - Absorption of Watoomb. When Wong deals Energy Damage he instantly Regenerates 2% of damage dealt. When dealt Energy Damage, Regenerate 25% of the damage over 1 second(s) and gain 4 Eldritch Energy. Cannot trigger while still active.
Blue - Virtue of Valtor. Hitting the Opponent will deal a Burst of 20.0 Energy Damage. Also, whenever the Opponent gains a Buff, Wong will go Unstoppable for 2 second(s) and gain 4 Eldritch Energy.
If Wong is inflicted by a Wither Debuff with at least one spell active, he will consume up to 1 of each type of spell to Purify the Debuff.

cards.title: ELDRITCH ENERGY
lines: Wong builds 100.0 Eldritch Energy every second, except during Special Attacks, doubled against Cosmic Champions. For every Spell active, Wong gains an additional 100.0 Eldritch Energy per second up to a maximum of 5 per second.

Charging a Heavy Attack grants a Power Gain Passive, generating 175.0% of a bar of Power per second. This Power Gain consumes Eldritch Energy over time and is removed when Wong runs out of Eldritch Energy or releases his Heavy Attack.
Charging Heavy Attack also grants an Unstoppable Passive for 2 second(s), paused while Charging. 6 second cooldown.

If Wong gets hit by a Light or Medium Attack while at max Eldritch Energy, he will unleash all Eldritch Energy to deal a burst of 160.0 Energy Damage. Hitting Wong with a Heavy Attack above 90 Eldritch Energy will remove all of it without unleashing it.

cards.title: SACRIFICE FOR YOUR SANCTUM
lines: If Wong is defeated with more than one Bar of Power, he will place a Cross-fight Spell on the Champion that defeated him, causing their next Opponent to gain the following at the start of the next fight.
Power Gain - Generate 1 Bar of Power over 4 second(s).
Fury - Gain 35.0% increased Attack Rating for 12 second(s).

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, Wong casts an Eldritch Spell associated with his currently active Mandala.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: Increases Attack Rating by 62.0 for each Spell currently active. The last 2 hits of this Special deal Energy Damage.
If Wong is Unstoppable due to charging his Heavy Attack, this attack becomes Unblockable.
Refreshes the duration of all active Spells.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Wong applies a Fate Seal Debuff on the opponent on the final hit, Nullifying all Buffs and preventing the Opponent from gaining Buffs for 3 second(s). This duration gets extended by 1 second for every Spell currently active.
Refreshes the duration of all active Spells. If no spells are currently active, cast one of each Spell.

synergy.note: While the Opponent is suffering from a Bleed Vulnerability Debuff, they are also inflicted with a non-stacking 25% Sabotage Debuff. This Sabotage deals Direct Damage by inflicting Yelena’s Instant Bleed.

signature.title: COVER ALL CONTINGENCIES
lines: While Yelena is in Observation mode, her target’s Critical Damage Rating is capped at 91.0% of what it was at the start of the fight.
While Yelena is in Elimination Mode, her target cannot Evade or cause attacks to Miss. No effect against Mutant Champions.

cards.title: ENDURE THE RED ROOM
lines: Yelena is Immune to Poison effects.
At the start of each fight, Yelena gains an indefinite Combo Shield Passive and a -35.0% Endurance Passive. These Passives are unaffected by Ability Accuracy reductions.

cards.title: TRAIN TO STRIKE
lines: Yelena can land Critical Hits through her target’s Block.
Critical Hits inflict an Instant Bleed dealing a burst of 21.3 Direct Damage.
If this Instant Bleed is prevented by an Immunity, deal a burst of 28.0 Direct Damage.

cards.title: OBSERVE THE TARGET
lines: Yelena starts each fight in Observation Mode. While being attacked, she caps her target's Attack Rating at 60.0% of what it was at the start of the fight. While Yelena is suffering from a Daunted effect, this cap becomes 100.0%.
While Observation Mode is active, Yelena gains:
+1 Combo Meter each time the Defender is struck by or Blocks a Basic Attack, or +400.0 if the attack was an Intercept.
+1000.0 Combo Meter each time the Defender is knocked down.
+5000.0 Combo Meter the first time the Defender is brought below 50% Health during any Basic Attack.

cards.title: ELIMINATE THE TARGET
lines: When Yelena’s Combo Meter reaches 100+, she switches from Observation to Elimination Mode after 10 seconds. Activating a Special Attack ends this timer early. When Yelena’s Combo Meter falls below 500.0, she switches back to Observation Mode.
While Elimination Mode is active:
Yelena loses -500.0 Combo Meter each time either Champion is struck by or Blocks a Basic Attack.
All of Yelena’s attacks are Guaranteed Critical Hits.
Yelena’s personal abilities are unaffected by Ability Accuracy.
When Yelena would be struck by a Light or Heavy Attack, she executes a Reversal, inflicts 400.0 Instant Bleeds, then loses 15 Combo Meter.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, gain an Impact Passive increasing Block Penetration by 45.0 for 10 seconds.
Observation: While this Impact is active, Yelena gains +500.0 Combo Meter each time she hits her target’s Block.
Elimination: While this Impact is active, Yelena can execute a Reversal against Medium Attacks.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: The final hit inflicts a non-stacking Disarm Passive for 15 seconds. This can be inflicted through Block.
Observation: Inflicting Disarm grants +5000.0 Combo Meter.
Elimination: Inflicting Disarm refreshes all Bleed Vulnerability effects then pauses them for 8 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 3
lines: Inflict a Critical Bleed Passive dealing 150.0 Direct Damage multiplied by Yelena’s Critical Damage Multiplier over 12 seconds. This Bleed starts paused for 12 seconds if Yelena’s target is Indestructible or below 5% Max Health.

signature.title: CENTAURIAN ARCHERY
lines: Yondu’s high-octave vocal range gives him precise control over his Yaka Arrows. For each Debuff on the Opponent, they are inflicted with a 15.0% Weakness Debuff when they activate a Special Attack for 5 seconds.

cards.title: ALWAYS ACTIVE
lines: For each Debuff on the Opponent, they suffer --10.0% Combat Power Rate. Max: -50.0%.
Yondu’s Fin stabilizes his head, granting Immunity to incoming Concussion Debuffs when fighting against Mutant Champions.

cards.title: YAKA ARROW
lines: Yondu’s Yaka Arrow attacks are non-contact, have +25.0 Armor and Block Penetration, as well as the following:
100.0% chance to inflict a Rupture Debuff dealing 120.0 Physical Damage over 7 seconds. Max stacks: -1. If the Opponent has 4 or more unique Buffs, this potency is reduced by half.
If these Ruptures are prevented by Immunity, inflict a -15.0 Armor Break Debuff for 9 seconds.
The strength and precision of Yondu’s Yaka Arrow allow it to trigger Critical Hits and personal Abilities through the opponent’s Block.

cards.title: ALL ATTACKS
lines: 35.0% chance to Pilfer 100.0 Armor Up Buff.
60.0% chance to Invalidate 100.0 Prowess effect.
For each Armor Up Pilfered or Prowess Invalidated, gain an Armor Up Buff, granting +40.0 Armor Rating for 15 seconds.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 1
lines: On activation, inflict a non-stacking -60.0% Stifle Debuff for 10 seconds.
The final hit inflicts a Heal Block Debuff for 20 seconds. If the Opponent has a Regeneration effect, instead inflict a 3000.0 second Debuff.

cards.title: SPECIAL ATTACK 2
lines: This attack gains +25.0 Block Penetration.
On activation, gain a +45.0 Fury Passive for 24 seconds. Yondu gains an extra Fury for each Special Attack the Opponent has used since the fight started. Max stacks: -1.
